title: Cryptogram
description:
This game is for people who do not just look at letters but see the meaning behind them.
Each phrase hides a thought that can be revealed if you use logic, intuition and persistence.

title: Super Dog Hero Dash
description: Super Dog Hero Dash is an interesting 3D running game with endless adventure and fun! You’ll become a brave dog hero running through a colorful city in this cartoonish world. Begin exciting challenges across various platforms!

title: Geometry Vertical
description: In Poligon Dash - Geometry, you find yourself entangled in an adrenaline-fueled run against time and various geometric obstacles. This game offers a dynamic mix of speed, calculations, and precision. With each level being a new challenge filled with exciting twists and turns, your journey to the finish line will keep you on your toes

title: Gladiators. Merge and Fight
description: Gladiators: Merge and Fight is an engaging arcade game that combines character attribute creation and enhancement with combat. In this game, you start with basic materials and improve your gladiator's attributes by upgrading weapon, shield, armor, and helmet materials. Every decision affects your hero's stats. After preparing your gladiator, press the "Start" button to begin the second part of the game: arena battles.

title: LampHead
description: The main character of this game is an amazing man with a lamp instead of a head who needs to get out of a dark and dangerous strange place at any cost. Are you ready to prove that you have an outstanding reaction, maneuvering between sharp obstacles, collecting bonuses, remembering that at the end of each dark path the light of victory awaits you? We are ready to offer you a one-time runner in which tedious jumps are replaced by moving the main character between two equal planes.

title: Little Commander. Red vs Blue
description: Build and develop your camp! Upgrade your army. Reds versus Blues! Command squads, build tanks and vehicles! Lead a crowd of soldiers! Lead them into battle! Attack and defend! You are the leader, the little commander! Get on the tank and into the battle

title: Tanks Merge: Tank War Blitz
description:
Embark on an armored adventure in Tanks Merge: Tanks to Attack on the Blitz! -
a strategy game where steel giants dominate the world.
Immerse yourself in a casual yet addictive tank simulation game
designed for those who love war machines and inventive tactics.
Have a blitz rumble and defeat all the bosses!
Your mission: control a fleet of tanks, each unique in design and
to defeat enemies and all bosses on the battlefield.

title: Little master of assembly
description: The gameplay of this game is puzzle assembly type, mainly according to the room suggested by the picture, according to the objects in the room, the use of parts to splice the room objects

title: ROYAL COIN RUSH
description: Drag adjacent coins to swap them, and line up three or more vertically or horizontally to remove them. Special coins appear when 4 or more coins are matched. Mix effects by combining special items! The stage is cleared when all the target coins are erased.

title: Farm Triple Match
description:
Looking for a fun tile-matching puzzle game? Try Farm Triple Match, a fresh take on tile-matching for puzzle lovers! This mahjong-inspired game is easy to learn but offers exciting challenges.
Beat levels and build your own farm with cute animals and a lovely garden.
Classic gameplay with a modern twist for relaxing brain training.
Explore a variety of tiles featuring fruits, veggies, animals, and more.
Use boosters to conquer tough puzzles and keep progressing. No time limits—play anytime!

title: Cyberpunk: Corporation
description:
The corporation takes control of the city. You are the only one who can fight back and free the inhabitants.
Enlist the support of local residents by completing their tasks. Activate the robot and break through the defense line.

title: Survival Sword Battle
description: Survival Sword Battle throws you into a ruthless sword-fighting free-for-all battle where a single hit means defeat. Fight to unlock all 10 character evolutions and boost your speed with each upgrade. Can you dominate the leaderboard and survive the longest?

title: Texas Holdem Poker
description: Players compete for winning combinations of cards using their skills and intuition. The game has the ability to bet, bluff and recognize the bluff of other players. Players can choose different difficulty levels and customize their own game rules. The unique interface design and realistic atmosphere allow you to immerse yourself in the world of card games and enjoy the excitement anytime and anywhere.

title: The Bodyguard
description: Players will have to save the future boss. You will have to take control of a bodyguard. The bodyguard is forced to protect the boss with his body, whom they are trying to attack. The main task is to save the boss.

title: Extreme Real Car Driving 2025
description: This ultimate car racing 3D lets you experience real car driving simulator like highway racing with its realistic car damage, accurate car driving physics and many other features. Car driver may use steering wheel, accelerator meter or buttons to control the car. Enjoy the best car driving simulator game and drag racing game that has an addictive game play with endless fun. Now you can modify your any sports race cars from garage according to your interest.

title: Ink Inc Tattoo
description: Ink Inc Tattoo is a free online simulation game for boys played on PuzzleGame. In the game, you can experience the satisfaction of a tattoo artist drawing various artistic tattoos for clients. You need to draw the correct lines and colors to complete the image given by the customer. Mobile, Tablet, and Desktop are playable. Come and get a new entertainment experience.

title: Find Sort Match
description: Find Sort Match is a fun and creative puzzle that combines sort and match elements. Let you experience the joy of DIY! In the game, sort and match items of various shapes, colors, and types. And complete each level of the challenge.

title: Farm Mahjong 3D
description: Have you ever imagined playing your favorite 3D mahjong game in a farm setting? Mahjong 3D Farm does just that! It brings the popular Mahjong 3D game into the charming world of farms, filled with adorable animals, crops, and farming tools for you to match! So why wait? Play Mahjong 3D Farm Connect now and solve the puzzle amidst the fields!

title: Draw And Escape
description: Car Games: Draw And Escape is a collection of parking puzzle games and drawing puzzle games. Draw Bridge requires you to draw a line across a defined area to help the yellow car to the finish line. When you meet the steps, you can also draw bridges to build a track to the finish line. Use your creativity to design the perfect path to win! Parking Jam 2d requires you to help all cars out of the parking lot smoothly and pay attention to the order of cars, to prevent traffic accidents.

title: Lady Pool
description: We are glad to welcome you to the bright world of a humorous dress-up game where fashion collides with the comic book universe! Get ready for a creative reinterpretation of your favorite comic book anti-hero costumes: bold color combinations, unexpected prints and fun accessories are available to you. There is everything here: from funny hats that emphasize individuality to stylish superhero jumpsuits. Unleash your imagination!

title: Hazmob FPS
description: Hazmob FPS is an intense first-person shooter that blends tactical depth with fast-paced action. Players engage in strategic, team-based battles across diverse maps, utilizing customizable loadouts and a variety of game modes. With its dynamic gameplay mechanics, realistic graphics, and competitive ranked play, Hazmob FPS challenges players to master their skills, coordinate with teammates, and outwit opponents in a visually immersive and constantly evolving environment.

title: Block Stacking
description: Block Stacking is a very fun, leisure, and pressure-relieving game. The game is very delicate and fresh. In the game, you will play by combining many different fruits. As long as you can complete the target tasks, you will have a chance to get rewards! By eliminating the fruits on the screen, you can successfully pass the level. It's extremely easy to operate, which makes you feel very addicted. Come and try the game!

title: Nuts & Bolts Wood Puzzle Game
description: Discover the fun of Nuts & Bolts Game: Wood Puzzle, a challenging and enjoyable puzzle game perfect for anyone who loves using their brain. If you're into puzzles, this game with its nuts and bolts twist will keep you happy.

title: My Parking Lot
description: Welcome to "My Parking Lot," the ultimate puzzle challenge! Navigate through a chaotic mess of cars stuck in a parking lot and strategize to safely remove each vehicle without crashing them into each other. Your goal? Clear the parking lot by guiding all the cars to the exit, unlocking new levels as you master the art of precision parking. Can you untangle the traffic and solve each puzzle with finesse? Test your skills in "My Parking Lot" now!

title: Superwings Subway
description:
Explore with ASTRA:
Cross the space dodging all kinds of obstacles with Astra. Move along three rails dodging, jumping or passing under all kinds of traps and avoid meteorites.
Be careful, the rails are incomplete and you can fall into the void.

title: Pet Connect Match
description: Pet Connect Match is an interesting matching game, in this game, you need to connect the same pets to eliminate all of them.  There are many different modes you can choose, you can pass levels, challenge time mode or just play without any limit. Have a good time!

title: GT Cars City Racing
description: GT Cars City Racing is a driving game with a fantastic open world, epic stunts and magnificent super stylized cars! The game, which brings many innovations and game-play to its previous series GT Cars Mega Ramps, has different surprises waiting for you in its 2nd series. The open world, which is especially demanded by the players, was designed as a Toy City. Incredible shows in the Toy City offer a dazzling game-play experience and never-ending action!

title: Puzzles Balls Merge the New Year!
description: ● This New Year's game is more difficult than it might seem ?! You have a playing field? on which you need to throw balls and connect the same ones??! Until you get the biggest and most beautiful one?! Save up points?! Compete with friends and colleagues to become the best?! Enjoy your game?!

title: Block Blast! - Block Puzzle Master
description:
Drop the blocks to create vertically or horizontally lines of blocks without gaps. When such a line is created, it gets destroyed. Keep your board clear and keep your cool as things heat up in this simple but addictive puzzle game!

Simple but addictive puzzle game!

"Block Puzzle" is a fun and classic block game!
And our Block Puzzle is not just that. It is more Simple and addictive! Once you start, you will not stop playing. Just have a try, you will love it!

title: Stellar Fusion
description:
Enter the captivating universe of Celestia —
As the stellar Alchemist, you alone possess the power to restore cosmic balance. Manipulate essences represented by vibrant tiles and solve intricate puzzles to restore balance in Stellar Fusion!

title: Transformers Battle For The City
description:
In this game you will find an open world where you will defend the city from the invasion of robots. If you are a fan of transformers, then you will definitely like this game. 
In the game you will find 7 full-fledged story tasks, the complexity of which will gradually increase. After receiving the task, you will go to the place of military operations, where you can use various super-techniques to destroy powerful robot villains.

title: Plants Vs Zombies War
description: Plants Vs Zombies War is based on the famous PC game called Plants VS Zombies. This tower-defense strategy game needs your plans to fight against 15 kinds of incoming zombies. You can check the consumption and attack of all of your 15 plants before the battle. Then the tutorial will show the basic rules and plants at Level 1. The more levels you complete, the more plants you can unlock. You could also unlock them from ads in advance.

title: Halloween Challenge
description: Get ready for a spooky adventure in Halloween Challenge! Bats are flying through the night, carrying candy that you must protect. Your mission? Tap the bats before they escape with the sweet treats. But beware, if even one bat escapes, the game is over! With simple controls and addictive gameplay, Halloween Challenge offers a fun and fast-paced experience for players. Test your reflexes, compete for high scores, and enjoy the eerie Halloween atmosphere. How long can you defend the candy?

title: Xmas Presents Mahjong
description: Match three of the same tiles. Click on a tile to move it to the collection spots at the bottom. If you have collected three of the same tiles there, they will be removed.

title: Truck Stack Colors
description: Get ready for an exciting challenge. Truck Stack Colors takes you into a wonderful world of parkour and truck stacking. In attractive levels, advance by stacking platforms that are the same color as the truck. To master the balancing and stacking skills to build amazing truck towers and climb even higher.

title: Gemstone Glam
description: Welcome to the fabulous world filled with sparkling gems! Here you will meet two princess girlfriends who adore fashionable outfits and the glitter of colorful stones in fashionable outfits. Try on dresses inspired by the radiance of a diamond, the passion of a ruby, the freshness of an emerald and the mystery of an amethyst. Create shining combinations of hairstyles, dresses and accessories to transform young princesses into real fashion queens. Feel like a real stylist of the jewelry kingdom!

title: Super Sniper Missions
description: Are you ready to experience an exciting first-person shooter game, Super Sniper Missions gives you an addictive shooting experience. You travel through various cities as a sniper who upholds the city's justice. Your mission is to kill the criminals within a limited time while keeping the hostages safe. Unlock and collect M74, 98K, and other sniper rifles, join us Save the hostages, and become the army's top sniper!

title: Italian Brainrot Clicker
description: Italian Brainrot Clicker is a hilarious one-button idle clicker that throws you into the chaotic charm of the Italian Brainrot universe. Fueled by Gen-Z meme culture and AI-generated madness, this game unleashes a world of mutant creatures and meme-fueled mayhem. From dancing cappuccinos to cactus-bodied elephants, every tap pulls you deeper into a spiral of satire and brainrot. It is weird, it is wild, and it is wonderfully addictive. You will not believe what you are unlocking next!

title: Doomsday Tower Defense
description:
Survive the zombie apocalypse in this fast-paced 2D top-down tower defense game. Construct and upgrade various defensive turrets to take down hordes of undead attackers.

Earn coins by killing zombies and use them to purchase new towers, upgrade existing ones, or sell for cash and reinvest into a different turret.

Defend your base from waves of shambling corpses as you fight to stay alive in a world gone mad.

title: Boolu Bask
description: Dunk Ball game is an exciting sports-based game that brings the thrills of basketball right to your device. The focus of the game is on scoring points by aiming each ball into the moving basket. Show off your agility, precision, and timing as you handle each ball with finesse and drop them into the basket for maximum points.

title: Frog.io
description: Frog io is a 2D PvP game where players control frogs battling for dominance. Use your frog's tongue to devour other players and grow bigger and stronger! As you explore the map, eat fruits and enemy frogs to boost your size and power. But beware other players are after you too! Outsmart them, grow massive, and become the top frog in this dynamic and competitive io game.

title: Bouncy Blob Race: Obstacle Course
description: Bouncy Blob Race: Obstacle Course is an exciting physics-based racing game. Guide a bouncy blob through challenging obstacles with just one click. The blob will move in the opposite direction of the thrust. Maneuver through the course and beat your opponent to the finish line. Grab power-ups for an extra boost and secure victory in this thrilling race!

title: Dino Hide N Shoot
description: Do you want to begin a fun dinosaur-themed shooting game in Dino Hide N Shoot? Play a brave gunman on an exciting adventure! In this game, you will constantly run to avoid the attack of dinosaurs.And pick up the bullets, accumulate enough firepower. Pay attention to using the box as cover,seize the moment to shoot at the dinosaur! The gameplay is simple yet challenging.

title: Obby Climb Racing
description: In the adventure game Obby Climb Racing, players may spend a lot of time racing on insane roads, acquiring interesting skins, improving Obby's bike, and completing difficult parkour courses. For fans of fast-paced, skill-based games, this is a must-play because of the thrilling combination of racing, platforming, and character advancement. In this adrenaline-pumping game, you'll have to crank your engines, level up your character, and complete parkour tasks.

title: Kick Loser
description:
Dive into the world of Kick Loser, a puzzle game that challenges your creativity and problem-solving skills. The objective is simple—inflict maximum damage on the stickman hero using a variety of objects. Each object has unique properties, adding a strategic element to your gameplay.
Take aim and deliver powerful drags to send the stickman crashing into objects. Experiment with different angles and forces to achieve the most satisfying results.

title: Car Care Repair DuDu Mechanic
description: Car Care Repair DuDu Mechanic is a casual simulation game where you act as a skillful mechanic. Your clients meet diverse problems with their cars: broken windows, cracked car doors, flat tires, malfunctioning motors, lack of car parts...

title: Toy Claw Simulator
description: Toy Claw Simulator is a fun and addictive arcade game where you take control of a virtual claw machine to collect a wide variety of adorable toys! Carefully aim and time your claw to grab plushies, action figures, and surprise collectibles. Once you've stocked up your toy inventory, head over to the factory to sell them for shiny coins! Use your earnings to run the machine to use the crane to unlock new toys. It's a charming blend of skill, strategy, and rewarding progression!

title: Puzzle - LINES AND KNOTS 1
description:
Easy to understand mechanics, swap hexagons with lines.
The goal of the player is to assemble a puzzle consisting of nodes.
▪ 150 Levels
▪ Achievements

title: Cars Merge
description:
Feel the thrill as racing cars zoom by at lightning speed on the track!

Get your hands on these incredible cars and watch them blaze across the raceway. Show off your passion for speed and excitement by collecting them all!

How many will you collect? Play now and find out!

title: My Little Farm
description: Welcome to My Little Farm! Roll up your sleeves and dive into the world of planting, harvesting, and selling to meet daily demands. Upgrade your tools, nurture your crops, and keep the farm flourishing. Can you handle the never-ending requests and become the ultimate farmer?

title: Push It 3D
description: Push It 3D is a casual online game of pushing boxes for free. The game adopts a 3D perspective, presenting a complicated puzzle-solving process for players. You need to push the boxes in the game to complete tasks, and only push them to the specified position can you go to the next level. The game has multiple levels for you to challenge. If you are interested, come and challenge it!

title: Screw Puzzle Master
description: Pull out the nuts and bolts and release the woods. Get ready for a fluent and entertaining screw puzzle! It is time to do some brain practice. Many game levels, entertaining puzzles, and super power-ups await you!  Challenge a friend and complete chapters as fast as you can. Place the bolts as strategically as you can. Buy different skins and play in a different ambient.

title: Classic Mine Sweeper
description: Dive back into "Mine Sweeper Classic," the ultimate nostalgic puzzle game from the Windows XP era, perfect for strategic gameplay during any downtime. Challenge yourself with levels from beginner to expert and relive the excitement of this timeless classic.

title: Eye Attack - Toilet Monster War
description:
Help Secret Agent to survive in Toilet War! Solve puzzles and prevent toilet invasion in our world!

Every single level in Eye Attack: Toilet Monster War is an unique challenge that will train your logic and shooting skills. Only the smartest players can solve all the puzzles and destroy all the Toilet Monsters on the level. Try to get three stars on each level! Can you?

Try this Trending Toilet Monster game and join the fight against the Toilet Monsters!

title: Hexa Sort: Winter Edition
description: Step into a mesmerizing world of winter puzzles with Hexa Sort! More than just a game, it’s a journey into a frosty realm where every hexagonal tile sparkles like a snowflake. Match and merge the pieces to create perfect combinations, clearing the way for new challenges as snow crystals gently dissolve.

title: Merge Shooter
description: In "Merge Shooter," defend the galaxy by merging turrets to fight off alien invaders. Enhance your defense with special powers, navigating through levels filled with challenges. With its colorful graphics and user-friendly interface, it's an exciting adventure for all ages. Become the galaxy's hero by proving your achievements in this dynamic gameplay experience.

title: PuzzleJam
description:
Puzzle Jam is a bright and fun puzzle game where you merge jellies of the same color to clear the board and complete each level!
Easy controls and smooth gameplay make it accessible for players of all ages . Each level brings a new challenge – find the smartest moves, use boosters, and unlock powerful combos!

title: Isometric Escape 2
description: Isometric Escape 2 challenges you to solve a variety of puzzles in uniquely designed isometric rooms. Search for hidden objects and use your logic and memory to unravel the riddles and escape.

title: Word Voyager
description:
Word Voyager - Embark on the ultimate quest for words,right on your touchscreen!

Solve puzzles and expand your vocabulary smoothly.

Follow Olivia, your trusty guide, as she navigates you through the gentle murmurs of an ancient library. Uncover secrets during the 'Daily Mission'. Find hidden stars that unlock new thematic categories that will take you on a odyssey through the infinite universe of words.

title: Gun Evolution
description: Gun Evolution is both a shooting running game and a strategy merge battle game. With 3D cartoon models, you need to merge a power gun to win the battle after the finish line at each level. I recommend shooting the numbered pillars, you can claim money inside and get the items on them. When you earn enough money, you can upgrade the ATK and Speed to destroy more pillars more easily on the track. Good luck!

title: Merge Muscle
description: Create the most powerful gym, connect athletes!  A large gym is at your disposal. Your task is to get new athletes, combine similar ones to get more powerful athletes. The most powerful athletes can be taken to a boxing competition. You need to click as often and quickly as possible to defeat your opponent in a difficult battle.

title: Screw Nuts & Bolts: Wood Solve
description: Embark on a Brain-Twisting Journey with Screw Nuts & Bolts: Wood Solve, an exceptional wood puzzle game about nuts and bolts to test your IQ brain power. For nuts and bolts lovers who likes challenge and innovative gameplay, the right game for you - the ultimate puzzle game - is here.

title: The Prism City Detectives
description: Embark on a vibrant adventure with "The Prism City Detectives" and join Luna, Ruby, Skye, Willow, Daisy, Violet, and Lumi in restoring color to their monochrome city! Explore dazzling dress-up levels and unravel hidden objects mysteries to find the missing Rainbow Gem and bring back the hues of unity.

title: Grandma's Last Stand
description:
Granny is in a hurry to get home and bake some pies. But there's one problem - first she needs to bake a few hundred zombies! They'll be chasing you in cars and motorcycles, they'll have machine guns, rocket launchers, and support drones. But you've got a pretty good arsenal too - from a revolver and machine guns to a minigun and a bazooka. Help Granny get home, roast them all!

INSTRUCTIONS

title: Food Truck Chef™: A Fun Cooking Game
description: Food Truck Chef is a thrilling casual food game where you travel the globe, cooking iconic dishes from tacos to sushi. Manage your time, upgrade your kitchen, and serve customers to build your food truck empire.
genre: Basketball, Bike, Car, Casual, Controller, Browser Game

title: Block Breaker
description: Embark on a 2D adventure filled with dynamic physics! Break ice blocks, use springs and portals, and launch the character through the air to reach the goal platform. Master the environment and discover all the creative ways to complete each level!"

title: Square Punki Long Hand
description: Ever wondered what life would be like with super long arms? In Square Punki Long Hand, you get to experience just that! This unique puzzle game challenges you to stretch, grab, prank, and solve hilarious puzzles using your extra-long limbs. Whether you're rescuing trapped characters, reaching impossible places, or pulling off mischievous tricks, every level is filled with surprises and laughter!

title: Traffic Light Simulator 3D
description:
"Traffic-Light simulator" is an immersive simulation game where players take on the role of a traffic controller tasked with managing the flow of vehicles through a bustling city intersection. Set against the backdrop of a dynamic urban landscape, players must strategically operate a traffic light to prevent congestion, accidents, and ensure smooth traffic flow.
With each passing level, the intensity and complexity of traffic increase, testing the player's decision-making skills and reflexes.

title: ASMR Washing & Fixing
description: This game is one of the cleaning games that gives you a real experience like no other. Most of the cleaning and organizing games on the market are 2D, but this game brings you a 3D experience. At the beginning of the game, you can pick a cool tool. There are 5 levels in this game and you can pick a level to start your cleaning. You can move your position as well as use the cleaning tool by clicking on the buttons on the screen or by hitting the keyboard.

title: Offroad Muddy Trucks
description: Embark on a great adventure with huge trucks featuring massive tires and bodies in the Offroad Muddy Trucks game! You can play in either the 1 or 2 player career mode or explore a vast free map with a friend. The game offers surprises and entertaining terrain for you to discover. Let the monster truck simulator begin on muddy ground and experience all the various terrains on the map.

title: Hide and Build a Bridge!
description:
Welcome to the exciting world of "Hide and Build a Bridge"!

In this exciting game your goal is to collect blocks on the level and build a bridge from them to the portal. But be careful! There are also other players in the level who are trying to reach the goal together with you, and a seeker who breaks bridges and catches runners.

title: Brainrot Boing Boing Merge
description:
Welcome to Brainrot Boing Boing Merge – a charming merge puzzle game where adorable creatures meet polished gameplay and juicy physics!

Merge. Match. Maximize
Satisfying Effects & Lively Details
Unlockable Skins System
Relaxing Yet Strategic

If you love satisfying merges, juicy feedback, and charming characters, this game is for you. Play now and see what creature you’ll create next!

title: V And N Pizza Cooking Game
description: Experience the ultimate virtual pizza-making adventure with the V And N Pizza Cooking Game! Craft delicious pizzas from scratch, choose mouthwatering toppings, and master the art of baking. From classic favorites to innovative creations, unleash your inner chef and create culinary masterpieces.

title: Zen Master - 3 tiles
description:
You can test your skills in this addictive puzzle game without time or place constraints. If you like solving problems like Match 3, Sudoku or Mahjong, then you will definitely like this game.

Collect three identical tiles to clear the board. Your goal is to completely clear the board of a variety of picture tiles. The levels start out easy and relaxing, but gradually become more challenging and addictive!

title: Shark Chomp Chase
description: Play Shark Chomp Chase free online and jump into a fast-paced browser game you can play instantly with no download and no install. This unblocked game loads fast and runs smoothly at school or home, making it perfect for quick breaks. Hunt, grow, and survive as you master each chase in a fun, skill-based challenge that feels like a light brain game. Mobile-friendly and built for desktop and mobile, it’s a free online game that’s easy to start and hard to put down.

title: Obby: Tsunami Escape +1 by Car
description:
A giant tsunami is approaching - and only you can outrun it! Dodge the waves, upgrade your car, and race to the finish line. The faster you get, the further you can go.

Buy new cars - each one gives you more speed, control, and capabilities.
Upgrade your vehicles to survive the most challenging races.
Defeat brainrots - from common to rare and legendary ones.
Practice, improve your reactions, and find the perfect strategy.

title: Destruction Simulator
description: Experience the ultimate destruction sandbox! Bend time, shift gravity, and unleash realistic debris effects. Choose from 13+ explosives, quakes, and tornadoes, or craft custom weapons. Wreck 30+ maps or design your own with the advanced map editor!

title: Online Car Destruction Simulator 3D
description: Experience a high-speed realistic car collision simulator! Drive down slopes and crash into specialized obstacles with various vehicles, all featuring authentic physics and a detailed damage system with separating parts.

title: OUTSIDE
description:
OUTSIDE is a sleek and minimal puzzle game where every move matters. Guide a one-eyed character through a grid to collect the key and reach the exit — but there’s a twist: once you start moving, you won’t stop until you hit a wall.

Plan your route carefully, avoid dead ends, and use the environment to your advantage. With simple mechanics and clean visuals, OUTSIDE is easy to pick up but tough to master — a perfect test of logic and spatial thinking.

title: Jetstream Escape
description: Play Jetstream Escape free online and dive into a high-speed browser game you can play instantly with no download and no install required. This unblocked game loads fast and runs smoothly at school or home, making it perfect for quick breaks or long sessions. Race powerful boats, dodge coast guards, and outrun storms in this mobile-friendly arcade challenge. Designed for desktop and mobile players who love skill-based brain game style reflex tests, it’s a free online game built for pure,nonstop.

title: Visual Memory Drag Drop
description: Immerse yourself in a thrilling memory challenge where you need to memorize patterns and recreate them by dragging and dropping circles. This game starts off easy, allowing you to get comfortable with the mechanics, but the difficulty ramps up quickly, especially by the time you reach the fifth level. Each round presents a new pattern to remember, testing your memory and attention to detail. The engaging gameplay and increasing difficulty make it a perfect test for your cognitive skills.

title: Reach 2048
description: The classic 2048 puzzle — slide numbered tiles on a grid, merge them, and reach the legendary 2048 tile! Simple to learn, impossible to put down. Challenge your brain with this addictive number puzzle. Plan your moves carefully, build combos, and aim for the highest score. How far can you go beyond 2048?

title: Celebrity Face Dance
description: «Celebrity Face Dance» - an exciting game for girls that combines makeup and dancing. Three celebrities await you, each with their unique style and image. Choose your favorite star and start creating a unique look for her. Use various cosmetic products to enhance beauty and individuality girls. Then, when the makeup is ready, move on to the most exciting part - the dance! Follow the instructions on the screen and mimic the celebrity's moves to become a true dance floor star!

title: Glossy Bubbles Challenge
description:
Dive into our bubble shooter! Burst bubbles, match colors, and rack up points in this addictive arcade game.

In the Glossy Bubbles Challenge, you'll encounter an incredibly colorful interface! The simple game mechanics combined with precise aiming create an atmosphere of complete control. Your task is to pop as many bubbles as possible with a single shot to achieve a high score. The ability to react quickly is crucial because the bubbles are relentlessly approaching!

title: Weaponsmith Evolution - Weapon Merge
description:
- Start with basic weapons and drag identical ones to merge them into more powerful versions.
- Each new weapon brings more gold.
- Spend gold on upgrades: unlock new types of weapons or speed up the merging process.
- Fight monsters and progress through levels.
- From time to time, you’ll encounter powerful bosses. Defeat them to prove your mastery!

title: Chicken Banana Quest
description: Help the Chicken and Banana to solve all puzzle quest and find the play button. Use your skills to solve the puzzles before the lives run out and complete all levels with the less possible clicks

title: Qube 2048
description: We present a unique arcade game that combines the dynamic gameplay of Q*bert and the mechanics of 2048!  You start with the number 2 and move across a grid of blocks, doubling its value. The goal is to reach the maximum number by planning your moves and avoiding obstacles.

title: LOGic Slide
description:
Get ready for some beaver fun in LOGic Slide – the cutest puzzle in the forest!
Meet two friendly beavers who love playing with wood. They need your help to slide the logs and make one big river-wide log . 
It might look easy, but you’ll need to think and figure out where each log should go!

Let’s slide some logs together with the beavers – start playing right away! ?✨

title: Crime Theft Gangster Paradise
description: Crime Theft Gangster Paradise is an action-packed gaming experience set in the neon-lit streets of Las Vegas. Players become ruthless gangsters, armed with a vast array of weapons. Engage in intense shootouts while collecting valuable loot

title: BFFs Golden Hour
description: Fall is here and the BFFs decided to take the perfect photos with their Instagram-worthy makeup and outfits. Elsa, Ellie, Kiki, and Regina are all in charge of getting amazing images for their fall aesthetics album, so make sure you come and join them in their BFFs Golden Hour dress up game for girls! Help them get ready by dressing them up with a variety of beautiful outfits, accessories and makeup styles then snap the most instagrammable pictures you need for their album. Enjoy playing!

title: Collect Em All
description:
Collect Em All! Is a puzzle game where you connect all the adjacent same colored blocks. Make long chains of colors to create beautiful sounds and unlock explosive power-ups!

Connect the dots to crush them. You can make a limited number of moves, and you cannot go back on yourself, so make sure to plan your path. Create the longest chains for the biggest reward!

 Come back every day to unlock new daily bonuses !

title: Hex Triple Match
description: Hex Triple Match brings together puzzle challenges, strategic matching and merging experiences. This game consists of clever puzzle-solving and logical manoeuvres, making it ideal for those seeking a brain workout.  You need to consider how to place them to eliminate them faster. Each colour represents an item, giving you a great gaming experience. Beautiful graphics bring you visual enjoyment. Come and join the merging game world.

title: Wooden bolts and nuts
description: As you play, you'll find tangled screws, nuts, bolts, plates, rings, ropes, and more. Find out how to solve the riddle. It's not just a game, it's a journey through the many fun nuts and bolts of the game.

title: Sunny Link
description: 'Sunny Link' is an easy and fun game where players match tiles with summer icons. The goal is to connect two identical tiles. Tiles can be linked if you can join them with three or fewer straight lines. The game has many levels to enjoy. As you play, you’ll hear sounds of the sea. It’s perfect for relaxing and having fun in the sun!

title: Stickhole.io
description: "Stickhole.io" is a thrilling game with single and two-player modes. In single player, swallow stickman and defeat bosses within time limits. In two-player mode, compete to eat the most stickman, then battle with collected characters. Dynamic gameplay and colorful graphics make it addictive and fun.

title: Turbo Car Track
description: Get ready for an exhilarating ride with Turbo Car Track! Navigate through winding tracks that get progressively more challenging as your speed increases. Collect gold coins to unlock new, more powerful vehicles and boost your progress. Can you handle the speed and conquer the track? Find out in this thrilling, high-speed adventure!

title: Checkers
description:
Immerse yourself in classic checkers on the go! 
Enjoy strategic moves, challenging AI, and hot-seat multiplayer fun in this classic checkers game!
Dive into the timeless fun of Checkers! Experience sleek design, smart AI opponent, and thrilling hot-seat multiplayer matches in this classic board game. Master strategy and make every move count!

title: Sneaker Factory!
description: Manage your own sneaker factory in this fast-paced online game! Complete orders, organize sneakers, deliver shipments, and rise through the ranks. Put your speed, strategy, and management skills to the test to become the city’s leading factory!

title: House Deep Clean Sim
description:
House Deep Clean Sim is a home-themed cleaning game with a strong sense of experience. It has 9 scenes for you to clean, which are fence, sculpture, trampoline, pool, robot, fountain, ground,
car, and dining table. Not only does it have a rich scene, but it also has everything you need for a clean game, such as full 3D effects, resizable nozzle size, and the ability to move around at will.  Try it if you are interested. Have fun.

title: Fortune's Deck Solitaire
description:
Welcome to Fortune's Deck Solitaire, where ancient Tarot magic meets the timeless thrill of Tripeaks!

Three enchanted towers of fate await your touch - draw from the mystical deck and begin your journey through the arcana.

Inspired by the classic Tripeaks Solitaire, this magical twist invites you to clear the cards, trust your intuition, and let the deck reveal your fortune.

Will you find insight, mystery… or unexpected luck?

title: Monster Dash
description:
Sprint, Jump and Blast your way through Monster Dash, an action-packed game by the creators of Jetpack Joyride and Fruit Ninja.

Join Barry Steakfries and his iconic Machine Gun Jetpack in a world full of menacing monster mayhem, as you run and gun your way through hordes of zombies, vampires and more with the most explosive and powerful weapons you can find!

title: Space Survival Rainbow Friends Monster
description: Begin a fun battle like never before in Space Survival - Rainbow Friends Monster! You’re in a mysterious space station overrun by terrifying rainbow monsters. Your task is to escape and rescue your friends. Use your gun to begin the battle. Avoid enemy attacks and unleash shooting combos against waves of enemies.

title: Resident Evil: Purge Operation
description: At the start of each level, players must quickly locate powerful weapons like the shotgun and sniper rifle, crucial for fending off hordes of zombies. Once the eerie alarm sounds, grotesque, ferocious undead flood the area. A single mistake can lead to being swarmed, so precise marksmanship, agile movement, and calm judgment are essential for survival.​

title: Water Dig Rescue
description: Dive into the captivating world of "Water Dig Rescue," a physics-based puzzle game where strategy and water manipulation go hand-in-hand. Players carve their way through sand to guide streams of water, aiming to fill a waiting truck at each level's end. With a touch of ingenuity and the laws of physics, can you solve the puzzles and achieve a triumphant splash?

title: ASMR Makeover & Makeup Studio
description: Get ready to dive into the world of beauty and creativity! ASMR Makeup & Makeover Studio offers an incredible opportunity to give your virtual model a stunning makeover. This isn't just any makeover game — it's an immersive experience that combines relaxation and excitement through the power of ASMR!

title: Grunge Chic Alt Fashion
description:
Step into the edgy world of Grunge Chic Alt Fashion, where style meets attitude. This dress-up game lets you explore the perfect mix of grunge edge and chic sophistication.

From plaid skirts and ripped jeans to oversized jackets, fishnets, and combat boots—you’ll have endless options to design your alternative fashion star. Top it off with smoky makeup, bold lipstick, and layered accessories to complete the vibe.

title: Happy Blocks
description: Play Happy Blocks free online and jump into a colorful browser game you can play instantly with no download and no install. Arrange and clear blocks in a satisfying logic puzzle that feels like a smart brain game for all ages. This unblocked game loads fast and runs smoothly at school or home, making it perfect for quick breaks. Fully mobile-friendly and optimized for desktop and mobile, it’s a free online game built for easy, addictive puzzle fun anytime.

title: Duck Luck
description:
Guide a lovable duck and his humorous friend and drop numbered blocks that merge when identical numbers come into contact, creating larger numbers that help clear the board. 
As you strategize and match numbers, you'll earn points. 
The goal is to accumulate the highest score possible by making as big of a number as you can.

title: 2048 Mayhem.io
description: Welcome to 2048 Mayhem.io! Combine the classic 2048 puzzle mechanics with thrilling .io snake survival gameplay. Collect cubes to grow your tail, merge identical numbers, and hunt down smaller players to become the biggest 2048 cube in the arena. Use your dash ability to escape danger or catch your prey. Can you reach 2048 and dominate the leaderboard?

title: BlowUp ATM
description: BlowUp ATM – The ultimate heist action game where you become a master thief! Your mission? Plant explosives, blow up ATMs, and grab as much cash as you can before escaping! But beware – the cops are always on high alert!

title: Block Escape
description: Block Escape is a brain-teasing puzzle game where players clear blocks by moving them off the screen in the direction shown by the arrows on each block. Each level requires logical thinking and careful planning, as blocks can only move in specific directions, making every puzzle increasingly challenging and strategic.

title: Super Kid Adventure
description: Hi there! It sounds like you're interested in playing Super Kid Adventure, an online game similar to Super Mario. To play, you'll need to jump on platforms, avoid obstacles and spikes, and defeat enemies. Don't forget to collect stars along the way! The game has 25 levels for you to explore, so there's plenty of adventure to be had.

title: Cat Mini Restaurant
description: In this heartwarming and healing simulation management game "Meow Flavor Restaurant", you will become a little cat owner who loves cooking and personally create your own dream restaurant. Starting from a small cat house kitchen, gradually upgrading equipment, developing new recipes, recruiting cute cat employees, until becoming the most popular internet celebrity restaurant in the city! More than 30 cats with different personalities and skills are waiting for you to collect!

title: Save Her Tour
description: This complex and relaxing puzzle game you've read about has finally become a reality! Only the smartest can pass these brain teaser quizzes and save the girl! Each level will give you a scenario where you must use your ingenuity to solve the problem. If you mess up, it won't end well for our heroine. There are so many different challenges waiting to be solved. This is the best puzzle game ever! Solve interesting puzzles, protect the girl from harm, and experience the thrill of success.

title: Gun Shooting Games Sniper 3D
description: Step into the battlefield and test your precision in Gun Shooting Games: Sniper 3D, an exciting fps experience packed with nonstop action. This immersive first person shooting game puts you in the role of an elite sniper armed with powerful weapons and challenging missions.

title: Little Bugs
description: you are the guardian of a group of lost beetles. At each stage, the beetles approach two pictures. One is a safe path forward, but the other is a trapdoor into the abyss. Your mission is to decipher the hint—a piece of a vegetable or an animal—to figure out which path is safe. If you misunderstand the clue, you won't be able to reach the finish line. Every choice matters in this charming world of clever puzzles. Are you ready to lead your little bugs to safety?

title: Ball Dunk Fall
description: In Ball Dunk Fall, your challenge is to guide a constantly falling ball through hoops of varying difficulties by tapping the screen. Test your precision and reflexes as you navigate through tricky obstacles. With each successful dunk, experience the thrill of victory and aim for high scores!

title: Falling Blocks - Halloween Challenge
description: Step into the Halloween fun with Falling Blocks - Halloween Challenge, a thrilling match-3 arcade game! Match 3 or more spooky blocks, including pumpkins, ghosts, and skulls, as they rapidly fall from above. Your reflexes and strategy will be put to the test to clear the board and prevent a pile-up. Featuring vibrant Halloween visuals and addictive gameplay, this game provides hours of entertainment for all ages. Face the challenge, set high scores, and embrace the Halloween spirit!

title: Hexa GO!
description: A puzzle game about dropping hexagons from grid. To do this, use a bomb and explode all the tiles nearby! Click on the rotate-button and swap the tiles! And also use other special tiles!

title: Chibi Doll - Avatar Creator
description:
Street - it's no matter build your modern city life or just stick with village-like town world you always be enjoy with it! 

Room - decorate and design home girly world.

Gacha - unlock countless gachapon surprises your lovely avatar, bring gacha to your fantasy life! 

Dress Up Games - match and mix more than 5000+ girly items for dressing up princess: hairstyle, clothes, hats, accessories, freckles, moles, blush, wings, tails.

title: Smartle
description: Smartle is a free online word puzzle game where you rearrange letters by swapping them on a 5x5 grid to form words. Win the game by creating 5 horizontal 5-letter words on the field. There are multiple valid combinations of words which can win the game.

title: Merge Numbers
description: Merge Numbers is a relaxing HTML5 game to play, the objective of the game is to combine two same tile or number into one, then tile number will be upgraded and score will be increased. The game will ended if there is no room or movement available in the board.

title: Mr Long Hand
description: Immerse yourself in the quirky and delightful world of Mr Long Hand, where you take on the role of a stickman with incredibly long arms. Your mission is simple yet endlessly entertaining: use your elongated limbs to swing through obstacles, solve puzzles, and embark on thrilling rescues. Mr Long Hand offers a unique blend of creativity, challenge, and humor that is sure to captivate players of all ages.

title: Obby - Escape Barry's jail parkour
description: An incredible escape from the New Barry Prison awaits you! Cool locations, parkour and obby. Show your agility to avoid getting caught by Barry.

title: Chaos Road Combat Car Racing
description: Chaos Road: Combat Car Racing plays like a shoot-em-up car shooting arcade game. With 3D vehicles on the ground, your mission is to defeat the final boss by collecting upgrade items and shooting down vehicles on the ground. Your vehicle will keep shooting automatically. Don't forget to collect the magnet to collect all kinds of items easily. To defeat the final boss, you need to avoid its bullets and keep shooting. Have fun!

title: Muscle Up Master
description: The aim of this game that will help you become a muscle master, a boxer or an MMA fighter is to reach the best level! In this adventure where you start with a weak body, start exercising and reach a more muscular body by merging with the characters. As you progress, participate in fighting tournaments and grow faster with the rewards you earn!

title: Mini Golf Battle
description: Mini Golf Battle is a casual sports puzzle where precision and timing decide the outcome. Your task is to sink the ball into the hole with the fewest strokes possible while navigating ramps, walls, and tricky obstacles. Special power-ups like Fire, Wing, and Spring shots add variety, letting you approach each course with unique strategies. Whether for short play sessions or longer runs, Mini Golf Battle delivers an engaging mix of relaxation and skillful play.

title: Boo-tiful Princess Match
description: Welcome to an exciting puzzle-game, created in a Halloween atmosphere. There are three princesses in the game and each one is ready for her own eerily beautiful transformation. The player will have to look for paired cards to discover new elements of the girls future image. Each successful match brings you closer to creating a unique costume, makeup or hairstyle. Only the most attentive players will be able to make their princesses truly scary-beautiful!

title: ASMR Nail Treatment
description: Today's patient is dealing with thickening of the fingernails. Help her maintain good nail hygiene by providing proper nail care. Showcase your medical skills by performing this ASMR Nail Treatment game. Once the treatment is done, dress her in fashionable outfit and create captivating nail art using various styles and accessories.

title: Sid & Ginny Y2K Glam Clash
description: Welcome to the Y2K style fashion world! Two charismatic heroines are waiting for you, ready to try on fashion trends from the 2000s. Create spectacular makeup for them with lip gloss, shining shadows and glossy skin; choose stylish hairstyles - from smooth straight hair to playful ponytails and fashionable hairpins. Experiment with low-cut jeans, crop tops, mini skirts, shiny fabrics, and bold combinations. Complete the resulting image with iconic accessories of those years.

title: Off Road Overdrive
description: Off Road Overdrive plays like a side-scrolling car-balanced game with 2D cartoon vehicles. Let me introduce the game modes for you!If you want to make a perfect record, play Challenge mode with different terrains again and again including Snow, Beachwear, Field, Desert, and Dark Night. Even the 2D platform will test your driving skills and balance abilities!

title: Banana Bounce!
description:
Banana Bounce! ? is a side-scrolling game where you lead your banana to as far as you can.
Discover many cool ? and amazing ? powerups to boost ? your progress!
Discover unique ? characters and earn coins ? while you run!
Don't forget to upgrade ⬆️ your powerups to make them even stronger ? and better!

Made with ❤️ by Realinspirer

title: Sort Balls - Cones
description: Immerse yourself in a calming logic puzzle where your goal is to sort colored balls into separate tubes. Plan each move carefully so that every tube contains balls of only one color. The straightforward mechanics gradually evolve into more challenging levels that test your focus and strategic thinking.

title: Bloom Within: A life simulator
description:
The simulator of a pregnant mother allows you to fully experience the whole process of pregnancy.
In this anime game you have to play the role of a girl who has a loving husband and a child under her heart, who is waiting for her birth. Take care of yourself, give birth, take care of your baby and raise a healthy baby.

title: Bloons Survival.io
description:
Bloons Survival. io is a fast-paced survival arcade game where you fight off endless waves of balloons!

Control your monkey hero, throw darts automatically, and pop incoming enemies before they get too close.
Collect coins and power-ups to grow stronger, but stay alert — one hit can end your run!

How long can you survive?

title: Cuddle Monster Fusion
description: Engage, Merge, and Challenge! Dive into a world of cuddly creatures where you combine identical monsters to evolve them and keep them from overflowing. But here’s the twist: when the same monsters collide, they transform into an entirely new, adorable creature. Can you merge your way to the ultimate fluffy beast?

title: Office Escape to Date
description: You have a date after work, but theres a catch: you need to get ready without your boss catching you! Complete your tasks, and prepare for your date before time runs out. But be careful, if the boss appears, quickly close the activity to avoid getting caught and return to work. How fast can you escape the office and be ready in time?

title: Roblox Christmas Dressup
description: Roblox Christmas Dressup is a delightful dress-up game where players embrace the festive spirit by customizing their avatars with Christmas-themed outfits and accessories. The game offers a wide variety of styles to explore, from cozy winter wear to glamorous holiday ensembles. Perfect for fashion enthusiasts and Roblox fans alike, Roblox Christmas Dressup brings creativity and joy to the holiday season.

title: Bubble Around
description: Bubble Around is bubble shooter with a twist. You shoot the bubbles from the inside to the playing field around you. Match 3 or more bubbles to make them pop. Clear all bubbles to complete the level. Each level will be slightly more challenging. Stuck in a level? Use the bomb, rocket or multi color power up. Find out all level shapes!

title: Robby: Bomberman
description:
Dive into an exciting adventure with Robby, a brave hero who finds himself trapped in a labyrinth filled with ghosts and mysterious loot boxes. In this danger-filled world, to unlock the exit, Robby must defeat all the ghosts and destroy the crates, which may contain precious coins and useful bonuses.

But Robby is not alone in his fight! He has a loyal ally—a magical mushroom that can emerge from the loot boxes to assist him in battles against the ghosts.

title: CraftMart
description:
Noob decided to go into business and open his own shop. And what do all the people of Minecraft want? That's right - to eat!

In Noob's shop you can always buy beet soup and bread! And also a lot of other food.

And now all the residents of Minecraft rushed to the best store! Help Noob to serve all the customers! No one should go hungry! :)

Build new fields for wheat and beets, get a cow and a chicken and expand the shop to the maximum assortment!

title: College Girls Team Makeover
description: Try our new fashionista app "College Girls Team Makeover". Here you can dress up 5 high school best friends. They are the most popular school girls and always together. Everyone would like to be in their girl squad! They manage to be the most stylish girls in school, because they have their own fashion stylist and that’s you! You can control their whole look from the color of their skin and eyes to hairstyle and makeup. More than 1000 items of clothes and accessories are at your disposal!

title: Dragon Draw Joust
description: Prepare for a wildly creative showdown in Dragon Draw Joust, where your imagination becomes your strongest weapon! Instead of choosing gear from a menu, you must draw your own tools to defend your warrior and survive intense combat challenges. Every match feels fresh because your strategy starts with your creativity. Your creation instantly becomes part of your character, helping you block attacks or strike opponents inside the chaotic battle arena.

title: Witch Craft Potion Sort
description: Step into the witch’s lair this Halloween night and test your skills in a spooky potion puzzle! Sort the eerie liquids, mix glowing brews, and fill each cauldron with the right color to complete your craft.

title: Zenith Rush
description:
Beat the track time to advance further! 
Switch the road and pickup upgrades, buy and upgrade cars to be faster and advance further!

title: Desert Rover Survival
description: Desert Rover Survival is an idle survival adventure set in a harsh desert world. Begin with a simple setup and slowly build your own desert rover, upgrading parts and improving technology to push farther into the wasteland.

title: Candy Pop Mania
description:
Dive into the enchanting world of matching games - Candy Pop Mania - where delightful fun and challenging games await! Pop, blast and match 3 sweets to keep on the adventure! Use combos and reach the best results!
Challenge yourself to win all of the levels of Candy Pop Mania!

title: Bubble Piggies
description: Bubbles Piggies is an engaging bubble shooter game with 50 levels. Free all piggies to complete the levels. When there are no piggies left in the tube the level will drop down 1 floor. Each level will face challenging features like the sleeping piggy, the hidden piggy, the powerup bubble, the moving bubble and more.

title: Sniper Elite 3D
description: Prepare to enjoy the finest 3D sniper experience ever with the most thrilling and action-packed shooting game! Sniper 3D is the ultimate free gun game that immerses you in the life of a lethal assassin. Immerse yourself in high-intensity offline missions and test your shooting abilities in this adrenaline-fueled sniper experience. Have fun playing Sniper Elite 3D, a free online game!

title: Stick Ninja Survival
description: Stick Ninja Survival is a rogue-like arcade game with 2D stickman characters and monsters. When the Red Sun comes, the sky is covered by the Red Moon, and the world becomes extremely terrifying. People fled in fear from the monster's mouth. You only need to dodge enemies and their bullets because of automatic attack. When you earn some gem resources, you can use them to upgrade your character, Skills, and Talents.

title: Portal Master
description: Help Stickman in the fight against villains! Arrange the magic portals so that the bullet returns to the villain. Become a Portal Master superhero!

title: NoobHood HalloweenCraft
description: Noobhood is actually a folk hero. Of course, that's how he is in our game too. He has one main goal: to dress in a Halloween costume, prepare his horse for Halloween, and collect all the Halloween coins. Gather all the Halloween coins. You must be very careful; surviving in this dark and scary forest is truly difficult. There are pumpkin monsters in this forest, and you must defeat them with your sword. Throw your sword at the monsters to defeat them all.

title: Blossom
description:
Blossom is a fun and relaxing puzzle game. You need to connect similar flower buds until 3 or more are connected. Then, the selected flowers will blossom, and your score will increase.

The variety of flowers will increase as you progress through the game, and the timer will speed up each time. Aim to reach your highest score!

title: Sand Blast - Block Game
description:
Welcome to Sand Blast, a fresh and relaxing twist on classic block puzzle games!
Relax your mind with Sand Blast — a satisfying and strategic puzzle game built around flowing sand mechanics.
Whether you're into relaxing brain games, casual offline fun, or smart logic challenges, Sand Blast delivers a fresh experience you can enjoy anytime, anywhere — no WiFi or internet required.

title: Steam Sorter
description: Take control of a cute robot and get to work sorting industrial garbage! A dynamic puzzle game with a steampunk aesthetic.

title: Tricky Arrow
description: Get ready to sharpen your skills in Tricky Arrow! Test your precision and reflexes as you shoot arrows at a spinning circle target. Aim for the bullseye and avoid hitting other arrows. With each twist and spin, the challenge grows, requiring strategy and accuracy. Simple yet addictive gameplay for all ages.

title: BouncePop Quest
description: Guide Jumpo, a squishy and color-changing jelly creature, through over 150 vibrant levels filled with tricky obstacles, moving platforms, and environmental hazards. Charge and release powerful jumps to collect stars, dodge enemies, and unlock new worlds—from the icy peaks to fiery lava lands. Master timing, aim for achievements, and power up in this cute, bouncy adventure!

title: Idle Lawnmower
description: In Idle Lawnmower, embrace the tranquility of tending to your virtual lawn, earning gold with each satisfying swath cut. Utilize your earnings to upgrade your lawnmower, enhancing efficiency and earning potential in this idle game of grassy growth and financial gain.

title: Northern Lights - the secret of the forest
description:
A new hit for fans of the Match 3 game genre!

The Scientist Cat is already hiding items throughout the mysterious forest so you can enjoy finding things and earn as many emeralds as possible. The cat is happy to have new guests!

title: Anaconda Runner
description: Anaconda Runner is a casual arcade game. In the snake kingdom, size is a status symbol. The bigger you are, the more powerful you are and the higher your status. So how do you increase your size?  There is a runway in front of you. There are many blue balls on the runway that can help you grow. See how far you can go, have fun!

title: Hypermarket 3D: Store Cashier
description:
Step into the world of retail and build the supermarket of your dreams! 

Manage customers, run the cash register, stock shelves, and keep your store thriving. From scanning groceries to cart-surfing adventures, every task brings your bustling market to life.

Take charge as the supermarket cashier, master time management, and turn your small store into a thriving grocery empire.

title: Strawberry Shortcake BoardGames
description: Visit the BerryWorks cafeteria and play checkers, memory, tic-tac-toe, connecting pairs, and complete jigsaw puzzles with your friends.

title: Paper Doll Diary: Dress Up DIY
description: ? Welcome to Paper Doll Diary: Doll DressUp, where the timeless charm of DIY paper dolls meets the exhilarating world of fashion dress up! Step into a realm of creativity and style where you become the master stylist of your enchanting paper doll dress up. With an expansive wardrobe featuring over 1000 fashion items, including the latest in trendy attire, distinctive accessories, diverse hairstyles, and soothing ASMR makeup touches, your creative potential is limitless.

title: Space Shooter - Speed Typing Challenge
description:
Get ready for an exciting space adventure that helps you improve your typing skills! In this free educational online word game, you'll pilot a spaceship and face waves of enemies.

It's a fun way to boost your typing speed and accuracy. Jump into your spaceship, start typing, and help save the galaxy one word at a time!

Think you're the fastest typist in the galaxy? Prove it! The universe is counting on you - start your adventure now and become the ultimate space hero!

title: Finger Heart Monster Refill
description:
Do you love Finger Heart posing? Do you want to make Finger Heart with a cute character? Let's Play This Game. In Finger Heart: Monster Refill, you must choose how to fit your finger with other
adorable monsters to form a perfect heart. To fill a perfect heart, you don’t need any special skills, just use your imagination and creativity.  They can change its shape in many ways. You'll need to think carefully about which form fits the shape of your fingers. Come make hearts with cute monsters!

title: Gelatino
description:
Gelatino needs your help! He needs to collect as much ice as he can! 
The hot summer sun will melt him if he doesn't pay attention!
But the road isn't safe: it is full of evil hot suns that will melt Gelatino in no time!
Destroy them will make you earn more points, but the price to pay to make a highscore could be to high...

title: Highschool Mean Girls 3
description: Play the Highschool Mean Girls 3 game and get ready to join 6 unique characters in the wild world of fashion drama in this brand-new dress-up game for girls. Test your fashion guru skills and transform high school wallflowers into show-stopping style icons. Rack up those style credits with a fabulous curated wardrobe and accessories. This dress-up game is where high school drama meets fashion week, straight from your screen. Happy playing!

title: Ragdoll Parkour Simulator
description: "Ragdoll Parkour Simulator" is an adrenaline-fueled parkour game that challenges players to navigate through urban environments with precision and style. With improved graphics and mechanics, players can expect an even more immersive experience than its predecessor.

title: Pushover 3D
description: Unleash your creativity in *Pushover 3D*! Draw unique curves to control your ragdoll fighter’s moves, launching them in unexpected ways to defeat opponents. Each match is a wild, physics-based showdown where every line transforms into unpredictable body motions. From wild spins to slingshot leaps, it’s all up to the patterns you create. Experiment, outsmart your rivals, and become a master of ragdoll combat!

title: Fire And Water Birds
description: Try to get the water and fire birds through challenging obstacles to get the highest score and become the master of the birds. a challenging adventure awaits you. Come on!

title: Barbee Met Gala Transformation
description: Barbee and her friends have a big night ahead—the Met Gala! It’s your job to help each of them get dressed up and feel amazing. Whether someone’s into bold colors or classic glam, you get to style their look from head to toe and make sure they’re ready to walk the red carpet.

title: Bonnie Fitness Frenzy
description: Bonnie decides to get her figure in perfect shape for the summer season. Join the girl in her adventures in the gym, where you will perform a variety of exercises to help her burn off extra calories. After intensive training, Bonnie will start applying makeup. And finally, it's time to dress up! Help us choose fashionable and elegant sports outfits to emphasize the fitness style of our heroine. Join Bonnie on her exciting journey to the perfect figure and style!

title: Gravity Matcher
description: In Gravity Matcher, you’ll launch circles of various sizes and types into a dynamic gravity field. Your goal? Match identical circles by carefully aiming and timing your throws. But beware – gravity is unpredictable, and the slightest miscalculation can send your circles spiraling out of control!

title: Hex Planet Idle
description: Hex Planet Idle is both an RPG adventure game and a survival idle game with 3D models. You can control a stickman warrior to discover the whole universe by collecting resources and unlocking new areas. When you step on the white lighting areas, you will know the resource request of the next area. Get close to any items to collect them automatically. If I were you, I would unlock all areas because of the plentiful resources.

title: Block Craft 3d
description: Block Craft 3D is a first-person RPG game with 3D pixel Minecraft models. Starting from a block base, you can attack the monsters outside to claim diamonds with weapons. I strongly suggest you build bombs to destroy terrains or build blocks to make yourself safe. When you earn enough diamonds, you can unlock and use 4 Melee weapons, 11 guns, and 8 bombs in the store. Glad you will have a good time in this block world.

title: Boost Your Brain!
description: "Boost Your Brain!" is an exciting incremental game where you develop your mind by collecting Aiku! Click the magic book, upgrade skills, collect pets with bonuses, and customize with skins. Enjoy deep progression, endless leveling, and cute companions. Reach new heights and become a genius!

title: Flower Block
description: Dive into our unique COMBO gameplay, where you strategically place blocks to clear rows or columns. Watch as clearing multiple lines triggers exciting animations and earns you bonus points. Challenge your mind and plan your moves wisely to ace Flower Block!

title: Formula Racing Games Car Game
description: Let's Play and Enjoy car driving in all the Formula Race master 3D tracks of the world and become a champion on all the tracks of the world in the Formula Car Racing Game. Formula Car Stunts Games 3D introduces a new offline car racing game for the fans of the Formula Car simulator.

title: SuperPixelint
description:
It's a game where you draw a cute little image.
You can develop color matching skills and accuracy without any burden.
Why don't you get out of your daily life for a while and heal yourself through coloring games?

title: Sprunki Memory Card Match
description:
Put your memory to the ultimate test with Sprunki Memory Card Match! Dive into a world of fun and challenge as you flip cards to reveal and match delightful Sprunki characters, scenes, and surprises. Perfect for kids and adults alike, this game combines entertainment with brain-boosting fun!
Challenge yourself or compete with friends to see who has the sharpest memory. With Sprunki Memory Card Match, every flip is a step closer to unlocking fun surprises and reaching the top!

title: Word Search with hints
description: Search for hidden words on the letter grid. Use hints to solve words and improve your skills. This game is great for players of all ages, and it's a fun way to spend time and test mental abilities!

title: Elite Chess
description: Enjoy classic gameplay with three chess modes, each offering varying time settings suited to your play style. Take your chess skills to the next level, climb the ranks from Bronze to Diamond, and strive to become a top chess player.

title: Jewels Blitz Legends
description: Embark on a dazzling adventure in Jewels Blitz Legends, the epic sequel to the beloved Match 3 hit! Travel through ancient Inca temples, uncover mystical secrets, and match colorful gems to unlock treasures. Explore Machu Picchu, complete hundreds of challenging levels, and take on exciting daily missions and weekly events. Collect gold, magical artifacts, and experience stunning visuals in this addictive journey through the heart of ancient legend!

title: ThumbPinball
description: ThumbPinball is an engaging physics-based pinball game that challenges players to manipulate various mechanisms and angles to achieve their objectives. Bounce the ball strategically to hit specific targets and tackle formidable bosses across exciting levels. Ideal for quick play sessions, it offers a blend of skill, strategy, and fun for all ages.

title: The White Room 5
description: The White Room 5 is the fifth sequel of an adventure escape game with a cartoon art style. Find objects that can help you escape the room and use your logic to solve the puzzles. Good luck!

title: Bloom Sort 2: Bee Puzzle
description: Dive into the enchanting world of Bloom Sort 2: Bee Puzzle, where flowers bloom, bees buzz, and your mind gets a delightful workout! This unique 3D puzzle game combines stunning 2D and 3D graphics with a relaxing, chill vibe, making it the perfect escape for players of all ages.

title: 2048 - Blocks destruction
description: 2048 - Blocks destruction is endless fun! Rules are simple: shoot balls, destroy blocks and grow numbers. Get balls with bigger numbers and reach higher scores! Get a lot of balls or merge them and increase damage drastically!

title: Save the Daddy
description:
Get ready to unlock a world of tricky puzzles and brain teasers in Save the Daddy. Each level is unique and carefully designed to challenge your mind and test your IQ. Pull the pin in the right order and help the man escape from dangerous monsters & obstacles safely and thoughtfully.
Play each level very cautiously by analyzing your move before pulling the pin. As you progress, levels increase in difficulty which will make you game challenging and earn more rewards.

title: Shoot N Crush
description: Unleash your shooting skills and break bricks in Shoot N Crush. This game is the best choice for your leisure time. Your goal is to shoot with precision and flexibility. Use the bouncing ball to smash a solid brick with precision. Each level has a different objective and difficulty, you need to break these bricks in the smartest way possible.

title: Tiny Baker Ocean Jelly Cake
description: Dive into a world of sweetness with Tiny Baker Ocean Jelly Cake! Create a shimmering ocean-inspired jelly dessert using playful shapes and colors, then decorate it with sea-themed toppings for the perfect underwater delight.

title: Scary Shawarma Kiosk: The Anomaly
description: This is a first-person psychological horror game where you work night shifts in a small street kiosk. What seems like a normal job quickly turns into a nightmare: customers grow increasingly strange, and reality itself begins to warp. Some people just want to eat — others are only pretending to be human.

title: Mobile Phone Case Design & DIY
description: Welcome to Mobile Phone Case Design & DIY, the ultimate playground for those who love to personalize, design, and express their unique style!

title: Animal Racing Idle Park
description: Animal Racing: Idle Park is an addictive racing animal transform game that will keep you playing for hours. In this game, you’ll train multiple animal racers such as lions, eagles, orangutans, dolphins, and more!

title: Hyper Knight
description:
The apocalypse began and ancient creatures emerged from their graves. You are people's only hope. Put on your armor and start fighting.

-Collect the souls of monsters and earn money.
-Find new weapons and armors.
-Discover your magical powers.
-Find a companion and it will accompany you.
-Save different towns, encounter unlimited enemies.
-Destroy the bosses that threaten the world.

Why are you waiting? Come on, grab your sword and join us.

title: Brainrot Evolution Game
description: Brainrot Evolution Game is a chaotic meme clicker incremental game where you tap your way through the viral Italian Brainrot universe, unlocking all the brainrot characters and upgrades as you progress! You will get the chance to collect Italian Brainrot characters such as: Bombardino Crocodilo, Tung Tung Tung Sahur, Tralalero Tralala, Bombombini Gussini, Cappuccino Assasino, Lirili Larila, Brr Brr Patapim, Burbaloni Luliloli, Bobritto Bandito, Trippi Troppi, Chimpanzini Bananini and more!

title: What's In My Bag?
description: Unpack style and surprises in What’s In My Bag? – the ultimate dress-up and makeup game for fashion lovers! Choose cute outfits, glam makeup, and trendy bags, then reveal what’s inside each one. From influencer props to girly goodies, every bag tells a story. Get creative, show off your style, and join the viral “what’s in my bag” trend now! Perfect for fans of dress-up games, makeup fun, and aesthetic vibes.

title: Find It Out Colorful Book
description: Begin a challenging yet relaxing casual game in Find It Out Colorful Book. It brings you into a colorful world. You will begin an adventure to find hidden objects. Choose your favorite mode like beach, city, zoo, etc. Each page is filled with color and mysterious numbers waiting to be discovered and unlocked.

title: Colors&Forms
description:
Dynamic and exciting!
Choose the game mode!
Complete missions and pass all levels!
Levels differ in color palettes and falling elements.
Interact with the objects appearing on the game screen, which complicate the process of the game.
After accumulating enough pieces, unlock the game type “Infinity”!
Choose your favorite level and accumulate as many pieces as possible to beat your opponents!

title: Super Bitcoin Boy
description: “Super Bitcoin Boy” is a “Mario Bros” style platform game, themed around the Bitcoin cryptocurrency, eliminate enemies, overcome obstacles, collect all the bitcoins to get the highest score possible. Enjoy the Halving year, have fun playing and complete all levels.

title: Frog Knight
description: Frog Bubble your mission is to help a spirited frog pop an array of mischievous bubbles! Using your swift reflexes and strategic skills, you’ll throw your lily pad-shaped projectiles at bubbles to clear each level.

title: Monster School Challenge
description: Complete teacher's assignments for evaluation, finding out who is a Noob and who is a Pro! Different tests and characters are waiting for you in the game Monster School Challenge.

title: Hidden Objects Crime Scene
description:
Keep clear! It's a police crime scene, and the evidence must not be disturbed. Engage your detective instincts and dive into Hidden Objects Crime Scene!
 
Keep a sharp eye out for clues left behind by the perpetrator. Work fast, and you might solve the case!

Can you find all the pieces of evidence? Come play now, and let's find out!

title: Fidget Trading Card Toy
description: Fidget Trading Card Toy is a fidget trading game that allows you to feel the fun of collecting toy cards! In the game, you will flip cards against opponents and even use the slap feature to set off a fierce trading duel! Your goal is to collect as many rare cards as possible, increase your card collection, and gain more advantages in trading!

title: Foxy Eco Sort
description:
Join Foxy and Raccoon on their eco-mission! Sort waste, play match-3 and matching pairs to clean polluted locations. 

But it's not just cleaning! Uncover the conspiracy of cunning Ratty who wants to destroy the forest. Complete story chapters: track garbage trucks, expose arsonists and save your home!

title: Grocery Shop: Supermarket Game
description: Run and manage your own supermarket in this engaging simulation game. Stock shelves, serve customers, manage inventory, and expand your store to build a successful grocery business. Handle the rush of customers while keeping products organized and priced competitively to maximize profits.

title: Idle Game Prison Life
description: Ever dreamed of running your prison? Now’s your chance! In this casual idle simulator, you’ll create a high-security prison empire. Upgrade and expand until you are on your way to becoming a tycoon! Create the perfect prison layout with cells, kitchens, gyms, and surveillance! Recruit guards, medics, and more to keep things under control.

title: Geometry Vibes Monster
