description: Geometry Vibes Monster is a reaction-based arcade game where you must dodge incoming obstacles, spikes, and battle against a variety of unique monsters. Each monster features distinct attack patterns that you must skillfully avoid. Your main goal is to navigate your spaceship as far as possible while surviving the onslaught of attacks.

title: Police Station
description: As the head of multiple police precincts, your mission is to boost the security rating in the district under your watchful eye. Begin your adventure by managing a modest police department, strategically hiring officers, and putting in the effort to cultivate a safer community

title: Tower Guardian - Epic Defense
description:
- Strategically summon warriors and unleash devastating abilities to protect your tower from hordes of enemies!
- Fight off waves of monsters, unlock new levels, and upgrade your heroes as you rise to become the ultimate protector. Every wave gets tougher—only the strong and strategic will survive.
- Rotate around the tower, lock onto approaching foes, and eliminate them before they breach your defenses! 
With each wave, enemies grow stronger and more numerous.

title: Obby Toilet Line
description:
Obby Toilet Line starts in the most chaotic place imaginable: a gas station restroom line. Around 30 different characters are already waiting, and the queue stretches all the way past the store entrance. Your goal is simple, but the situation is not: earn money while you wait, move up the line, and reach the mysterious toilet at the end.

This is not just a “stand still” queue. The game uses an idle-style progression system: the position you’re standing in determines how much you earn.

title: Mahjong Cute Tiles
description: Enjoy a classic Mahjong game, now in another dimension! Rotate the board, explore fresh tile layouts and challenge your mind. Show off your skills and use powerful boosters like undo moves, tile shuffles, bombs and hints to help you advance faster.

title: I Am Security
description: Have you ever wanted to be a hardened security officer and be on the front lines of maintaining order? In I Am Security, an ultra-realistic role-playing simulator, you play the role of a professional security guard. You decide whether or not to allow them to enter. Some guests may try to sneak in with prohibited items and find these hidden items. Performs tasks in a variety of scenarios to identify suspicious persons.

title: Broomcraft Mystic Evasion
description: Broomcraft Mystic Evasion is an action-packed horde survival game where you soar through the skies on a magical broom, battling waves of enemies! Defeat foes and gather experience points to level up and grow stronger. Unlock and master powerful spells, evolving them to take down enemies even faster. Good luck in your battles!

title: Wolf Life Simulator
description:
Wolf Life Simulator: A Realistic Animal Simulation Game
Explore the life of a wolf in Wolf Life Simulator, the most realistic animal simulation game ever! Become a wolf and learn how to survive, hunt, mate, and fight against other predators. Experience the thrill of the wild in this exciting wildlife game. Are you ready for the adventure? Try Wolf Life Simulator now and have fun!

title: Aqua Blitz 2
description: Welcome to Aquablitz 2 - the newest iteration of the beloved underwater match-3 game that comes with fresh new graphics, a catchy tune and lots of improvements! Meet your new hostess, Pearl, the little mermaid. She will be pleased to guide you on your adventure through more than 700 splashy levels and teach you all the tricks you need to know to solve even the most complicated puzzles.

title: Skyscraper to the Sky
description: Challenge your skills as an engineer and architect in this  puzzle game. Build the tallest, most stable skyscraper across 30 levels, from small houses to huge buildings.

title: Mahjong Connect Cookware
description: Help your chef to clean his kitchen and remove all cookware by connecting them with a line that can change it's direction no more than 2 times!

title: Puzzle Blocks Asmr Match
description:
Puzzle Blocks ASMR Match is a block puzzle game that combines classics with innovation. It is different from the block jigsaw games and brick puzzle games you usually play. This game uses a
real physics engine. After the bottom blocks are eliminated, the upper bricks will automatically fall down, which makes the game more difficult. In the game, you cannot rotate the blocks to make
them fit more gaps, which means that you often only have one chance.

title: Brainrot Merge Drop Puzzles
description: Drop and merge Italian Brainrot. Trallallero Trallala, Tum Tum Tum Saur, Boneca Ambalabu and more. Play funny memes. Drag and drop memes.

title: Jump Girl 3D
description: Jump Girl 3D is an addictive casual jumping game. It's time to stack your own tofu towers and help the lively girl climb the delicious bouncy tofu trampoline tower. Beware of obstacles that appear from both sides and try to stand in the middle for a smoother and safer ride. Try to challenge every move and unleash the girl's acrobatic skills! Go, Tofu Girl!

title: Muscle Challenge
description: Run, eat healthy foods and proteins and avoid harmful foods, drinks and obstacles in the Muscle Challenge game! Defeat your enemies with the strength and muscular body you gained at the end of the race! The enemies get stronger in each level, so you have to get better too... If you want, you can also play the game in challenge mode with your friend in 2 Player mode.

title: Bubble Merge 2048
description: Welcome to Bubble Merge 2048, where classic 2048 meets exciting bubble-blasting action! Shoot, merge, and blast through puzzles filled with colourful bubbles and challenges. Match numbers and colours, solve brain-teasing puzzles, and smash obstacles as you journey through this one-of-a-kind adventure.

title: Logic Blast Explorer
description: A fresh twist on the classic block puzzle experience, featuring hundreds of handcrafted levels, relaxing yet strategic gameplay, world landmarks to collect, boosters and custom tile skins.

title: BFF Lovely Kawaii Outfits
description: Welcome to BFF Lovely Kawaii Outfits game. Princesses Elsa, Anna, Moana, and Jasmine are more fascinated about Kawaii Outfits. They are very eager to browse the new collection of Kawaii outfits. Start helping with each princess for their outfits and matching costumes by browsing their wardrobe. Play these cute girl games and have fun!

title: Robocarpoli
description:
In Brooms Town, you must solve four amazing adventures:

Problems with the pipes: 
In Brooms Town, a water pipe broke and the road is getting flooded. Help the Rescue Team to solve these situations completing 6 games: 
    • Connect the wires in Jin’s invention
    • Block the water leaks as soon as possible.
    • Solve Poli’s maze.
    • Work in a team with Micky.
    • Help Roy with the hoses.
    • Make Bruner as clean as a whistle.

title: Tile Hex World: Red vs Blue
description:
Build and destroy!
Take part in an exciting battle between Blue and Red! This time, you will have to extract resources, construct buildings and even build entire islands!
To ​​fight the enemy, you will need to build a path to his island.
Chop down trees, process resources into building hexes, with which you can expand your territory!
The winner is the one who captures the enemy flag and subjugates the enemy army!

title: Car Simulator 3d & Car game 3d
description: In this school car parking simulator, you get to drive in the different car driving arenas skillfully with the various parking method and driving skills. Your love for 3d parking games will help you to play all levels and perform great driving in this offline parking game.

title: Sorting Balls
description: Sorting Balls is a fun and challenging puzzle game where players must sort colored balls into the correct tubes. The goal is to organize all the balls by color using logical thinking and strategic moves. As the levels progress, the puzzles become more complex, requiring careful planning. With simple controls and engaging mechanics, Sorting Balls is perfect for players who enjoy brain-teasing challenges.

title: Stickman Jailbreak Story
description:
An exciting puzzle game in which the player will have to help stick make a daring escape from prison. Stick found himself in a sinister prison, from which there is no way out, except for various ingenious paths, hidden objects and puzzles.
The player will explore the various rooms of the prison, paying attention to every small detail and examining objects in search of key clues. Each room is filled with riddles, traps and various items that can be used to escape.

title: Relax Mini Games Collection
description: This is a collection of creative and fun mini-games. The game contains a variety of modes, you can DIY ice cream, have cooking for mooncakes, design a car of your favorite, and so on. You cant miss our game if you want to find some relaxation in your busy life.

title: Princesses of Quadrobics
description: Two beautiful princesses, Eliza and the Little Mermaid, are waiting for your help in creating the perfect images for practicing Quadrobics. First, create a gentle but expressive makeup for each of the girls and put your hair in a comfortable hairstyle. Then choose dresses, jewelry and accessories. But the adventures don't end there! Complete the look by putting masks in the form of adorable animals on the princesses. After all, this is a mandatory part of the Quadrobics trend!

title: Slingshot Master
description: Take aim with a powerful slingshot, launch your hero through the air, and eliminate stickman foes in exciting, dynamic levels. With easy-to-learn controls, you’ll quickly master the art of launching, facing new challenges and enemies with every level.

title: Puzzle Blocks Classic
description: Get ready for an addictive block puzzle challenge! Drag and drop colorful blocks to clear lines and rack up points. Think ahead, make big matches, and unleash powerful Super Blocks to crush multiple lines at once! Stuck? Use boosters to keep the game going. With three chances to clear the center, aim for the highest score and climb the global leaderboard. Easy to play, hard to master—can you become the ultimate puzzle champion? Let the block-dropping fun begin!

title: Merge Pixel
description:
Attractive characters in dot, pixel style!
Combining the same characters creates a higher level of characters.
Repeat Merge to create a legendary character.

title: Theo Morini's Magical Resort
description:
“Theo Morini’s Magical Resort” is a magical, romantic, and captivating merge puzzle game about rebuilding a resort on an enchanted island.

Talented writers and actors created this story and brought its characters to life. Enjoy the story!

title: Stack n Sort
description:
Welcome to Stack n Sort, the ultimate color stack game that combines precision, hoop sort strategy, and excitement in one addictive experience.

Immerse yourself in a world of vibrant stack color and dynamic hoop sort challenges as you test your skills and aim for high scores. Whether you’re a casual gamer or a competitive enthusiast, hoop stack offers endless fun and engagement.

title: Mysterious Familiars Enchanted Bestiary
description: Welcome to the magical world of Mysterious Familiars! Your task is to fill the magic vessel by simply tapping on the screen. Each click fills the potion bowl. As soon as the vessel is filled, a new image of one of the familiars or its next stage of maturation will open. Explore magical locations, from the Moonlight Glade to the Slug Trail, and watch incredible creatures appear from small drops of magic potion. Start the adventure right now - the familiars are waiting for you!

title: Bitball
description:
A unique tile ball puzzle game from coin base bitcoin games loved by millions of players around the world. 
Make a lot of coins and become a rich. ?
 - Start with 10 and start making millions. ?
 - Coun you rech the topmillioners.❓
 - Play with friend together.?
 - Guess the ball where it will go.?

title: Politon
description: Politon is a turn-based strategy game with easy-to-understand mechanics and satisfying visuals. If you want to test your strategical logic against enemies of different numbers and difficulty levels, Politon offers a variety of hex-based maps with various terrains. You'll need to manage your economy while expanding your territories and defend your region against rival invasions.

title: Mahjong Slide Puzzle
description: Experience the thrill of Mahjong puzzles! Strategically match tiles, clear the board, and conquer challenging levels to achieve high scores!

title: Spa empire
description:
? BUILD YOUR DREAM SPA EMPIRE

Have you ever dreamed of running the ultimate spa, offering everything from soothing massages to exciting makeovers? Step into My Spa Empire, the idle arcade game where you dye hair, create stunning hair color makeovers and manage a bustling spa filled with exciting treatments. Design, upgrade, and expand your spa into the ultimate relaxation haven for your guests.

title: 3D Basketball.io Dunk Sport
description: Sports Basketball is a thrilling 3D basketball game that will keep you entertained for hours. Whether you're a basketball fan or just love fast-paced Sports games Fun

title: High Heels 2
description: Stack rider new run adventure game with high heels, swipe to collect heels and make tall stack heels, and cross bricks and reach the destination. Have a good time.

title: FRAGEN
description:
FRAGEN offers intense gunfights and challenges! With dynamic game modes, you can test your skills in different ways and become the best shooter out there!
Are you ready to join the fight? Gear up, and prove your skills!

title: Geometry Arrow
description: Dive into an exhilarating journey through a treacherous cave! Your mission: reach the portal at the end of each level while avoiding deadly spikes and obstacles. With six progressively harder levels, you’ll need sharp reflexes and spot-on timing to survive. Can you conquer every challenge and make it out of the cave? Put your skills to the test in this high-speed action game!

title: Cut Grass
description: Do you know powerful a ring blade is? Cut Grass will show you a famous Mexican weapon in a 3D collecting puzzle arcade game. Here is some weed on the mud, your mission is to cut them all down at all levels. Without time and score limitations, keep calm and have a good time!

title: Home Island
description:
Looking for a family adventure game? Try our Home Island: Family Pin free puzzle games about village life in paradise island! Pull the pin to solve the puzzle, follow the story and enjoy adventures on the island.
On the adventure for discovering the new island, a family cruise ship plane had to face an accident because of the bad weather. The father has gone missing, but the mother and their daughter luckily survived and got to a strange island.

title: Block Crasher
description: Block Crasher is a fun and fast-paced mix of classic Bubble Shooters, block-breaking games, and a bit of penalty shooting flair. Your goal is to launch colorful bubbles at moving blocks, match the colors, and score as many points as possible. It’s all about timing, precision, and quick thinking as the blocks keep shifting across the screen.

title: Avoid The Spikes
description: Jump and dodge all the spikes to avoid dying, get score for each touch of the wall and get gems while jumping to then be able to buy new skins in the in-game store in which there are 22 to unlock in exchange for the gems obtained.

title: Sprunki Garden
description: Welcome to Sprunki Garden – a wild match-3 puzzle adventure inspired by the legendary Sprunki meme! Match colorful Sprunki characters across 100 hilarious levels filled with chaos, charm, and absurdity. Every move connects you with the bizarre Sprunki universe, where each character is weirder than the last. Get ready to swipe, match, and laugh your way through the most brainrotted garden ever!

title: Belote 3in1
description:
Play 3 of the most popular card games with smart & powerful AI co-players, who won’t forget the game’s rules:
- French Belote – the original: a trick-taking game played by four players in two teams, using a 32-card deck, and featuring Ace-Ten cards. 
- Contrée – a variant of Belote with advanced bidding options.
- Coinche – a variant of Belote with even further advanced bidding options, declarations, and No Trumps & All Trump modes.

title: Draw To Home 3D
description:
Draw to home is a game to draw lines home. Everyone needs to return home according to their respective homes. This type of puzzle game is full of adventure with avoiding traps and obstacles on the way to finding a house.

Play a game of drawing a line to get home. It is very fun for children or teenagers to fill their days with this fun game.

title: Daily Wordler
description:
Test your vocabulary and puzzle-solving skills with Daily Wordler, the ultimate word-guessing game that challenges your mind every day! With a simple yet addictive gameplay mechanic, Daily Wordler is perfect for fans of word games and brain teasers. 

Your goal is to guess the hidden word by entering valid words and using color-coded feedback to narrow down the solution. Yellow tiles indicate correct letters in the wrong position, while blue tiles signal correct letters in the right spot.

title: Marathon Race io
description: In Marathon Race io, players take on the role of a runner who strives to become the fastest athlete on the planet. Players start at a basic level and can improve runner skills such as speed, endurance, income, etc. The more the player covers the distance, the more opportunities there are to improve skills and collect bonuses.

title: Dragon Hunter
description:
Choose your character, roll the dice and go on a fun adventure.
Click on monsters - help the hero survive and defeat the legendary dragons in the clicker RPG Dragon Hunter.
Luck and a strong phone glass will determine the fate of the dragon hunter.

title: Motorcycle Racer: Road Mayhem
description:
Motorcycle Racer: Road Mayhem is an exciting motorcycle racing game. 
In this game you will become a motorcycle racer who travels through city streets and highways, avoiding collisions with other vehicles. You will be able to unlock faster and more powerful motorcycles, each with its own unique handling characteristics, as well as improve the characteristics of your motorcycle. One of the key features of the game is a realistic physics engine that makes the gameplay challenging and exciting.

title: Cookie Land
description: Step into Cookie Land, the ultimate sweet Match 3 adventure! Match cookies, candies, pies, donuts, cupcakes, and cotton candies to clear the board and trigger scrumptious chain reactions. Explore a fairytale-like saga map filled with colorful sweets, charming graphics, and a catchy soundtrack. With new treats raining down and endless levels of fun, Cookie Land is the most addictive, mouth-watering Match 3 game for all sweet lovers!

title: Mermaidcore Aesthetics
description: In Mermaidcore Aesthetics, you'll embark on a thrilling undersea adventure alongside three fabulous fashionistas. Each mermaid has a unique and stunning wardrobe that will make your inner fashionista do a happy dance! With a wide selection of clothing options and accessories available at your disposal, you'll have endless possibilities to create your fashionable mermaid looks. Have a blast!

title: Pet Fall
description: You can move animals from side to side. You have to collect full horizontal lines to make them disappear. Some animals are frozen and must be released twice, some are locked in cages and cannot be moved. Use bonuses when necessary

title: Noob in Geometry Dash
description: Move to the rhythm and help Nubik navigate challenging levels! Collect keys to unlock skins, complete courses, and see how high you can rank among the best players. Step into the beat-driven adventure!

title: Cozy Kitchen Merge
description: This is an addictive cooking-themed merge game you won't be able to put down. Here, you'll become a kitchen master by merging identical ingredients and dishes to create new, more delicious cuisine. From simple vegetables to exotic feasts, continuously unlock tasty recipes from around the world. Fulfill customer orders to earn coins, and use them to upgrade and decorate your kitchen, transforming it from a humble diner into a dream culinary paradise.

title: 3D Ball Balancer
description: 3D Ball Balancer is a fun 3D rolling ball game. Control the ball to roll on the floating bridge. There are obstacles all over the floating bridge, including broken bridges, ramps, single-plank bridges, etc. Not only do you have to control the direction of the ball, but you also have to control the speed of the ball. How far you can go? Have a try!

title: Blockibo: Color Blocks
description:
Blockibo: Color Blocks is a fun and thoughtful puzzle game where every move matters.
Move colorful blocks, unlock gates, overcome obstacles and use boosters to clear the board.

title: Furry Kung Fu
description: Furry Kung-Fu & Babushka is a humorous fighting game with fun cartoon graphics, where controlling Cat or Babushka you need to inflict the enemy a series of hand-to-hand strikes, managing to dodge the sinister ball and sausage, which every second flies at you. Engage in epic hand-to-hand combat with park troublemakers. Earn achievements, get coins, unlock player skins! Will you be able to throw enemy sausage back at them? How long can you hold out? It's time to find out!

title: Wild Tanks
description:
Wild Tanks includes two game modes.
This is a survival race and tough tank battles.

Compete in tank races with shooting, earn stars, level up the tanker, upgrade your tank.
Take part in epic tank battles and destroy the enemy.

Break, destroy, destroy everything. Drive through the mountains, crush soldiers, blow up the enemy, have fun to the fullest!

title: Super Brain
description: In the game, you'll control a character sprinting down a track, but your path is blocked by a series of "Gates of Knowledge." Each gate presents an interesting question, and you must choose the lane corresponding to the correct answer in a short amount of time to pass through. A wrong choice ends the run! As you get faster, the questions become trickier. This game tests not only your knowledge but also your on-the-spot reaction skills. Come join this dual challenge of brain and speed!

title: Dream Restaurant 3D
description: Ready for the ultimate restaurant challenge in Dream Restaurant 3D? Embark on a journey to establish your very own restaurant empire. The mission is straightforward: swiftly attend to customers, prepare delectable hamburgers, stack them up, and gracefully serve them around the tables. Expand your team by hiring proficient waiters, accumulate profits, and gradually construct an unparalleled restaurant empire!

title: Pizza Tycoon
description: Play as Boss Hei Wa, running a pizza shop! Serve food, collect payments, hire and upgrade staff, and expand sales channels. Manage and grow your business to success!

title: Red Stickman vs Craftmans 2
description: Classic platformer with shooting. Stickman got into the world of Minecraft, flooded with zombie people and zombie animals. Help Stickman destroy all the infected, save Eve and get out of this world.

title: Build and Run
description: Experience the ultimate blend of running and building in our action-packed game! Navigate through exciting levels by constructing missing parts of the level while running at full speed. Master using horizontal builds, slopes, and ramps to keep moving forward and avoid dangerous traps.

title: Mahjong Connect: Spooky
description: Connect two tiles of an identical type. A move can only be made if there are 2 or fewer bends in the line between them. Clear the board to advance to the next level, but be warned, the game is time sensitive.

title: Boxteria
description:
Dive into an amazing cubic world, where you can become anyone from a BANDIT to a ZOMBIE attacking everyone around! Imagine having 20 super cool cars at your disposal to ride, drift, and have fun on maps like "Russian Village," and "Courtyard," spaces filled with adventures.

You'll enjoy creating characters, each unique in their own way. You can assemble a team of bandits, zombies, or even police officers and engage in thrilling battles or cool races.

title: Sniping aliens
description: Aliens skilled in disguise have quietly infiltrated Earth, and their traces may be found in every corner of the city. Find and kill them, and drive the evil aliens out of Earth!

title: Darling Doll
description: Darling Doll is the ultimate paper doll DIY game that offers a perfect blend of character creation and dress-up game. With a vast collection of outfits, accessories, and hairstyles, you can unleash your creativity and design unique avatars that reflect your personal style. Whether you prefer chibi dolls or glamorous fashion dolls, Darling Doll has got you covered.

title: Mobile Legends Slime 3v3
description: Mobile Legends Slime 3v3 will bring you into a fun arena of exciting battles! In this 3v3 PvP game, you can unblock many slime characters. Enter a variety of colorful battle scenes. Each character has unique skills and fighting styles, ensuring you find the best gameplay.

title: Shipbuilding tycoon
description:
Do you want to become a shipyard manager and build big ships?
Step into the role of a shipyard manager and grow your very own ship empire in this addictive idle game! As you build ships, earn profits, and unlock epic vessels, you’ll expand your factory and boost production efficiency.

title: UGC Math Race
description:
Run fast. Think faster!

Solve math problems on the go in this competitive racing game! Choose the correct answer to stay on track, one mistake and you fall. 

Perfect for players who love speed, smarts, and math.

title: Portal Hop
description: Portal Hop is a platform puzzle game where you carry a portal above your head and use it to solve tricky challenges! Move through each level by warping yourself onto higher platforms, collecting plus and minus power-ups to adjust the height of your portal. Think smart, plan your moves, and find the perfect path to reach your destination. Ready to warp your way to victory

title: Basketball Life 3d
description: Ready for the wonderful basketball challenge? Basketball Life 3D is a fun and creative sports game that tests your skills and timing! From classic hoop challenges to trick shots, every level is packed with excitement.

title: Basketball Rush
description: This isn’t just about shooting — it's about precision, patience and strategy. As you score, the game intensifies, but with helpful power-ups at your disposal, you’ll be ready for anything. Unlock a variety of unique ball skins to customize your game and add even more excitement.

title: Meme Wars
description: MeMe Wars is a strategy battler with US-style Shanhaijing flair. Build a quirky hero lineup with unique roles and stats. Place them on the board for max power, adapt to new foes each stage, and win.

title: STALKER-Strike
description: STALKER-Strike is a tactical online shooter inspired by CS and Valorant — but set in a deadly Zone filled with anomalies. Fight as stalkers or special forces in fast-paced PvP battles where hazards can shift the tide. Level up, survive traps, and prove your skills. Love CS, Standoff, or Valorant? Then step into the Zone and become a legend in this intense fusion of esports action and danger!

title: Hexa Sort 3D
description: Hexa Sort 3D mixes puzzle challenges, strategic matching and a satisfying merging experience.Involving clever puzzle-solving and logical manoeuvres, this game is ideal for those seeking a mental workout. As the levels progress, players will find the game both addictive and calming, striking the perfect balance between challenge and relaxation. Put your skills to the test with tasks such as sorting, stacking and merging hexagonal tiles.

title: From Zombie to Glam A Spooky Transformation
description: Embark on a spooktacular journey with Ellie in "From Zombie to Glam: A Spooky Transformation"! Help her shed her undead appearance and embrace a new, ordinary life. Dive into levels of makeover, hand clean, makeup, nail decor, and dress-up for an epic Halloween makeover!

title: Tie-Dye Explosion of Color
description: Welcome to the new game for girls who love juicy colors and stylish outfits. In this game you will meet two girlfriends: the self-confident Kaylee and the sweet Marie. The game begins in a world painted in bright colors, where girls want to create the most unusual and colorful outfits using the Tie-Dye technique. Join creative girlfriends and create the brightest and most stylish outfits in the world of Tie-Dye!

title: Bark & Blast
description: Crash-land on a post-apocalyptic planet in Bark & Blast! Help a brave alien dog survive and escape in this thrilling 2D platformer action RPG. Test your aim, strategy, and courage in an epic adventure. Play now and conquer the challenges!

title: Royal Garden Match
description: Welcome to Royal Garden Match! You’ve inherited a grand Royal Castle and a once-beautiful garden—now it’s up to you to bring its beauty to life! Solve exciting match-3 puzzles by combining exquisite royal flowers, fruits, and plants to unlock powerful boosters. With hundreds of challenging levels, unique royal characters, and a magical journey ahead, there's always something new to discover. Can you make the royal garden flourish? Play now and start your enchanting adventure!

title: Ludo World
description: Experience endless fun with various vibrant environments, where every roll of the dice brings a new challenge. Choose between classic or quick mode, progress along the trophy road, and prove you're the master of the board with every move you make.

title: Let The Train Go
description: Unblock Metro is a fascinating puzzle game. You need to move all the vehicles in front of the metro so that the metro drives smoothly along the track. You have to be careful that the head of the vehicle is facing that way and you can't change the direction of the vehicle. There are cars,trucks, ambulances, and so on. Lovely pictures and a wide variety of cars give you a refreshing gaming experience. The intricate vehicles placed in front of the metro will dazzle you. Waiting for your challenge！

title: Draw To Fly
description: Ready for a game that’s as creative as it is challenging? Draw Fly brings your imagination to life, turning simple drawings into pathways to solve puzzles and conquer obstacles. Whether you’re flying past traps or dodging tricky obstacles, this puzzle game will keep you entertained for hours.

title: Horde Hunters
description: Horde Hunters is an idle and clicker game where you will earn money by killing zombies. Upgrade to a new level by merging soldiers, speeding up your shots, and increasing the amount of money you get. Shoot a horde of zombies from the top of a moving vehicle and get rich!

title: Tile Match Connect 3 Tiles
description:
You have to tap and match all the tiles to clear the playing field before the timer expires. It can help you focus and hone your skills to think and react quickly. Go to the unearthly world and become a master of the match 3 game genre!

Enjoy this mahjong tile matching game and enjoy moments of peace during the day to calm your mind and recharge your brain. Sharpen your mind with a series of tile matching levels that gradually increase the difficulty of the puzzle. Relax and enjoy the beautiful scenery backgrounds and use your creativity to decorate your own zen room to relax!

Let matching tiles become your new hobby for a relaxed creative mind. Come back to it every day, as there are always new daily mahjong puzzles that allow you to take care of your own houseplant and become a mahjong master!

title: Dice Fusion
description: Dice Fusion is a casual game with puzzle content. The game is easy to understand and use the game mechanism, as well as highly strategic gameplay, colorful vision and with a leisurely background sound, to bring users visual and auditory dual enjoyment, so as to achieve the relaxation of the user's physical and mental needs.

title: Two Archers: Bow Duel
description: Get ready for a great battle at the Archery Tournament, because no one is going to just give up and let you win. With each new battle, your enemies will only become stronger. But you shouldn't stay put either. Buy new equipment. A huge selection of different bows will help you defeat your enemies, from simple wooden ones to magical golden bows with incendiary arrows! Earn money by participating in the tournament.

title: The specimen zero
description:
The moment has arrived to persevere in a hostile and mysterious environment. In the 3D horror game Specimen Zero, sick creatures creep across rooms, trying to murder you until you can find a way to escape.

You are terrified, you have no idea where you are, and your last memory is of being abducted. However, an unusual and maybe hazardous event has taken place in that peculiar location. A means of evasion from such establishments must be found by you.

title: Overflowing Palette
description:
Test your puzzle-solving skills in Overflowing Palette! Pick the perfect colors, flood the board, and fill every tile before your moves run out. You'll find plenty of levels with different mechanics, an endless mode without a move counter if you want to relax, and the ability to create and share your own levels.

Credits
Based on the puzzle of the same name from the game "Wuthering Waves " by Kuro Games.

title: Onet Mahjong Connect
description: Onet Mahjong Connect is an easy and fun puzzle game where players match identical tiles. The goal is to connect two matching tiles. Tiles can be linked if they can be joined using three or fewer straight lines. With many levels to enjoy, the game offers a relaxing and engaging experience — perfect for taking a break and sharpening your mind!

title: King Kong Kart Racing
description: Get ready for an exhilarating kart racing experience in King Kong Kart Racing, where you'll navigate thrilling tracks, outmaneuver opponents, and collect fuel packs to extend your runway, all while immersing yourself in a fun cartoon theme, complete with simple controls for both desktop and mobile users and a great racing soundtrack.

title: World Cup 2026 Soccer Game
description:
Choose your national team and enter the excitement of the World Cup! 
Play as your favorite heroes like Cristiano Ronald, Lionel Messi or Kylian Mbappe and jump into fast-paced 1v1 soccer battles to claim the cup! 
Defend your goal, watch for the perfect opening, and strike to score!
Challenge the CPU or compete against friends, sharpen your skills, and climb your way to the top. Victory is just a goal away!

title: Zoo Anomaly Simulation
description: Experience a zoo mutation crisis like no other. In Zoo Anomaly Simulation, a peaceful zoo has turned into a nightmare filled with mutated animals, and you’re the only one who can stop the chaos! Enter a first-person shooting experience like no other. Explore the eerie zoo environment, grab your weapons, and fight back against giraffes, zebras, elephants, etc.

title: Card Solitaire: Word Game
description:
Train your brain in a fun new way with Card Solitaire: Word Game — a clever blend of card sorting, word puzzles, and logic challenges!
Explore the exciting world of word solitaire, packed with clever associations, tricky word sort levels, and fun topic sort puzzles.

title: Canasta Royale Offline
description:
Canasta is the most traditional and loved card game by all. It is an exciting mix of strategy, luck and skill.Canasta uses two complete decks of 52 playing cards (French Deck) plus the four Jokers. All the Jokers and twos are wild cards.

Game Features:
★ 2 or 4 players
★ Clockwise or Counter-Clockwise
★ Game is automatically saved each turn, so you can close it and continue playing later
★ Undo function so you can cancel mistaken melds

title: Hostage Fishes
description: A malfunction occurred in the aquarium filter pipes. The fish in the aquarium are in a very difficult situation. If you do not repair all the pipes within 1 minute, you may cause them to disappear.  You should fix the pipes as soon as possible to solve the problem.

title: G Wagon City Driver
description: Dive into city driving with four game modes. Navigate busy morning streets, managing fuel and realistic traffic. Venture beyond the city to tackle rugged offroad terrain. Stunning morning graphics bring the city and landscapes to life, while unpredictable pedestrians and police chases add excitement. Customize your G-Wagon's look and performance, and enjoy the ride with your loyal dog. Whether evading cops or exploring trails, G-Wagon City Driver offers a thrilling experience.

title: Demolition Derby Derby
description: Welcome to Demolition Derby the mobile sensation where you control the chaos! Strategically tap to toss dynamite and swipe to send rocks crashing down. Decimate buildings and statues with precision in this hyper-casual game.

title: Jail Prison Van Police Game
description:
Get ready for action-packed gameplay! Take on the role of a police officer, drive the prison van, and ensure the secure transport of criminals in this exciting Police Bus Game

Immerse yourself in the intense world of law enforcement with the Jail Prison Van Police Game. Assume the role of a dedicated police officer tasked with transporting high-profile criminals in a specially designed prison van.

title: Animal Basketball
description: Dive into Basketball: The Power of Moe! Team up with adorable animals, unlock over 100 magical balls, and enjoy physics-powered hoop action. Play through arcade, championship, and mission modes on dazzling courts in this fun and addictive basketball party!

title: Zumba Story
description: Explore every corner of the jungle, create combinations and shoot colorful marbles. With each level, face unique challenges and utilize powerful boosters to enhance your skills. Unlock exciting chapters, conquer obstacles, and experience a vibrant journey full of surprises!

title: Merge in Space
description: Merge in Space is a cosmic twist on the classic Tetris formula, where you must strategically merge falling astronomical objects of the same kind as they descend through the infinite void of space

title: Bublix: Bubble Hit
description: Bublix: Bubble Hit is a fast-paced bubble shooter where precision and strategy matter. Aim, shoot, and match 3 or more bubbles to clear the board. Use clever angles, wall bounces, and combos to boost your score. With endless gameplay and rising difficulty, it’s perfect for quick, addictive sessions.

title: Color Bump Dancer
description: Color Bump Dancer is a fun and casual puzzle game, with cool colors that greatly enhance the fun of the game. Various classic levels are waiting for you to pass, and there are also various gameplay options, don't miss the game!

title: Popping Candies
description: Match and crush candies to achieve goals in this addictive puzzle game! Swap adjacent candies to form rows of three or more and clear the board. Create special candies like striped, wrapped, or color bombs to enhance your progress. Overcome obstacles like chocolate and blockers while completing each level's unique objectives. Be mindful of your limited moves! Use boosters for extra assistance and advance through challenging levels to unlock new stages.

title: Imposter Coloring Book
description: Get ready for a colorful twist on the mystery and excitement of the Imposter Coloring Book! Inspired by the thrilling world of imposters, this coloring app lets you bring your favorite characters to life with vibrant colors and unique brush styles. Choose from various brushes, including pastel, watercolor, and pencil, to add a unique touch to each crewmate, imposter, and spaceship scene. Whether you prefer bold colors or a soft pastel look, every coloring page is yours to make unique.

title: Match Collection
description: Collect 3 of the same items from the shelf to erase them. When a shelf is empty, the shelf above it falls down. You can have up to 7 items, and when your hand is full, the game is over. When all items are erased, the stage is cleared.

title: Cube in Cube
description: Play the new 2048 game with unique mechanics! Develop strategies to clear cubes in endless mode or rescue the monkey. Challenge yourself now!

title: Candy Carver
description: Play Candy Carver free online and dive into a colorful browser game you can play instantly with no download and no install. Slice and sculpt sweet treats in a relaxing logic puzzle that feels like a light brain game, mixing creativity with satisfying precision. This unblocked game loads fast and runs smoothly at school or home, perfect for quick breaks. Fully mobile-friendly and optimized for desktop and mobile, it’s a free online game made for easy, calming fun anytime.

title: Block Team Deathmatch
description: Block Team Deathmatch is a first-person shooting simulation game. All models are made of pixel blocks including scenes, characters, and weapons. We have 4v4 Team Mode, Individual Mode, and Sniper Mode for you to select. If I were you, I would play the Team Mode first for better equipment, then challenge the other 2 modes when the rank levels up. If you never played any shooting games, I recommend you buy an auto-rifle to fight at any distance. Keep calm and shoot first!

title: Russian Treasure Hunter
description: You're a prospector in a big mining town: grab your device, head to a location, and search for hidden items. As your device's signal grows, you're near a treasure trove; dig up a find and take it back to town to sell. The game combines tactical exploration, economics, and collecting: clever backpack management, purchasing upgrades, and choosing the right moment to return to town determine whether you'll make a profit or leave empty-handed.

title: MeatRider
description: Welcome to "MeatRider" — an intense action-packed game set in a post-apocalyptic world overrun by zombies. You find yourself right in the middle of the chaos, where your only goal is to survive at all costs. Choose one of the unique combat vehicles, each with its own special abilities and weapons, and get ready for dynamic battles across a zombie-infested desert landscape.

title: Ballistic Breakthrough
description: explore lush scenes, tackle tricky obstacles, and unlock upgrades. Every level blends fun challenges with strategic boosts

title: Jigsolitaire
description: Step into a peaceful world of beautiful images made from gentle, carefully crafted blocks. Jigsolitaire is a game you’ll want to return to every day: it helps you unwind, disconnect from stress, and enjoy a small moment of calm just for yourself. Each level reveals a new scene - warm landscapes, charming cottages, delicate nature details, and quiet corners you’ll love exploring piece by piece.

title: Biking Extreme 3D
description: Do you like riding a mountain bike? Biking Extreme 3D offers you a chance to ride a mountain bike and challenge multiplayer mountain racing tracks. It doesn't matter when you crash any other riders on the track, they will be crashed into the sky. But please always keep a safe distance between your vehicle and obstacles like trees and rocks. Or else, you will lose the game directly. The coins you won are used to upgrade your bike. Don't forget to try another 5 characters!

title: Celebrity Spring Fashion Trends
description: Welcome to Celebrity Spring Fashion Trends. Hello little girls. Are you ready for the latest spring fashion collection? Follow the latest fashion trends with these celebrities and create your own fashion clothes for next spring season. Browse their wardrobe to pick suitable outfits and costumes. Join and help them to welcome their favorite season.

title: Hidden Object Rooms Exploration
description: Explore a variety of rooms and find hidden items! With 18 levels and 6 items to discover in each room, enjoy the thrill of searching through different spaces like living rooms and more. Drag the screen to explore them. Get ready for an exciting adventure in 'Hidden Object Rooms Exploration'!

title: Run from Baba Yaga
description:
Run from Baba Yaga is a potentially endless runner in which player has to collect as much treasures as possible and run as long as possible while Baba Yaga is trying to catch up with them.

During the chase, Baba Yaga gradually gets stronger: her movespeed and damage increase.An outstanding result can be achieved if player reaches the last stage of the game by running 400 hexes (hexagonal pieces of path).

title: Snap Fix
description:
Snap Fix is a fast-paced block puzzle game where you slide tiles to restore a scrambled picture.
With one empty space to maneuver, you must think quickly and arrange the grid before time runs out!
Complete the puzzle to unlock and download the image as a reward.
Can you snap everything into place before the clock hits zero?

title: Wood Blocks Jam
description:
Wood Blocks Jam is a relaxing logic puzzle game with colorful wooden blocks. Your goal is to drag each block into a gate of the same color. No time limits — just calm, thoughtful gameplay.

Enjoy thousands of handcrafted levels with increasing difficulty and new mechanics to discover.

title: Brainrot Mob Clash 3D
description: Welcome to the wild and chaotic world of Brainrot Mob Clash 3D. It’s a full-blown racing and fighting adventure. Dash through 3D obstacle courses, avoid deadly traps like spikes and spinning saws. Match and merge your stickman army. Crush enemy mobs in exciting action-packed battles. As you run, collect brainrot characters to increase your numbers and merge them to form powerful units.

title: Sniper vs Sniper
description: Sniper vs. Sniper is a game where players compete in sniper shooting skills. Each player takes on the role of a sniper, participating in intense battles with an opponent. Exciting long-distance sniper duels where key skills include accuracy, strategy, and quick reaction.

title: Digging Moles
description: Dig, guide, and solve! In this physics-based puzzle game, tap or click to dig tunnels and create paths for cute, ball-shaped moles. Your mission is to help each mole roll into the correct colored pipe. Use gravity and smart digging to guide them through challenging terrain filled with obstacles, slopes, and surprises. Timing, precision, and a bit of creativity are key! With charming visuals and satisfying mechanics, this game offers fun and brain-teasing puzzles for players of all ages.

title: Penguin Adventure
description: Join the penguin’s adventure in Penguin Adventure! You will play as a penguin who must reach the castle in each level. You will explore three worlds, each with its own challenges and surprises. You will also have to control the penguin’s actions. You will collect stars and hearts along the way, which will affect your score and rewards. You will need enough yellow stars to unlock the next world. Penguin Adventure is a game that will test your reaction and strategy. Don’t miss this fun game!

title: Popping Pets
description: In Popping Pets, stack and match adorable pets to score points! Connect three or more adjacent pets to clear them before time runs out. Look out for bombs for big clears and big points. Can you reach the highest score in one minute?

title: Perfect Shot
description:
Step into Perfect Pocket, a unique puzzle game inspired by classic pool, but with a twist – you only get one shot to clear each level! Test your aim, plan your angles, and pocket all balls in a single move. 
Game Highlights :- 
One-Shot Levels: Every level challenges you to pocket all balls with just one shot. 
Realistic Physics: Feel the true motion and collision of balls. Many Unique Levels: Each with different layouts and increasing difficulty.

title: Labubu Adventure
description:
Dive into a world of Labubu characters. If you are looking for an amazing adventure, help the little Labubu to complete all the levels and collect coins through the fantasy world.
Whether you want to elevate your gaming skills or just look for simple fun, you can always find something that fits your type.

title: Halloween Fruit Slice
description: Halloween Fruit Slice is a high-energy arcade action game set in a spooky Halloween world. Vivid fruits and devious traps streak across the screen in an instant. Your task is to slice as many fruits as possible with lightning speed, chaining spectacular combos and racking up points while dodging explosive bombs. Rich visuals, splashy juice effects, and eerie backdrops create a thrilling, immersive atmosphere. The tempo keeps rising, so every moment tests your reflexes and precision.

title: Clicker Hero
description: Click on the screen to defeat the monsters and earn gold in Clicker Hero. Spend your gold to buy and upgrade heroes that deal damage automatically. Then advance to fight tougher monsters that drop more gold. This game keeps going, even when you're offline, so come back later to earn and spend even more!

title: Soda Block Jam
description:
Slide soda crates, collect bottles, and deliver to the right
exits. A smooth, colorful puzzler that blends motion and
color-matching

title: Ninja Climb
description: Embark on a thrilling ascent in Ninja Climb, a captivating 2D game where your nimble ninja scales towering buildings. Click to seamlessly leap between structures, dodging obstacles along the way, and utilize rewarded video ads to revive when challenges arise, ensuring an adrenaline-packed ninja adventure.

title: Geometry Subzero
description: Welcome to Ice Age in Geometry Subzero! The new interface of this game has captured any player's heart. Instead of a basic interface, you can experience the cold air when it's snowy in this game. The main character is a little monster who is frozen. The monster moves forward on a road with many spikes. Move, jump, and slide to overcome these dangers! In this game, the diversity of characters is one attractive feature. You can move a turtle, penguin, seal, etc to overcome challenges in this game.

title: My Farm
description: Become the proud owner of your very own farm! Grow crops, tend to animals, catch fish, and set up production. Assemble collections of exotic animals in the zoo, meet the mysterious visitors, and embark on thrilling adventures!

title: Police Traffic Racer
description: Skid the wheels of 6 awesome police cars with insane speed limits and drive them through 3 landscape highways without crashing. Show how well you can steer the wheels of these amazing cars with roaring engines and conquer 3 awesome game modes. Use replenishing nitro to overtake slow cars and drive in speed at all times. Customize and upgrade your cars with the best upgrades and get the most out of all the cars. Are you ready to show your driving skills? Prove yourself in Luxury Highway Cars!

title: Cute cat's adventures
description: An adventure game for girls about a cat, with whom you have to go in search of kittens. Colorful levels await you, filled with traps, obstacles and secrets, as well as dangerous enemies who will try to prevent you from completing your main goal.

title: Geometry Vibes X-Arrow
description: Geometry Vibes X Arrow is the newest evolution of the Geometry Vibes series, offering the most refined, competitive and customizable arrow experience so far. The goal is simple but demanding: guide your arrow through dangerous geometric paths, survive increasingly difficult patterns and reach the portal at the end of each route without touching anything.

title: Real Impossible Sky Tracks Car Driving
description: Real Impossible Sky Tracks Car Driving  simulator, stunts, and gameplay options keep it interesting. This game is great for racing, 3D car games, and extreme car driving fans. Multiplayer and internet games let you challenge friends and show off your track talents. ??️

title: My horse is amazing
description:
Ride a horse and overcome obstacles: fences, pits and water obstacles. Control the jumps — tap and release to jump accurately.

Collect powerups with powerups — increase attack and health. The further you run, the stronger your horse becomes!

Your steed is growing: it's getting faster and more powerful. Upgrade it and keep running. At the end of each level is a boss battle! Show what you are capable of!

title: Math King - Math Skill Game
description:
Math King is the perfect game to help your kids to improve their Math skills in easy & fun way!
This game even helps you to develop calculation speed with high accuracy!

title: Revoxel 3D - Voxel RPG Shooter
description: Immerse yourself in a dynamic voxel-style RPG shooter with a cyberpunk atmosphere. A dark futuristic city overrun by a tech corporation awaits you, along with endless battles with robots and monsters, character development, and constant action in the spirit of a shooter RPG.

title: Cannon Blast - The Last Stand
description: You are in control of a cannon and the enemy army is marching towards you. You have to improve your skills, collect coins to buy upgrades, and never retreat because this is The Last Stand.

title: Ultimate Sports Car Drift
description: Dive into the world of Ultimate Sports Car Drift and feel the rush of adrenaline as you take on the ultimate drifting challenges. Whether you're a seasoned pro or a newcomer to the world of drift racing, this game offers something for everyone. Buckle up, hit the gas, and let the drifting madness begin!

title: SnakeMaxx
description: Dive into thrilling PvP battles or solo runs! Unlock avatars, skins, and boosters to power up your snake in this fast-paced action runner.

title: Digital Circus Find The Differences
description:
Step into the whimsical and wacky world of Digital Circus: Find The Differences, where fun meets challenge! Explore vibrant and surreal circus scenes filled with unique characters and zany details, all while sharpening your observation skills. Can you spot the subtle changes between two seemingly identical pictures?
Put your eyes to the test and discover how many differences you can find in this exciting puzzle adventure!

title: Hunt And Seek
description: Ready for a challenge of intellect and strategy? In Hunt And Seek, enter an adventure world filled with puzzles that will stimulate your brain as you search for hidden characters! This game offers endless fun and challenges, suitable for boys and puzzle enthusiasts! At the beginning of each level, an arrester is randomly selected. At the beginning of each level, a random arrester is selected to become a giant and start hunting.

title: SORTSTORE
description: Swap products to match three of the same kind and fulfill customer requests. Products can be moved to empty shelves, and items in the back will move forward when the front ones are removed. Each move decreases the number of moves left, and the game ends when the move count reaches 0.

title: Checkers Deluxe Edition
description:
It's a clash on the battlefield! Draw up your plan and defeat your opponents with finesse!

It is also known as the draughts game, and it is an interesting test of strategy. Compete with an opponent and dominate their pieces as best you can.

What happens when you manage to move a piece to the other end? Come play now and let's find out!

title: Human Evolution Run
description: Start with a skeleton, choose your evolution route.

title: Grand Clash Arena
description:
Grand Clash Arena is a unique war game that offers an action-packed experience.

Key Features of the Game:

-Epic Combat Experience: Showcase your mastery against opponents by using every object at your disposal.

-Drop Weapons and Surprises: Alter the flow of the game with surprise drops from the sky. Surprise your opponents with powerful weapons that suddenly appear and gain an advantage.

Grand Clash Arena offers a unique gaming experience that combines the art of war and strategy.

title: Hexa Sort Trick or Treat
description: Step into a haunted puzzle realm where glowing hexagonal blocks hide within a web of spooky challenges. Your task: sort eerie, color-coded pieces into their rightful places before the shadows close in. With every drag and drop, you’ll sharpen your wits and unravel chillingly clever layouts that grow trickier as you progress. Easy to pick up yet devilishly addictive, this Halloween brain-teaser will keep players of all ages spellbound through hundreds of spooky levels.

title: 99 Balls
description: 99 Balls 3D is an endless arcade game that mixes brick breaker and bubble shooter action in full 3D. Launch balls to smash numbered cylinders before they reach the bottom. Collect stars to unlock fun ball skins like sports balls, gems, or fruit. Simple to play, endlessly challenging, and highly addictive!

title: Caterfall 2048
description: Caterfall 2048 is a vibrant reimagining of the classic 2048 puzzle set in a cozy feline atmosphere. It combines familiar merging mechanics with a hexagonal grid and fun "jelly" physics. This game is perfect for all puzzle lovers — whether you want to relax or you're a competitive player striving for a new high score.

title: Save The Piggies
description: Save The Piggies is a car-moving game. But this time you are moving not a car, but a pig or other animal. From a few pigs to a large group of pigs, you need to click on the pigs to move forward until all the pigs are there. The pig must be successfully removed to pass the level.  Have fun!

title: Color Block Blast 3
description:
Drag and drop the correct block into the grid. Match 3 or more tiles of the same colour to eliminate them.

Score beautiful combos while earning bonus points and watching beautiful animations take shape.

How high can you score in this endless match 3 game?

title: Pin Master
description: Pin master: Screw puzzle quest & brain games challenges your problem-solving skills in a captivating pin puzzle adventure. Strategically tap to unlock screw holes on products, guiding metal plates to fall in the correct sequence. Navigate through intricate mazes of nuts, bolts, and plates. With each level presenting new challenges, immerse yourself in over 100 brain-teasing stages. Need a hint? No problem! Utilize the hint feature or remove random screws to progress.

title: Juicy Match
description: Tired of candies? Dive into Juicy Match and explore a world of natural, fresh, and juicy delights! You run the best Juice Bar in town, where you match a variety of fruits, from tropical to classic, to create the perfect juice blends. Your cheerful friend, Tiki will guide you with tips and tricks. Match three or more identical fruits to juice them and complete levels. Create chain reactions for extra bonuses and points. Enjoy a refreshing, juicy adventure with Juicy Match!

title: Ibiza Foam Party
description: Splash around in a sea of bubbles, dance to pumping beats, and compete against friends in wild and energetic beauty challenges. Ready to get the fun started? Then join Gina and Selena in this colorful, summer-themed makeover game for girls, and help them deal with their dazzling party looks. From scrubbing and skincare to makeup and fabulous fashion, you’re the ultimate stylist, ensuring these besties shine bright under the Ibiza sun.

title: Home Block Story
description: Step into a world of renovation! Match blocks, clear the board and unlock new decor to design your house just the way you want. With each new challenge, show your unique style and make your dream home a reality.

title: Panda Running
description: Embark on a thrilling adventure through the bamboo forest in Panda Running, an endless runner game where you guide a cute panda through various obstacles like traps, tree stumps, and boulders. Collect power-ups along the way to protect and boost yourself, experiencing non-stop excitement in this adrenaline-fueled journey.

title: Hidden Kitty
description:
Hidden Kitty is an engaging and delightful hidden object game for kids, available for free! Step into a world of adventure as you help an old lady reunite with her beloved kitties, who are playfully hiding throughout the building.
Embark on a Kitty-Finding Adventure

title: CUBE KING
description:
Show them who's the real King here!

New cubes appear from the portals at the bottom. Your task is to connect cubes with the same numbers by moving them from one stack to another!

You get coins for every merge. Use them wisely:
Upgrade a selected cube!
Unlock new portals with cubes!
Increase the starting level of cubes!
Extinguish burning cubes or instantly shatter the ice on all frozen cubes!

But be careful: if a stack overflows, the game ends!

title: The Branch Runner
description: Are you good at endless running arcade games? Here is a chance for you to play a funny running arcade game with 3D pixel blocks. You need to help the character run forward by means of rotating the platform track and avoiding the obstacle blocks. There are many beautiful skins in the shop. As long as you earned enough gold coins, you could unlock and use them!

title: Racing Car Destroying Zombie
description:
Zombie Racing Car fast-paced physics-based racing game. You’re in for the ride of your life through a zombie apocalypse!

Drive your car through deserts, forests, abandoned city,...surrounded by zombies, earn cash, upgrade your car powerful ones. Steer your car to keep balance on the hills while trying to smash zombies into debris. It's you against a boatload of super-strong zombies!

title: Parkour Obby
description: Dive into the ultimate parkour adventure with Parkour Obby! Immerse yourself in a world of stunning, blocky beauty inspired by iconic Minecraft graphics. Leap, sprint, and climb through meticulously crafted levels, each more breathtaking than the last. From towering cliffs to dazzling pixelated landscapes, every jump tests your skills, timing, and creativity.

title: Grow Wars.io
description: The battle between the heroes is beginning in the Grow Wars arena in this great io game! This battle is between the evolution heroes. Step into the arena and start slashing your opponents. Earn coins and buy new equipment or heroes in the shop. This battle can be played either single or 2 player. Call a friend and start playing together!

title: Zombie Frontier Shooter
description: Zombie Frontier Shooter is filled with non-stop action and zombie-slaying madness! Step into the shoes of a skilled sniper hunter as you embark on a mission to eliminate the relentless horde of undead creatures. In a world plagued by a lethal virus that has transformed ordinary humans into ferocious zombies. However, survivors must rise up and engage in a life-or-death struggle against the zombie menace, morphing into fearless zombie shooters who will stop at nothing to secure their territory.

title: Pumpkin Catcher
description:
Fly on a jetpack between walls and avoid rotating traps. Catch pumpkins using your favorite monster: zombie, vampire, devil or even a cat!

Try this challenging Halloween game and set a new world record in catching pumpkins. Compete with your friends on the online leaderboard! Collect them all!

title: Halloween Store Sort
description: In Halloween Store Sort, match spooky toys and Halloween decorations by dragging them between shelves. Create sets of three to clear the shelves and reveal hidden ones above or to the sides of the screen. With many levels and increasing difficulty, each level has a time limit, so think fast! Use the shuffle button if you get stuck. Complete all levels to win and become the ultimate Halloween sorting champion!

title: Thread Match 2
description:
Thread Match 2 is a satisfying logic puzzle game that combines color matching, layered challenges, and calming embroidery visuals.

Solve clever thread puzzles by planning the correct order of moves and dismantling complex constructions. Each level challenges your brain with blocked and unlocked elements, where strategy and attention matter more than speed.

title: Geometry Missile
description: Navigate your missile through challenging geometric obstacle courses! Control a triangular missile that automatically flies forward while you tap to guide it up and down. Avoid collisions with various shapes like triangles, rectangles, and spikes to reach the gate at each level's end. Test your reflexes in this fast-paced arcade adventure!

title: Wordmeister HD
description:
Create words in the English dictionary to score points. Drag and drop the tiles to form words.

Take advantage of bonus tiles such as double letter scores, triple word scores and more. How well-versed are you with the English vocabulary?

The highest score wins!

title: Find It In The Haunted Mansion
description: “Find It In The Haunted Mansion” is a finding style game, where you are a detective and need to find all the keys hidden in each part of the house to complete all the levels.

title: Car Collision Master
description: Rev up for Car Collision Master Jagged canyons frame your blue jeep versus orange-black rivals on a looping desert track. Smoke trails and starry arches amp the chaos—customize your rig, battle friends, and dominate leaderboards in this wheel-warping thrill ride. Feel the V8 roar; claim victory in dust and daring!

title: Link & Color Pictures
description: Link & Color Pictures is a captivating coloring puzzle game where you connect colorful dots to fill in the colors of intricate pictures. Dive into a world of creativity and challenge as you complete all sections of the picture to finish each level.

title: Hexa Tile Master
description: Welcome to Hexa Tile Master! Drag stacks of hex tiles from the bottom of your screen to empty spots on the board. Watch as similar tiles merge into bigger stacks, and collect stacks of 10 or more matching tiles to clear them. Your goal is to clear all the hex tiles before time runs out. Each level gets more challenging, but don't worry—fun animations and exciting rewards will keep you engaged. Enjoy the strategic fun and see how far you can go!

title: Crazy Traffic Control
description:
You control the traffic in the most realistic, craziest one-touch traffic game!
Put your timing and skills to the test with:

- realistic traffic 
- realistic acceleration   
- realistic stopping times!
- trains
- cows
- pedestrians

Unbelievably absorbing and incredibly fun — clear the intersections with Crazy Traffic Control!

title: Dragon Year Jigsaw
description: Dive into the lively universe of 'Dragon Year Jigsaw,' a comical online puzzle game set in the Chinese Dragon Year. Solve 24 levels of dragon-themed jigsaw puzzles, featuring vibrant and playful comic art. Perfect for puzzle lovers and those seeking a whimsical online experience. Join the fun – start piecing together your dragon adventure now!

title: Sophie's Farm
description:
Plot: After a divorce, Sophie is left alone with a child. She starts from scratch, hoping to turn her life around.
Gameplay: Fulfill customer orders by matching items on the playing field. Spend your earnings to restore the farm and other locations. Each task reveals more of the story and brings you closer to the finale.

title: Deform It
description:
Deform It is a game about deforming objects. There are 13 different ball options and 14 levels in total. Set in space, this game has 3 game modes.
-Level Mode
-Free Deform Mode
-Antigravity Mode

title: Steampunk Tower Builder
description: Build the tallest tower and touch the sky with the steampunk tower builder! Simply tap to release the blocks, making sure to release them at the right time to balance the tower. The tower will rise higher with each correctly placed block. If a block falls, you’ll have to start over. Use the funds you’ve accumulated to build as high as possible and climb the leaderboard!

title: Tricky Life
description:
Welcome to Tricky Life, the funniest brain test puzzle game ever made!
Here, logic meets laughter every level is designed to make you giggle, think twice, and smile when you finally find the answer.

title: Mr Throw
description: Mr Throw is a game in which even an old teddy bear can become a deadly weapon! Calculate the strength and direction of the throw and throw at the enemy all the things that come to hand! Victory in this dangerous garbage battle!

title: Ball and Girlfriend
description:
Our ball's girlfriend is in danger! They lock her in a cage and hide the key! You need to find the key and save your beloved Girlfriend!
There are many levels, different locations, enemies, dangerous obstacles, good graphics and much more!
There will be a boss in the last level!
Collect hearts to increase your health!
There are 3 difficulty levels to choose from!
There is one hidden emerald in each level, find the secret passage to it!

title: Egg Adventure
description: You need to manipulate eggs to solve all kinds of puzzles and get out of the door, seemingly simple but hidden secrets.The key to solving the problem may be a word or an action, which means that you need to understand it carefully

title: Pictures Riddle
description:
Guess 1 word based on shown 4 pictures
Discover what word can be related to pictures
Game has 2 modes: “Pictures” & “Riddles”
 
Features:
-     Simple & addictive gameplay
-     Challenging riddles
-     Hundreds of fun levels
-     …



** Credits:
-     Music by “Fred Patry”
-     Menu vector created by upklyak – www.freepik.com

title: Single Line Puzzle Drawing
description:
Sharpen your mind each day with fun single-line drawing puzzles — clever, captivating brain teasers that boost your cognitive skills one stroke at a time. Enjoy a relaxing and rewarding 20-minute mental workout!
Would you like a version tailored for an app store description or marketing banner?

title: Idle Bathroom Empire Tycoon
description: Ready to become the ultimate bathroom tycoon? In this exciting mix of simulation, management, and idle tycoon gameplay, you’ll start with a small restroom. Grow it into a luxurious five-star hygiene haven! Upgrade facilities, optimize services, and expand your empire to make your bathroom the most popular spot in town. Manage your front desk with care, and faster cashiering will give you more cash flow.

title: Spooky Chains
description: Spooky Chains is a fun Halloween puzzle game. Tap a tile and drag through matching nearby items to make a chain of 3 or more. The items vanish, and the tiles turn golden. Your goal is to turn all tiles golden. Sometimes a Flying Witch glides across the board. Tap her while she flies to watch a reward ad. After the ad, she blasts some tiles into golden. You can also watch a reward ad to remove the timer and play without time pressure.

title: King Of The Hill
description: Exciting pixel races to the top of the mountain! Choose a bright car, avoid all obstacles and reach the top of the mountain in one piece! Compete with other players and become the King of the Mountain!

title: Traffic Run Puzzle
description: Traffic Run Puzzle is a popular car merge and racing simulator game. All Players can enjoy this game free online. Buy cars to merge, high-level cars can earn more money. Take it to the road to race, and watch out for other cars. Classic game-playing mode and car-driving content. Dear traffic cop, come to help them get through the intersection!

title: Sand Blast
description:
Sand Blast – A Satisfying Flowing-Sand Puzzle Experience, a relaxing yet strategic puzzle game built on soft, flowing sand physics!
Every block is made of loose, unstable sand — place it, and it instantly crumbles and shifts with gravity. These pieces won’t stay still, so you’ll need to think ahead and plan every move carefully.

title: Hoop World 3D
description: Hoop World 3D is a flip-and-dunk game that brings basketball to a whole new dimension! Get your timing right or you'll fall short of the net and fall flat on your face.

title: Magic Beauty Makeup
description: Welcome to Magic Beauty Makeup, a casual and relaxing girl makeover game on H5games4u. The girl is in trouble with her appearance. Help her return to her original beauty with skin care and makeup methods. You will act as a makeover artist who does skin care, applies facial makeup, and designs a perfect look in the virtual fashion salon. And the best part? All the makeup procedures are done just by clicking and dragging.

title: Knock and Run. 100 Doors Escape
description: Become the fastest and most daring stickman in this fun arcade game! Your goal is to race through the corridors of the hotel, ring the doors, knock and slam them, arranging epic pranks. The main thing is not to get caught! Residents' reactions are unpredictable, and danger can lurk around every corner.

title: Stop The Bullet
description: Your task is to create protective barriers by drawing illustrations on the screen that are able to repel enemy attacks. Each level provides you with new creative opportunities, your every stroke matters, and your artistic intuition will be the key to a successful defense!

title: Nose Hospital
description: In Nose Hospital Games, The patients are counting on you in this nose surgery hospital game. Will you rise to the occasion and become the hero in plastic surgery games, they desperately need? Step into the operating theater and redefine the world of nose plastic surgery games.

title: Purrfect Puzzle
description: Purrfect Puzzle is an adorable cat-themed tile-merging puzzle game where players strategically place and combine cat tiles with different values to achieve higher scores. With relaxing pastel visuals, the game challenges players to think ahead while enjoying a cozy, heartwarming experience. Perfect for puzzle lovers and cat enthusiasts alike!

title: Hawaii Match 5
description: Escape to the paradise in Hawaii Match 5! Explore dreamlike landscapes while matching exotic fruits and flowers. With over 4000+ levels, complete challenging goals in limited moves by forming rows of five or more symbols. Unlock powerful boosters and combine symbols for explosive bonuses. Discover hidden treasures and let your soul unwind in this captivating island adventure. Play Hawaii Match 5 now and enjoy endless fun!

title: Choco Blocks
description: Enter the delightful world of Choco Blocks, a tantalizing puzzle adventure where strategy meets sweetness! In this engaging game, your task is to pick and drop sets of blocks to complete rows. But there’s a sweet twist: special chocolate blocks are hidden within the rows, waiting to be collected. Your mission is to strategically arrange the blocks and collect all the specific choco blocks from the board before time runs out.

title: Underwater Survival
description:
Dive Into a Mysterious and Beautiful Underwater World
Welcome to an unforgettable underwater survival adventure where exploration, discovery, and survival come together in a stunning ocean environment. Dive deep into a vibrant and mysterious sea filled with hidden secrets, breathtaking visuals, and endless possibilities.

title: Mad Truck
description: Are you good at challenging the balanced platforms and ramps? Mad Truck provides you with a driving simulation game. In the Level mode, you need to keep the car stable at the side. In the challenge Level mode, you can drive the car to overpass different obstacles at the normal view. All levels require players to reach the finish line as soon as possible. If you can complete the level at the marked time, you can win all 3 yellow stars.

title: Lucy All Season Fashioninsta
description: "Lucy All Season Fashionista" invites you to four seasonal clothing adventures! From spring to winter, create combinations that cover every season. Experience the freedom to create your own style by complementing Lucy's fashion with accessories. This fun and heartfelt game is ideal for anyone who is interested in fashion!

title: Cameraman vs Toilets Puzzle
description: Cameraman vs Toilets Puzzle is an exciting game in which you play as Cameraman's Agent, whose task is to destroy all the toilets with the heads of rainbow friends. You have to use your shooting skills to accurately hit each toilet bowl and avoid hitting a Nubian friend.

title: Run 3D
description: The infinite running platformer game Run 3D takes place in the immensity of space. The character must be navigated by players through the constantly shifting space. Go, leap, and keep yourself from plummeting into the chasm!

title: That's My Seat Logic Puzzle
description: Who took my seat? Welcome to the brain-teasing logic puzzle game - That’s My Seat - Logic Puzzle. In this fun and casual game, your mission is to help each quirky character find their perfect seat. Some want to sit by the window, others hate noise, and some need distance from others. Your job is to match everyone’s preferences and place them just right! Each level is a unique puzzle that requires smart seating arrangements.

title: Taxi Simulator 2024
description:
Are you prepared to play an awesome simulator? Taxi Simulator 2024 is an online game set in an open environment with objectives to help you improve your cab driving abilities. Pick up the passengers and drive them to their destination, following the directions and exploring all of the maps to locate the streets and addresses.

This game includes many game modes to keep you entertained; accomplish the stages in taxi or open mode, and freely explore the whole landscape.

title: Witchy and the Puzzle Adventures
description: Help the brave Witch to pass all the puzzling tests and find all the seals to shelter them in her cozy forest house. Kittens are lost in the forest, which is full of various traps and dangers, you need to help the Witch to pass all the tests and find all the seals.

title: Perfect Asmr Cleaning
description: Immerse yourself in home cleaning and personal care with Perfect ASMR Cleaning! This is a casual cleaning simulator game where you can experience the whole process of cleaning work, such as washing carpets and trimming cat nails. Finish each task with full patience and enjoy the perfect sound of teeth polishing, cutting, and trimming.

title: Unblock It 3D
description:
Power up your logic and spatial reasoning skills with Unblock It 3D! Rotate the cluster of bricks to find unblocked tiles you can slide away without hitting any obstructions. 

Play Classic Mode and enjoy hundreds of intricate puzzles with unlimited moves, new cube designs and backgrounds to unlock.

Or, journey through time in Adventure Mode. Try your hand at 25 additional levels of increasing complexity and size. Explore Ancient Egypt, Medieval Europe, the Aztec Empire, feudal Japan, and more.

title: Falling Dummy
description:
Push the dummy off the roof of the tallest building on the construction site and watch it break all its bones. Control the body of the little man as he falls and break as many limbs as possible!

Do you want to relax after a hard day? Then this game is made for you! In this anti-stress game, your main goal is to make the dummy break as many limbs as possible when falling from tall buildings!

title: Join Clash Color Button
description: Are you ready for a game of choices and surprises? Color Button is the game for you! You need to pick the right door and make it to the end safely. But be careful, each door can lead to a different challenge or enemy. You have to use your skills and strategies to avoid traps and obstacles. Teamwork is the key to success in this game.
