Color Button is an exciting game that tests your judgment and decision-making skills. Do you have what it takes to beat the enemies and reach the end?

title: Pool Master
description: From a rookie with a cue to a legend of the table, journey through 100 challenging levels with closed pockets, special balls to clear and more. Unlock custom gear, gain special boosts and rule the table with precision and power.

title: Real Car Parking And Stunt
description: Welcome to Real Car Parking And Stunt, a challenging driving simulation game. Here you’ll control a car and put your parking and stunt skills to the test. Choose stunt mode or parking mode, each level challenges you to park your car accurately while performing exciting stunts.

title: Bubble Shooter Butterfly
description:
Bubble Shooter Butterfly is your next favorite bubble shooter game! It is a classic arcade game with a fresh look and new twists. With its bright butterflies and breezy gameplay this online butterfly game is perfect for Spring and Summer.

The game includes 300 diverse levels, divided over beautifully serene day and night backgrounds. Release all the butterflies and achieve the highest scores!

title: Save Stranding Fish
description: Help all the little fish that unfortunately wash up on the beach to escape their predicament.You must pay attention to the order in which you rescue the fish.

title: Teacher Simulator Christmas Exam
description: Welcome to the funniest and busiest Christmas classroom ever! Teacher Simulator: Christmas Exam is a charming and playful teacher class simulator where you act as a holiday teacher. Manage orders, hand out exam papers, grade tests, etc. Different classes are scheduled on different days of the week, such as art class, geography class, math class, and so on.

title: Gangsta Island: Crime City
description: Dominate the streets in Gangsta Island: Crime City! Rise from a street hustler to a crime lord in this action-packed online game. Engage in heists, battle rival crews, and conquer Las Vegas. Play mini-games and climb to the top of the underworld!

title: Elemental Monsters: Merge & Evolution
description: Welcome to the world of "Elemental Monsters: Merge & Evolution"! This free online game is perfect for children and teenagers. Develop your logic and strategic thinking while taking part in epic battles with monsters. You will control an army of fire, water, earth and air elementals in an exciting battle to liberate their worlds.

title: Black Jump
description: Escape the war-torn planet in this dynamic jump-and-run game. Sprint through the desolate landscape, vanquish enemies, sidestep deadly traps, and gather valuable crystals.

title: Brainrot Clicker
description:
Brainrot Clicker is a hilarious and chaotic idle clicker game that plunges you into a bizarre world of meme-fueled madness. Your mission is simple: tap the screen to earn “Italian Brainrot Points” and unlock increasingly ridiculous AI-generated characters from the internet’s wildest corners.

With eye-catching visuals, meme-inspired humor, and endless upgrades, Brainrot Clicker offers a weirdly satisfying experience you won’t want to stop!

title: Radical Rappelling
description:
Feel the rush and hold on tight as Radical Rappelling is back!

Join Rip and Roxy as you rappel down mountains at breakneck speed using your rapid reflexes.

Pull off death-defying tricks by ricocheting between launch pads, riding rainbows and rocketing over obstacles in the most redonkulous adventure ever.

Rack up coins and complete rockin’ missions to unlock sweet new gear for Rip and Roxy, the most fearless risk-takers on the planet.

title: OhPeach-It
description:
OhPeach-It is a game about dash&merge fruits that provides
you fun and engaging gameplay.

Game becomes more engaging when you use the idle mechanism and use power-ups.

So keep the fruits dash and merge !

title: Ball Rolling Slope
description:
Navigate a rolling ball through endless neon slopes in the Ball Rolling Slope game! Test your reflexes, dodge obstacles, and aim for the highest score in this challenge.
Ball Rolling Slope game is an exhilarating 3D arcade game that puts your reflexes and precision to the ultimate test. Guide a rolling ball down a steep, neon-lit slope filled with challenging obstacles and sudden drops. The gameplay is simple to pick up but difficult to master.

title: Pixel Blast
description: Pixel Blast is a colorful online arcade game that mixes classic gameplay with modern design. Play for free on your phone or computer and enjoy smooth controls and vibrant pixel art. It’s easy to pick up and fun for players of all ages.

title: Memoji
description: Match pairs of emojis and word cards to uncover and learn about a significant historical event from around the world each day.

title: Hair Stack 3D
description: Hair Stack 3D is a hair running game. Go through the numbered doors and collect more hair. Dodge the obstacles that make you less in number. Your ultimate goal is to make more hair so that the bald head at the end can have beautiful hair! Are you ready to help him? Let him applaud you!

title: Slingshot Chicken
description: Launch your fearless chicken from a slingshot and smash through unstable pig-filled towers in an endlessly fun physics adventure! With infinite levels and constantly evolving challenges, no two runs are ever the same. Perfect your aim, trigger explosive TNT chain reactions, and watch satisfying collapses unfold as you clear every pig before your shots run out. The fun never stops — how far can you go?

title: Container Sort Puzzle
description:
Container Sort Puzzle - Sort All the Cargo!
Get ready to test your brain with Container Sort Puzzle, the ultimate cargo-sorting challenge! Load the right containers onto the right ships and become a port master!
Perfect for fans of sort games, stacking puzzles, and logic-based challenges. Whether you're a casual player or a seasoned puzzler, Container Sort Puzzle will keep your brain sharp and entertained.

title: ColorWars.io - Conquest Game
description: Color Wars is a fast-paced strategy game where you battle three opponents to control the most territory before time runs out. Deploy powerful cards like Warrior, Ranger, Thunder, and Wizard, each with unique abilities. Earn trophies by ranking in the top two and use gold to upgrade your cards. Plan smart moves, outplay rivals, and dominate the battlefield.

title: Z Stick Duel Fighting
description: Join the ultimate stickman battle in Z Stick Duel Fighting, a game that will make you fight for glory. You will play as a stickman warrior who must face other stickmen from across the universe. Can you win this duel competition? Various exciting and handsome skills are waiting for you to try! Calculate the amount of mana, avoid the enemy's attacks, and deliver a fatal blow! You are the stickman fighting king of the universe!

title: Skillful Finger
description: Touch the screen and slide your finger along the glowing line without lifting it. Avoid barriers, stay clear of the edges, and react quickly as the speed increases. Customize your ball and tail, face dynamic obstacles, and enjoy endlessly generated paths that keep every run fast, challenging, and addictive.

title: Yoga Master
description:
Yoga is a great way to improve your quality of life. It is also a great way to entertain yourself in this game: Yoga Master.

Yoga Master is an addictive 3D running game with different levels that will challenge even the fastest reflex.

title: Popcorn Stack
description: Welcome to Popcorn Stack! Here, you will have a fun stacking popcorn trip. Collect many boxes and fill them with grain, sprinkle them with choco, bake and other food. Pack them up, cover them, and decorate them with fancy wings.

title: Hobo Speedster
description: Hobo Speedster is an exciting motorcycle platform BMX game featuring 2D cartoon graphics. Your mission? Keep the motorcycle balanced until you reach the finish line. As you earn coins and diamonds, upgrade your current bike at the motorcycle settlement, purchase 3 more motorcycles from the Shop, and unlock 4 additional riders in the Decorate section. Ready for a personal challenge? Explore various maps and aim to complete all 7 tasks for extra rewards!

title: Chess Online
description:
Options:
- Choose an opponent from 18 difficulty levels from Beginner to World Champion
- Selection of time control modes: Unlimited, Bullet, Blitz, Rapid, Classic
- Highlighting possible moves when choosing a piece
- Cancel the move, if there was a yawn, you can go back
- Interactive hints, showing the best move during the game
- Analysis after the game, highlights mistakes and gives recommendations on how to play
- Replay the game from the right place
- Setting the handicap

title: Crazy Fruit Merge
description: Looking for the perfect relaxing game? Sometimes all you need is a fun puzzle. Merge fruits, challenge your mind and use power-ups to keep the game flowing. Progress further and aim for the highest score!

title: Aidan in Danger
description: Aidan in Danger is an exciting platformer where you play as Aidan, a young red-haired elf armed with a slingshot. Your mission is to protect Drakor, the last dragon on Earth, from an interdimensional villain bent on world domination. Battle dangerous monsters, travel through time, and navigate challenging levels in this epic adventure. With immersive gameplay, stunning graphics, and a gripping story, help Aidan save Drakor and restore peace to the land!

title: Zombie Monster Survivors
description: Zombie Monster Survivors is a role-playing game where you will become a brave survivor. Fight against terrifying zombies and monsters in an amazing world. Use your resources wisely and defeat the monsters and zombies that keep coming. Try to survive in this extreme environment. Keep moving and attack large waves of zombies. Collect coins or energy and choose your skills.

title: Stickman: Dinosaur arena
description: Take command of a squad of dinosaurs and go into battle with them! Reinforce your squad, unlock new dinosaurs and upgrade existing ones. Go as far as possible and become a great Dino Commander!

title: Pool 8
description: Pool 8 is a relaxing yet challenging billiards-style puzzle game where players must sink all the balls into the pockets in the correct order. The game follows a step-by-step movement system, requiring strategic planning to clear the table efficiently. With smooth mechanics and progressively difficult levels, Pool 8 offers a unique twist on classic pool gameplay, perfect for puzzle and strategy lovers.

title: Racing Master 3D
description: Racing Master 3D is a 3D racing driving simulation game that'll get your adrenaline pumping in seconds! Here, you'll drive ultra-cool cars at full throttle. Race through the fully immersive 3D tracks. Enjoy the realistic car driving simulation. Hit the nitro button and blast past every rival in seconds.

title: Jeli2D
description: A game in the genre of 2048. Skillfully use the game physics to your advantage. The goal of the game is to connect the jell to the maximum size and not to lose. There is a boosters in the game, which will make it fun and easier to pass the game.

title: Stolen House
description: Stolen House is a free leisure online game for boys. You play the role of a thief in the game, and you need to steal the specified items to complete the task. There are many dangerous things to pass the levels, so you need to avoid traps and obstacles, and don't be found by guards. The game is exquisite and the gameplay is simple. Come and challenge to unlock more levels!

title: Stickman Gun Shooter
description:
Get ready to dive into a unique shooting experience with Stickman Gun Shooter! Enjoy an experience that invites you to take control of an expert shooter as you use a spinning gun to defeat fun Stickmans.
The game combines realistic ragdoll physics with exciting and simple gameplay - your goal will be to destroy the yellow Stickmans that get in your way, overcoming different levels with different challenges and obstacles, while demonstrating your sniper skills!

title: Pull The Thread - Puzzle
description: Unwind your mind with Pull The Thread - Puzzle, a captivating HTML5 game that challenges your logic and creativity! In this fun puzzle game, your task is to stretch a thread between all the screws on the screen, creating intricate patterns while solving each level. As the puzzles grow more complex, your problem-solving skills will be put to the test. With simple controls, engaging gameplay, and a satisfying sense of accomplishment.

title: Knife Up 3D
description: Knife Up 3D is a casual game that tests your reflexes. Feel the rhythm, don't damage the ball and beat your opponents. You can unlock new skins with the rewards you get by passing the levels. It's time to test your reflexes, so if you find it interesting, don't forget to share it with your friends and join in! Have fun!

title: Crab Guards
description: Fight through waves of relentless crab-masked enforcers using a deep arsenal—from AKs and SMGs to sniper rifles, shotguns, pistols, flamethrowers, and melee. Master recoil, ADS zoom, and reload timing, earn cash, unlock new gear, and survive through the Crab Guards.

title: Gas Station - Stick Simulator
description: You start with a small gas station in the middle of the highway, where everything depends on you. Service cars, fill up with gas, earn coins, and build even bigger! Over time, your gas station will grow into a true empire: with a store, restroom, cafe, and even a hot dog delivery service. The more customers, the more profit, upgrades, and fun!

title: Sorting Sorcery
description:
All the pots, crystals, mushrooms and other magical ingredients have been mixed up! Brush up your organizing skills and sort the witches’ and wizards’ items in the magic castle.

The fewer moves you use, the higher your score per level will be. You can earn three stars in every level if you solve the puzzles efficiently, so plan your moves! Sorting Sorcery includes a total of fifty levels with witchy, spooky and magical ingredients to discover and organize.

title: Cryptogram: Word Brain Puzzle
description: Cryptogram: Word Brain Puzzle presents a fresh take on the classic word puzzle genre. With an array of unique gameplay mechanics, hints, and events, players are immersed in an engaging experience. The game's USP is its diverse content, offering a wide range of quotes across various themes, from inspirational to literary and beyond.

title: Dream Wedding Planner
description: Plan your dream wedding with Dream Wedding Planner Game, a simulation game for kids and girls who love weddings. You can pick four characters and plan six different aspects of their wedding. You can use various tools to complete each step and create your own style. You can skip the current scene by following the pink arrow on top. You can also print the screen after each step and change your plan as you wish. You can make different design plans for each character and give them a sweet wedding.

title: Tap & Go Deluxe
description: Embark on an exhilarating adventure in this arcade runner game! Your goal is simple: Tap to move forward or change direction. Navigate your way through the path, aiming for higher scores as you pave the way!

title: World Cup Soccer Caps
description: World Cup Soccer Caps is a fun and fast-paced tabletop-style soccer game where you control a team of caps, flicking them to pass, shoot, and score goals. Strategize your moves, outplay your opponent, and aim for victory in this exciting, skill-based challenge!

title: 12-in-1 Solitaire
description:
Solitaire is one of the most popular – if not the most popular – card games in the world! Experience premium Solitaire gameplay at its best with 12 of the world's most popular Solitaire games!

Welcome to our latest & most comprehensive collection of the world's best & most popular Solitaire games! We included 12 of the most beloved Solitaire games in 1 comphrehensive collection, added helpful features appreciated by both Solitaire pros and amateurs alike.

title: Easter Eggventure
description: Welcome to Easter Eggventure! Embark on an exciting journey to find Easter eggs scattered throughout the beautiful spring landscape. Your mission is to discover the hidden Easter eggs and collect them all. Are you ready for this thrilling search game? Let's get started!

title: Chill Clicker
description: Chill Clicker is a clicker game where you multiply the Chill Capybara population by clicking. You can buy various upgrades to increase the output of Chill Capybaras, change the weather, and unlock new skins to make you the coolest Chill Capybara in town.

title: Agents io
description:
Play Agents.io online! Eliminate other agents, grow your team, and dominate the arena in this free game.
Agents.io is a multiplayer action game where you control a lone agent and battle against others in an open arena. As you eliminate enemies, they join your team, allowing you to grow your squad and become stronger. The more agents you collect, the easier it is to dominate your opponents. Use smart tactics, avoid bigger squads, and climb to the top of the leaderboard!

title: Sokoban P/R
description: Help the adorable loader handle his daily tasks in the classic Sokoban puzzle! Enjoy simple design, clever challenges, and the ability to develop your own strategy. Levels will gradually expand, so you can always test your skills. The best puzzle solutions await you!

title: Tied Up
description: Tied Up is a physics-based arcade survival game where you control a small ball tethered to a larger one by a spring. Use momentum and precise mouse movements to swing, evade, and counter waves of enemies. With only three lives per round, survival demands quick reflexes and smart play. Rack up high scores and push for a new personal best!

title: Survival Racing: Extreme Road
description:
Imagine that the time has come when ordinary racing is no longer enough adrenaline temptation. In a world where extreme sports are at the peak of popularity, a new competition has appeared - Survival Racing: Extreme Road.

Overcome obstacles, avoid traps and fight your rivals to reach the finish line first. Your goal is not only to win the race, but also to survive in the face of fierce competition.

title: Merry Christmas Stickman
description: Help Stickman escape from jail just in time for the holidays! This time, he’s on his own, relying solely on a mysterious Christmas package filled with special items. Choose carefully to aid his breakout in this festive, story-driven adventure packed with seasonal surprises—can Stickman make it to freedom before the New Year?

title: 2 Player Online Chess
description: Enjoy the classic game of chess with 2 Player Online Chess! Play solo against the computer or challenge a friend in 2-player mode. Easy to use, with no distractions—just simple, fun chess for everyone. Start playing today!

title: Bubble Shooter Panda Blast
description:
Step into the colorful world of Panda Blast, where your mission is to rescue baby pandas by popping bubbles. Mama Panda needs your help to bring her lost cubs home. With vibrant graphics, charming animations, and exciting puzzles, this game is perfect for all ages.
Match three or more bubbles to clear them, free trapped pandas, and progress through hundreds of fun levels. Use powerful boosters, enjoy daily rewards, and experience smooth animations that bring the adventure to life.

title: Exo Observation
description: Exo Observation is a space exploration incremental game where you uncover alien worlds and study mysterious lifeforms. You’ll collect resources, build advanced orbital science facilities, and manage them efficiently to progress. Each discovery pushes you closer to unlocking warp gates, letting you expand across the galaxy, and continue your quest for knowledge among distant stars.

title: Number Place Travel
description:
Fill the grid with numbers 1–9 so that no same number appears in any row, column, or 3×3 block!
Tap a cell and choose a number to place it.
You can make up to 3 mistakes. Fill in everything correctly to clear the puzzle!

title: Car Factory For Kids
description: Build and race your dream car in Car Factory For Kids! This exciting experience combines creativity, assembly, and racing into one fun-packed adventure, making it a perfect pick for young fans of car games for kids. This playful kids car game experience brings together building and racing in a fun and interactive way. Easy controls are perfect for free car game lovers.

title: Jump Up 3D: Basketball Game
description: Jump Up 3D is a sports basketball game where you shoot to get that slam dunk, but the one hitch is you're doing it by jumping on a trampoline. Not your ordinary basketball game, this one promises and delivers the excitement! Take aim, bounce on the trampoline, and score baskets before your opponent. With intuitive controls and addictive gameplay, it tests your precision and unleashes your inner dunk master.

title: DriftClicker
description:
Race Clicker: DRIFT MAX is an action clicker that immerses you in the world of thrilling drift races, demanding lightning-fast reflexes and the ability to make decisions at high speed. Participate in dynamic drift where every turn is a high-speed challenge.
- Open containers to obtain unique parts and enhance your car.
- Participate in high-stakes races to earn keys for containers and unlock new possibilities.
- Upgrade your car to dominate races and defeat all your rivals.

title: Poke The Presidents
description: "Poke the President" is the perfect stress-reliever game. Defeat politicians by throwing various weapons. The objective is to creatively inflict damage upon the politicians and watch them react in humorous and exaggerated ways. Earn money to buy various weapons and items in the shop. Have fun!

title: Epic Car Stunt Race Obby
description: Epic Car Stunt Race Obby is a fast-paced, acrobatic and challenging stunt racing game. In these races with hundreds of different levels, each new track creates a completely different excitement with its special design. You can play Epic Car Stunt Race Obby against AI racers or with your friend in 2 player mode. Start the endless racing excitement now!

title: Animal Bus Traffic Jam
description: All aboard for the cutest puzzle ride ever in Animal Bus Traffic Jam. This clever match-3 sort puzzle and casual logic game challenges you to help adorable animal passengers find their correct buses. Each level is a traffic jam of colorful buses filled with cats, dogs, pandas, and more. Your mission is to sort the animals by type or color, match them into the right buses, and clear the jam with smart moves.

title: Solitaire Winter
description:
It’s cold outside and you’re snowed in with a game of Solitaire! Travel the icy land and rebuild 5 beautiful winter locations across 200 levels, plus unlock 18 bonus game variants like Klondike, Spider and Freecell!

Overcome obstacles like locks, frozen cards, chains, vines, and more to collect the bonus gems and coins in each level which you can spend in the shop for upgrades. 

Choose between multiple card decks, but don’t freeze up as you go for the elusive 3 stars on every level!

title: Break Beat
description: Break Beat is a fast-paced and colorful brick-breaker game with a pixel art/neon aesthetic and an electronic music soundtrack.

title: Gloves Grow Rush
description: “Gloves Grow Rush” is a 3D arcade game where you control stickman boxers in a vertical running challenge. Collect boxing gloves, battle weaker opponents, and take on the final boss at each level. If you encounter a stronger boxer, evade rather than fight to survive. Beware: a direct punch means game over! Claim gems to upgrade your starting level and attack power (ATK). The shop offers 6 unique boxing gloves, but they don’t grant extra ATK or levels. Best of luck!

title: Mission Santa: Deliver the Gifts
description:
Santa must deliver gifts to children in time! There are many kids and only one Santa, so everything has to be done on the fly! Fly in a sleigh on Christmas night and throw gifts down chimneys to make children happy. 

The game helps you feel the atmosphere of the approaching holiday and prepare for the most magical time of the year!

title: Magic Forest - Merge the Secrets
description:
The Magic Forest is full of amazing little places!
Do you want to take a walk here?
Then hurry and start your journey!
And to make it even more fun, you’ll have company - Masha, a young girl who loves discovering new and mysterious things.
Even if it sometimes means sneaking away from Grandma and missing lunch.

title: Strykon
description:
Strykon is a mobile FPS game with exciting missions and battles. Play different modes like Deathmatch, Team Deathmatch, and Free-for-All, where your goal is to survive.
Choose from many weapons, like pistols, rifles, shotguns, and snipers. Each gun has its own style. Enjoy great graphics, realistic sound, and easy controls. Earn rewards with the Battle Pass to keep the game interesting. Whether you complete missions or fight enemies, this shooter is full of action anytime, anywhere!

title: Foot Hospital
description: HELP! Doctor, I hurt my feet, ouch! It is so painful!Could you please help me to cure my feet? I know you have the best medical tools here!

title: Stickman Archero Fight: stick shadow fight war
description:
Complete levels, collecting items that you can then put on yourself and improve in your inventory. You can finish off your enemies with colorful fatalities. Try different skill combinations to complete as many levels as possible. 
Game features:

- Fights with stickmen
- Skins: warrior, fighter, ninja
- Enemies: red stickman, black stickman
- Various biomes

Did you like the game "Stickman Archero Fight: stick shadow fight war"? - Then write a review and play all our games about stickmen.

title: Save The Sheep
description: Save The Sheep offers an immersive mental challenge as you step into the shoes of a shepherd. Relentless wolves have invaded your flock, seeking to feast on your precious sheep. Safeguard your flock by strategically placing wooden stakes to separate them from the predators. Experience the electrifying thrill of rescuing sheep and demonstrate your unmatched intellect in this captivating game.

title: Fashion Challenge: Catwalk Run
description: Fashion Challenge: Catwalk Run is a stylish dress-up game where you join glamorous catwalk competitions. Pick the perfect outfit, match accessories, style your hair, and impress the judges. Travel to fashion shows around the world, earn points, unlock outfits, and become a global trendsetter. Win challenges to climb the leaderboard and prove your fashion sense. Every level brings a new style theme to conquer!

title: Children Happy Farm DuDu
description: Hey there, little farmers in the making! Welcome to "Children Happy Farm DuDu"! This is an amazing casual simulator designed just for your kids. In this fun-filled farm world, you'll be the boss of your farm. The farm is full of cute animals like fluffy sheep, clucking chickens, and friendly cows. Your job is to take good care of them. Feed the animals, clean their shelters, and make sure they are happy.

title: Dino Digg
description: Dino Dig: Collect, Clean, Build! Exciting dino adventure in your pocket. Dig, find bones, clean 'em, and build your own dino museum. Easy, fun, and perfect for all ages!

title: Stickman Sort
description: Play Stickman Sort Puzzle free online and enjoy a clean, addictive browser game you can play instantly with no download and no install. Sort colors, shapes, and items in a satisfying logic puzzle that doubles as a relaxing brain game for all ages. This unblocked game loads fast and works smoothly at school or home, perfect for quick breaks. Fully mobile-friendly and optimized for desktop and mobile, it’s a free online game built for simple, smart fun anytime.

title: Island Puzzle: Build & Solve
description: Welcome to the ultimate Island Puzzle adventure! Test your logic and strategy skills in this captivating logic puzzle and building game.

title: Emoji Frenzy
description:
Test your reflexes and knowledge in this fast-paced emoji matching game! 
Tap the correct emoji before time runs out, build streaks, and unlock new themes. Simple to play, hard to master!

title: Sworded.io - Spin and Rub.
description: Test your skills in the game – an arcade simulator of sword fights! Fight waves of enemies, upgrade your character, unlock powerful weapons and magic spells. Demonstrate your tactics and reaction in dynamic battles!

title: Valentine Hidden Heart
description: Dive into a world of love and discovery with "Valentine Hidden Heart" - the ultimate romantic hidden object adventure! Unleash your inner cupid as you embark on a delightful quest to find the 10 hidden hearts in each of the 15 enchanting levels.

title: Prison Master: Escape Journey
description: Prison Master Escape Journey is a thrilling prison escape simulator that challenges your brain and strategic thinking! Trapped inside a high-security prison, you must plan every move carefully and begin an intense adventure toward freedom.

title: Archery Master - Bow and Arrow
description:
Join archery adventure and become a bowmaster! Aim, shoot and hit the bullseye!

Pick your bow, defeat other archery masters and don’t let them take you down! Join in this fun and challenging adventure and have fun. Bow masters can really challenge your casual game skills but have no fear! If you enjoy bow and arrow games, then prepare to defeat other bow masters, earn coins, score, and become the ultimate bow master!

title: Fire Ball and Water Ball: Parkour Love Balls
description:
Fire Ball and Water Ball: Parkour Love Balls is an interesting parkour adventure and addictive ball game in the platform genre where orange fire ball and blue water ball running races. 

Help orange ball to get to the portal faster than the blue ball doing parkour tricks! The game is similar to mario.

Game Features:
- Multiple levels with colorful balls
- Various biomes
- Secrets in the back
- Orange fire and blue water ball skins
- The water ball girl goes through the levels with you!

title: Energy Clicker
description:
Enter the captivating world of Energy Clicker and become a true master of electricity generation! You will take control of the main character who, by pressing the generator pedal, unleashes immense power and lights up the windows of the city. However, be careful because if the energy exceeds the permissible value, your generator will start to break down!
Become a leader in electricity generation and show everyone your energetic side in Energy Clicker.

title: Offroad Jeep Game Simulator
description: Off road legends are brought to you by offline Car Games or Car Racing Games no wifi Tap studios that open an exciting (4x4 mania or 4x4 off road games) 4x4 Off road SUV Jeep Driving Games where off road outlaws or off road jeep drivers will take SUV test drive ahead in Hill Jeep Driving Simulator and Monster Truck Games. Extreme car driving simulator game.

title: Block Puzzle - Jewel Forest
description: An addictive block puzzle game that helps train your eyes and brain. It is a combination between the Tetris and Jewels game styles.

title: Banana Farm
description: Embark on Banana Farm, an engaging business casual game catering to cat enthusiasts. As a diligent feline entrepreneur, oversee market operations and recruit adorable cat workers to enhance efficiency. Cultivate bananas and various products while serving charming cat customers eagerly queuing up. Ready to launch your supermarket?

title: Candy Monster Raffi
description: Help the candy monster Raffi eat all the candies! He absolutely loves them – all he wants is to eat candy. But be careful while collecting them! If you jump in the wrong direction, you might hit dangerous spikes. This cute little monster is hungry – run and feed Raffi with as many candies as you can!

title: Slippery Drift Racing
description: Slippery Drift Racing is an adrenaline-pumping racing game where precision and speed go hand in hand. Players can choose between Race and Time Attack modes, tackling five unique and challenging maps. With three difficulty levels—Easy, Normal, and Hard—drivers of all skill levels can enjoy sliding through tight corners, mastering drifts, and racing against the clock or opponents. Perfect for fans of high-speed thrills and skillful maneuvers, every race promises excitement and challenge!

title: Tank Challenge
description:
Tank Challenge is an action-packed tank battle game that tests your reflexes and strategy. Play solo or challenge a friend in fast-paced matches.

Defeat your opponent using powerful weapons like lasers, triple bullets, bomb shells, and rockets.

Make quick decisions, aim carefully, and stay ahead to win. Smooth on mobile and desktop, easy to learn but challenging to master.

Enter the arena and fight for victory!

title: Money Grabber
description: In Money Grabber you collect Money before it goes into the Shredder! Upgrade your machines using cards in this survivor style tower defence game, you can unlock new cards using gems as a gacha mechanic and upgrade your machines using coins!

title: Dress Princess
description: You will transform into a fashion stylist, creating a unique look for the beautiful princess! The game offers a vast array of gorgeous clothing styles, from sparkling evening gowns to fresh and sweet daily dresses, everything is available. Every piece of clothing is carefully designed, with exquisite details displayed in every detail. ​

title: Hero Tower Wars Merge Puzzle
description: Join the exciting world of Hero Tower Wars - Merge Puzzle! Here is filled with tower defense strategy and merging games. Being careful of strategy and quick thinking are important. You'll play as a brave hero, battling enemies in layers of towers by mergers and digital strategies. Each tower has a different number of enemies. Use every number and a stronger sword to defeat enemies.

title: Last Day On Earth Survival
description: Last Day on Earth: Survival is a 2D survival simulation game. In this large ruined city, you have 51 locations to discover. When you collect some wood and metal, you can make weapons on the Workbench. When you win enough experience and level up, you can check your Attribute and upgrade HP, ATK, Speed, and Search. In the day, explore and go to places you have never visited. I hope you will survive 50 days and explore all 51 locations.

title: Sweet And Fruity Makeup
description: From luscious watermelon pinks to zesty lemon yellows and tangy orange hues, this game allows you to experiment with a selection of deliciously scented cosmetics. Create stunning looks using fruity lip glosses, shimmering eyeshadows, and blushes that mimic the radiant glow of ripe berries. Let your imagination run wild as you mix and match fruity fragrances, adding a delightful touch of freshness to your final touch. So, get ready to enter a delectable paradise where sweetness meets style!

title: Billiards 3D: Russian Pyramid
description: Play a realistic online billiards game against virtual opponents of varying difficulty. Customize AI skill levels to match your ability and improve your game. Enjoy lifelike tables of different sizes and refine your strategy in this immersive billiards experience!

title: Build A Rich Queen
description: Make the most accurate choice and become the most beautiful queen! In Build A Rich Queen, you will bring your credit card. When you encounter a POS machine on the road, you can directly swipe the card to buy clothes and other decorations. These decorations will allow you to pass obstacles without directly failing the game, but you will lose these decorations. But pay attention to the road under your feet, don't fall suddenly, otherwise, you will directly fail the game.

title: Table Tennis Open
description: Discover a casual, easy-to-play game for hours of endless fun. Face off against your opponent, bounce the ball as its speed increases, and aim for the highest score. Earn coins with each hit to upgrade your racket!

title: Sea Monsters Mahjong
description: Dive into 'Sea Monsters Mahjong,' an underwater twist on the classic game. Match sea monster tiles strategically—remember, you can only draw tiles that are on top of a stack with no blocks on their sides. Explore the depths, revealing krakens, dolphins, and mermaids. With easy controls and oceanic vibes, enjoy a relaxing Mahjong experience with charming sea creatures.

title: Limited Kaboom
description:
Use your buddies to take down the enemy structures and the enemies along with them! 
Can you make survive the hero? 
Use the physics of the world to skillfully take down Sam's enemies!

title: Rough Ball
description: Bounce wildly in Rough Ball! Control your cute purple ball across wall-to-wall platforms, dodging spikes, skulls, and deadly drops. Collect shiny coins, unlock free burger skins, and conquer chaotic levels. Don't fall down—jump, roll, and thrive in pixel-perfect adventure!

title: Tsunami Race
description: Have you ever faced the thrill of escaping a giant tsunami? In this action-packed game, you’ll choose from a variety of unique characters and race to stay ahead of your opponents. The game offers three exciting modes: outrun a tsunami in Tsunami Race, dodge flying fruits in Fruit Run, and slide to glory in Water Slides—knocking down opponents and collecting boosters along the way. Only the fastest and most strategic players will emerge as champions!

title: Idle Supermarket Tycoon
description: Build and manage your dream shopping mall! Expand by adding new shops, upgrade interiors, serve customers, and boost your reputation. Invest wisely, assign priority shoppers, and earn extra income with delivery vehicles. Complete missions to unlock rewards!

title: Kings and Queens Match
description: Welcome to Kings and Queens Match! Dive into a magical kingdom , matching jewels and crowns to progress through levels. Unleash Royal Bombs, hammers, and wands for extra fun. Stunning graphics and an enchanting soundtrack will transport you to a world of magic and wonder. So what are you waiting for? Join Princess Bella on her quest for treasure and adventure today!

title: Crazy Alien Adventure
description: Crazy Alien Adventure is an addictive and exciting game. You will play as a brave character who runs, jumps, and dashes through various worlds, collecting stars and power-ups along the way. Your goal is to rescue the animals that are trapped in cages by smashing the wooden stakes with your rush power. The more you run, the more points you get. You can also use the stars to buy items and outfits. Discover different kinds of animals in the game and try to save them all. How far can you go?

title: Fruit Match Juicy Puzzle
description: Fruit Match Juicy Puzzle is an irresistibly fun puzzle casual game that bursts with juicy visuals and addictive gameplay! A brilliant combination of puzzle and match mechanics. From the moment you start, you’ll be hooked on its satisfying matching mechanics and clever level design.

title: Body Care Simulator
description: ASMR Cleaning is a fun simulation game on yad.com. There are four sections: foot spa, manicure, lip care, and clean inside the ear. You will enter a quiet and comfortable environment and experience different care processes. Have fun!

title: Geometry Lite
description: Are you ready for a new adventure in Geometry Lite? The graphics of this game can impress gamers because they're different from the other Geometry Dash versions. This game offers many levels with different backgrounds to players. In this game, your mission is to help geometry to overcome many deadly traps on the road. You can get a victory when your character reaches the exit portal. If you are a beginner, you can improve your skills through practice mode in this game. Let’s enjoy this game now

title: Egg Farm
description:
Join the egg-citing adventure of Egg Farm and unleash your inner fox as you embark on a fast-paced egg-catching frenzy! 
Dash with lightning agility, master obstacle evasion, and craft a fox character like no other with a range of custom skins. It's time to become an egg-cellent egg-catching maestro - your prowess will earn you legendary status!

title: Capybara Skewer Match
description:
Capybara Skewer Match
Step into the cozy world of Capybara, your friendly skewer merchant! Help Capybara clear out the skewers by grilling and matching them before time runs out.

Capybara needs your help to keep the BBQ stand running. Can you master the grill, match all the skewers, unlock tasty collectibles, and make Capybara proud?

title: Online Cats Multiplayer Park
description: Come to run, jump, guess, and race as a cute but competitive kitty in Online Cats - Multiplayer Park. It’s a real-time multiplayer chaos arena. Here are seven modes you can choose from. In Grab A Shabby Ball, for example, you will have to compete with your opponents and try to touch the ball to get points.

title: Cafe Owner Business Simulator
description: Build your dream cafe and become a successful business owner in Cafe Owner: Business Simulator! Restore your dad cafe and turn an abandoned space into a thriving restaurant. This exciting and simulation game lets you experience what it’s like to run your own cafe, from cleaning up to expanding into a successful cafe business.

title: Number Domination
description: Number Domination is a turn-based strategy card game where players compete to claim tiles on the board using number cards (0-9). Create chains of three or more, match pairs, or make a "Perfect 9" by summing two cards to 9. Each successful move earns points and claims tiles. At the end, each occupied tile grants an extra point to its owner. Play in Face the Challenger or Face the Champion mode and win with smart moves. Think ahead, outplay your opponent, and dominate the numbers!

title: Snowboard Game​ Party
description: Begin snow racing thrill in Snowboard Game Party. It's a high-energy multiplayer ski sport challenge. In this adrenaline-filled winter sports game, you’ll join other players on dynamic ski tracks full of surprises. Flexibly control your hero and race against other opponents. While keeping your speed! Avoid snowballs, fences, sudden slopes, etc. Win races to earn points, unlock gear, and customize your style!

title: Serious Bro
description: Defend your base against adorable alien invaders using an M16 Carbine Rifle and frag grenades. Experience a beautiful low poly 3D environment with cute enemies and simple controls for both desktop and mobile.

title: Ball Craze Sort
description:
Ball Craze Sort is a fun, relaxing, and addictive puzzle game where your goal is to sort colorful balls into the correct order. What starts as a simple task quickly turns into a brain-teasing challenge as more colors and tubes are introduced.
Ball Craze Sort is the perfect game to unwind or mentally recharge. Whether you’re looking to relax for a few minutes or challenge your logic skills for hours, this game offers the ideal balance between fun and focus.

title: Gloves of Block
description:
Become the last line of defense and lead your nation to World Cup glory!

Step into the gloves of your national team’s goalkeeper in this thrilling reflex-based football game. Your mission is simple: protect the net, stop the shots, and carry your team to the top. Choose your country and dive into a series of high-stakes matches where each save counts!

Opponents get tougher as you advance, stronger nations will demand sharper reflexes and quicker decisions. Can you lift the World Cup trophy?

title: Koi Fish Pond - Idle Merge Game
description:
An addictive idle merging game. Build your own Koi fish company and grow your business.
Release your Koi fishes into the pond and earn money every time they cross the finish line. Buy new Koi fishes (or collect them from the gift boxes), and merge the same level Koi fishes to upgrade into a new type. The higher-level of the Koi fishes, the more money you will earn. Use your earnings to buy upgrade packages in the Shop to help you make money faster!

title: Portals
description: Portals - HTML5 adventure-puzzle game where two heroes, one black and one white, are stranded on a mysterious planet filled with portals after being swallowed by a black hole. Your mission is to guide them through a series of challenging levels, utilizing their unique abilities to navigate this portal-filled world and find their way home. With intriguing puzzles, captivating graphics, and an immersive storyline, Portals offers a thrilling gaming experience for players of all ages.

title: Anomaly Content Record
description: Welcome to Anomaly Content Record, a terrifying horror adventure where your only goal is to escape and survive. You’re a field investigator sent to explore a restricted research facility that went silent overnight.

title: Tank Sniper 3D
description:
Tank Sniper 3D: The Ultimate Shooting Game
Are you a fan of shooting games? Do you have what it takes to be a sniper tank driver? Then youll love Tank Sniper 3D - the action game that puts your skills to the test. Shoot your enemies with one shot from behind cover. Stay hidden until you strike with a surprise shot. Then, dodge their fire and hit as many targets as you can. How long can you survive? Find out now and play Tank Sniper 3D!

title: Wordling: Daily Word Challenge
description: Wordling is a fun, free daily word puzzle game where you guess the hidden word in 6 tries using color-coded clues. Perfect for adults and seniors who love brain games, spelling challenges, and relaxing, ad-free gameplay. Explore all game modes!

title: Ball Paint 3D
description: Ball Paint 3D is a relaxing, simple, and fun game for kids, free online. You only have to find the balls of the same color within the limited number of balls given to you to pass the game, with beautiful 3D graphics to give you the best gaming experience. It's a battle of the brains, do you dare to challenge?

title: Extreme Car Race Master 3D
description: Fine tune your ride, keep your foot on the gas, dodge the endlessly varied obstacles, and try to keep out the way of your equally manic rivals in super-fast, super-exciting, psychedelic races that always offer something new and unexpected. Feel the need for speed?

title: Color Maze
description: In Color Maze your mission is to light up all the paths on the map to complete a level. Make the right move, avoiding obstacles or just pay attention to not get stuck in a corner. Beat all the 20 levels with increasing difficulty to show yourself that you are the real king of Color Maze.  Remember, if a level is to hard for you, you can always skip it clicking or touching the reward button in the up right corner of the screen.

title: Mini Grand Theft City
description:
Free game of Mini Grand Thef City, an entertaining game based on the famous GTA game in a minimalist world!! In this entertaining game you can walk, run through the streets and assault passers-by to create new buildings!!!

In this incredibly fun little world you will have the freedom to enter homes or businesses to steal furniture or sell it to get more money to build!! It sounds fun, have fun with this game on your favorite device in your favorite browser.

title: Limited Defense
description:
Limited Defense is a strategic tower defense game where you command bandits, archers, and explosive towers to hold back relentless waves of enemies. Face off against mischievous Green Slimes, fearsome Orcs, and towering bosses like the Boss King Slime. Upgrade your defenses, unlock legendary warriors, and test your tactical skills in intense, fast-paced battles!
Can you make it in this tower defense game?

title: Skating Park
description: Welcome to Skating Park, where skateboards meet high-speed racing madness! Dive into a world of adrenaline-fueled stunts and fierce competition as you shred through gravity-defying tracks. Master insane ramps, outmaneuver opponents, and conquer the leaderboard. Feel the thrill as you jump off the track, taking daring shortcuts to gain the edge. Get ready to grind and glide your way to victory!

title: Tap Away
description: Tap Away plays like a 3D block movement puzzle arcade game. Your mission is to launch all blue blocks out of the screen with their marked directions. Remember to rotate the whole combinations, you will find more available choices. I hope you will complete all levels and have fun!

title: Quizmania: Trivia game
description: Sharpen your mind across exciting levels. Answer a variety of questions from different topics and use strategic hints to guide your way. As you progress, the difficulty increases, offering a rewarding and challenging experience with every round.

title: Sniper 3D Zombie
description: Defend your position from the zombie invasion. You have a sniper rifle, find and eliminate zombies. Hitting a zombie is not difficult, it is much more difficult to detect it. The enemies are cunning and very well disguised, they are able to blend in with the environment. Shoot the zombies and take the first places in the leaderboard!

title: Untangle Rings Master
description: This is a simple but addictive ring puzzle game. Do you want to train your brain by solving exciting ring-spinning puzzles? Do you like simple, colorful games with addictive gameplay? Start this free online game and enjoy!

title: Battle Island 2
description:
Battle Island 2 is sequel of Battle Island
Battle with wild monster and trainers.
Earn money from battles and use it to build the army of powerful monsters.

You have only 1 goal, defeat all the Trainers and be the Master of Island.

title: MR RACER - Car Racing
description: MR RACER - Car Racing is a thrilling and challenging racing game that will excite you! Race at high speed with stunning supercars and beat the traffic. This game provides a very easy-to-control car movement and is extremely fun to race.

title: Soccer Snakes
description: Two wild, clumsy snakes competing in a soccer match is the perfect mix of humor, chaos, and sports. Play solo or share your keyboard with a friend and score some 'hiss-terical' fun with Soccer Snakes!

title: Alien Hunters
description: A fast-paced game where you will play a role of a robot hunter with a deadly dagger of light. With multiple enemies to kill, and a lot of challenging missions to complete, this game will take you on a captivating and thrilling adventure.

title: Scary BanBan Escape
description:
Scary Players of the realistic survival horror game BanBan Escape will need to devise a plan to get out of a terrifying kindergarten inhabited by terrifying creatures. The game's intriguing storyline and tense atmosphere have garnered a lot of attention in the gaming community, and it all started with Euphoric Brothers.

In Banban Kindergarten, the protagonist is huggy, who plays the role of the searcher. Not only is this school deserted, but it also hides several perils and mysteries.

title: Black Cat Stacking POP
description: Tap tiles to clear them! When you tap a tile, any same-colored tiles next to it will also connect and clear together. Clear a bunch of tiles at once, and a toy mouse will appear to help clear even more! Clear target tiles or tiles that add moves to increase your remaining moves. The game ends when you run out of moves.

title: Aim Ninja
description:
Aim Ninja is a fast-paced skill game that tests your timing and reflexes. 
Stop the moving needle at the perfect moment to score points and improve your accuracy. 
Simple to play but hard to master, Aim Ninja delivers quick, satisfying gameplay sessions 
for players of all ages.

title: Color Brain Test Games
description: Color Brain Test Game is a ring puzzle game. Do you want to train your brain?  You love fun spinning circle puzzle games with simple and colorful gameplay. Play Color Brain Test Games now!

title: Winter Wonderland Mahjong
description: Escape into a cozy Winter Wonderland filled with snowflakes, penguins, and festive cheer! Relax with calming music as you match beautifully crafted tiles in this soothing Mahjong puzzle game. Unlock charming new backgrounds and unique tile designs as you progress, each adding warmth and wonder to your journey. Perfect for unwinding, celebrating the holidays, and discovering the magic of winter—one match at a time.

title: Kitchen Sorting
description: Kitchen Sorting uses well known meachanics of ball and water sorting games. Sort cooking ingredients into glass jars right in your comfortable kitchen. When sorted, pour them into the pot a cook meals.

title: Mahjong Riddles: Egypt
description:
Welcome to the mysterious world of Ancient Egypt! Find matching tiles, solve mahjong levels and collect artifacts to uncover secrets of Giza valley, Old city, Desert and Nile.
Discover how the Great Pyramid of Giza was constructed, how Egyptians learned to read hieroglyphs, why only the pharaoh could own a cat in Ancient Egypt and many more. 
Simple and engaging gameplay of mahjong solitaire is the best way to relax. You will find huge treasures, tricky locks, new bonus tiles and more.

title: Ping Pong Air
description: Table tennis, also known as ping pong, is an easy and enjoyable arcade game in which you control the bat as simply as in life: with the mouse or the movement of your finger. Several modes await you to suit every taste. In classic mode, you go through worlds, earn cups and unlock new opportunities. In Halloween mode, you have to banish spirits for a while, improving your reaction. In Career mode, you move up the tournament ladder, taking part in games against increasingly stronger opponents.

title: 2248 Blast
description: Are you ready to train your brain while having fun? 2248 Blast is a highly addictive number-connecting puzzle game designed to relax your mind and sharpen your logic skills! With simple swipe controls and engaging gameplay, this game is perfect for puzzle lovers of all ages.

title: Balloon Match 3D
description: Relax and enjoy this addictive ballons 3d matching game as you collect items and complete different missions.Your goal is to clear the bubble by finding and matching all ballons before the time runs out!

title: Super Star Animal Salon
description: Welcome to Super Star - Animal Salon, a paws - itively delightful casual simulator game that's perfect for girls with a passion for fashion and animals! In this game, you step into the role of a superstar animal stylist. Your very own salon awaits, filled with all the tools of the trade. First, meet your furry, feathery, or scaly clients. There are cute puppies with a zebra, an elephant, and a leopard. Start with the hair.

title: Brother!Follow Me! - Merge Men
description:
It's a 3D running game where you control a runner as you navigate various obstacles, overcome challenges, and face off against a boss at the end of each level. This action-packed game combines exciting competitions, battles, and intense conflicts.

Collect and lead your brothers along the way, and grow your team to challenge the final game.

title: Easter Glamping Trip
description: This Easter, our princesses are going glamping in the mountains to relax under the sun all day long. For that, they booked the most Instagrammable glamping place in Norway, and now they need your help to get their outfits ready for the fancy trip. Play the Easter Glamping Trip game for girls, and see what jaw-dropping holiday looks you can put together for them. Then get ready to discover new challenging tasks as you continue playing this Easter game for girls. Have a blast!

title: Woods of Nevia: Forest Survival
description: Woods of Nevia: Forest Survival is a one-tap action adventure where you battle and survive in the wild. Wield your axe to fend off wolves, chop wood, and build shelter as you explore for resources and hidden chests. Level up, choose upgrades, and outlast growing dangers while managing hunger and health in this engaging forest challenge.

title: Clownfish Pin Out
description: Clownfish Pin Out is an interesting and cute puzzle game, you need to help one little fish escape from a dangerous place. Tap the pin to make the waterfall to the fish and avoid the lava. Think before you move, or you will lose. Come on!

title: Taxi Driver Simulator
description: Taxi Driver Simulator offers an immersive experience behind the wheel of a taxi. Complete Work Mode’s 80 levels with 3 yellow stars to become an eligible taxi driver. Follow the blue direction indicators, pick up passengers, and deliver them to their destinations efficiently. Slow down before steering to save time. Don’t forget to buy the other 9 cars in the garage as you earn money! In Free mode, drive farther and pay for fuel at gas stations. Keep serving customers without advancing levels.

title: Slicer Duo
description: Slicer Duo is a satisfying ASMR game where precision, timing, and rhythm come together in a sharp slicing adventure. Move through level-based stages, cut through fruits and all kinds of objects, collect points, and try to keep your knife in motion for as long as possible. While the controls are simple, every section demands focus because one bad move can send your knife straight into danger.

title: Mahjong 3D Match
description: Welcome to the 3D Mahjong adventure! Challenge your mind with speed and precision. Plan your moves, view the board from all angles and remove pieces intelligently. Beat increasingly difficult levels, play offline and relax with immersive music.

title: Save the cats - Bubble shooter
description:
Think strategically, aim, shoot and get rid of all the bubbles.

Explore hundreds of levels with different levels of difficulty.

Be as accurate as possible to free all the cats.

Buy and use boosters on challenging levels.

To win - clear the field of all the balloons.

title: Hyper Survive
description:
Imagine you woke up to the apocalypse. The virus has infected the world and it's been one year since the zombie apocalypse began. Get ready for the terror, horror, survival, and fighting against zombies. Build your camp and survive the waves of zombies. Prepare yourself for a survival arcade game!
Build your strategy and write your own story. Gather whatever you'll need to survive during this devastating period. No matter who you are, where you come from, and what you used to be before.

title: Sweet Dessert Hole
description: Ready to make cute and tasty desserts? In Sweet Dessert Hole, you control a hole that sucks up various sweet toppings. Move the hole around to collect chocolate, cream, fruits, cookies, dan many more. Collect everything on the base before time runs out. Use your coins to upgrade the hole and make the gameplay faster and easier. After making one or more cakes, you can arrange them neatly on a tray. This game is simple, relaxing, and very satisfying to play.

title: Mind Games for 2-3-4 Player
description: Mind Games is a huge game where you can find 2-3-4 player games while playing. The game consists of 27 games under various categories like skill games, Brain Games, matching games, pop-it games, mancala, ludo, and Tic Tac Toe games. Each of these games is fun and made for kids and it is safe to play. Most of these games can be played 2 player, 3 player or 4 player.

title: Merge cubes 2048 3D
description: A completely new approach to the classic game 2048?! Now in 3D and with dynamic physics?! Number cubes don't just merge - they bounce and collide?, adding an element of surprise to every game! Compete with friends or colleagues?!

title: Alchemy Puzzle
description:
We create challenges with fun puzzles, challenge your brain and make you always smile on your lips.
Alchemy Puzzle will help you have moments of light entertainment, combined with puzzle play and fun real life characters.
If you've ever played games: puzzlers, word games, trivia games, quiz games, brain teasers, or just want to spend time have time to relax, let try Alchemy Puzzle, It's for you.

title: Merge Food Puzzle
description: Merge Food Puzzle is a synthetic puzzle game. What is different from ordinary match-3 games is that successful matches will not disappear and will generate higher-level food. The game has two modes: Merge BBQ and Merge Fruit. Merge BBQ has a variety of barbecues waiting for you to unlock, including corn, cauliflower, fish, squid, and more. Have fun!

title: Mega Escape Car Parking Puzzle
description: A fun and compelling puzzle board game called Parking Jam. It's more than just parking; it's an enjoyable driving adventure that will advance you. Parking lot traffic jams, difficult parking conditions, irate seniors, and more. Play one of the best parking board games, earn rewards and unlock skins, solve harder and harder puzzles, decide which car to move to find smooth departs without hitting anybody or anything, characteristics.

title: Makeup Stack
description: Would you like to make up? How many cosmetic brands do you know? In this game, these questions will get the answers. Let's play Makeup Stack game to make up for the customers. You will pass the various doors that you can choose as you like. As long as you can complete the task, it doesn't matter what you choose. Let's try this game right now to make up more people!

title: Geometry Vibes X-Ball
description:
Geometry Vibes X-Ball is ready to give you a completely different gaming experience! After the first game of the series, interactive new levels, challenge section and completely new store are waiting for you in X-Ball mode. 

Start your new adventure now in Geometry Vibes X-Ball game where you will find yourself avoiding obstacles, traps and gears in each level!

title: Donut Box
description:
Enjoy the delightful Donut Box, a casual HTML5 slide game featuring beautiful designs of various donuts and cupcakes. Each level presents a new arrangement of sweets for you to slide and match.
With its engaging graphics and fun gameplay, Donut Box is perfect for players looking for a light and enjoyable gaming experience.
Try Donut Box today and enjoy a sweet and engaging gaming experience!

title: Elemental DressUp Magic
description: Welcome to the fascinating world of natural elements and magic! The main characters of the game are already waiting for you - five beautiful girls representing various elements: fire, water, earth and air. The makeup and outfit of each of these girls is inspired by the element that she represents. The fifth heroine is special. This girl is an Avatar that combines all four elements!

title: Hyper Cars Ramp Crash
description: "Hyper Cars Ramp Crash" is a 3D stunt and crash simulation game with realistic physics and graphics. You can perform incredible stunts in many different modes with great looking cars. 7 different super-sport car models are waiting in the garage for you to try them. Open world, stunt modes and fall mode can be played in 1-player and 2-player modes.

title: Noob: Jailbreak 2
Happy Glass Game
description: Happy Glass is a fun and engaging puzzle game where your goal is to fill an empty glass with water. Draw lines to create a path for the water to flow into the glass. The less you draw, the higher your score. With 80 challenging levels, you’ll need to use your creativity and logic to make the glass happy again. Enjoy this delightful game on both desktop and mobile devices!

title: Party Games Mini Shooter Battle
description: Party Games: Mini Shooter Battle is a battle-royale shoot-em-up game with 2D cartoon models. In 4 modes, you can shoot other players to earn scores for coins and gems. Then you can buy more roles and guns in the Shop. Your character can aim at the closest target automatically so that you only need to fire and dodge bullets from enemies. More kills and less death will make you claim more coin and gem rewards. Good luck!

title: Snake Masters
description:
Control a small worm and get ready to reach the other side of the screen. Enjoy a puzzle inspired by the classic Snake, where you must guide the worm to the other side of the apple and escape safely. Will you be smart enough to beat all thirty levels?

Game Features
- Special crawling mechanics.
- Challenge your brain.
- Tons of interesting puzzles.
- Easy controls.

title: Paperly - Paper Plane Adventure
description:
Go on an exciting paper plane flight adventure, learn different flight mechanics & reach your destination.

PAPERLY: PAPER PLANE ADVENTURE - is all about Flying a Paper Plane, learning from previous mistakes, and Heading toward a Better Flight in this Physics-Driven Gameplay.

title: Frogtastic Marble Adventure
description:
Get ready to dive into a world of colors and adrenaline with Frogtastic, the puzzle game that will keep you glued to the screen! Jump into the adventure and save your world from the invasion of colorful spheres by combining strategy and lightning-fast reflexes!

Endless fun! Whether you have a few minutes for a quick game or want to dive into long gaming sessions, Frogtastic is perfect for you.

Play now and experience a puzzle game you won’t forget!

title: Match Master
description:
Match them all!
Match all same pairs in the given time to win the game and earn coins. Use various powerups to match them faster. Spen your coins to decorate your house and unlock new houses.

title: Erase the extra element
description: Sharpen your focus and logic in Erase the Extra Element! Erase parts of each scene to reveal clues and solve tricky visual puzzles.

title: Bloxorz - Block Puzzle 3d
description: Roll your block across challenging 3D platforms and drop it into the goal hole to solve each puzzle. Bloxorz - Block Puzzle 3d is an addictive block puzzle game that tests your logic, spatial thinking, and problem-solving skills across dozens of mind-bending levels.

title: Eating Simulator
description:
Eating Simulator is a funny clicker game.
?GROW BY EATING! ?
?LEVEL UP AND UPGRADE BY SELLING YOUR FOOD ?
?Can you become the most substantial of them all??

title: Leap of Life
description:
"Leap of Life" is a short game that offers a true challenge! Every jump you make is a step towards victory but also a step towards losing a life.
Your task is to preserve each jump, calculating your path precisely to avoid depleting all your lives.

title: Crowd Battle Gun Rush
description: Crowd Battle Gun Rush is a weapon evolution history parkour game. At the beginning of the game, you only have an ax, which is the least lethal weapon. You must keep moving forward. On the way forward, you must collect bundles of money. , which can be used to purchase weapons and ammunition. When you prepare your weapons, you can target the groups that remain and continue to attack and eliminate them.

title: Hide And Seek Horror Escape
description: Hide And Seek: Horror Escape is an asymmetric horror escape game. Abandoned schools and haunted hospitals, here's a lot of hidden secrets and treasures are waiting to be discovered. During the game, there are two identities for you to choose, hide or seek?

title: Idle Archer Tower Defense RPG
description: Welcome brave archer heroes to the enchanting realm of Idle Archer Tower Defense RPG! Embrace the role of a solitary archer, unyielding in defending their towering stronghold against relentless tides of monstrous adversaries. With an unwavering determination, you pledge to safeguard the realm from the nefarious creatures summoned by the sinister dark Lord. Engage in a battle to fortify your tower, enhance the skill set of your valiant archers, and triumph over malicious waves of malevolence.

title: Last to leave circle Obby
description:
Last to leave circle Obby - is a dynamic online game in the style of Roblox, where only the most dexterous and persistent can win! Exciting obby challenges, dangerous traps and intense battles with other players are waiting for you. Going outside the circle means you're out, and the circle is getting smaller and smaller!

Tense obby challenges that will test your reaction and agility.
Roblox-style game with unique multiplayer.
Ability to compete with friends and players from all over the world.

title: Obby +1 Pet Every Seconds
description:
Are you ready to become the owner of the coolest pet collection? Merge them, upgrade buildings and open new islands!

The game offers you:
- A constant influx of new pets - collect, merge and open rare ones!
- Upgrade your lab, market and home for even more opportunities
- Sell pets, earn money and build your empire

Open all the islands, pump up your pets to the maximum and create your own pet empire in "Obby +1 Pet Every Second"!

title: Neon Gravity
description:
Defy gravity in this intense neon-soaked arcade runner! In Neon Gravity, your goal is to survive as long as possible by switching gravity to avoid deadly spikes, saws, and mines.

Master the timing to pass safely between rotating gears and trigger the "Perfect" bonus for massive points. As your score increases, the game speeds up, testing your reflexes to the limit. Can you unlock all 10 unique skins, including the Ninja and the Eye?

title: Space Survivor
description: Jump right into the action, fighting dangerous aliens and executing amazing maneuvers! Sharpen your weapons and skills, you will need them to last as long as possible.

title: Glitch
description:
Glitch is a 2D platformer game where you must solve challenging puzzles to overcome the glitching platform and reach the finish door. Get ready for a gaming experience like no other, whether you’re a fan of puzzles, action, or platformers. Start your adventure!

Innovative Puzzle Mechanics: Tackle a range of puzzles designed to test your problem-solving abilities. Each level offers a unique brain teaser, from classic logic challenges to cutting-edge new mechanics.

title: Catch The Pig
description: This is a casual elimination game. The main purpose of the game is to find three identical pigs, catch them, and collect all the pig collections!

title: Idle Legend
description: Dive into an exciting world! Fight monsters, gather battle energy, unlock bosses, and defeat them to earn coins. Spend coins on upgrades, skins, and pets. Enjoy vibrant cartoon graphics and exciting quests. Start your adventure today!

title: Pool Merge Mania
description:
Pool Merge Mania!

Get ready for a wildly addictive twist on classic pool mechanics!
In Pool Merge Mania, shoot balls into the arena and watch them bounce, collide, and merge into higher-level balls. 

But beware, you can only have 15 balls on the table.

Tip: Fewer balls = more control. Merge them quick to stay in the game!

title: Sky Assault
description: Drop from a helicopter into a hostile neon skyscraper! Sky Assault is a tactical vertical shooter where you descend through procedurally generated floors. Eliminate 30 unique enemy types, defeat massive bosses every 10 levels, and loot crates for ammo and weapons. Survival is the only option in this infinite arcade shooter.

title: Magic Finger Puzzle 3d
description:
Magic Finger Puzzle 3D is an interesting casual puzzle online game. You have an amazing pair of  hands that can fire the laser. It can help you smash the cages that are holding you. It can also
  launch boxes onto barricades so that you can escape from the cage without stepping on spikes and dying. But don't worry, you need to use your ingenuity to make good use of those amazing hands. All difficulties will be solved. Join the game if you want to try a journey full of adventure.

title: Ball Bunker: Sneaky Stacks
description: Ball Bunker: Sneaky Stacks is a fun physics puzzle where your goal is to keep the ball safe! Tap to drop shapes and stack them into a bunker. Rotate pieces to fill gaps, then release the enemy balls. If your bunker holds, you win — if the ball gets hit, you fail. Simple, clever, and addictive!

title: Word Search Universe Easter
description: Word Search Universe: Easter is a fun and relaxing puzzle game with a happy spring theme. Enjoy colorful eggs, soft colors, and a peaceful mood while finding hidden words. Easy to play and great for all ages, it’s a perfect way to relax and enjoy the Easter season.

title: Warping Bat
description: In Warping Bat you have to bounce from spring to spring in order to collect all of the coins in the level which will then open the exit gate. Face more than twenty levels, avoiding obstacles, and bouncing around each level! Try your best and see if you have what it takes to complete the game in its entirety!

title: Alien Wreckage 1
description: In "Alien Wreckage - Chapter 1" you are a lone space traveler, who explore the deepspace looking for alien artifacts around the universe. Face alien creatures, collect coins and jewels to spend in the game shops, find all the secrets and unlock new powerups.

title: Battle Zone 2D
description: Immerse yourself in a dynamic 2D top-down shooter. Fight on a vast map, search for weapons, ammo, and gear to survive epic battles. Use strategy, cover, and tactics to become the last survivor. Simple controls, fast-paced matches, and thrilling gameplay make the game accessible to everyone. Test your skills, defeat enemies, and prove that you are the best fighter!

title: The Trendy Mermaid
description: Embark on an exciting journey of makeup, accessories, and fashion to help Ariel make an unforgettable comeback. With a wide selection of clothes, makeup, and accessories, help Ariel become the trendiest mermaid ever. Enjoy making her look dreamy and fabulous - The Trendy Mermaid is free to play for every girl.

title: Ragdoll Beat - Simulator
description:
In "Ragdoll Beat - Simulator" you will find crazy levels, chaos physics and familiar characters! How far can you go, creating incredible moments with a ragdoll?

-Unique levels, where every object can become a tool of fun.
-Realistic ragdoll physics - push, throw and watch the result!
-The more you play, the more new situations you discover!

Jump into "Ragdoll Beat - Simulator" and check what chaos physics is capable of! Complete all the tests, open new opportunities and enjoy crazy fun!

title: Snake Classic
description: Snake Classic: A modern twist on the nostalgic snake game. Navigate your snake through six unique modes: Classic, Box, Tunnel, Mill, Condo, and Rail. Collect fruits and gems, customize your snake with skins, and enjoy multi-language support. Compete on personal leaderboards and play on both PC and mobile. Fun and engaging for all ages!

title: Bubble Shooter Valentine
description: "Bubble Shooter Valentine" is a delightful twist on the classic bubble shooter genre, set in a charming Valentine's Day theme. With its vibrant romantic aesthetics, players shoot and match colorful bubbles to create clusters and clear the screen. A perfect treat for bubble game enthusiasts, it offers a love-infused take on the familiar gameplay mechanics, ensuring an enjoyable experience for fans of the genre, particularly those who appreciate the engaging dynamics of Bubble Game 3.

title: GTA: Grand Vegas Crime
description: Grand Vegas Crime is an open-world action game set in a sprawling city inspired by Las Vegas. Players take on the role of a daring gangster looking to rise through the criminal underworld. The game offers intense missions, thrilling car chases, and fierce shootouts against rival gangs and law enforcement. Grand Vegas Crime delivers an adrenaline-pumping experience filled with crime, action, and adventure.

title: Brain Find Can You Find It
description: Brain Find brings new brain puzzles! Combine brain power and discovery for a brain challenge like no other! You can use your brain and reverse thinking to get the final target item. The unexpected way of passing levels can bring you endless laughs.  The game tests your logical thinking skills, reflexes as well as memory and creativity. Come and experience it and prove that you are the smartest!

title: Bubble Shooter Billiards & Pool
description: Do you love Pool, Billiards, or Snooker? Now, imagine them combined with your favorite Bubble Shooter game! Bubble Shooter Billiard Pool brings a fresh twist to the classic bubble shooter by blending the thrill of billiards with strategic bubble-popping action. Line up your shots, swap bubbles for the perfect move, and aim for high scores in a vibrant pool hall setting. The crowd is watching—can you master your technique and become the ultimate champion? Play now and find out!

title: Superhero Drop and Save
description: Our Super Hero is ready to save the hostages captured by the bad guys. To destroy the bad guys, jump on them and neutralize them by firing small explosions. Act carefully to avoid damaging the hostages from the explosions. You can unlocked new hero skins from the market section with the money you earn. As the levels progress, the tasks will become more difficult, but you can overcome them.

title: Family Tree Puzzle
description:
Get ready to dig into the family history and piece together the puzzle! In Family Tree Puzzle, you’ll be presented with a set of clues that will challenge your problem-solving skills and test your ability to think critically.

Using the given information, assemble the family tree by connecting the dots between relatives and ancestors.

title: Merge Tower Hero
description: Dive into Merge Tower Hero, an exhilarating online puzzle - Merge game that sharpens your mathematical thinking while exhilaratingly combining action, strategy, and combat. Assemble your team and tackle challenging battles that require not only strength but clever gameplay strategies to prevail!

title: Plants Warfare
description: Plants Warfare is a shooting game where you step into the shoes of the cute plants. Aim your projectiles, and take down the zombies with strategic aiming and precision shots. Use the environment to your advantage—ricochet bullets and eliminate multiple targets with the least shots possible! Collect stars, customize your look, and prove you’re the ultimate plant defense.

title: Running In Foam
description: Welcome to the wonderful world of "Running In Foam"! Everything here is made of soft, colorful foam. You'll play as a cute character, racing through foam-filled tracks. You need to nimbly jump over giant foam obstacles, slide down slippery foam slides, and collect shiny gems to unlock new characters and power-ups. The game is fast-paced with fresh, adorable graphics, and every run is full of surprises and fun. Be careful not to get lost in the foam!

title: THE SURVEY
description:
After a long work time when you ready to play games in your computer and start a survey  and it's shows you the things that you don't want to watch and know!
- 5-10 min Gameplay
- Atmospheric Enveronment
- Intrective Gameplay

title: Brain puzzles-Quests
description: This is the puzzle game filled with challenging, interesting tasks that will help you relax and have fun. There are games for training thinking, mental tasks, and IQ tests suitable for those who like to think. Develop logic, pump your brains!

title: Gun Clone
description:
A free browser game Gun Clone in the arcade and runner genre about cloning guns. Upgrade your weapons, collect cards. The game for girls and boys. The game is endless and pay attention, the levels are simple, but there are also very difficult ones! 
Take weapons and destroy everything in your path! By collecting various bonuses, more and more destructive weapons appear in your hands.

title: Fruitsland: Escape from the Amusement Park
description: Fruitsland: Escape from the Amusement Park is a horror escape adventure where bright amusement park rides hide lurking dangers.
