Players must solve puzzles, collect items, and uncover clues while evading hostile enemies. Stealth and timing are crucial—explore cautiously, hide when needed, and outsmart the threats to survive and escape. The mix of colorful setting and eerie tension creates a unique, suspenseful experience.

title: Vex Hyper Dash
description:
Get ready for a fast-paced challenge in this brand-new Vex spin-off: Vex Hyper Dash! Inspired by the legendary Geometry Dash. Your goal is simple: survive as long as possible. Jump from platform to platform, time your moves perfectly, and avoid the countless dangers that stand in your way. One wrong move, one mistimed jump, and it’s game over. 

Vex Hyper Dash puts your reflexes and precision to the ultimate test. Can you master the flow and set a new high score?

title: Ballpoint
description: Ballpoint is a fascinating Arkanoid game in which you have to shoot balls from a cannon and hit all the targets. Colorful backgrounds, varied levels, many variations of levels and bonuses. Try to pass all levels!

title: Nuts And Bolts Screw Puzzle
description:
Nuts And Bolts Screw Puzzle is a puzzle game to remove bolts from the board, by moving the bolts to other bolt holes. The game will be finished when all the boards are gone
This challenging and addictive Wooden Nuts & Bolts puzzle game will test your problem solving skills as you twist, turn and strategize your way through a maze of tricky Wooden tools. With each level, the puzzles become more complicated and complex.

title: Cookie monster
description: What more could you ask for?! Puzzle, brain teaser, monsters, snacks...wait what? That's right MONSTERS and SNACKS! Feed the hungry monsters snacks to pass the level! You have to make sure all the snacks get into the monster's mouth though or you will see a sad face! Let's keep these monsters happy! If you like the game, leave us a review! That will help us continue to bring you many more challenging levels, new monsters, maybe some new twizzler lines.

title: Ninja Obby Parkour
description:
Step into the thrilling world of Ninja Obby Parkour, where every level is a test of speed, agility, and strategy. Packed with hundreds of unique obstacle courses, this game combines competitive racing with ninja-style combat and dazzling customization options.

From smashing glass doors at checkpoints with your ninja power to unlocking powerful bonuses like speed boost, giant mode, and flight, every run feels fresh.

title: Path ice
description:
Chill the soda, add some ice, but here's the problem, it's not so easy to get into the glass, you need to draw a path for the ice.

Draw the path as you like.
Go through many levels
Discover all kinds of ice and glasses

title: Rotate Rings - Circle Puzzle
description: Play Rotate Rings - Circle Puzzle free online and test your skills in a clever browser game you can play instantly with no download and no install. Twist and align colorful rings in a satisfying logic puzzle that challenges your strategy like a true brain game. This unblocked game loads fast and runs smoothly at school or home, perfect for quick breaks. Fully mobile-friendly and optimized for desktop and mobile, it’s a free online game built for focused, mind-bending fun anytime.

title: Italian Animals: Create Your Own Brainrot!
description: Create your own crazy Brainrot! Mix bodies, heads, and legs to create absurd Italian creatures, listen to their "passports" and keep your masterpieces as keepsakes. Creative chaos is in your hands!

title: Brawl Stars
description: Welcome to a multiplayer arena game! Brawl Stars will take you into a world full of action .io battles! You will experience nervous PVP battles and a unique evolution system. Choose your favorite hero including fire dragons, electric dogs or flower spirits.

title: Robot Transform Race
description: Robot Transform Race is a running arcade game that is made of collecting, avoiding, and transforming elements. With 3D transformable robots, you need to win each race by collecting useful items, avoiding obstacles, and slowing down the other robots. Mostly you can strike and slow down the other robots nearby. Collect missiles to attach the advanced robots behind you. Don't forget to design your robot rather than buying a provided skin.

title: Noob Legends Dungeon Adventures
description: Dive into a thrilling 2D action-platformer! Battle zombies, drones, upgrade weapons, rescue friends, & uncover hidden secrets!

title: Lava Jump
description: Lava Jump is a fast-paced parkour platformer set in a deadly lava-filled dungeon! Jump across moving blocks, bounce off boost pads, and ride shifting platforms to survive. Complete more than 25 levels, evade enemies, spikes and other deadly objects and escape from the lava dungeon alive. Collect coins and get new characters to use in your adventure.

title: Truck Simulator: Russia
description: In Truck Simulator: Russia you will drive a truck. As a driver, you will deliver cargoes to various cities and travel the open world. Unlock new types of goods to receive a greater reward for delivery. With the money you earn, you can buy a new truck or improve your trucks, as well as upgrade driver skills.

title: Pop Star
description: Ready to relax, think, and have fun all at once? In Star Pop Mania, the rules are simple, but the satisfaction is endless. Tap two or more matching blocks to pop them and clear the board. The bigger the combo, the higher the score—and the more rewarding it feels!

title: Animal in Rails!
description:
An exciting puzzle game about delivering animals to a trader's base

Connect and disconnect railways around the world to help each animal reach its home.

Install, remove, and redirect connections so that wagons can safely connect to the locomotive. But be careful and don't let them collide with each other!

Delay trains by using railway barriers. Change the tracks to redirect the wagons in different directions. Pick up new pets along the way and face even more challenges along the way!

title: Capybara Go!
description: Enter the wonderful world of Capybara. In Capybara Go, begin a strategic adventure. You'll be forming and commanding your own little Capybara army. Defeat your opponents and conquer everything through strategy and combat. Lay out your Capybara's to take advantage of each one's strengths and use strategy to defeat powerful enemies.

title: Hexa Blast Game Puzzle
description:
Hexa Blast Game Puzzle is a fun and challenging game! Try to find the right combination of hexa puzzle. Just drag and drop all the hexa block game on the board. The rule is simple: everything must fit! Enjoy the satisfaction of pieces fitting neatly in place.
Our unique hexagonal pieces will stretch your mind in ways you never imagined in this addictive hexa block puzzle game.
Keep your brain active and sharp, analyze all the possibilities and try to finish all puzzles.

title: Match Masters
description: Match Masters is a real-time multiplayer match-3 puzzle game where players compete head-to-head on the same board. Each move requires strategic thinking, as it can benefit both you and your opponent. Utilize unique boosters, participate in tournaments, and climb the global leaderboards in this dynamic and engaging game.

title: Stickman Duo: Escape The Tomb
description: - Stickman Duo: Escape The Tomb is an addictive puzzle game where you have to synchronize two characters. Control both stickmen at the same time and use the buttons to move, push boxes and collect coins to reach the exit in the maze.

title: Run Now
description: Dive into Run Now, where each step is a puzzle waiting to be solved! This game offers a unique blend of creative challenges, quirky humor, and addictive gameplay. Perfect for puzzle enthusiasts and casual gamers alike, Run Now invites you to test your skills in a world filled with unexpected obstacles and entertaining surprises.

title: Obby Halloween Danger Skate
description: Obby is skateboarding on the rooftops and performing dangerous tricks. He wants to skateboard on the rooftops during Halloween. Help Obby reach the finish line safely. You must be very careful! Since it's Halloween, the city is flooded with toxic water, and if you fall from the building, you will die. Jump from barrels to containers and climb to the top of the building. Collect all the pumpkins along the way to earn money. Gather all the pumpkins and reach the finish line!

title: Special Holiday Solitaire
description:
Step into a festive world of fun with Special Holiday Solitaire! This cheerful card game combines classic solitaire gameplay with a holiday twist, creating the perfect escape for players of all ages.  
Whether you're looking for a relaxing break or a way to get into the holiday spirit, *Special Holiday Solitaire* is the perfect companion for the season. Challenge yourself, enjoy the magic of the holidays, and spread the festive cheer!

title: Bubble Shooter Free 3
description: Bubble Shooter Free 3 is back with a long-awaited 3rd sequel to one of the most popular bubble shooter games there is! This bubble shooter embraces endless gameplay that is designed for players to enjoy hours and hours of fun without time pressure. It boasts the ‘Bubble Swap’ feature which lets you swap the current bubble in your shooter with the incoming one as well as the BOMB which creates huge explosions popping 15 bubbles at once! Now the players can play even more strategically!

title: PopSortica
description:
PopSortica is a new chapter in Poppy’s adventures! Join the underwater SORTING voyage! Challenging yet relaxing levels await as you sort things out.
The rules are simple, but the difficulty increases with each new level.
Special obstacles and conditions will challenge your skills, while boosters will help you achieve the best results faster.
Dive deep with Mermaid Poppy and challenge yourself in this exciting sea sorting adventure!

title: Squarehead Hero
description:
Squarehead Hero is a fun, turn-based puzzle game where you help a brave, square-headed hero explore dangerous dungeons full of monsters and treasure.
Plan your moves carefully on a grid board — fight enemies, grab loot, and gear up for the next challenge.
Think you’ve got what it takes to lead Squarehead to victory? Jump in and find out!

title: Animal Swipe
description: Animal Swipe is a fun and addictive puzzle game where players match adorable animal pairs on a colorful board. With easy-to-learn controls and exciting power-ups, the game offers a challenge for both casual and strategic players. Use your wits and boosts to clear levels and achieve your objectives!

title: Battle Of Tank Steel
description: Are you ready to enter the world of tank battles? In Battle of Tank Steel, you’ll drive powerful tanks into intense battles. Experience endless action and shooting fun! This game puts you on a battlefield filled with challenges and strategy. You can unblock various types of tanks, each with unique capabilities and weapons.

title: Gun Fest
description: Gun Fest is a free online shooting game for boys played on PuzzleGame. Of course, a lot of running elements are added to the game. In the process of playing, you not only have to choose the right door to fight against the enemy but also have to avoid many obstacles to reach the end. It will greatly test your skills and reaction ability. Play on Mobile, Tablet, or Desktop with us!

title: Kings and Queens Mahjong
description: Enter the magical Royal Kingdom in Kings & Queens Mahjong! Match pairs of jewels, crowns, and other royal treasures to clear the board and climb the Royal Leaderboard. Race against the clock, use boosters like Hint, Shuffle, and Undo when needed, and enjoy handcrafted tiles with a majestic design. Perfect for puzzle lovers looking for a royal challenge!

title: Dark Myth: Monkey Merge
description: Merge warriors, build your army, and fight through hordes of monsters as the Monkey King! Your master and companions have been captured — combine strategy and action to rescue them all. From Common to Legendary, every merge makes you stronger.

title: My Little City
description: My Little City is the latest Match-3 challenge for aspiring city planners! The City Council has commissioned your company to prepare countless new building plots for construction. They need you to ensure the construction projects go according to plan! Supply building materials such as stones, water, electricity, and more! Use various boosters like sledgehammers, dynamite, or paint bombs to complete tasks on time. Play My Little City for free now and build your own Little City!

title: Divinex
description:
Embark on a captivating journey into the world of Divinex! Solve challenging puzzles by matching pairs of themed tiles adorned with intricate symbols! Сhallenge yourself with increasingly difficult levels, create a unique atmosphere by choosing new avatars and backgrounds. Immerse yourself in the magical world of Divinex - a new relaxing game with stunning visuals - explore all levels and uncover the magic hidden within the tiles!
Begin your journey today with Divinex!

title: Dirty Them All
description: Let's splash some dirt over the walking people near the road with this Dirty Them All game! Drive your car through the mud and splash it all around the other people. Let them chase you until the finish line. The more people chase, the more scores you get. Let this funny and entertaining adventure begin!

title: Sort Puzzle - Nuts and Bolts
description: Play Sort Puzzle - Nuts and Bolts, a free and addictive sorting game! Train your brain by stacking nuts of the same color. Simple yet challenging, it's the perfect casual game to relax and sharpen your logic skills. Play now and start sorting!

title: Fitness Club 3D
description: Fitness Club 3D is a casual game where you plunge into the world of fitness and make every workout count as you strive to build an empire. Help your clients achieve their dream bodies and fitness aspirations while transforming your studio into the ultimate gym. Jump into the aerobics class, making a splash to rake in the cash. Pay close attention to your clients' forms, ensuring proper training techniques.

title: Stick - Color War
description:
To defeat enemies you must shoot bullets of the same color as the enemy. 
Every five levels you have to defeat a boss.
Breaking off new weapons.
Will you be able to resist the colored sticks?
Play our shooter without downloads and registration.

title: Pinball Basketball
description: A captivating fusion of classic arcade pinball excitement and thrilling sports gameplay. Flip your paddle skillfully to keep the ball in play, aiming for the basketball hoop while enjoying the stunning minimalist art and responsive design that make every moment electrifying and addictive.

title: Mini Games Casual Collection
description:
Mini Games: Casual Collection is an online game. The gameplay is simple, fun, and addictive, so
you won't be able to stop playing. There is no stamina display. You can play anytime anywhere. You can use hints to help you pass when you are stuck on a level. If you have any problems playing this game or have any suggestions for this game, please leave us a message. If you like our games, please share them with your friends to double the fun!

title: Hole Battle.io
description:
The battle between the holes is beginning in the arena! Pick your hole and join this battle! Eat fruits, planes, cars, and many things that come to mind, and grow as much as you can! Your goal is to eat things that are smaller than you and make your hole bigger than the enemy's. Avoid bigger holes and try to collect power-ups besides eatable items.
Four different great maps are waiting for you:
- 2048 Map
- World Map
- Stationary Map
- Kitchen Map

title: Winter Mahjong
description: You can test your pattern detection skills in this relaxed mahjong & connect puzzle game with winter christmas theme. You can eliminate pair of same tiles. The line connecting the two clicked tiles can't have more than 2 corners. Some levels the tiles can auto slide( to left, to right, to up, to bottom). Can you clear the board before time runs out? Enjoying matching winter tiles with 32 levels in this game.

title: Volley Bean
description: Volley Bean is a simple and easy to learn volleyball game. With simple controls and fast paced gameplay volleyball never been more entertaining. The variety of boosts spawn randomly on the screen doubles the fun.

title: Love Cats Rope
description: Help pretty woolen cats to be together! Think carefully before you draw a figure that will help to meet two loving hearts!

title: Draw Weapon Fight Party
description: In Draw Weapon - Fight Party, you can draw your own weapons. Feel free to write your weapon, but keep an eye on the amount of ink left. Your creativity determines your combat style. Enter the 3D battle arena and fight against other opponents in an action-packed showdown. Draw precisely, craft the ultimate weapon, and crush your opponents to become the ultimate warrior.

title: Home Pin 1
description: Welcome to Home Pin: Pull Pin Loot Puzzle , you will play as Edward, the man who just moved into an abandoned house. Use your wisdom to help Edward defeat villains, save his wife, collect money and build the house. Only with your brain can you help him turn his abandoned house into the dream’s home of Edward's family.

title: Ragdoll Bounce
description: Jump into a fun 2D challenge where you control a ragdoll launched by a bigger ragdoll. Click to bounce on platforms and keep climbing. But be careful—missing a platform means a big fall!

title: Catch Thief
description: Catch Thief is an addictive puzzle game where you must outsmart a clever thief and stop his escape. Take control of the police, block every possible path and drive the criminal into a dead end. With each new level the challenge grows, requiring you to plan ahead, think strategically and act quickly. Bright cartoon graphics, fun scenarios and increasing difficulty make Catch Thief a perfect choice for fans of logic games who enjoy testing their skills, attention and reaction speed.

title: Mahjong Garden
description:
Mahjong Garden offers players the opportunity to enjoy a classic puzzle game with no time limits and on full screen!
In this exciting game you have to connect identical chips in a certain sequence so that they disappear from the field, as well as immerse yourself in oriental culture!
Unlock new tiles and backgrounds to take a look Mahjong in a new way!
Raise your level of logic and visualization, making every move strategic!

title: Bubble Ball
description: Bubble Ball is an untimed bubble-popping strategy game with a classic interface and arcade special effects noises. The player uses an arrow shooter to pop clusters of three or more matching bubbles to earn points and special gifts.

title: Whats Grandma Hiding
description:
Embark on a mysterious journey, where your grandma tasked you with restoring a mansion that you never knew your family had. 

Search for clues scattered throughout the estate, piecing together the mystery and unlocking hidden truths as you delve deeper into the enigmatic past. 

Utilize rewarded ads to gain valuable coins or expedite the deciphering process, enhancing your investigative prowess in this immersive item-searching adventure.

title: Lucky Vegas Blackjack
description: Enter the Lucky Vegas casino and unwind with a game of blackjack. Calculate the chances of winning and make split-second decisions, that will help you win against your opponents.

title: Brawl Stars Brave Adventure
description: Brawl Stars Brave Adventure is a casual battle game designed for brave boys who love fast-paced action and nonstop adventure. Control fearless heroes as you battle enemies, avoid traps, and blast your way through nervous levels. Defeat monsters to constantly upgrade. Choose your skills to ensure your survival or increase your damage! Keep moving to avoid enemy attacks! Complete all levels to win. Get coins to unlock a variety of awesome weapons. Like darts, axes, etc.

title: Two RX7 Drifters
description: Drift through 3 stunning drift tracks and show how well you can steer the wheels of a powerful rx7. Go head to head with your friend in a drift battle and see whose a better drift racer, customize your ride with stunning body colors, underglows and cool rims. Are you ready to showcase your drifting skills?

title: Collect Honey Puzzle
description:
Collect Honey Puzzle is a popular and favorite merge game. You are now in charge of collecting honey, but you need to slowly upgrade to collect it. You can start by collecting sticks and
upgrading to bricks. Upgrade from one brick to three and then to the honey jar and finally collect the honey successfully.  You can also challenge your highest record anytime, and anywhere. If you are interested in this game, join us!

title: Dictator Simulator: 1984
description: Make choices as the Supreme Leader of a dystopian state. Maintain control, balance resources, and crush opposition—or be overthrown!

title: Food Jam
description: Food Jam is a fun and satisfying puzzle game where you sort fruits, veggies, and drinks into the right takeout carts. With over 500 juicy levels, unlock delicious new themes like desserts and juices! Use unique power-ups to clear tricky jams and keep your customers happy.

title: Aventador Vice Crime City
description: Dive into city driving with four game modes. Navigate realistic traffic and monitor your fuel while exploring busy streets. Enjoy stunning morning city graphics, transforming the city into a spectacle. Pedestrians add unpredictability, and hitting them triggers police chases. Customize your car's appearance and performance. All this chaos is accompanied by your cute dog. Whether evading the cops or just cruising, Aventador Vice Crime City offers a thrilling and visually amazing experience.

title: Dice Puzzle
description: Dice Puzzle is a smart, satisfying merge game where you place numbered dice on a grid to combine matches and build higher values. Plan ahead, manage limited space, and handle dice that appear solo or in pairs. Every move matters—chain merges, grow your numbers, and test your strategy in this addictive dice challenge.

title: Army Truck Driver Online
description: Take control of a cargo army truck in a military game and deliver high-ranking soldiers to their camp. Carrying out your assignment as an army truck driver cargo in this military game is no easy feat, especially when you're an officer. The highways are filled with hazards and obstacles.

title: Single Stroke: Energy Line Puzzle
description: Single Stroke: Energy Line Puzzle is a fun and simple way to train your brain every day. This mind-challenging game has easy rules—just connect all the circles using a single continuous line. It’s a great way to keep your brain sharp with quick, clever puzzles. Spend just a few minutes daily to give your mind a boost. Enjoy this brain-training experience anytime, anywhere!

title: Grenade Simulator
description: Begin the most explosive simulator experience ever. Grenade Simulator is an adrenaline-pumping explosion simulator where you can freely throw grenades, drop mines, and trigger massive blasts. This isn’t just a casual game.

title: Super Elip Adventure
description: In Elip Adventure, you engage in a thrilling quest as an ellipse, navigating through treacherous maps to locate stars that unlock the elliptical house. Each stage presents a different challenge, with numerous obstacles and antagonists designed to hinder your progress. Whether you choose to outmaneuver or confront these enemies calls for strategic choices contributing to a dynamic gaming experience.

title: Freddys Nightmares Return Horror New Year
description:
Immerse yourself in this 3D game there's no need to fear the monster Freddy. To familiarize yourself with the area, play the escape mode. You'll find yourself in a mysterious, forgotten city on New Year's Eve, with snow making escape difficult. Go out of there as quickly as possible and see how far you can go.

Freddy Krueger and his snowman minions will relentlessly pursue and attack you in the second game mode, but you have the option to bring weapons to help you destroy them.

title: 100 Doors Challenge
description:
Do you like puzzles and hidden object games? Do you play games from the 100 Doors series? Then this point-and-click game is just what you need! Use all your skills to complete all levels and get all achievements.
The main goal in the "100 Doors Challenge" is to get out of the room. Using all the capabilities of the device, you need to open each of the 100 doors and move the elevator to the next floor. Find hidden objects, solve puzzles and use objects to do it!

title: Magic Finger
description: Magic Finger 3D is a casual physics game where you use your magical powers to defeat alien foes creatively. Use your magic touch to throw enemies at each other, utilize explosive barrels for big impacts, and send adversaries off platforms. Control your surroundings by picking up and manipulating objects, becoming the ultimate magic user.

title: ASMR Water vs Fire
description:
Water vs Fire, upgrade your water power and damp down the fire!
And Have fun!

Upgrade your Water Power and your Amount of Canister.


- Easy intuitive controls
- Release to shoot

title: Hotel Fever Tycoon
description: Wanna be a Hotel Empire Tycoon or a Top Cooking Chef? Come to "Hotel Fever Tycoon" to start an interesting hotel management and cooking journey with Emma and Uncle George! Work together to build your world-class hotel chain!

title: Monster High Spooky Fashion
description: In Monster High Spooky Fashion, step into the world of ghouls and ghosts as you style your favorite Monster High characters! Choose spooky outfits, eerie accessories, and haunting makeup to create the ultimate creepy-cool look. Mix and match from a wide range of outfits to give each character a unique spooky style perfect for any Monster High event. Whether it’s for a Halloween party or a night out in the graveyard, bring out your inner fashionista with Halloween Spooky Fashion!

title: Angry Chibi Run
description: Angry Chibi RunAn endless sprinting running game. Jump and slide to avoid obstacles and dodge oncoming trains as fast as possible. Choose your favorite character, dress him up and surf the streets to your heart's content! What are you waiting for, come and join the best parkour game ever!

title: Escape School Duel
description: Escape School Duel is a fast, funny, and tense escape challenge set inside a school that does not want to let you leave. Play solo to chase your best time, or go 2 player and turn every hallway into a race for freedom. One moment you are dodging traps, the next you are trying to slip past the principal in a long corridor or outsmart a teacher waiting near the classroom. Every section has its own danger, so learning the school layout is part of the strategy.

title: Life Clicker
description:
Life Clicker: Move to Success - Live your dream life!
   In this unique indie life simulation game, you can explore various careers in cafes and factories, unwind in luxurious or budget-friendly apartments, and have fun in different exciting places. Hone your skills with new jobs, advance to the top of your chosen profession, and reach new heights of success.
   Join the thrilling adventure of Life Clicker and become a success story today!

title: Grandma with machine-gun: Apocalypsis
description:
Granny is in a hurry to get home and bake some pies. But there's one problem - first she needs to bake a few hundred zombies! They'll be chasing you in cars and motorcycles, they'll have machine guns, rocket launchers, and support drones.
But you've got a pretty good arsenal too - from a revolver and machine guns to a minigun and a bazooka.
Help Granny get home, roast them all!

title: Epic Racing - Descent on Cars
description:
To tear yourself and your neighbor to shreds, but to reach the finish line first is an "Epic Racing - Descent on Cars"!

Epic collisions, a serious fight to the finish line and a million ways to bend and twist metal - that's what awaits you in the game "Epic Racing - Descent on Cars".

Burn rubber and tear metal - the game begins!

title: The Hardest Puzzle Ever
description:
An Exciting Puzzle Game for the Whole Family! ?

Play together and train your brain every day! ?? Enjoy thrilling puzzles suitable even for the youngest players. With new levels added daily, there's always a fresh challenge waiting for you!

Have fun, improve your skills, and become a true puzzle master! ??

title: Master of 3 Tiles
description: Step into a fresh take on classic Mahjong! Your mission is clear: find matching tiles, gather sets of three, and clear the board. Each level ups the challenge, sharpening your skills as you progress. Ready to conquer every board and prove your mastery? Let the tile-matching adventure begin!

title: Woop Crawl Up
description: Woop Tower Climb is a fun arcade climbing challenge where you crawl, jump, and dash your way up endless towers. Dodge tricky traps, survive obstacle course chaos, and master platformer moves to reach the top. Perfect for fans of climbing games, jump games, obstacle course adventures, and even cool math games students search for online. Addictive, casual, and funny—how high can you Woop Crawl Up?

title: Ball Mania!
description:
Ball Mania is an addictive little ball runner game. 
You never know what the future holds and a path full of unexpected obstacles awaits your exploration. 
Slide to control the little ball to move left and right, and then turn the corner, you have to be very careful, or you risk falling! 

This is a great test of the player's reaction ability, can you succeed in the challenge?
Simply click the big play button to start having fun.

title: Ellie's Recipe: Dubai Chocolate Bar
description: Whip up luxury in Ellie’s Recipe: Dubai Chocolate Bar! Help Ellie create rich, decadent chocolate treats in this fun, interactive cooking game. Gather ingredients, prepare molds, make gourmet fillings, and craft elegant chocolate bars with Dubai flair. Unlock stylish outfits for Ellie and enjoy hands-on cooking fun with real kitchen actions. From mixing to decorating, every step is sweet! Play now and become a luxury dessert pro with Ellie!

title: Crazy Motorcycle
description:
Drive Nubik along exciting tracks. Jump over gaps, go around obstacles and reach the finish line! Lots of different levels, drive a motorcycle, get there without destruction.

You have to drive a motorcycle with a noob and get to the finish line.
Jump over gaps and go around obstacles at high speed.
Exciting levels are waiting for you!

title: Doomsday Survival Rpg Shooter
description: Doomsday Survival Rpg Shooter is a 2D side-scrolling survival RPG shooting game. Zombies occupy the whole city. You need to recruit the last survivors to fight against zombies for a living. As humans, you need weapons, ammo, food, and medicines. Send your teammates to dispatch different buildings, go to complete the tasks in this fallen town. Time is your life, get out of the safe house and find resources!

title: Association - Connect Word
description: Dive into the world of word puzzles and associations! In this game, you need to find hidden connections between words and group them logically. Each level offers new themes, new words, and increasingly challenging tasks. The game develops thinking, expands vocabulary, and trains attention. Intuition and logic will help you complete dozens of levels, from easy to hard, and become a true master of associations. Play at your own pace without time limits and use hints if needed.

title: Paris Kiss
description: Welcome to Paris Kiss, a fun and quirky puzzle game where your goal is simple — bring the characters together for a kiss

title: Digger Fighter in the Maze
description: Digger Fighter in the Maze is an action-packed adventure game that takes you deep into a mysterious underground labyrinth filled with secrets, dangers, and treasures. Step into the shoes of a brave digger fighter as you tunnel your way through winding mazes, uncover hidden paths, and gather valuable resources. Along the way, you'll meet and recruit powerful allies, each with unique abilities that can help you overcome obstacles and defeat fierce enemies.

title: Cosmic Aviator
description: Embark on an exhilarating journey through the depths of the cosmos in Cosmic Aviator! In this pulse-pounding arcade-style game, you find yourself piloting a sleek aircraft that's trapped within a twisting and treacherous tunnel of unknown origin. Your mission? Navigate through the endless labyrinth of obstacles and hazards while collecting valuable power-ups to boost your score to new heights.

title: Little Hero Knight
description: In Little Hero Knight, you'll play the role of a brave little hero. Travel through a world full of monsters and keep fighting with your weapon. Build your defense towers and engage in a battle of wits and courage! Strategically manage your battlegrounds, build walls, barracks, houses and more! Build your base and towers using collected coins. Unlock powerful weapons and defense towers, and customize your battle setup!

title: Unpuzzle Master
description:
Unpuzzle master plan and execute your moves strategically to become the master, navigating through bottlenecks and utilizing “exit” strategies effectively.

Touch the tile to move it in the direction of the tile. Complete each level that really challenges your brain to think sharper.

Choose from a variety of themes and skins to customize your block-puzzle adventure. Each skin not only changes the visual aesthetic but also improves the way you interact with the puzzles, making every move count.

title: Family Tree Emoji
description:
Is a logic game that combines the excitement of deciphering with the surprise of bizarre combinations.

The game will come across family trees with missing cells, you need to choose the emoji that fits into that gap.

Look at the parents and children to find commonalities and complete all levels.

title: Tappy Bird - Avoid the Spikes
description: Tap on the screen to move bird up, avoiding the spikes as the level progresses more spikes appear and the possibility to collect coins increases.

title: Murder
description: Ready for the scary world of Murder? Colorful Halloween scenes, accompanied by scary ghosts and jack-o '-lanterns, enhance the immersion of the game. On this most mysterious night,let you try a nervous assassination adventure! You will be a cunning assassin who will seize the moment to kill the king. Play the king when you kill successfully.

title: Mermaid Princess Avater Castle
description: This is a dress-up and decorating game for girls. If you like games where you create your world, you can't miss our game. There is a group of mermaids living in the underwater world and you can live with them and create beautiful memories.

title: Crush it ALL!
description: Take on an exciting journey in Crush it all, a fun mobile game where you guide a lively anvil. Flip and jump to squish fruits, bottles, emojis, and more on your way to the finish line. Watch out for dangerous fire and water, one wrong move, and it’s game over! Can you crush through the chaos and reach the end safely? Test your skills in this fast and addictive challenge!

title: Club Tycoon: Idle Clicker
description:
Idle Manager / Clicker game where you have to manage little club: upgrade abilities, defend area, resist various enemies, earn money, get resources and become a club tycoon!
Highly addictive and fun Idle clicker game with area defense elements. If you enjoy tycoon simulator and incremental style games, where you have to find the right strategy for resource management, "Club Tycoon: Idle clicker" will be best for you. Good luck capitalist, don't forget to share your scores on the leaderboard!

title: Sort Games Challenge
description: Sort Games Challenge is a puzzle game. Here you can challenge yourself and choose from multiple modes, not limited to one. Your goal is to complete the mission within a limited time to pass the level. Dont underestimate this game, its still very difficult to pass. Come and challenge!

title: Heritage Mahjong Classic
description: Immerse yourself in a timeless Mahjong experience with Heritage Mahjong Classic. Featuring a single elegant layout, three unique tile skins, a time bonus for quick matches, and a competitive leaderboard, this game offers a simple yet captivating challenge. Perfect for players of all levels, enjoy a relaxing atmosphere as you match tiles, earn bonuses, and climb the ranks. Are you ready to test your skills and embrace the charm of classic Mahjong? Start your journey today!

title: Tricky Castle
description: The knight finds himself in a medieval castle full of tricky traps and puzzles. His goal is to escape by overcoming dangerous levels. Help the hero get out of this treacherous place and test your skills in our thrilling platformer!

title: Dinosaur Cards
description: Explore, match, conquer! Dino challenge! Win by matching sets of dinosaurs faster than time runs out. Dive into dino fun today!

title: Doge Bubble
description: Doge Bubble is a classic bubble shooter game with multiple challenging levels. Doge Bubbles features the classic bubble shooter gameplay with 3 powerups: The rocket that clears the chosen path, the bomb that clears up to 8 bubbles at a time and the multi color bubble. The goal in each level is to "free" all the doge bubbles.

title: Pursuit Rampage
description: In Pursuit Rampage, you’re behind the wheel of a police car in an endless, high-speed chase. Navigate through busy streets, dodge obstacles, and close in on criminals while keeping your cool under pressure. The game constantly pushes your reflexes to the limit, with each second offering a new challenge. Whether you're weaving through traffic or speeding down back alleys, the action never lets up.

title: Shape Transforming: Shifting Run
description: Get ready to dive into the exhilarating world of Shape Transforming: Shifting Run, where the power of transformation is in your hands! This game is a thrilling journey across diverse terrains, challenging players to adapt, transform, and conquer. If you have a knack for quick thinking and love dynamic gameplay, this is the perfect game for you! ??

title: Survival On Raft Multiplayer
description: Begin an exciting survival adventure in Survival On Raft: Multiplayer. Have an addictive survival-adventure simulation on an island. Here, you'll be gathering various foods, stones, and other items. Collect ocean resources like wood, leaves and rare items. Sharks in the sea will attack your raft at any moment.

title: Pet Simulator
description:
You are the owner of the pet store! Earn as much money as possible, satisfy all visitors! Try to catch all the animals!
This is an easy and relaxing game in which you are the owner of a pet store!

Positive and beautiful graphics, meditative gameplay.

Grow food, feed animals, build new enclosures, sell animals to buyers. Your goal is to earn as much money as possible, for this try to grow and sell as many animals as possible.

Have a good game!

title: Ballerina Cappuccina First Date
description: Tonight’s a big night—Cappuccina and Tung Tung Sahur are heading out on their very first date, and they want to look perfect. In Ballerina Cappuccina First Date, you’re the stylist behind their special evening. From choosing outfits to adding finishing touches, it’s up to you to make sure both of them shine.

title: Kawaii Realm Adventure
description: Embark on a whimsical journey to the "Kawaii Realm" with Sarah, Emma, Lily, and Mia! Discover a hidden portal in their school basement, transforming them into adorable 2D characters. Engage in dress-up and makeup activities for a delightful adventure!

title: Traffic Jam Hop On
description: In Traffic Jam: Hop On, challenge your strategy thinking and quick reflexes! This wonderful puzzle game will take you into a colorful parking lot. Your task is to help all kinds of vehicles get out of traffic jams and start smoothly.

title: Fishing Bear
description:
Tap to reel in your fishing line and catch as many fish as you can!
But stay alert—mischievous creatures in the sea will try to get in your way.
And when you pick up a mysterious Treasure Shell… something exciting might happen!
Enjoy a simple and addictive fishing experience!

title: Ship Factory Tycoon
description: Play Ship Factory Tycoon free online and build your industrial empire in a fast-loading browser game you can play instantly with no download and no install. Manage production lines, automate workflows, and upgrade your shipyard in a smart strategy experience that feels like a rewarding brain game. This unblocked game runs smoothly at school or home and is fully mobile-friendly. Optimized for desktop and mobile, it’s a free online game perfect for quick breaks or long-term tycoon planning anytime

title: Stack Tower Pro
description: Test your precision in this addictive 3D block stacking game! Build the tallest skyscraper, unlock stunning themes, and master the art of balance. Can you reach the stars?

title: Farmer Pedro
description:
Get ready to till the soil and reap the rewards in Farmer Pedro!

In this charming 3D farming simulator, you’ll take on the role of Pedro, a humble farmer with a big dream - to build the most bountiful farm in the countryside. Start by driving your trusty tractor around the initial plot of land, harvesting a variety of crops like corn, tomatoes, carrots, and more.

As you grow and harvest your crops, you’ll earn cash that can be used to expand your farmland and unlock access to new crops.

title: Wood Screw Puzzle
description: Wood Screw Puzzle is a satisfying logic game where you untangle wood screws, nuts, and bolts from clever wooden structures. Each level challenges your spatial thinking as you analyze, plan, and carefully unscrew fasteners in the right order. Beautiful visuals and tactile mechanics make every puzzle feel rewarding and immersive.

title: Kitty Couple Lovely Valentine
description: Celebrate love with the adorable kitty duo Angela and Tom in Kitty Couple Lovely Valentine. This charming game takes players on a delightful journey filled with fashion, hidden surprises, and puzzles. Help the cute couple prepare for their special Valentine’s Day by dressing them up, uncovering hidden hearts, and completing their couple photo puzzle.

title: Lode Retro Adventure
description: Relive the classic fun of Lode Retro Adventure, a 2D pixel game that will make you dig for gold. You will play as a gold miner who must collect a certain amount of gold coins in each level. You will use your shovel to break the ground tiles and trap the purple monsters, but be careful, they can escape and chase you. You will also find other treasures such as golden bananas that will boost your score. Lode Retro Adventure is a game that will test your strategy. Can you collect all the gold coins?

title: Wild West Match
description: Embark on a captivating Wild West adventure with Bonnie! Explore iconic landscapes, face challenges, and uncover secrets in this thrilling journey. The frontier spirit awaits – join Bonnie on the quest for an unforgettable adventure!

title: Candy Cascade
description: Click on groups of two or more candies to destroy them. You need to collect certain amount of different sweets on every level.  Wooden blocks, honey and jam should be cleared from the game field. If there is a key on the game field it should be dropped down. The moves are limited for each level. If you have hard time with a task you can use bonuses that can be received when you collect jam.

title: Bunnyhop and Surf Maps
description: Game that brings bunnyhop and surf from "Counter Strike" straight to your browser! The game features a variety of parkour maps, many knife skins, unique bunnyhop mechanics, the ability to accelerate with a knife, and the opportunity to compete with other players to see who can reach the finish line first.

title: Mahjong At Home - Scandinavian Edition
description: Immerse yourself in the minimalist elegance of the North with 'Mahjong at Home: Scandinavian Winter Edition'. This high-quality Mahjong game celebrates the sleek, modern design of Scandinavian style, blending festive themes with clean, sophisticated aesthetics for a uniquely cozy winter gaming experience.

title: Tangram Puzzle
description:
Tangram Puzzles is a relaxing geometric logic game where you must recreate a given shape using classic tangram pieces. The challenge trains your spatial thinking, visualization, and ability to rotate and position shapes so they perfectly fit the silhouette.

Don’t be afraid to experiment — sometimes a wrong combination in one place prevents the correct placement somewhere else.

title: Draw Bridge Puzzle
description: Draw Bridge Puzzle is a creative and exciting puzzle game that combines drawing and rescue gameplay into one addictive experience. You become a bridge designer, using your finger to draw safe paths and complete thrilling rescue missions. Enter the car mode, draw a strong bridge to help a motor cross gaps, broken roads, and dangerous obstacles to reach the goal.

title: Wacky Strike
description:
This time you will choose who are you actually. Well, no. Who is the strongest! Girls, or boys! So, just build a lot of towers, and buy your cool enemy! Fight like the real hero and you will cope with it, just try it!

Are you a good fighter? Then this game is for you! Just pick a side, setup your troops, and fight against your mortal enemy, do you think that it is so easy?! Then march from your castle to the enemy castle claiming ground in between.

title: Max Crusher 2 - Destruction, Drift, and Racing!
description: Get ready for unbridled automotive chaos in Max Crusher 2 - Destruction, Drift, and Racing!– a game where the three elements of extreme driving merge: devastating crash tests, masterful drifting, and frantic racing!

title: Hole Eat Grow Attack
description:
Eat objects, and ammos, and attack other holes around. Two unique game modes, time attack and infinite modes are waiting for you. Let your hole battle begin in the arena against the other holes.

The game consists of two levels Time Attack and Infinite. There are more than 20 characters. You can play the game either in single-player mode or in 2 player mode. Pick your hole fighter and start the game. You can activate player 2 with keys. Make sure you avoid larger-hole enemies around.

title: City Drift Racing
description: "City Drift Racing" is an atmospheric racing arcade game where crazy competitions await you on the streets of the metropolis.

title: Solitaire Tail
description: Raise your dragons at Solitaire! Clear the game by moving all cards to the foundation! Move cards from the tableau or stockpile in ascending order of the same suit. In the tableau, you can stack cards in descending order with alternating colors! You can place a King card in an empty column! When there are no available moves, you can draw cards from the stockpile to the foundation or tableau!

title: Fruit Survivor
description: Fruit Survivor is a cool and exciting 3D cartoon survival arcade game. You play as a gardener who is attacked by fruit monsters. You have to fight your way out and destroy them with different weapons. I recommend choosing the blender and maxing it out first. It can deal with many strong enemies effectively. You can also experiment with different weapon combinations to challenge yourself with harder levels. Enjoy hunting fruit monsters!

title: Gin Rummy
description: "Gin Rummy" is a classic and engaging card game where the goal is to strategically arrange your hand into sets and runs. Place your cards in either groups of the same rank or in sequential order of the same suit. Score points by eliminating these combinations from your hand. The game ends when a player reaches the target score, typically set at 100 points.

title: Harvesting Veggies
description: Players will take on the role of a farmer, planting vegetables and achieving a full row or column to harvest. The game is based on a cartoon style, with a fresh and cute overall aesthetic, making it fun and addictive to play.

title: Brawl Stars Sound
description: Listen to the voices and enjoy the visuals of the Brawl Stars characters. Start your sound-filled brawling adventure and enjoy a unique auditory twist in your gaming routine!

title: Crazy Screw King
description: This is Unscrew All! More than simple matching, swiftly remove screws into same-colored bins. Glass slides down with each success! Release stress, show skill, become the Screw Master!

title: 9 Blocks
description: Logical puzzle game with original gameplay. The goal is to fill all empty places in a chip merging with chips next to this one.

title: Paint Sponges Puzzle
description: Challenge your logic and strategy in this exciting puzzle game! Swipe to move the sponge and color every square in the maze with vibrant colors. It might seem straightforward, but don’t be fooled! Each level brings more complex mazes to test your problem-solving skills. Plan carefully, avoid traps, and complete all levels. Sharpen your mind and enjoy victories in this colorful adventure!

title: Tank Fury: Boss Battle 2D
description:
Welcome to the world of tanks of the game "Tank Fury: Boss Battle 2D"! 
There are various tanks available in the game that can be controlled and pumped: T-60, T-54, T-70, IS-3, PLACES. Each of them has its own unique characteristics and capabilities. Choose your favorite tank and go to the battlefield!

title: Tag Run
description: Tag Run is an adrenaline-fueled multiplayer action parkour game where 1–4 local players race to ditch the bomb and be the last standing! Tag opponents, use teleport pads and jump springs, and survive thrilling matches with 6 players. Explore six dynamic maps: Pixel, Winter, Lava, Jungle, Candy, and Night, and packed with creative power-ups. Test your reflexes, strategy, and parkour skills in this fast-paced, chaotic playground challenge.

title: Thrill Roller Coaster
description: Thrill Roller Coaster is a fun 3D roller coaster simulator game. Press and hold to accelerate forward, your speed and acceleration is fast enough for you to reach the other end of the track. Watch out for the brakes in the middle and drive the roller coaster at breakneck speeds now! Experience speed and passion!

title: Stickman Punishment
description: When a mysterious radiation blast grants Stickman and his friends superpowers, heartbreak quickly turns into a quest for revenge! Betrayed by his best friend over a girl, Stickman discovers he can morph into any shape imaginable. Now, he’s ready to use his new abilities to create chaos and keep the pair apart. Dive into this action-packed story filled with unique animations, clever payback strategies, and endless creativity!

title: GT Drift Most Wanted
description:
Drift your way around each level and hit all the snow piles while avoiding barriers. With responsive controls and a focus on timing and precision, players must master their drifting skills to clear each stage and become the ultimate Drift Master.
In this game, players can purchase different cars, each offering a unique driving experience. There’s no customization—just pick your favorite car and hit the track!

title: My Purrfect Cat Hotel
description: Welcome to My Purrfect Cat Hotel, a super cute cat hotel simulation management game. Enjoy cute and vivid cartoon cat animations. This is the vacation spot for all meow stars, and your mission is to create the most cozy cat hotel. Serving a variety of adorable cats and catering to their needs. Make your hotel the most popular animal tycoon hotel.

title: Chicken Banana Run
description: Explore the World and Space with the famous Chicken Banana! Run and keep running to collect gold, diamonds and special items and finish with the longest distance to get a high score! Play now the new free runner game for everyone.

title: Excavator Simulator 3D
description: Drive and operate realistic 3D construction vehicles in Excavator Simulator 3D. You can choose from different trucks, excavators, and Pincer Jaws to complete various missions and tasks. Whether you need to dig, clamp, lift, hammer, or forklift, you can switch the attachments easily and quickly. Learn how to control these powerful machines and enjoy the realistic physics and graphics. Complete the levels faster and earn more money to buy more vehicles and unlock new challenges. Have fun!

title: 2048 Merge World
description: The numbers are multiplying and the board is filling up. It's up to you to manage the chaos! Think quickly, act strategically and merge numbers to create bigger and better values. Be smart, but don’t forget to trust your intuition when making moves on the board.

title: Gorilla Adventure
description:
Gorilla Adventure immerses players in an open-world, action-adventure platform game that unfolds within a nocturnal cityscape. In this game, the future's technological advancements have precipitated the downfall of the natural world, plunging players into a mysterious and eerie electronic realm. 

Embark on this journey and master the art of hammer swinging to set new records. Embrace the fury of Gorilla and get ready for an exhilarating climb to the top!

title: EQ Test Puzzle
description: A puzzle game that tests emotional intelligence through emotion recognition and jigsaw puzzles. Match emotional icons, scenarios, and puzzle pieces to train your emotional awareness and problem-solving skills.

title: Wednesday Addams Beauty Salon
description: Get spooky and stylish in Wednesday Addams Beauty Salon, where gothic meets glam in a 3-level makeover game. Treat Wednesday to a facial, apply stunning dark-themed makeup, and finish off with iconic dress-up fashion in her unique style. From skincare to eyeliner, you control every detail of her transformation. Whether you’re a fan of the Addams aesthetic or just love alternative beauty, this salon experience offers a complete glow-up from head to toe.

title: Caillou Chef
description: In "Caillou Chef," Caillou puts on his apron and takes on the role of a chef in a fun and challenging café. The goal of the game is to help Caillou prepare delicious coffees and pancakes for his customers, effectively managing time to keep everyone happy with the service.

title: Granny's Classroom Nightmare
description: Step into the eerie halls of Granny's Classroom Nightmare, a horror survival game that blends the terrifying atmosphere of Granny Horror with the unsettling chill of an abandoned school. Trapped in an old, decaying classroom with Granny as your relentless pursuer, you must uncover hidden clues, solve twisted puzzles, and avoid her watchful gaze to escape. Each room holds a dark secret from a haunted past, and the slightest noise can summon Granny

title: Pops Quest
description: In this story-based platformer, you'll step into the shoes of a heroic protagonist driven by an undying love for their child. Experience the perfect fusion of action and platforming as Pop's Quest takes you on a high-octane adventure. With its fast-paced gameplay levels designed, you'll be engrossed in a world that demands agility, strategy, and quick reflexes. As you progress, you'll be emotionally invested and driven to save your child from danger.

title: Mahjong connect tiles
description: Mahjong Connect Tiles is a classic tile-matching puzzle game. We have combined the authentic charm of the traditional Mahjong Solitaire with modern convenience to create the perfect game for seniors and puzzle lovers of all ages. If you are looking for a relaxing yet intellectually engaging way to spend your time, this game is designed for you.

title: Mansion Tale: Merge Secrets
description: Discover Mansion Tale: Merge Secrets, your ultimate casual puzzle adventure. Dive into exciting merge gameplay combined with home renovation challenges as you uncover mysteries and restore a grand estate.
genre: Basketball, Bike, Car, Casual, Controller, Browser Game

title: Vikings: An Archer's Journey
description: Vikings: An Archer’s Journey blends the fast-paced action of a shoot ’em up with the adrenaline rush of an infinite runner, all presented in a striking minimalist art style. Play as Nott, a fearless Valkyrie archer, on a quest to save her wolf, Oder, from the Underworld. Use intuitive controls, collect powerful upgrades, and team up with Viking heroes to face off against mythical Nordic creatures in this thrilling adventure.

title: Save little red hood
description:
Match-3 puzzles combined with physics-based gameplay: eliminate blocks to make stones fall and become Little Red Riding Hood's weapons, which she then uses to attack the wolf.
Plan your elimination route carefully, utilizing gravity to make the stones fall and become weapons—that's the ultimate goal. Various power-ups can also help you.

title: Arrow Wave
description: Explore a world where a wave moves through various obstacles, overcoming challenges along the way. Test your reaction and perseverance!

title: Real Drive 3D
description:
Are you ready to experience unique car-driving gameplay? Start with your SUV and unlock new vehicles as you progress through the game, playing different and unique levels. Drive your favorite vehicles, and navigate your way around new challenging environments.

We welcome all racing car game fans to experience this new driving game! Real Drive 3D is a car simulation game which will give you a unique arcade experience.

title: Animal Sort - Cute Puzzle Game
description:
Are you a pet person? Do you wanna run a farm that is full of cute animals? Try Animal Sort, not only be an owner but also be in charge of keeping them in line - the game you should not look away.

This is not just a regular puzzle game, but it's also a fantastic one with a lot of mini games included. Moreover, we have an additional mode of building the pet city that you definitely won't be able to miss. Let's give it a try!

title: Car Park Simulator
description: Welcome to Car Park Simulator, Are you ready to test your driving skills and master the art of parking? Navigate through 72 challenging levels filled with obstacles and narrow spaces...

title: Hero Rabbit Idle Survivor RPG
description: We are rabbits! A fun offline survival shooting RPG game starring a rabbit!Hero Rabbit is an offline game. Players can play games anytime, anywhere without connecting to WiFi and the Internet.

title: Javelin Battle
description: Javelin Battle is a spear-throwing physics puzzle game with 2D stickman models. We need you to eliminate all incoming enemies at each level in the Normal Mode. When you destroy enemy infantry's shields, they will run to you quickly. I strongly suggest you destroy the enemy spearmen on the platforms first. Don't forget to choose skills to increase your abilities and power. Keep calm and aim carefully.

title: Roblox Craft Run
description: Welcome to begin a 3D running adventure full of speed and creativity in Roblox Craft Run. In this pixel-craft game, you'll control your character as he runs and jumps around an exciting platform track. Jump across the bridge and walk into a new level. Start your journey through the maze. Challenge your jumping skills and strategy.

title: Deadly Descent
description: Deadly Descent is an exciting driving simulator game where you will need to speed your way through impossible-looking obstacles! They are difficult, but not impossible.
genre: Basketball, Bike, Car, Casual, Controller, Browser Game

title: Zombie Chase
description: In Zombie Chase, players navigate a chaotic world filled with the undead, using every ounce of strategic prowess to outlast the apocalypse. This is not a typical racing game, youll need to manage resources and make smart decisions to survive the relentless zombie hordes. Your brain isnt just a desirable snack for zombies in this game - its your greatest weapon!

title: Grow A Garden | Growden.io
description: Growden.io is an .io farming game where you manage a small plot of land, starting off with some carrot seeds and a vision for success! This community-based game is based on progressive management of your farm, so be sure to stay logged in to get the whole experience.
genre: Basketball, Bike, Car, Casual, Controller, Browser Game

title: Perfect Cake Maker
description: Get ready to make some seriously delicious cakes in Perfect Cake Maker! It’s a delightful casual simulation game. When you start, you’ll see a fully stocked kitchen and delicious guests waiting. First, choose the cake base based on your guests’ needs. Then comes the fun part – mixing the ingredients!

title: Happy ASMR Care
description: Happy ASMR Care is a fun cleaning simulator game. When life starts to get messy, its time to clean. This game offers you four modes of cleaning, including cleaning turtle barnacles, carpet cleaning, shaving, and hoof trimming. What do you prefer to clean? Come join us to start your cleaning journey!

title: Math Duck
description:
You play as a fearless duck who battles enemies not with brute force, but with math smarts.

The rules are simple but addictive:
- Pick from shuffled number cards and combine them to make 10.
- Each correct match becomes your attack to damage enemies.
- Defeat foes, earn XP, and level up your duck!

Every level-up lets you choose from 3 unique upgrades. Each run is different, and your choices shape the way your duck fights.

Sharpen your mind, master the numbers, and guide your duck to victory!

title: Cross the Road
description: Experience the classic arcade action of Crossy Road in Roblox style! Navigate through endless roads, rivers, and train tracks, dodging obstacles and aiming for the highest score. With its vibrant voxel-style graphics and simple yet challenging gameplay, it's a nostalgic journey for both new and seasoned players.

title: Domino Solitaire
description: Experience the free online Domino Solitaire challenge with 90 engaging levels! Match domino tiles to clear the board and sharpen your mind in this addictive puzzle game. With sleek graphics, intuitive controls, and unlimited play, Domino Solitaire offers hours of brain-teasing fun. Use strategy to connect matching ends, tap the closed pile for new tiles, and unleash wild domino power-ups when you’re stuck. Perfect for desktop and mobile, this single-player game tests your matching skills.

title: Zombie Raft
description: Zombie Raft is a survival game. The zombie apocalypse is coming and it's time for a raft survival game! Protect yourself and other survivors from the looming zombie tsunami, and push them all back, it's your responsibility to survive on the raft! Squeeze the vehicles forward and push them if necessary! Keep going, escape the zombie tsunami, and conquer the barren land! If stranded survivors are found, you need to rescue them! Join us and experience the best zombie game!

title: Construction Truck: Building Games for Kids
description: A vibrant and engaging construction game where kids can build houses, drive vehicles, and explore a world of fun activities. With easy-to-follow instructions, children learn new words, develop skills, and enjoy creative play in a safe, interactive environment.

title: Quiz Master
description:
Quiz Master is a fast-paced casual quiz game where you race against the clock—and other players—to prove you’ve got the wittiest brain in town.
Each match drops you into a question showdown spanning everything from pop culture and geography to brain-rot challenges.
When you answer a question correct you get 1 Block that will save you. If you pick the wrong answer you will stay where you are.
The water rises so make sure to answer correctly or you get eaten by the sharks.

title: Throne vs Balloons
description: In this unique and dynamic game, your attention and dexterity will be put to the test when you control a bouncing ball and use its sharp spikes to break through obstacles and pop balloons.

title: Break the block there, Brainrot!
description:
Break the block there, Brainrot! — Break blocks and collect the entire Brainrot collection.
Sell Brainrots to earn points to upgrade your axe.
Find rare Brainrots in blocks. The further you go to collect the blocks, the greater the reward, but beware of the block guard.

title: CANDY LOVE
description: Let's erase the same candies by matching 3 or more of them! You can take a candy from the tapped row and put it on the tapped row. The game ends when the candy reaches the bottom.

title: Brawl Bros Squad
description: Introducing a new exciting third-person shooter — Brawl Bros Squad! Fight opponents in a variety of conditions. Discover a variety of unique skins to make yourself unique. Enjoy dynamic jumps, accurate shooting and get ready for intense battles. Become a real champion among players around the world and prove that you are the best in this crazy world!

title: Rainbow Balls 2048
description: A game in the genre of 2048, where you can skilfully use game physics to achieve victory. The main task is to connect the balls and reach the number 2048. The game also features a booster, which makes passing the game more fun and easier.

title: Iron Legion
description: Iron Legion is an action tank combat game where you command powerful military vehicles in intense warfare. This game demands focus and nerve, as every decision on the battlefield determines your fate.
genre: Basketball, Bike, Car, Casual, Controller, Browser Game

title: Fashion Week 2025
description: Get ready to rule the runway in Fashion Week 2025! Style 5 stunning models in high-fashion looks for the most glamorous fashion event of the year! From Chanel-inspired elegance to punk rock rebellion, create jaw-dropping outfits across five unique themes. Mix and match couture dresses, bold accessories, and trendy hairstyles to make every model shine! Are you ready to become the ultimate fashion stylist? Play now and slay the runway!

title: Garden Block Puzzle
description: A neglected garden, overrun by weeds and dried flowers… it can't stay like this! Test your wits, place the bricks strategically, complete each level and bring your garden back to life. Have fun playing and create the perfect space to relax.

title: Color Nonogram Puzzle
description: Play Color Nonogram free online and uncover hidden pictures in a relaxing browser game you can play instantly with no download and no install. Solve each grid using logic clues in a satisfying logic puzzle that doubles as a focused brain game. This unblocked game loads fast and runs smoothly at school or home, perfect for quick breaks. Fully mobile-friendly and optimized for desktop and mobile, it’s a free online game made for calm thinking and colorful puzzle fun anytime.

title: Zen Tile
description: Are you a master player of matching games? Do you enjoy matching puzzle games? Come to challenge this addictive puzzle game: Zen Tile - Relaxing Match!

title: Sprunki Shooter 2025
description: Sprunki Shooter 2025 is a free to play online game that delivers exciting shooting action in a colorful and challenging world. Players must navigate through each level, clearing obstacles and defeating enemies to reach the exit. The goal is to complete all levels by unlocking the exit doors. To do this, players must shoot and collect all the scattered diamonds while avoiding or eliminating dangerous enemies along the way. Have fun!

title: Pet Me Maze
description:
Welcome to Pet Me Maze, the most hilarious and addictive maze puzzle game that combines humor, challenge, and adorable pets
Are you ready to test your wits and reflexes in a maze full of surprises, traps, and funny moments

title: Royal Jewels Match
description: Matching jewels has never been so much fun! Unlock unique levels, participate in special events and take on surprising challenges. Collect coins with your matches and show off your decorating skills. Earn crowns as you progress and become a true master of the game!

title: Hidden Objects: Vacation in Brazil
description:
Discover Hidden Treasures in Brazil – Play "Hidden Objects: Vacation in Brazil"!

Embark on a thrilling hidden object adventure through Brazil! Search and find hidden objects in stunning locations, enjoy fun mini-games, and collect unique souvenirs.

Explore famous landmarks like SugarLoaf Mountain and the Amazon jungle. Visit ancient castles, vibrant museums, and mysterious caves. Experience the energy of Rio de Janeiro and unwind on Brazil’s beautiful beaches.

title: Escape from the Portal
description:
"Your soul is trapped between worlds. The only way home is to activate an ancient portal... but only one can pass through."
Explore gloomy catacombs, avoid traps, fight monsters, uncover secrets of the past, and use magical artifacts to open the portal and escape the underworld.

title: Enchanted Mahjong Saga
description: Enchanted Mahjong Saga is a fast-paced twist on the classic tile-matching game, with unlimited levels to challenge your mind. Match tiles, beat the clock, and keep your streak alive as each level gets tougher and more exciting. Feeling stuck? Use helpful hints to get back on track and stay in the game.Whether youre playing for a quick break or settling in for a longer session, theres always a new puzzle waiting.

title: Mr Bean Jump
description:
Jump on moving blocks and get as high as you can in the new official Mr Bean game!

Unlock hilarious costumes and hats from the show to make Mr Bean as unique as you like.

Unlock fun backgrounds and new blocks from the hit animated show.

title: Hexa Puzzle Master
description: Hexa Puzzle Master is a fun and addictive web puzzle game where players fit hexagonal blocks into a grid. With simple drag-and-drop controls, players must think strategically to complete levels without gaps. Featuring multiple difficulty levels and a sleek design, the game offers a relaxing yet challenging experience for puzzle lovers of all ages!

title: Highway Bus Rush
description: Welcome to the heart-pounding world of "Highway Bus Rush" – a game that propels you into an exhilarating journey along infinite highways. Brace yourself as you surge forward, navigating the ever-changing landscapes with precision and speed. The relentless pursuit of adrenaline awaits, as you weave through traffic and conquer challenging obstacles.

title: Cheerful Plumber
description: Greetings, young artist. Do you like video games and creativity? Then this game is for you! Color video game characters: a princess, a cheerful plumber, a dragon and others! Choose different colors on the main and secondary palette. Play and color! Take a screenshot and share the result with your friends!

title: Mahjong Crimes - Puzzle Story
description:
MYSTERIOUS FEATURES

Play 100+ Mahjong exciting levels! 
Dive into Agatha Christie's stories 
Use boosters and collect tile sets

PLAY MAHJONG

Mahjong Crimes is a puzzle game where you match tiles to find clues and solve crimes. Use power-ups to beat tricky levels and win awards!

SOLVE CRIMES

Join detective Hercule Poirot on the Orient Express to solve crimes in this Mahjong game! Match tiles to investigate, defeat thugs, and untangle mysteries. Fun guaranteed!

title: Card Master
description: Card Master is a fun and addictive puzzle game for all ages! Strategically merge identical cards to create stronger, higher-level ones while keeping the board from filling up. Use special cards and powerful boosts to clear space and score big. With its mix of strategy, challenge, and endless replay value, it’s the perfect game for anyone who loves to think ahead and have fun.

title: Air Block
description:
Jump, Place Blocks, and Conquer Challenging Levels!

In Air Block, use quick reflexes and smart block placement to overcome obstacles and enemies. With limited blocks per level, every move counts! Avoid saws, spikes, and unlock doors to progress—plus, grab those bananas if you can!

Game Modes:

Single Player – Test your skills across unique levels.
Two-Player Mode – Compete in quick place challenges and mini-games like Beach Ball, with more to come!
Think you’ve got what it takes? Start now!

title: Pick Brainrot: 3D Battle
description: Choose one of two Brainrots, transform into them, and engage in intense battles with other players. Defeat opponents and unlock new abilities: a Brainrot morph, unique weapons, and powerful abilities. Every battle is a chance to prove yourself! At level 5, you'll unlock a protective shield, and at level 10, you'll unlock slow-motion , which will give you a huge advantage in battle. Earn titles for your victories, from "Noob" to a true "Pro"!

title: Car Stunt Racing 3D
description: Car Stunt Racing 3D is a fun racing game. Open this incredibly entertaining car racing mobile game and prepare yourself to engage in all kinds of thrilling races. Place your fingers on the ground and get ready for the unexpected. You will never know what you will encounter when making your next turn. Collect energy and money, evade opponents, and join us to experience the thrill of speed and excitement! We wish you a joyful gameplay experience!

title: Wheel in the face
description:
Jump behind the wheel of a furious combat vehicle and rush into battle! Lightning-fast battles await you in closed arenas: ram enemies, dodge traps, use deadly weapons and win deadly fights.

Choose your style: cut your opponents with a sword, shoot them with a shotgun or burn them to the ground with a flamethrower!

Upgrade cars, weapons and wheels, earn money and raise your rank.

title: FPS Toy Realism
description: This new shooter offers a unique experience of team battles on a large 12x12 map. Thanks to the excellent shooting feel and precise shooting mechanics, every shot feels realistic and exciting. The game features a weapon purchasing system similar to popular shooters, allowing you to select and customize your arsenal before the fight for maximum effectiveness. Support items such as medkits and rockets are available to help you quickly restore health or destroy enemies with powerful rocket volleys.

title: Bubbly Lab
description: Bubbly Lab is a physics puzzle game where you have to catch all the adorable bubbles in the laboratory. Use a super strong vacuum cleaner to get the bubbles into the flask. Use your logic to move lab items to help you get bubbles. Solve interesting puzzles in this fun and unique game!

title: Stickman Halloween Survive
description:
Now that Halloween is here, the gloomiest day of the year, it's time to bring back the courageous white stickman who is an expert at vanquishing monsters. Stop procrastinating and start enjoying Stickman Halloween Survive right now on your preferred mobile device. It's a fun and free online game. 
Every living thing on Earth is frightened to death when monsters emerge from their underground lairs on Halloween night.

title: Magic Printer
description: This is a simulation game, you play a shop assistant, for the small animals to print the goods they need, then you will get gold, gold can be used to decorate your shop, upgrade your equipment, this game is very good, come and play.

title: Drawing Squares
description:
Drawing Squares is the logic game that will blow your mind!
It is a logic game inspired by the classic pen and paper game Dots and Boxes. Do you remember the game you used to play at school? (also known as Boxes, Squares, Paddocks, Pigs in a Pen, Square-it, Dots and Dashes, Dots, Smart Dots, Dot Boxing, or, simply, the Dot Game).

title: Super Soccer Noggins
description: Select your preferred nation and guide them to triumph in the wildest soccer competitions. Experience 10 unique powerups and numerous diverse fields, each adding a distinct, whimsical touch to every game. Can you conquer all 6 trophies in this exhilarating soccer adventure?

title: That's my seat!
description: That's My Seat! is a fun and engaging logic puzzle game where you must place characters in the correct seats by analyzing clues. Each level presents a new seating challenge with unique rules and relationships between the characters. Study the hints, think carefully, and figure out where everyone belongs. Perfect for fans of logic puzzles, brain games, deduction games, and casual puzzle games that test your thinking skills.

title: Merge Home Mania
description: Welcome to an exciting game where creativity meets strategy! Merge items, build unique structures and decorate your perfect home. Use materials like stone, wood, textiles, flowers and plants to create furniture and decorations. Design beautiful rooms and show off your decorating talent!

title: City Banana Man Agent
description: Begin an interesting fighting experience in City Banana Man Agent! You'll play as a strange banana agent passing busy city streets. Choose a spot to land and start exploring this wonderful city.Find the target and complete the task. And show your driving skills. Equipped with many powerful weapons and shoot enemies. Aim your gun at the enemy and attack him.

title: Minecraft Battle Party
description: Ready for a hot feast of square battles? In Minecraft Battle Party, you'll enter a pixel-styled battle arena where nervous fighting meets iconic Minecraft-style visuals. In this world, every game is a duel to the death. You will play different roles and use different weapons. For example, as a gunner, constantly move your character so that enemies are shot within your scanning range. Watch out for other people's attacks.

title: Sliding Gems
description:
Embark on an enchanting journey of matching gems! Dive into a realm filled with shimmering jewels, tactical maneuvers, and irresistible puzzle trials.

Slide and place vibrant gems to unveil newfound powers.

Confront challenges with diverse boosters to overcome obstacles and achieve higher scores.

title: Halloween Stickman
description: On Halloween when the air was thick with mystery and the streets were decorated with carved pumpkins, you were ready to enjoy the spooky night. But Stickman, your sly friend and perennial trickster set you up and you are in trouble. It's time to punish him in every possible way. How? Yes, you have the super ability to rewind time. So take advantage of it and  punish your enemy on Halloween!

title: Horror Hotel: Scary Room
description:
"Horror Room" is a simulator of the owner of a theme park, where visitors come to experience thrills. The player will have to develop his establishment, improving the rooms of fear, buying new decorations and equipment, as well as hiring actors and staff. The goal of the game is to scare as many visitors as possible and make their stay in the park unforgettable.

Scare all your customers!
Buy new creepy rooms!
Monitor the condition of the rooms, clean, repair the equipment.

title: Turbo Stars
description:
Hop on your skateboard and speed down the track in this wild and fast-paced racing game!

Zoom through a wide variety of exhilarating tracks and defeat your opponents!

Think fast to pick up items that will help you gain an advantage — or even pick up and throw your competitors if they get too close to you! 

Don’t forget to snatch coins and keys to unlock a whole bunch of awesome items, including power-ups, new objects to ride on, and gear for your character.

title: Mystic Object Hunt
description: Welcome to 'Mystic Object Hunt,' a fifteen-level Hidden Object game. Explore ancient realms, discover hidden artifacts, and unravel secrets in dim chambers and ruins. Sharpen your skills, overcome challenges, and delve into the mysteries within each location. Get ready for a thrilling hunt!
