title: Christmas Snowball Arena
description: Christmas Snowball Arena is a 3D stickman snowball IO game. You have to compete with nine other players in collecting snow blocks and making your snowball bigger. The goal is to be the last player standing by defeating and collecting other snowballs. You can also collect blank snowballs that are free for anyone. You can use two power-ups in the game to boost your snowball: one that makes it twice as big and another that makes it twice as fast. If you are looking for some snowball action, try it!

title: Youtuber Mcraft 2Player
description: You need to help the YouTuber girl and her boyfriend escape from prison. In this two-player adventure, they must collect all the YouTube plaques without getting too far apart, obtain the key and the golden plaque, and reach the chest. Open the chest and run to the door. You need to be very fast, you must escape from prison!

title: Sandstorm Covert Ops
description: Welcome to Sandstorm Covert Ops. As the leader of an elite team, your mission is to infiltrate a desert region controlled by a deadly terrorist organization. Navigate harsh terrains, gather crucial intelligence, and execute precise strikes to dismantle the enemy network.

title: Matching Puzzle
description:
Paintings blocks fall from the sky.
When you touch the ground, the pictures are covered, remember that picture and guess the same picture.
If you match the picture quickly, you can get additional points as a combo.

title: Capybara Coin Master
description:
Capybara Coin Master is a cozy yet addictive incremental tycoon clicker game where every flip counts!

Start small by buying your first coin and flipping it for income—heads mean profit! As your fortune grows, hire adorable Capybara Coin Masters to flip coins for you, even while you relax. 
Upgrade your coins to higher quality for bigger rewards, and unlock powerful Coin Mastery to boost your team’s flipping skills.

Flip. Upgrade. Profit. Rule the coin empire with your capybara crew!

title: Flip Knife
description: Explore different rooms, jump on all sorts of objects: shelves, tables, chairs, sofas, and even subwoofers!Make the knife jump or even double flip. How? Just tap the screen at the right moment and jump!

title: Hangman Saga
description: Challenge your vocabulary with Hangman Saga! With thousands of levels, each word includes a category hint to guide you—like "Profession" for "Doctor." Guess the letters wisely, but too many mistakes end the game! Need help? Use the hint button for a clue. Perfect for all ages, this fun and educational word puzzle will keep you entertained while sharpening your spelling skills. Can you solve them all?

title: Valentine's Day Couple Date
description: Experience the charm of Paris in Valentine's Day Couple Date, an amazing couple dress-up game for girls. Start with a picturesque breakfast and help Ellie glam up. Next, keep their fitness streak alive with a couple's workout as you dress them both in fashionable gym outfits and accessories. Later, style Ellie & Ben for a dreamy rooftop dinner. Choose from trendy clothing, accessories, and chic hairstyles to create the perfect romantic ambiance. Stay tuned for a special surprise from Ben.

title: Cute Kitty Merge
description: Step into the role of a farmer and grow your own fruits and vegetables. In Solitaire TriPeaks Farming you will spend time in beautiful nature and play fun and constantly changing levels that will never allow for boredom. It is all about having fun.

title: Craft Man Vs Giant TNT
description: Are you ready to enter a crazy world full of giants and TNT? Craftsman vs Giant TNT is an exciting Minecraft-style game that challenges your creativity, strategy and courage. Play as a brave craftsman in a dangerous world. Choose between two different modes: Destroy TNT or City TNT. Build fortifications and use weapons to repel giant enemies.

title: Black Pink Christmas Concert
description: If you’re a fan of Black Pink, the Black Pink Christmas Concert Dress Up game is perfect for you. This game lets you style the members of Black Pink for their exciting holiday concert. Whether you’re a Black Pink fan or love fashion, this game offers endless styling options. Celebrate the magic of Christmas while showing off your creativity.

title: Venetian Love Affair
description: Go to the festive Venice and become a fashion stylist for two girlfriends, each of whom dreams of an unforgettable fancy dress. Create unique masks with great designs and choose luxurious Baroque dresses, jewelry and accessories. Immerse yourself in the atmosphere of mystery and romance of the Venetian carnival. Unleash your talent as a fashion designer in a unique way for the masquerade participants. Get ready for a magical journey into the world of love and mysteries!

title: Ocean Small Hospital Doctor
description: Dive into the exciting world of Ocean Small Hospital - Doctor! This casual and educational game is an absolute blast for animal lovers. In this game, you'll step into the role of a heroic doctor on a submarine-turned-hospital. Your mission? Rescue injured sea animals from the vast ocean depths. As you spot a distressed creature, quickly assemble your medical team and gear.

title: Mahjong Stack
description: Mahjong Stack is a unique tile-matching game featuring realistic 3D mahjong tiles. Unlike classic match-3, blocks appear in stacked piles. Match identical tiles and drag groups of three to the tray to clear. Use boosters to speed up progress. Dive in and enjoy!

title: Dig out of Prison
description: Dig Out of Prison is a casual puzzle game where you are an innocent man in jail, determined to plot your escape. All you habe in your jail cell is a spoon to use as a shovel to dig tunnels beneath your cell.
genre: Basketball, Bike, Car, Casual, Controller, Browser Game

title: Pin master: Screw puzzle quest & brain games
description: Pin master: Screw puzzle quest & brain games challenges your problem-solving skills in a captivating pin puzzle adventure. Strategically tap to unlock screw holes on products, guiding metal plates to fall in the correct sequence. Navigate through intricate mazes of nuts, bolts, and plates. With each level presenting new challenges, immerse yourself in over 100 brain-teasing stages.

title: Hydraulic Press 2D ASMR
description: You have in your hands a terrifying power that gives you the ability to grind dozens of objects! A very effective stress reliever. Try out your personal hydraulic press right now and start destroying all objects! Crush, crush, break!

title: Street Traffic Racer
description: Skid the wheels of 6 stunning street cars with modified body kits and drive them through 3 landscape highways without crashing. Show how well you can steer the wheels of these amazing cars with roaring engines and conquer 3 awesome game modes. Use replenishing nitro to overtake slow cars and drive in speed at all times. Customize and upgrade your cars with the best upgrades and get the most out of all the cars. Are you ready to show your driving skills? Prove yourself in Street Traffic Racer

title: Meow Market
description: In Meow Market, players take on the role of a charming white tabby cat running a bustling vegetable shop. To keep the business thriving, players must harvest fresh veggies by engaging in a click-match puzzle game. Selecting grouped matching vegetables to harvest them efficiently. Each harvest consumes one move, which regenerates over time, encouraging strategic decision-making.

title: My Farm life
description: My Farm life is a fun farm adventure simulator game. Plant fields, take care of animals, hire workers and build bigger barns. Harvest apples, wheat, tomatoes, eggplants and all your favorite fruits and vegetables. Raise all kinds of cute pets like your own farm dog, breed cows, sheep and hens for milk and eggs. Become the richest farming tycoon, sit back and enjoy!

title: Mahjong Connect Majong Class
description: Mahjong Connect is a classic elimination-style casual game where players need to find and connect identical mahjong tiles on the board. The game rules are simple yet challenging, suitable for players of all ages.

title: Spacebar Clicker
description: Set out on an epic cosmic adventure in Spacebar Clicker! Click your way through the space, gather light years, and recruit aliens to supercharge your journey. Unlock awesome rewards and aim for that cosmic jump to the next galaxy. Can you collect enough light years to uncover the secrets of the universe?

title: Yes or No Challenge Run
description: This time you will not only run over the platforms and pass through the gates for the next version of yours, but you will also answer questions and earn rewards. Yes or No Challenge Run game comes with lots of features, surprises, and cool questions! Some helper machines or pets will be with you during this adventure. You can embark on this Yes or No adventure either single-player or 2 player. Pick your game mode and let the adventure start!

title: Traffic Cop 3D
description: Traffic Cop 3D is a casual game where you play as a police officer enforcing the law of the road. Scan nearby drivers and use intel from the police database to decide whether you should pull them over, or let them go, all while progressing through the story and increasing your duties as a cop.

title: Your dream room
description:
Do you dream of creating the perfect room? 
In this game you will become a real interior designer! 
Have fun, experiment and turn an empty space into a cozy dream corner.
Choose wallpaper, flooring and furniture in different styles. Decorate the room with stylish accessories, add coziness!
Choose the color scheme and arrange items as you like.
Experiment with design, create unique interiors and enjoy the process!
Start creating your dream room now!

title: Minicraft Chef Cake Wars
description: Hey player, would you like to have a cooking competition with your friend? In this cooking contest, you must beat your friend. Collect all the cooking materials as quickly as possible. We need to gather the cake ingredients floating in balloons in the air. The player who collects the most ingredients the fastest wins the game. To bake the cake, collect everything: salt, flour, and milk. Gather all the ingredients and win the game!

title: Hidden Objects Story
description: Every scene tells a story, waiting for your discovery. Collect coins, unlock hints and piece together secrets buried beneath the surface. The mystery deepens with every level. Stay focused or the secrets slip away forever.

title: Puzzle About Orange
description: Test your mind in Orange Puzzle Quest, a fun fruit puzzle game packed with logic challenges and brain teasers! Match colors, solve tricky levels, and enjoy juicy orange adventures. Perfect for US students searching “puzzle game,” “fruit puzzle,” or “brain puzzle,” this addictive casual game mixes fun with strategy. Can you conquer every orange puzzle and prove your skills? Play now and boost your brainpower while having endless fun!

title: Foam and Find
description: Foam and Find is a relaxing hidden object game with a playful bubble twist. Explore cozy houses, each filled with charming rooms and easy-to-spot hidden items. Your tasks appear inside floating bubbles — and when you find an item, it flies into its bubble and pops with a satisfying animation. No timers, no stress — just a calm, casual experience at your own pace.

title: Princess Winter Ice Skating Outfits
description: Welcome to Princess Winter Ice Skating Outfits. Girls enjoy this winter with your favorite princess. Princesses Anna, Elsa, Moana, Ariel, Jasmine, and Snow White are planning to go for Ice skating. But before that, they need perfect outfits. Help the princesses with their outfits with matching boots. Have fun!

title: Perfect Piano Magic
description: Perfect Piano Magic is a fun casual game. If you are a big fan of Piano Magic games, then this is a game you can't afford to miss! The gameplay of this game is extremely similar to Piano Magic, you need to shoot the blocks with a gun to capture the beat. You have three chances per game, start now and feel the real music when you click the blocks, enjoy the beats, and get ready to experience the delightful music and become a rhythm master!

title: Epic Stunts PvP 3D
description: Skid the wheel of a stunning muscle car through 3 awesome game modes and showcase your driving skills. Customize your car according to your taste and drive in style with the roaring engines. Feel the heat in 2 player mode where you go head to head with your friend in 2 amazing game modes! Are you ready to conquer the stunt city? Prove yourself with Two Stunt Racers!

title: City Gas Station Simulator
description: Ever dreamed of running a bustling gas station? City Gas Station Simulator lets you experience the thrill of managing every detail of your very own station in a fun 3D casual simulator! From fueling cars to running a mini shop, every choice is yours to make. Fun and addictive casual management gameplay. Mix shopping and service for maximum efficiency.

title: Meteoheroes
description:
THE PLANET’S SUPERHEROES
Fulmen, Nix, Nubess, Pluvia, Thermo and Ventum are six children that one day find out that they have superpowers.
Train the skills and superpowers of each MeteoHeroe in the gym with six games of marksmanship, speed, ability, coordination, strength, and synchronization.

title: Moto X3M Dead Ahead
description: Racing game enthusiasts, are you ready? This is a game that's going to make your adrenaline skyrocket - Moto X3M Dead Ahead! It's an exciting blend of motor, driving, and even a bit of shooting. Driving a cool motorcycle, take your partner with you and race through tricky tracks.The game offers thrilling driving action as you avoid obstacles like wrecked cars, fallen debris, and explosive traps.

title: Echolocation Shooter
description:
Shoot to see in the dark!

Eliminate all the neon enemies, in the horroristic level!

The only way to see in this FPS is to generate soundwave with your weapon.

Survive endless waves of the wide variety of enemies, where the only way to see is to shoot. Unleash soundwave rifles, laser cannons, and grenades to light up the battlefield, upgrade your gear, and fight deeper into the horde.

Every shot reveals the world—every wave pushes your limits.

title: Ink Shop: Dress & Tattoo
description: Welcome to Ink Shop: Dress & Tattoo, a unique and immersive game that lets you unleash your inner tattoo artist. This isn't just any game; it's your gateway to a world where art meets relaxation, and where your creativity can truly shine. Prepare to immerse yourself in the satisfying and intricate process of tattooing, all at the tip of your fingers!

title: Boom Stick Bazooka
description:
In Boom Stick Bazooka, an explosive online game where you may customize your bazooka and smash platforms and opposing stickmen, you're in for a wild ride. The black stickmen are stationed in towers, and if you pause for even a second, they'll open fire, attempting to wipe off your three lives.

In each level, you'll have three chances to aim and fire; you may always try again or purchase more ammo. If you want to kill foes quickly, blow up the barrels so they explode and knock down the towers.

title: Circle Shooter Master
description: Circle Shooter Master is a cool and exciting game about destroying the boss in the circle. You run in circles, shoot the boss, get materials, build towers, defend roadblocks and grab things that fall on the circle. You have to watch out for the boss’s attack and kill him before he hurts you. Join the game now!

title: Dogs Spot The Differences
description: Immerse yourself in the charming world of 'Dogs: Spot the Differences,' a puzzle game featuring scenes filled with adorable companions. Challenge your observation skills, uncover subtle differences, and unlock new levels. With stunning visuals and escalating challenges, become a detective in a captivating journey of discovery and fun. Can you spot them all and become the ultimate enthusiast for your lovable companions?

title: Spider-Noob obstacle course
description:
Noob was bitten by a creeper-spider and became a spider-noob! Help Noob train in the big city, fly on webs, collect badges, unlock new costumes, and complete challenges. Unlock new levels. 

Complete all the levels and turn Noob into a Pro-spider

title: Lorenzo the Runner
description: Lorenzo the Runner is a 2D Mario-like platformer that takes you on an exhilarating adventure through a vibrant cityscape The game features 4 levels set in 3 distinct environments. Bounce through the levels with slick controls and face a variety of enemies!

title: Tower Defenders
description: Fight the undead viking warriors and upgrade your defenses. Use the rewards you get for victories to your advantage. Hold out for as long as you can!

title: Fruit Merge Reloaded
description: Dive into the juicy and colorful world of Fruit Merge Reloaded, a captivating merging game that combines the addictive gameplay of 2048 with the sweetness of your favorite fruits! Your task is to merge identical fruits to create new and exotic varieties, aiming to reach the ultimate fruit fusion.

title: 2048 Run Gorgeous Balls
description: 2048 Run: Gorgeous Balls is a fun arcade game that invites you to chase high scores in a delightful environment! In this creative 2048-style game, you’ll control a colorful array of balls as they race along a dynamic track.

title: Avatar Life My Town
description: Avatar Life: My Town game is a casual simulator game for kids. You can enjoy creating your sweet home stories! Meet fun family characters in the dollhouse game! Role-play house games and manage family life in your new home! You need to take good care of your character and prepare delicious food. Cooking a big meal.

title: RiddleMath
description: Math Riddles level up your IQ with a mix of logical puzzles. Challenge yourself with different levels of math games and stretch the limits of your mind. Brain games are prepared with an approach of an IQ test.

title: Domino World
description: Play a timeless game of dominoes where strategy rules and every move matters. Unlock exclusive trophies and collectible wooden sets as you progress. Perfect for puzzle enthusiasts seeking endless fun and challenges.

title: Ragdoll Arena 2 Player
description: Ragdoll Arena 2 Player consists of 14 super cool and challenging 2 player games. You can play these games in either 1 player or 2 player modes. Each game you will have a different goal but your main goal is to score three before your opponent. The games consist of fruit slicing, hammer challenge, chicken catching, rooftop shooting matches, and more. You can also customize your character from the shop. Earn coins from the matches and buy new costumes for your character.

title: Wild West Match 2: The Gold Rush
description: Wild West Match 2 immerses you in the thrilling Gold Rush era of the Wild West! Match three or more gold nuggets, cowboy hats, horseshoes, and other treasures to earn points and unlock new levels. Use Dynamite to clear obstacles or reveal hidden gold! With hundreds of challenging levels, you’ll dig through the Wild West to find hidden treasures and secrets. Ready to strike it rich? Join the Gold Rush adventure now!

title: Fantasy Math Number
description: Embark on an epic adventure in Fantasy Math Number! Test your math skills in exciting battles against monsters by solving addition, subtraction, and multiplication problems. Every correct answer brings you closer to victory! Power up, defeat enemies, and aim for the highest score in this fun and educational math quest!

title: Through the Wall
description: Get ready for a unique puzzle experience with Through the Wall, where creativity and humor meet strategic problem-solving. Guide your stick figure character through moving walls by striking the perfect pose, with each level presenting new and exciting challenges.

title: Galactic Golf Solitaire
description:
Enjoy a relaxing round of Golf Solitaire, a fun and easy-to-play card game. The goal is to clear the board by matching cards that are one rank higher or lower than the one on the discard pile. Don’t worry about suits—just focus on the numbers! If you’re stuck, you can draw from the deck to keep the game going. Play at your own pace and see how many rounds you can win.

Perfect for a quick break or to unwind at the end of the day!

title: Fruit Balls: Juicy Fusion
description:
Discover the exciting world of juicy fruits! The task is simple: connect identical fruits to create ever larger and tastier associations, heading towards the treasured watermelon.

- Click on the field
- Connect identical fruits
- Create combinations to get bigger fruits.
- Reach the last level
- Don't let the container overfill
- Earn money for new skins and try to pass with them ???

title: Bubble Game 3D
description: Get ready for bubble-popping fun in Bubble Game 3D, a super cool version of the original classic Bubble Shooter game, now with amazing 3D graphics. Aim, match, and pop colorful bubbles in a world that looks like it’s coming right out of the screen. This is Bubble Shooter 3D like you’ve never seen before!

title: Puzzle Lab
description: Tap connected blocks to clear them! If any blocks are left, you will lose life. The game ends when your life reaches 0. You can use placed special bombs by tapping them.

title: Parking Fury 3D: Beach City 2
description: Parking Fury 3D: Beach City 2 takes you to a vibrant town by the beach where you can test your driving and parking skills in a variety of supercars. Complete challenging parking missions while exploring the scenic coastal streets. You can switch cars on the map, but watch out for the police - get caught stealing a vehicle, and it’s game over! Can you master the art of parking in Beach City without getting busted?

title: Celebrities Get Ready For Christmas
description: Step into the world of ‘Celebrities Get Ready for Christmas’! Join your favorite stars as they prepare for the festive season. Explore dazzling holiday outfits, glamorous decorations, and witness the magic of Christmas through the eyes of celebrities. Get ready for a star-studded holiday celebration! Play and have fun!

title: Barbee Black Friday Fashion
description: Get ready for a fashion-filled shopping day with Barbee Black Friday Fashion, the ultimate dress-up experience for style lovers! Barbee is hitting the mall for the biggest sale of the year, and she needs your expert fashion sense to shine. Explore chic winterwear, cozy sweaters, stylish boots, and dazzling accessories.

title: Last Standing
description: Players are dropped onto a map and start without weapons. The map is scattered with a wealth of weapons and equipment. Players need to constantly explore and collect these resources to enhance their survival ability and combat power. The core goal of the game is to be the last survivor. Usually, there are multiple players in each game, and they are randomly distributed on the map.

title: Archery Ragdoll
description: Embark on an adrenaline-pumping adventure in this action-packed online game featuring thrilling ragdoll archer physics. Master the art of archery and prove your prowess!

title: Crazy Bubble Breaker
description: Crazy Bubble Breaker is a fun and challenging 2D bubble shooter physics puzzle game. You have to destroy all bubbles with falling balls. You can aim the bubble with a subline and release the ball. You can also bounce the ball off the walls to hit more bubbles with one ball. Can you eliminate them? Dozens of levels are waiting for you to challenge! Use your brain and try to finish all levels with the fewest balls!

title: Feed the Parrot
description: Hello! In this exciting game you will have to help the cute parrot to fill up on delicious fruit. Combine identical fruit tiles to clear the playing field and open new levels, compete with other players, enjoy the bright pixel art and comfortable puzzle difficulty level.  Each game session offers unique challenges and colorful backgrounds, creating an atmosphere of fun and relaxation - the game is perfect for relaxing after a long day at work.

title: Fat Cat Life
description: In this game you will have a bunch of cats to choose from, a huge selection of hats and a variety of tasks. From the simplest to the most difficult.

title: Cat Football
description: Enter the adorable world of Cat Football, where cute felines don caps and engage in soccer madness! Score goals using a ball of blue thread against cardboard box goals. Compete with friends or challenge a skilled computer opponent in time-limited matches filled with frantic fun!

title: Ancient Wars: Caesar
description: Ancient Wars: Caesar is an exciting strategy game in which you lead an army and fight for supremacy on the battlefield. The game takes you to the world of epic battles where tactics, planning and proper utilization of resources are important. Control various units, including warriors, archers and generals, to destroy enemy troops and destroy their base.

title: Toilet Roll
description: Remember the fun of unrolling toilet paper as a kid? Now relive that joy in a fast-paced game. Unwind as many rolls as you can in one minute, but be careful not to tear the paper—it costs valuable time. Earn points for upgrades. Play Toilet Roll for free and let your inner child loose!

title: Plant Merge: Zombie War
description: In the chaotic world of Merge Plant Zombie War, arm your garden with strategic merges to fend off relentless zombie hordes! Master upgrades, deploy special abilities, and outsmart waves of undead foes in this addictive merge-tower defense adventure. Will your botanical army prevail in the ultimate war for survival? Dive in and merge your way to victory!

title: Trial Xtreme
description: Trial Xtreme is an exciting game in which you have to get a new experience from driving a motorcycle. Experience a sea of adrenaline while riding a motorcycle and passing 30 levels with dizzying and spectacular obstacles.

title: Worm Escape
description:
Worm Escape is a fun puzzle game that tests your logic and decision-making skills. Move worms in the correct order to clear each level. A single right move can solve the puzzle, while a wrong one can block your progress.

As you advance, levels become more complex with tighter spaces and more worms. Analyze carefully and choose the right sequence to succeed.

Simple tap controls make it easy to play, but mastering each level requires planning and strategy.

title: Ice Cream Inc.
description:
Ice Cream Simulator is a satisfying casual game where you step into the shoes of a master ice cream artist. Your goal is to run the most popular shop in town by creating the ice cream of your dreams!

From classic Vanilla and Dark Chocolate to fruity Mango and Juicy Strawberry, you have all the ingredients needed to create the perfect frozen treat. Whether your customers want a soft-serve cone, ice cream rolls, frozen yogurt, or traditional Gelato, it’s up to you to serve them with a smile.

title: Planet Merge
description:
Embark on an interstellar journey in the most thrilling puzzle game of 2025! Merge planets in a cosmic challenge and create a universe of fun.
imple Yet Addictive Gameplay: Just drag and release to align the planets. Watch as they combine into spectacular new celestial bodies.

title: Roller Coaster 3D
description:
Go through this roller coaster, pick up more passengers along the way and have more fun!
Can you pass all the obstacles and enjoy all the crazy loops?
Enjoy the ride!
Unlocks all the different mechanics and many levels!

title: Grow a Garden: Online & Offline
description:
"Grow a Garden: Online & Offline" – Become the best farmer!

Plant, grow, harvest, and earn millions while playing online with other players! Start with a simple plot and turn it into a huge farm with rare and magical plants. Buy seeds from the shop, which refreshes every 5 minutes. Find your plants on the market!

title: Draw To Smash Zombie
description: Draw To Smash Zombie is an exciting drawing logic puzzle game where your creativity becomes the ultimate weapon against waves of silly zombies.

title: Tarcat
description:
Enter the world of feline destruction with Tarcat, a hilarious casual game where you control a cats paw! Your goal? Smash all targets with quick reflexes and pinpoint accuracy!

With just one tap, hit targets, avoid traps, and dominate each level with the style of a true feline destroyer.

title: Hidden Horrors
description: Ready to explore the haunted Halloween world? Play a hidden object game with 30 Halloween levels. Each level has 6 hidden objects. Find all objects before time runs out. If you need help, use a hint. The game is easy to play. Enjoy colorful Halloween scenes and fun gameplay.

title: Age of Apes Run
description: Welcome to the wildest adventure of the ape era! Age of Apes Run is a fun platform running game. It is full of puzzles and nervous battles. Perfect for every arcade-loving boy out there! You'll be a brave ape warrior and run through a platform full of obstacles! Collect many bananas to boost your skills.

title: Hero Wizard: Save Your Girlfriend
description: One day when I woke up, I saw that my girlfriend wasn't beside me, so I started searching around for her but couldn't find her. Then I noticed a letter on the table, and the letter said: "If you want to see your girlfriend again, you'll have to pass through the magic forest to rescue her, but it won't be easy because you're not alone in the forest!" At first, I didn't understand, but..

title: Color Wood Animal Jam
description: Begin a charming logic puzzle match game in Color Wood Animal Jam. Drag the colorful wooden animal pieces into their correct spots. Complete each delightful jam puzzle. One wrong move can make the color block jam even trickier.

title: Motorcycle simulator offline
description: Get ready for an exotic stunt master & adventurous high ground city jumper sports bike simulator game.For bike racing fans and motor bike riders this exotic sports bike simulator is a real fun game. Just start your engine and hit the gas of an extreme bike to experience the stunt master thrill of high ground city jumper motorbike racing & enjoy sports bike sound.

title: Cute Craft Lab
description: Step into the colorful world of Cute Craft Lab, a super casual game where creativity shines and every girl can become a true crafting designer. If you love relaxing gameplay mixed with adorable creativity, this cute design adventure is made just for you. In Cute Craft Lab, enter a magical workshop filled with charming tools, sparkling decorations, and endless crafting possibilities.

title: Big Bad Ape
description: In Big Bad Ape, you will play as an unstoppable giant ape. Join this casual battle and experience the exhilaration of destroying a city! Freed from a lab experiment, this furious monster is now unleashed. As this super monster, your job is to destroy everything.

title: Moscow Metro Driver 3D
Cosmo Pet Starry Care
description: Immerse yourself in the wonderful world of space and get to know cute alien creatures better. Choose your pet and find out how best to take care of them. Feed, walk and play with your space friends to give them happiness and care. Support your pets so that they please you with their devotion and love.

title: Tile Living
description: Select matching tiles that can be connected with up to 3 straight lines to clear them! Clear all the tiles to complete the stage! Use the coins you collect from clearing stages to decorate your room!

title: Wild Race Master 3d
description: Wild Race Master 3D is an exciting 3D racing game that brings you into a world of extreme speed!In this game, you can experience endless racing fun and drive various cool cars. Challenge the exciting track! ? Drive your beloved racing car through various unique and challenging tracks. You should show excellent driving skills on winding roads and be flexible when dealing with various complex track conditions.

title: Sort Tiles
description:
Sort Tiles: Tap Away is a fun and addictive puzzle game where you move tiles, clear the board, and reveal hidden pictures. It’s simple to learn but offers endless logic challenges that keep your brain active. Perfect for fans of tile puzzles, logic games, and relaxing brain teasers.

Key Features:
Unique puzzle mechanics — move tiles in the arrow’s direction and solve logic puzzles step by step.
Hidden images — every cleared puzzle board reveals a new picture.

title: Idle Firefighter 3D
description: Idle Firefighter 3D is a single player firefighter simulator game. You will play the role of a firefighter and it is your duty to save the survivors from the fire. Here, new emergencies are constantly occurring and you need to be on standby and must put out the fires as soon as possible! The fire extinguisher is your friend, if the props run out, you will not be able to put out the fire.

title: Match Tile Royal Family
description: Play an addictive brain challenge in Match Tile Royal Family. This is not just another match puzzle game. It’s a thrilling mix of logic, strategy, and quick thinking. Your goal is simple yet exciting: match tiles of the same design to clear the board. Unlock levels and rescue the royal family from tricky traps. Eliminate blocks, balls, and other objects in a limited number of moves. You can also use power-ups to quickly clear blocks or temporarily freeze obstacles.

title: Italian Brainrot: Puzzle & Battle
description:
You have many parts of the same picture. Drag and drop the parts and assemble the character picture.

A game about Italian animal characters. Each level is a new character.

Unlock them all!

title: Survival master: 456 Challenge
description: Surval master: 456 Challenge is a sequel where participants undergo unique survival tests, facing moral dilemmas and dangers. Are you ready for the challenge?

title: Exit - Puzzle
description: Embark on an exciting journey in Exit - Puzzle, a captivating game where your mission is to rotate the puzzle and guide the ball to the exit! Each level presents new challenges, requiring you to think creatively and find the best route. Twist and turn the puzzle to navigate through obstacles and unlock the path forward. With a variety of levels and progressively harder puzzles, this game will keep you entertained and engaged.

title: GT Cars Mega Ramps
description: Exotic cars, mega ramps, colorful giant bosses and face to face races all come together in this game. GT Cars Mega Ramps invites you to a fantastic driving experience with its completely unique game-play. Fly over mega ramps with your customized exotic car, destroy giant bosses or try to finish the stages first in face to face races!

title: Crazy Hill Climbing
description:
Get ready for the ultimate hill racing adventure in Crazy Hill Climbing! Race through steep hills, rugged terrains, and tackle challenging obstacles. With 15 unique levels and cars to unlock, upgrade your vehicles and customize your rides as you strive to conquer each track and perform daring stunts.

* Use coins to upgrade your engine, tires, suspension, and more to improve performance on rough terrains
* Execute daring front flips and back flips to earn extra points and boost your score

title: Soccer Dash
description:
Soccer dash is a soccer game in which you swipe a soccer ball through obstacles and soccer players and hit the ball to score a goal.

You have drag controls, drag to choose the direction of the kick, and release to hit the ball. During the dragging process, the game goes into a slow motion state, so you can take your time to choose the direction of the kick.

title: Happy Monsters 2
description:
A bundle of fun games designed for children of all ages that will delight everyone!

Our little monsters love to play all sorts of games where you collect coins. Help them gather as many as possible to unlock all the toys. Complete the entire toy collection!

title: Red Stickman vs Craftmans
description: The red stickman found himself in a land of monsters from Minecraft and in order to escape he must defeat them all in hand-to-hand combat.

title: TearDown - Destruction SandBox
description:
The player is given complete freedom of action. You can explore various locations filled with structures. The main feature of the game is the ability to destroy everything you see.

Have you ever wanted to level a multi-storey house with your own hands? Now you have the opportunity to do just that! The physics of destruction is close to reality. You can use a variety of weapons to destroy objects, from a hammer to a powerful bazooka.

title: SUV Traffic Racer
description: In SUV Traffic Racer, you will be playing SUVs through stunning endless highways. Skim through the highway traffic and make the highest score by going as far as you can, Unlock more than 6 SUVs to make the ultimate SUV garage. Upgrade your SUV with 4 awesome upgrades and get the most out of those roaring engines. Enjoy the picturesque highways and conquer it with your driving skills. Are you ready to show if you're the finest highway racer out there?

title: The Noob Aventures
description:
The Noob Adventures invites you to join a dangerous journey through a colorful world full of action, traps, and enemies. Travel across challenging lands in search of diamonds and overcome all obstacles. Complete 70 levels packed with danger and surprises as you fight enemies determined to stop your progress. Rescue the friends, survive the challenges along the way, and prove that even a noob can become a true hero.
Collect diamonds and unlock new characters to continue your adventure

title: Downhill Car Ride: Crash Test
description:
Put on a real destructive show!

Forget about safety, in this game you need to check how strong the dummy is. At your disposal is a huge pile of dummies, an abandoned town, an incredibly huge arsenal and complete freedom of action! In this game you can check what will happen if you crash a motorcycle at full speed into a house with dynamite or what will happen if you jump out of the car a second before the accident!

title: Ayla World Princess life
description: Step into the magical world of Ayla World: Princess Life, where you can live the ultimate princess adventure! This exciting game lets you dress up your avatar, create stunning outfits, and design beautiful nails with endless styles.

title: Seafaring Memory Challenge
description: Set sail into the captivating depths of the ocean with Seafaring Memory Challenge! Match pairs of sea-themed icons in an endless array of levels. Test your memory skills as you uncover treasures like colorful fish, delicate sea shells, and sunken treasures. With no level limit, the adventure never ends, providing hours of entertainment. Stay sharp and immerse yourself in the mesmerizing world beneath the waves!

title: Color Dots Challenge
description: Dive into Color Dots Challenge, a bright and addictive puzzle game that puts your logic and strategy to the test. Connect, match, and move colorful dots to clear the board and score big! Simple to play yet hard to master, this free online game is perfect for quick breaks or long sessions on your phone or computer. Can you outsmart the colors and conquer every level?

title: Parking Master Urban Challenges
description:
A realistic 3D parking simulator where you can hone your driving skills and become a real parking master!
Get behind the wheel of realistic cars of different sizes and maneuver through crowded city streets, parking in the most difficult places.
Pass all the tests, become a parking master and prove that you can do any maneuver!

title: Sprunki Lava Escape 2Player
description: Together with your friend, you must save the Sprunki characters from the rising lava. You must be very careful. The lava is rising, and you're in danger. Escape the lava with 6 different characters and jump as high as you can. An endless jumping and lava escape awaits you. Collect all the music notes along the way. You need the music notes.

title: Strike It!
description: A cool game where you need to shoot down all the little men so that they fly in different directions! Bright locations and a lot of challenging tasks are waiting for you! Show accuracy and foresight: everything depends on the trajectory of the blow!

title: Build a Go-Kart
description:
Build your karting empire from scratch — from simple straights to complex tracks with boosts and risky turns.

Design unique tracks using modular blocks: combine elements, optimize your route, and find the perfect balance between speed and profit. Every ride earns money — and your track design determines how much you make.

title: Organize It
description: Organize It is a decompression and organizing game for all players. Aren't you tired of all the clutter and chaos? Don't you just find peace when everything is in its right place and in harmony? Everything is scattered in total chaos. Only a hero can fight against all this chaos. This is your chance to organize it! Solve ingenious puzzles and organize everything to find harmony at every level. Organize, profit and become the best of the best!

title: City Tower Builder
description: In the game, you need to develop your own city, build houses, and place them around the city. You need to build the houses evenly so that the blocks don't fall to the ground. The game is a combination of a city-building simulator and an exciting arcade game where you need to build even houses out of blocks so that the blocks don't fall and the houses don't collapse.

title: 3D Block Gladiator: Sword Draw
description:
Sketch Your Path to Fight and Become the Ultimate Champion!

Step into the gladiator arena where only the strongest and smartest warriors survive! In 3D Block Gladiator: Sword Draw, you don’t just fight—you draw your attacks and dodges, controlling your gladiator’s every move with precision. Swipe, slash, and outmaneuver your enemies to claim victory!

title: Bowmasters
description: Bowmasters is a fun and action-packed game that combines creative physics with exciting Archery gameplay. Use different types of bows and weapons. Draw your weapon, judge the angle, and fire arrows to hit all enemies. The game shines with its physics-based mechanics, where timing, distance, and trajectory matter. You’ll need real skill and smart thinking to solve each shooting puzzle and land accurate hits. Every match feels different thanks to unique characters and varied weapons.

title: Toytopia
description: Toytopia is a cozy merge-and-repair adventure where you combine art items to craft materials and restore broken toys. Every toy has its own look and challenge, so you’ll keep unlocking new fixes and surprises. Relaxing, creative, and gently strategic.

title: Auto Ninja
description:
Auto Ninja is the ultimate ninja platform game that dares you to conquer 41 trap-filled chambers with sharp reflexes and puzzle-solving skills. 

Your mission? Steal all three coins hidden in each chamber to unlock exclusive ninja skins and show off your mastery.

With simple but tight controls, dynamic level design, and a steady ramp in difficulty, Auto Ninja delivers an intense, addictive experience that tests your agility, timing, and wit. Play now and rise to the challenge!

title: Tunnel Road
description: Tunnel Road is an adrenaline-filled arcade game that requires quick reflexes, sharp focus and a great visual reaction! Keep up with the speed, avoid obstacles and cover the longest distance while advancing in a colorful and dynamic tunnel!

title: Find Hidden Cats
description: Explore charming black-and-white scenes inspired by iconic European cities in this relaxing yet addictive hidden object game. Every corner is packed with clever details and playful surprises - can you spot all 20 mischievous cats hiding in plain sight? Test your observation skills, take your time, and enjoy the satisfying thrill of discovering each well-hidden feline!

title: Catch The Goose
description: Catch The Goose is a puzzle elimination mini-game. Players can tap identical items to automatically send them to the bottom slot - when three matching items gather, they get eliminated. When players successfully clear all items arranged in the grid, they get to "catch" a mischievous goose. Its addictive simplicity, stress-relieving design, and playful art style have made it a cultural phenomenon.

title: Metro Escape
description: On Metro escape you must search the room for items that will help you escape. Search for itens in the metro and use them to solve the puzzles. Look carefully at the various patterns around the metro and solve the riddles. Good luck to search for your way to escape!

title: Candy Jewels
description: It is a candy-filled puzzle adventure full of surprises! Match candies, break chests and collect coins as you progress through countless levels. Complete fun events like Time Attack or Coin Catch and use boosters to overcome tricky obstacles even faster!

title: Smash Karts
description: Smash Karts is a 3D multiplayer IO kart battle game. Drive your go-kart, pick up weapons, and blow up other karts to win!
genre: Basketball, Bike, Car, Casual, Controller, Browser Game

title: Spaceflight Simulator
description: Do you have a space dream? Spaceflight Simulator is a challenging spaceflight simulation game suitable for boys who love to build and launch rockets. The game has real-life conditions in space.

title: Space Craft: Ship War
description:
Explore deep space, piloting a cubic ship that can be infinitely expanded with modules. Collect new decks, melee and ranged weapons, boosters, and rare upgrades on the map, transforming your ship into a true battle station. Enemies also grow, making every encounter a dynamic battle for survival.

Complete levels, upgrade your stats, unlock new skins, and experiment with builds. Vibrant 3D graphics, rich effects, and constant progression make space battles exciting and unpredictable.

title: Zombie Survival
description: Play the nervous zombie adventure in Zombie Survival. Explore a dangerous world occupied by zombies. Collect various weapons to attack zombies. Move smartly and set traps to defend yourself from massive zombie waves. Explore abandoned cities, dark alleys, and creepy forests - each level is a new adventure! Challenge big zombie bosses and prove your survival skills under pressure! Collect many useful items to fix your broken tools.

title: Shelter Security: Gatekeeper Simulator
description: Become the gatekeeper of the most bizarre shelter in a post-apocalyptic world! In this guard simulator, you’ll face chaos, humor, and wild challenges. Inspect documents at the visa center, scan luggage for contraband, and distinguish peaceful residents from prankster mutants and disguised bandits.

title: Ragdoll Football 2 Players
description: Ragdoll Football 2 players is an exciting and fun sports game in which you can feel like a real football player! Fight with friends or the computer by controlling a ragdoll stickman on the football field. Show your skills and wit to score grand goals and become a champion.

title: CrazyZombies 3D
description:
Crazy Zombies 3D is a fast-paced top-down zombie survival shooter with cartoon-style 3D graphics. Use 10+ weapons to fight endless waves of zombies, conquer a town map, and unlock powerful upgrades. Battle 5 zombie types and 4 deadly bosses with unique abilities. Customize your loadout and survive as long as you can. Fun, intense, and addictive—can you survive the apocalypse?

?- Zombie Survival
?- 10+ Weapons to Master
?️- Conquer the Town
?- Boss Battles
?- Fun, Fast & Addictive

title: Cop Simulator
description: Cop Simulator is an exciting and dynamic gaming experience that immerses you in the world of a lawman with unlimited possibilities. In this game you will take on the role of a cop, where you are given complete freedom of action.

title: Falling Man
description:
Fall for fun in this addictive hypercasual game!
Ready for a wild ride? Join the thief as he falls from dizzying heights, dodging obstacles and collecting coins in this addictive hypercasual game. With two distinct locations to explore and endless possibilities for high scores, the fun never ends in this exciting game.

title: Little Lily Halloween Prep
description: Welcome to Little Lily Halloween Prep. It’s time to celebrate Halloween with Little Lily! Enjoy a memorable Halloween night with Lily and play fun-packed Halloween games and activities. Help the lily to complete her makeover, then help her with Halloween face painting. Browse her wardrobe and pick cute outfits and costumes. Finally, help her with cake decoration. A lot more to enjoy and explore this Halloween season with Little Lily. Happy Halloween!!

title: Dog Merge Mania
description: Merge cute puppies! Unlock breeds & grow your own fluffy dog paradise! A Relaxing Escape: The perfect mix of chill gameplay and light strategy.

title: Flower Shop
description: Match 6 of the same flowers to ship them! You can place your flowers in any empty spot on the board. Place a flower next to a tray with the same kind to make them merge. When the right conditions are met, customers will come by to visit! Complete their requests to earn rewards. The game ends when there’s no more space left to place flowers.

title: Tap Tap Builder
description:
"Tap Tap Builder invites you to build the city of your dreams and become its mayor! But before leaning back in a comfortable boss's chair, you'll have to roll up your sleeves and do some work. Want to build a skyscraper? Tap-tap and you're done! Not enough money? Tap-tap and earn some! A fire broke out? Tap-tap and save your people!

Let's start working right now, tap-tap the PLAY button!

title: WormsArena.io
description: A great Snake IO game is beginning with the Worms Arena IO game! The baits are all around the map and collect them to make your snake the largest of the arena. Make strategic moves and trap your opponents to make them fail. Try to achieve the highest score and wear the crown. Unlock new snakes at the marketplace with coins. Let the super snake adventure begin!

title: Capybara Mukbang ASMR
description: Welcome to Capybara Mukbang ASMR, a casual cooking ASMR game that you can play for free. Dive into a delicious world where you cook hamburger, pizza, and ice cream recipes. Dress up and taste your dishes one by one. Share your food with the audience by eating and drinking in the Mukbang livestream, and see how many likes you can receive.

title: Challenge Your Friends
description: Challenge yourself! With seven different games, you can experience thrilling moments whether you're playing solo or competing against your friends. Drunken Duel, Tug The Table, Stick Duel, Milk The Cow, and many more games are waiting for you! Plus, to make the competition even more fun, you can choose exciting dares to make  the matches unforgettable! For those who prefer solo play, 6 games are ready to keep you entertained! Step into this world of fun and enjoy the thrill of competition!

title: City Builder
description: How do you become the mayor of your town? Find the right valley and build everything from scratch with your own hands. Then the residents will help you make your town even better and even share their equipment!

title: Bubble Sky
description: Bubble Sky is an ascending Bubble Shooter game that will take you to dizzying heights. Will you be able to reach space? Reach a score of 200000 points to unlock the wheel of fortune and win collectible cards to complete your album!

title: 4 Hexa
description: 4 Hexa is a fun, colorful online puzzle game! Merge same-number blocks to reach higher scores in this addictive math trivia challenge. Perfect for fans of block match games and brain teasers! Play now and test your skills!

title: Stunt Bike Rider Bros
description: Stunt Bike Rider Bros is a motorcycle racing and show game that you can play in both 1 player and 2 player mode with your friend. There are 3 different game modes in the game. In the "Racing Mode", you can compete with both your friend and other motorcycle drivers. In the "Career Mode", try to complete the difficult stages in a limited time. In the "Open World", you can earn coins and diamonds by performing various stunts with your motorcycles.

title: Cute Relaxing Matching 3 Tiles
description:
Fun Farm Wonderland is a light but extremely fun game from our team

Fun Farm Wonderland is a puzzle game combined with a Farm theme, to create a feeling of lightness and relaxation for all players participating in them.

Have you ever played a match 3 tiles game with such cute design and interface? If not, don't skip our game, for the following reasons

title: Color Sort: Impostor Edition
description: Color Sort Impostor Edition is a fun and relaxing puzzle game that challenges your logic and focus. Sort the colorful characters into the correct tubes so that each tube contains only one color. The rules are simple, but the puzzles quickly become more challenging as new colors and obstacles appear. Plan your moves carefully, avoid mistakes, and enjoy a smooth, satisfying sorting experience designed for players of all ages.

title: Merge Haven
description: Merge items to restore the café to its former glory, uncover hidden secrets, and discover its mysterious past. Start merging today to reveal the café's enchanting story!

title: Ships 3D IO
description: Ships 3D is an IO game, multiplayer sailing ship simulator. The game is played in 'first person' where you control the sailor and move around the ship; interacting with the helm, sails and cannons. Sink enemy ships and shoot other players to score points.

title: Mega Prize Scratch
description: Embark on a fun journey and try your luck with scratch cards. The appearance and value of houses, cars, or animals are in your hands. Win big with the scratchers, complete all the missions, and ensure every story has a happy ending.

title: Summon Tribe
description: Summon Tribe is a simple merge-and-defense game where you combine identical units to create stronger ones to stop enemies. It’s easy, mostly for passing time, and it also supports idle play.

title: Connect Puzzle Image
description: Step into the delightful world of Connect Puzzle Image, a game designed to tease your brain and sharpen your observation skills. Match and connect a variety of funny characters, tasty foods, and interesting objects as you progress through colorful levels. Easy to play yet delightfully challenging, this free online puzzle game offers hours of relaxing entertainment on both mobile and desktop devices.

title: Spooky Link
description: Spooky Link is a relaxing Halloween-themed game where you connect matching spooky tiles. Tap a tile, then tap its match. If the path between them has two or fewer turns, the tiles are cleared. Each cleared tile creates more space to connect others. Enjoy many levels of fun with Halloween surprises!

title: Jelly Tower CRUSH
description:
You can tap to clear the jelly of the same color as the ball.
Clearing jelly will cause more jelly to collapse and disappear.
Clear the objective before you run out of moves.
Use bombs to clear a lot at once!

title: Ellie and Ben Christmas Eve
description: Celebrate the magic of the holiday season with Ellie and Ben Christmas Eve, a delightful game where players join Ellie and Ben as they prepare for the most wonderful night of the year. From decorating the tree to picking the perfect outfits, this game brings the charm of Christmas to life in a fun and interactive way.

title: Number Master Run And Merge
description: Number Master: Run And Merge is an awesome number racing game that lets you run, merge, and upgrade on a parkour platform to become a true number master! Control your number character as you run through dynamic tracks. Keep collecting more numbers and expanding. Merge with matching numbers to grow stronger. The bigger your number, the more unstoppable you become! Pick the smartest paths, hit speed zones, and keep your speed maxed out!

title: Mermaidcore Makeup
description: In Mermaidcore Makeup, you ladies can step into the shoes of a talented makeup artist and work your magic on three stunning ladies. Journey into the realm of fantasy as you help these beauties achieve their perfect, enchanting looks. Prepare for a sensational trip filled with endless options as you explore an extensive selection of hairstyles, eyeshadows, mascara, lipsticks, face patterns, and intricate shoulder and neck patterns that perfectly match each girl's unique style and personality.

title: Flight Pilot Airplane Games 24
description: In this Real Flight Pilot Airplane Games 24 you will experience the piloting of an aircraft. This free airplane game will let you involve in navigating the aircraft through a series of obstacles, such as sea, mountains, buildings, and other aircraft while avoiding crashes and collisions and maintaining the plane's height and speed. It would be best if you also had to manage the airplane fuel, speed, altitude, and other flying physics.

title: Epic Hero Quest Idle RPG
description:
Conquer enemies, level up heroes, unlock skills in Epic Hero Quest: Idle RPG!

- Battle Through Hordes of Enemies
- Earn Gold and Level Up
- Unlock and Upgrade Skills

Are you ready to embark on the ultimate adventure? 
Join the quest  and become the legendary hero you were destined to be in Epic Hero Quest: Idle RPG!

title: Load The Dishes ASMR
description:
Load The Dishes ASMR is a puzzle game that puts you in comfort and fun! Your task is to sort different colored dishes and put them in the dishwasher. By organizing your cutlery in an organized way, you will find that this is not just a simple puzzle challenge, but also a super
relaxing ASMR sound experience.

title: Dynamons 12
description:
Embark on a brand new Dynamons adventure in Dynamons 12! This online monster collecting game includes two fresh areas to explore; Guardian Tomb world and the bonus cave.

Seasoned Dynamons Captain Jovani will tell you everything you need to know to become a true Dynamon trainer. Encounter the 8 titans from the Guardian King: Bearmoryx, Sharkonyx, Crocynos, Horzaryx, Visi, Rhinodys, Fenixaro, Uryndur and many more special Dynamons.

title: Stickman escapes from prison
description: New prison escape adventures welcome you! Your task is to play as a Stickman and find all the ways to successfully escape from prison. 10 different items to choose from are hidden in a secret place. Some items will lead you to victory, but many other items will lead you to death. Interesting animations and jokes will delight your attention. Check out all the items and enjoy the different situations in the zone.

title: Color Nuts
description:
Color Nuts is a relaxing and addictive color-matching puzzle game where you place colorful nuts on the board and connect three or more of the same color to clear them.

Plan your moves carefully, complete level objectives, and keep the board from filling up. Easy to learn and hard to master, Color Nuts is the perfect casual puzzle game for fans of match-3, block puzzles, and logic games.

title: Feed me Monsters! Idle Battle
description: The fate of the world is in your hands. Will you rise to the challenge and become a beacon of hope in a land filled with darkness?

title: Lost in the Forest
description:
Lost in the forest is a classic adventure game. The protagonist is an airman who ends up in a storm, loses control of his plane and falls into a mysterious forest.
The next day is stuck under a tree and must find a way to break free and solve various puzzles to make it back home safely.

title: Put the fruit together!
description: A game in the genre of "Connect the Balls" and "2048". Stack identical fruits to combine them into a new larger fruit! The game has incredibly beautiful and cute graphics, nice music accompaniment and addictive gameplay!

title: Sprunki Link
description:
Sprunki Link – the wildest Sprunki-fueled tile puzzle!
Find and connect matching tiles featuring your favorite chaotic Sprunki characters.
Test your focus and logic across 15 levels of pure unhinged madness.
Can you collect all 45 stars, or will the Sprunki win?
It’s fast, it’s silly, it’s dangerously addictive – Sprunki-style!

title: New Years miracles! Connect the balls!
description: A game in the genre of "Connect the balls" and "2048". Stack identical Christmas balls to combine them into a new bigger ball! The game has incredibly beautiful and cute graphics and addictive gameplay!

title: Grass Ranch
description: Grass Ranch is a super fun and relaxing casual game that makes you a true ranch grass-mowing master. If you like to complete simple and fun tasks in a cozy environment, then you can't miss this game. In this world of green grass, you will mow grass constantly. Keep mowing the lawn and feed some cute animals.

title: Paint It
description: An exciting coloring book in which you have to compete in speed with other players! A bright coloring puzzle will make you use your brain and spend time with pleasure!

title: Tailor Stylist: Fashion Diary
description: Welcome to Tailor Stylist: Fashion Diary – the place where your style dreams come to life! Step into the shoes of a talented fashion designer, build your own boutique, and create stunning outfits that dazzle the world. From fabric to final look, you’re in charge of every stitch!

title: Pumpking vs Mummy
description: Are you ready for a competitive game between the mummy and the pumpkin king on Halloween? Yes, someone has to win on Halloween! Team up with a friend and choose to be either the mummy or the pumpkin king. Collect as many flying pumpkins as you can! You can earn money by eating candies, and by gathering all the pumpkins, you can win the game. Catch the balloons and take them to the treasure chest. The one who collects and brings them back the fastest wins.

title: Spider Solitaire
description: Spider Solitaire is a timeless card puzzle where strategy and precision lead to victory. Arrange cards in descending order from King to Ace within the same suit to clear the tableau.
genre: Basketball, Bike, Car, Casual, Controller, Browser Game

title: Daily Match
description: Connect tiles with a great number of pictures in pairs within the limited time. As you crush all the tiles on the board, you can win the level! Become a tile master level by level! Play faster and faster to train your brain and exercise the link technology!

title: Brain Challenge
description:
This game will challenge your mind, think out of the box
Unexpected and mind-blowing answers will amaze you
250 Fun levels.

Features:
- Solve fun & mind-challenging puzzles
- Think out of the box
- Simple & addictive gameplay

** Credits:
"Ukulele"
"Royalty Free Music from Bensound"

"Forest" & "calm-bgm"
Music by "BandCamp - syncopika"

Menu vector created by jcomp - www.freepik.com
Menu vector created by upklyak - www.freepik.com

title: Rift of Hell-Demons War
description:
Hordes of insidious demons are lurking in the hellish catacombs! Can you challenge hundreds of hellish creatures and destroy them all as you descend closer to the citadel?
You have several types of weapons at your disposal and an almost endless supply of ammo along the way!
With each step, collecting gold that falls from enemies, you will become stronger and stronger, strength, speed of movement, arsenal of deadly weapons, armor - all this will depend on your actions.

title: Royal Bubble Blast
description: Welcome to Royal Bubble Blast, where you'll be transported to a majestic castle to enjoy a royal Bubble Shooter experience! Featuring vibrant, handcrafted designs and a colourful, lively theme, this game offers endless, relaxing gameplay accompanied by a beautiful soundtrack. Play as a King or Queen in the most exclusive Bubble Shooter enjoyed by royalty. Dive into a world of colourful bubbles and endless fun. So, what are you waiting for? Join the royals and start popping!

title: Pop Party - Suika Watermelon
description:
Get ready for Pop Party, a fast-paced 2D physics puzzle game with a wild twist! 
Your goal? Merge them to create bigger, better versions before your jar overflows! 

Power-Up the Madness!
Turn the tide of the game with six powerful abilities:
Shake
Level Up
Level Down
Claw
Bomb
Color Bomb

Unlock Stunning Themes!
Progress through the game and collect unique themes, each transforming the look of your balls:

Can you master the chaos, merge your way to victory, and unlock every theme?

title: Wild West Match 3
description: Saddle up for a Wild West adventure in Bubble Shooter Wild West! Join Sheriff Bonnie as you pop colorful bubbles to defend your frontier town. Travel through dusty deserts, lively saloons, and scenic canyons while enjoying toe-tapping country tunes. Track your progress with detailed stats showing your best, current, and previous scores across Novice, Expert, and Master modes. With its vibrant Western visuals and exciting challenges, this bubble shooter brings cowboy spirit to every pop!

title: Physics Box 2
description: Get ready for a fun and challenging physics game with 45 levels to complete. Easy to play but challenging to complete. Just tap or click on the screen to shoot an impulse out of the box that will make it move. Trickly levels will have you getting the box to buttons to open gates, avoiding sawtooth obstacles and making the box invincible to laser gates.

title: X to Y: Almost Impossible!
description: X to Y is a fast-paced precision platform skill game focused on timing, reflexes, and speed control. Guide X through dangerous obstacles, traps, and tight spaces to reach Y. Every move requires perfect acceleration and sharp reactions — one mistake and you fail. Earn up to 3 stars per level to unlock new worlds, including dark mode challenges, auto-movement stages, and physics-based puzzles.

title: Traffic Escape Puzzle
description: Come to enter a complex maze in the Traffic Escape Puzzle! In this exciting puzzle game, get your car out safely. Find the right time to exit the vehicle. Be careful to avoid traffic jams and collisions. To slide the vehicle and create a clear path for cars. Each level presents a new traffic maze. And traffic flows become more and more complex. Come to use your ingenuity and strategize. Cleverly arrange all cars on a complex maze of roads.

title: Sprunki Phase Brainrot
description: Sprunki Phase Brainrot is a chaotic and hilarious reskin of the original Sprunki game, now powered by Italian Brainrot energy! Play as absurd meme legends like Tralalero Tralala, Tung Tung Tung Sahur, Frigo Camelo, La Vaca Saturno, Lirili Larila, Burbaloni Luliloli, and many more. Run, jump, and lose your mind through surreal levels packed with brainrot humor, crazy visuals, and unpredictable madness. Enjoy custom sound effects and music that match each character’s bizarre personality!

title: Indygirl and the Golden Skull
description:
The girl 
who loves to uncover hidden treasures and adventures. She now found the 
Golden Skull and now ready come and needs your help dig into the cave! Your 
task is help Indygirl in her journey to collect all the jewels and golds that are 
hidden in the cave. Focus on getting gold! Run as fast as 
you can before that gigantic rock will run over you!

title: Candy Color Sort Puzzle
description: Welcome to our addictive and fun ball sort color puzzle game! If you're looking for a game that challenges your brain and keeps you entertained for hours, you've come to the right place. You'll never get bored. Our game is perfect for those who enjoy brain teasers, puzzles, and games that challenge their cognitive skills.

title: Relay Race
description: Relay race game is an engaging and addictive game that combines puzzle solving elements, casual gameplay and exciting race challenges. This game offers players a unique combination of fun puzzles and trolls for a thrilling and engaging gaming experience.

title: Board Kings Board Dice
description: Board Kings: Board Dice is a classic multiplayer strategy board game. Do you like to play Monopoly,Board Kings: Board Dice is similar to Monopoly. Become the real Board King by building and upgrading your empire with dice points, building and upgrading your board, or infiltrating other players' boards and attacking their buildings. This is a game where luck and strength go hand in hand to win,how is your luck today? Join us for more surprises waiting to be unlocked!

title: Mahjong Online
description: Mahjong Online is the classic version of the ancient board game that requires you to clear the board by matching the same patterned tiles. The rules dictate that there must be two or more of the same tiles to clear tiles from the play area and successfully win the game.
genre: Basketball, Bike, Car, Casual, Controller, Browser Game

title: Bowling Stars
description: Enjoy a classic game of bowling with simple and fun gameplay. Earning trophies will unlock better bowling balls and help you win against more skilled opponents.

title: Back 2 School Makeover
description: Embrace the nostalgia and dive into our Back 2 School Makeover game, where you can fashionably express yourself, experiment with stunning looks, and relish into the feeling of heading back to school with style! Embark on a fabulous journey with our character, Amelia, as she transforms from an edgy e-girl to a chic, school-ready fashionista. Revamp her entire look starting with a haircare routine and a new haircut, a complete skincare routine, and a new, school makeup.

title: Liquids Sort Puzzle
description:
Colorful, bubbling, fragrant, and iridescent concoctions fill flasks, jugs, and test tubes in varying proportions!

Figure out strategy and create harmony by collecting liquids of different colors and properties in different containers!

Test your attention and reasoning skills in this meditative puzzle game. 

Many levels of increasing difficulty and bonus tasks await you! 

Excellent attention training and good mood guaranteed!

title: Giant Crowd io House Capture
description: Come to lead your squad in Giant Crowd io House Capture, a fun .io strategy adventure game. You will expand your power in the city, occupy more houses and become the winner of the city. Grow your crowd by collecting more followers as you explore the city.

title: Chicken Jump : A Tap Challenge
description: This is simple but addictive chicken jump game. You'll have lots of levels and you have to save your chicken but swiping on screen from bottom to up to make chicken jump so that it can avoid hurdles.

title: Bullet Heroes
description:
Join the ultimate team-based shooting game! Team up with players worldwide to strategize, outsmart, and dominate your enemies. Experience intense firefights on stunning high-definition 3D maps, with multiple game modes and a vast arsenal of weapons. Become an elite agent, master your skills, and lead your team to victory.
Dive into the action and enjoy the thrill of cooperative gameplay. 
Are you ready to become a hero?

title: Bubble Shooter Pop
description: Get ready for a nostalgic blast from the past with Bubble Shooter Pop - Blast Fun, the ultimate classic bubble shooter game! Immerse yourself in a world of vibrant bubbles, addictive gameplay, and endless excitement.

title: Crazy 2248 Link - Matching Puzzle Game
description: 2248 is a classic number merge link matching puzzle game. The player's challenge goal is to merge the number blocks into 1024, 2048, 4096, and finally reach the infinity block!

title: Hero Story - Monsters Crossing
description:
An addictive hyper-casual game.
Build the bridges nicely to cross as many deeps as possible.
Use the special items (Attack, Second Chance, Accurate Eye, Jump) wisely to help your hero on his adventure.
There are many nice themes and cool heroes to unlock.
A global leaderboard is also supported. Try to win high scores and raise your name on the leaderboard.
ENJOY NOW!

title: Hotel Manager
description:
Have you ever dreamt of being one of the biggest landowners in the world?

Get your (virtual) chance in this extremely addictive game!

Build hotels all over the world, upgrade them and crowd your opponents out of the market, leaving their customers to come to you!

title: Poppy Strike 5
description: Poppy Strike 5 is a first person shooter game with elements of horror where your mission is to use big arsenal of weapons to shoot huggy wuggy and kisiy misiy and find a way to escape liminal spaces of haunted toy factory.

title: Lost Puppy Rescue and Care
description: Welcome to Lost Puppy Rescue and Care. A small pup is lost in the rain, cold and alone. He’s not sure who to trust—but with your care, that starts to change. Gently clean him up, feed him, and help him feel safe again. This calm, story-like game is all about kindness, connection, and giving one little dog a second chance.

title: ASMR Girl: Livestream Mukbang
description: Step into the world of ASMR Girl: Livestream Mukbang, where you take on the role of an adorable mukbang streamer! Get ready to indulge in delicious food, satisfy your cravings, and share the experience with your viewers in a cozy, interactive livestream. The more you eat and engage, the more you earn!

title: Skip Love
description: Ready for a funny, brain-teasing love adventure? Play an addictive brain teaser puzzle game in Skip Love. A funny little stickman hero trying to win the heart of his beloved while dodging all sorts of dangers! Each level has unique puzzles that make you think and laugh! Think and use your brain to overcome each challenge, helping the man overcome his sexy wife and lover. For example, help him disguise himself as a clown, disrupt, create chaos, etc.

title: Doors Awakening
description: This is a challenging puzzle-solving online game.  This game has wonderful 3D graphics enabling you to explore the handcrafted levels. The fascinating visual effects, realistic atmosphere, and natural camera controls will keep you returning for more. If you'd prefer puzzle games, don't miss this wonderful challenge.

title: Hazel Tangle Rope 3D: Sorting Puzzle
description: Untangle colorful twisted ropes in this satisfying 3D brain-teaser puzzle game. Strategically select and move rope endpoints to separate tangled knots and sort them by color. Use logical thinking and spatial reasoning to solve increasingly complex rope puzzles and become a tangle master.

title: Pubg Hack
description: Experience the ultimate shooting adventure. In Pubg Hack, you step into the battlefield as an elite soldier, exploring massive maps and engaging in fierce combat. Select a location to land and begin searching for supplies.

title: Oil Tanker Transport Truck
description: Let's go on to ride with an oil tanker transporter truck across all the continents like the Euro, Asia, and America oil transporter truck game has real features in the Euro and American cargo systems of the fuel truck.

title: Sheep Sort Puzzle Sort Color
description: Sheep Sort Puzzle Sort Color is a fun and addictive puzzle game. You must move the sheep from one enclosure to another in order to match them by color. When all enclosures contain only sheep of the same color, you win. Dozens of challenging levels await your challenge, allowing you to exercise your brain in a fun and colorful environment. Have fun playing!

title: Obby Tower Parkour Climb
description:
Dive into the parkour adventure with Obby in the Hell Tower game theme. Climb colored platforms and get to the finished platform for a great reward.
The game contains three hell tower maps easy, medium, and hard. Play these maps in two different modes normal mode and challenge mode. Try to do your best timing in challenge mode in either single-player or 2 player game mode. You can also compete against your friend in normal mode in the 2-player game mode option.

title: Bloxd.io
description: Bloxd.io is an IO adventure game with Minecraft-style visuals where you can navigate obstacle courses, gather resources, craft tools, battle other players, and much more. With game modes ranging from parkour challenges and creative sandbox building to combat-based gameplay, there's something for every playstyle.
genre: Basketball, Bike, Car, Casual, Controller, Browser Game

title: Glacier Rush
description: Welcome to "Glacier Rush," an exhilarating endless driving game set in the breathtaking icy landscapes of a frozen world. Brace yourself for an adrenaline-fueled adventure as you navigate treacherous snow-covered terrains, speeding through towering glaciers and sweeping icefields.

title: Pet Salon 2
description: Take care of the cutest puppy and cat that you can bathe, help it when it is sick and choose an outfit  and dress it up! Pet Salon 2 is very helpful for the daycare of your pet and have too much fun with this game.

title: Master Addiction Solitaire
description:
Challenge yourself and take on this brain teaser of a solitaire game!

Masterfully rearrange the cards so they end up in ascending order, from A to 6

If you need some help, there are hints, undos, and shuffle that you can use

title: Roller Coaster Rush
description:
Speed through tracks in Roller Coaster Rush! Play free and online in this thrilling coaster game.

Roller Coaster Rush is an exhilarating 3D game that puts you in control of a speeding roller coaster. Your goal is to accelerate through the tracks without crashing, performing crazy jumps and navigating steep drops. Hold to speed up and release to slow down just in time. Each level challenges your timing and precision as you rush through colorful and thrilling environments.

title: Real Freekick 3D
description: Immerse yourself in the intensity of Real Freekick 3D, a penalty shootout game where the championship's fate hangs on a nail-biting series of penalty shots. Select your preferred soccer team and progress to the finals. The pressure is on – make every shot count!

title: Graduation Makeup Trends
description: Discover the latest makeup trends with our Graduation Makeup Trends game! From bold and fierce to soft and elegant, this game offers a variety of makeup options to suit your style. We bring 3 BFFs, each with a unique style, many makeup options, stunning dresses, and accessories for your inspiration. Mixed with floral printed dresses, golden jewelry, and holographic accessories, in the Graduation Makeup Trends game, you will find everything you need to help these girls make a statement.

title: Onet Monster Book
description:
A "match-the-pairs" genre game where you need to find matching images and connect them. But it's not that simple: there are tons of pictures, and you have to find the right ones.

Match all the books with the same little monsters on the covers — once you've paired them all, the level is complete! With over 100 levels, meditative gameplay, various cute monsters, and beautiful graphics. Play and relax!

title: Sprunki Easter Coloring
description: Sprunki Easter Coloring is an exciting and colorful online game designed especially for kids who love to explore their imagination. This delightful digital coloring book lets young artists express themselves through a fun and festive Easter theme. With charming Sprunki characters and spring-inspired backgrounds, children can dive into a world of creativity that is both relaxing and full of color. And the best part—it is completely free to play online.

title: Bone Doctor Shoulder Case
description: Oouch, our cheerleader took a tumble and hurt her shoulder. Help fix her up with a quick shoulder surgery by following the right steps to ensure she recovers fully.
