Once she healed, give her a make over with some stylish outfits and accessories from our collection, so she can return to the squad looking better than ever!

title: Gun Shooting Range
description: In this game, you are a rookie sniper at the beginning, take your rifle, pass all the missions,and grow into a professional sniper! Remember, shoot every bullet calmly, be accurate and fatal,and use the least bullets to do the biggest damage.

title: Earth Defender
description:
Earth Defender is a fast-paced arcade game where you control a spaceship orbiting around planet Earth. Deadly meteors are flying toward the planet, and it's your mission to stop them before they crash into Earth.

Your ship circles the planet. Time your moves carefully and collide with incoming meteors to destroy them

Tap to change your orbit direction and intercept as many meteors as possible. Survive the meteor storm and defend Earth for as long as you can!

title: sokoban puzzle game
description: Push the Box game is an addictive and challenging puzzle game. It will help you train your brain. The operation of the game is very simple, move the box pusher by using the four direction buttons: up, down, left and right, push all the boxes to the specified position, the game is considered successful. If you are a fan of matching puzzle games, you will love our game. Keep your brain sharp while relaxing, having fun and relieving stress. Come and enjoy playing this puzzle game!

title: Okay
description: Okay is a minimalist puzzle game where your goal is to clear every element from the board by drawing a single strategic line. Each line you draw interacts with the objects on screen — if it hits them correctly, they disappear. The challenge lies in predicting the trajectory and eliminating everything with just one attempt.

title: BillyTheBox
description:
Want to deep dive into a cute graphics cozy puzzle game? BilBox is for you.

Simple puzzle game which can be enjoyed by anyone who loves playing cozy puzzle games with fun elements.

title: Sweet business of cats: cakes
description:
An exciting game in which you have to interact with a variety of objects, manage cells and create delicious cakes based on original recipes.
31 unique cakes!
6 ingredients that can be combined!
More than a 13 000 customers!

title: Chicken Scream Race
description: Get ready for a wacky and challenging voice-controlled adventure in Chicken Scream Race! This unique game brings a hilarious twist to platform racing by letting you control your character with both taps and your voice. Whether you’re clucking quietly or screaming loudly, your chicken responds to the intensity of your sound, making each race a chaotic yet exciting experience.

title: My kitties. Catworld
description:
Create your own world with unusual kittens!
At the beginning of the game three kittens are waiting for you, with black, white and ginger colors. 
Create unprecedented colors, mix colors and get new ones: blue, pink, neon-green and others. All this is in our game!
Replenish your collection and perform tasks!

title: Super Hero Driving School
description:
Drive unique super hero vehicles and perform stunts on multiple crazy tracks.

It’s a bird! No, it’s a plane! Or maybe a car? What the hell is that thing? I want to drive this right now! 

So buckle up and prepare for super fun times in Super Hero Driving School. Because even heroes need a driving license, you know! 

Drive, and fly unique super hero vehicles and perform stunts like never before. And be careful, because super heroes can have super crashes! :D

title: Astral Escape
description: Astral Escape is a thrilling space game where you dodge asteroids, outsmart aliens, and survive cosmic traps in a fast escape game adventure. Explore galaxies in a sci-fi arcade escape with astronaut missions and star quests. Fans of cool math games, Roblox, Minecraft, snake game, or Kahoot-style challenges will enjoy this galaxy escape quest. Astral Escape blends action, strategy, and fun into one cosmic survival run.

title: Coffee Craze - Sorting Game
description: Play Coffee Craze - Sorting Game free online and step into a lively café in a fast-loading browser game you can play instantly with no download and no install. Sort colorful cups, match drinks by type, and think ahead in a satisfying logic puzzle that doubles as a quick brain game. This unblocked game runs smoothly at school or home and is fully mobile-friendly. Optimized for desktop and mobile, it’s a free online game perfect for quick breaks and clever sorting fun anytime.

title: Steal Brainrot Monsters!
description:
Step into a world of fun, charm, and Italian flair with Buy Cute and Funny Animals! From the tiny and delightful Nubini Pizzanini to the rare and majestic Tralalelo Tralala and the playful Los Tralalelitos, there’s no shortage of adorable creatures to collect.

Build your very own cozy base, place your animals in it, and make them feel right at home. In return, they’ll reward you with coins, which you can use to unlock even more animals and exciting upgrades.

title: Cards 2048
description: Are you looking for a fresh twist on a familiar game? Cards 2048 is the perfect blend of classic solitaire and the popular 2048 puzzle game! This unique combination creates an engaging brain teaser that's highly addictive. As you merge cards with matching numbers, the challenge intensifies, offering a true test of your skill and strategy. Sharpen your logic and enjoy hours of fun with Cards 2048, the ultimate card merging game for puzzle enthusiasts!

title: Italian Brainrot Obby Parkour
description:
Italian Brainrot Obby Parkour is a wild and hilarious 2 player platforming experience that blends meme-fueled chaos with classic obby parkour mechanics. Inspired by games like Tower of Hell, this title brings the unpredictable humor of the Italian brainrot meme universe into a 3D climbing challenge.

Available characters are: 
-Tung Tung Sahur
-Brr Brr Patapim
-Burbaloni Luliloli
-Frigo Camelo
-Girafa Celestre
-Lirili Larila
-Orangutini Annaucini
-Tralalero Tralala
-Vaca Saturno Saturnita

title: Sorting Candy Factory
description: A great puzzle game in the sorting genre. At the candy factory, all the candies are mixed up, sort the candies into flasks so that they can be packed and shipped according to orders. The game has many levels with increasing difficulty!

title: Crazy Bunnies
description: An exciting platformer about super bunnies in which you have to go through levels created in the style of Minecraft. There is a single and cooperative mode.

title: Zero to Millionaire!
description:
"Zero to Millionaire!" is an immersive life simulator where you rise from poverty to wealth! Start with simple jobs, earn your first money, and work your way up: open businesses, buy luxury houses, sports cars, stylish clothes, and build romantic relationships. Upgrade your skills, make life choices, and build a career or entrepreneurial empire. Live the life you’ve always dreamed of!
How far can you climb in Real Life?

title: Santa Go
description:
Santa Go is a cozy Christmas puzzle game where you help Santa reach his sleigh!
Draw a line for Santa to slide along and watch him glide under a cheerful holiday melody.
Be careful — with each level, more obstacles appear, and they can easily knock Santa down.
Your goal is to guide him into the sleigh and keep him there for 3 seconds to complete the level!

title: Butterfly Kyodai Deluxe 2
description: The beloved classic returns! In Butterfly Kyodai Deluxe 2, connect matching butterflies in this beautifully refreshed game,  featuring new wing colors, enhanced animations, updated UI, and countless levels to complete . Can you clear each level before time runs out? Collect coins to unlock new backgrounds and stunning butterfly wings in the updated shop! A relaxing, fun puzzle for all ages!

title: Crazy Traffic Racer
description: Skid the wheels of 6 stunning supercars with crazy speed limits and drive them through 4 landscape highways without crashing. Show how well you can steer the wheels of these amazing cars with roaring engines and conquer 3 awesome game modes. Use replenishing nitro to overtake slow cars and drive in speed at all times. Customize and upgrade your cars with the best upgrades and get the most out of all the cars. Are you ready to show your driving skills? Prove yourself in Crazy Traffic Racer!

title: Golf Orbit
description:
One shot golf simulator is the battle of golf rivals to become the golf king worldwide. Become part of this idle golf orbit rocket league in which balls go high to Mars. Smash the ball to mars and become the golf champions.

Oneshot Golf Orbit is golf offline game which has many golf rocket leagues and one shot golf battles. Be part Mars golf games to become champions of golfing over it.

title: Idle Hotel Empire
description:
Grow your hotel empire in this idle tycoon simulation game.

Construct different hotel floors to suit the needs of your customers. This includes construcing standard hotel rooms, cafe bistros, deluxe rooms, meeting rooms for corporate customers, vip rooms, infinity pools, gym and fitness rooms and of course, the bougee presidential suite.

Control hotel employees, move them up and down the elevators to move the cash, and finally CASH it in the reception office.

title: Ellie Christmas Makeup
description: Experience the joy of festive makeovers with Ellie Christmas Makeup game! This fun, holiday game lets you guide Ellie to create three Christmas-themed makeup looks: Candy Cane Queen, Christmas Queen, and iconic character-inspired. Perfect for makeup lovers and enthusiasts of holiday-themed games alike, this girl game takes you on a journey filled with creativity, color, and Christmas cheer! Craft Ellie's look using assorted eyeshadows, lipsticks, patterned blushes, accessories, and more.

title: Block Puzzle - Frozen Jewel
description: An addictive block puzzle game that helps train your eyes and brain. It is a combination between the Tetris and Jewels game styles.

title: Rescue Hero
description: The hero begins his journey for treasure and save princess, but the puzzles in front of the hunter trapped him. What you need to do is to pull the pins in the right order, so that the hero can take the hidden treasure and save princess away from dragon, wolf and monster safely.

title: Word Cross
description:
Word Cross is an excellent way to loosen up and relax your mind.
Find as many hidden words as you can and improve your vocabulary everyday!

Word Cross combines classic crossword with a modern twist, offering hours of fun and brain-boosting challenges.

► Features:
     ◆ 6000+ challenging levels.
     ◆ Well designed grass & wooden theme.
     ◆ Dictionary: Expand your vocabulary!
     ◆ Hint and other boosters: magnifying glasses, firecrackers.
     ◆ No time limit, no pressure.

title: Number Bubble Shooter
description: Have fun with the whole family in this colorful number puzzle game! Shoot numbered balls onto the board and merge matching ones to create bigger numbers. Use powerful rocket boosters to clear a round area and make room for more moves. Easy to learn and packed with cheerful challenges, it’s perfect for players of all ages to practice quick thinking, strategy, and have a blast together.

title: Europe at War
description:
Europe stands on the brink of the greatest conflict in history. It's 1936 - choose your nation and decide the fate of the continent.
Europe at War is a turn-based strategy with a detailed map of Europe divided into 369 regions. Manage your economy, build factories and barracks, research technologies, forge alliances or declare wars.
Three paths to victory: conquer all regions by force, unite Europe through diplomatic alliances, or build an industrial empire of 12 factories.

title: Mini Obby War Game
description:
Manage your little character and see him through the never-ending conflict in Mini Obby War Game, an action-packed 3D game set in a Roblox environment.

With over ten unique and challenging levels, this amazing game is within your reach. Keep sprinting to avoid being caught by the waves of enemy troops who will shoot you if they see you, and aim and fire at all adversaries.

As you defeat enemies, you'll find coins that may be used to unlock additional characters with unique abilities.

title: Pin Detective
description:
Welcome to Pin Detective - Mystery Mansion!
A rich woman mysteriously vanished in a lavish mansion that was covered by the rumors of ghosts and dangerous monsters. A talented detective is committed to uncovering the mystery.
By pulling the pin, you can collect clues that enlighten the truth. What happens to the billionaire? Why do the biological laboratory and so many alien animals exist in this mansion? Let’s use your brain to solve the puzzle to find it out.

title: Super Hero Tycoon
description: Build your superhero empire and dominate the battlefield! In Super Hero Tycoon, choose from iconic heroes like Iron Man, Spider-Man, or The Hulk, and construct your base to generate income, unlock powerful gear, and engage in thrilling PvP combat. With over 2 billion visits, this game offers an immersive experience for fans of superheroes and tycoon-style gameplay.

title: Funny Fruits: Merge and Gather Watermelon
description: Merge the cheerful fruits, combine them to help them evolve into something even tastier! Hurry to gather more of them to prevent the box from overflowing. Can you collect all the fruits and grow a huge watermelon? Compete with friends for higher scores!

title: Obby Champions
description: A journey awaits you where every wall is a challenge, every obstacle is an ancient seal, and every punch is a step towards legend. Explore unique zones, fight titans, and find rare pets with unique abilities. Enter hidden codes, collect fragments of history, and leave your mark in the Hall of Echoes - only the strongest will be able to break all the seals and become the Fist of Legends!

title: Xytrian Runner
description: Xytrian is an endless flight runner where you pilot a spaceship through a dangerous course. Dodge obstacles, score points, and survive as long as you can! Click to control your shuttle and hit the timing perfectly! Only precise altitude changes will let you overcome the obstacles ahead.

title: Valentines Makeup Trends
description: If you're still seeking inspiration for your upcoming Valentine's Day look, then look no further Our social media influencers bring a selection of super sweet makeup looks that are going to impress your Valentine tonight. In the Valentine's Makeup Trends game for girls, you can discover the secrets of a sophisticated fantasy makeup look in candy colors. Play today and have fun!

title: CS: Upgrade Gun
description: The weapon is alive and ready to go hunting! In this fast-paced launcher, you control a cannon that runs itself and shoots at targets. Collect boosters, improve their performance and last as long as possible. The further you go, the more action and explosions!

title: Super Stock Stack
description: Super Stock Stack challenges you to sort food cans onto shelves with speed and clever organization! Match the cans by their labels, manage the growing stock, and test your skills as the levels get tougher. Can you become the ultimate stock master?

title: Merge Heroes
description:
In this game, you will command squads of melee fighters and ranged archers fighting against waves of enemies. Your agility and strategic thinking will give you an edge to victory.

Unlock new powerful fighters and accurate archers by combining those available for purchase. Place them on the map according to abilities and win.

You will have to discover not only new characters, but also beautiful different worlds, enjoy our new game.

title: Jungle Solitaire
description: Jungle Spider Solitaire is an adaptation of the classic card game Spider Solitaire with a jungle theme. It is optimized for short games and encourages strategic planning of moves with an original system of collecting diamonds.

title: Emilys Hotel Solitaire
description: What are you going to do when you go on a journey to a tropical island? Will you spend your time in a lounger, enjoying the hot sun and cold drinks, or become a master surfer? Our heroine Emily has arrived at this heavenly place to make her honorable grandfather Douglas Kirby’s dream to build a hotel of his own come true.

title: Block Puzzle Tropical Story
description: Discover a new genre in the world of puzzles! This game intertwines block puzzles with a thrilling adventure on tropical islands! Complete levels to earn stars, unlock new territories and unique relaxation areas. From snow-white beaches to dense jungles – each location is filled with unique challenges. The booster system will help you in difficult situations, and the well-thought-out mechanics allow both beginners and experienced players to enjoy the game.

title: Stunt Rider
description: In this exciting game, you will take on the role of an experienced stuntman, performing daring stunts on your motorcycle at different levels. Unlock new levels and buy cool motorcycles in the Stunt Rider game.

title: Hexa Tap Away
description: Hexa Tap Away is a sleek one-direction hex puzzle. Drag tiles to move them in the only direction they can travel, create space, and clear the board. Each level adds trickier layouts, blockers, and tight corridors that demand planning ahead. Short, snackable stages, smooth controls, and a clean look make it easy to start and hard to stop. Stuck? Try a hint or rethink your route and there’s always a smarter move!

title: Farm Animal Sort Puzzle
description: Welcome to Farm Animal Sort Puzzle, a fun and relaxing casual puzzle game set on a lively farm. Your mission is simple but addictive: match the appropriate animal or vegetable to the customer's needs. Sort adorable farm animals into the correct spaces and enjoy the satisfying challenge of smart organization.

title: Hill Climbing Mania
description: Drive over hilly tracks, collect stars, coins and pickups to upgrade your cars and get further! Also watch out for various obstacles! But you can also use them to perform some backflips... just watch your head! So, buckle up, driver! Drive from the start to finish in each level and collect coins to upgrade your cars.

title: Color Race Obby
description: Color Race Obby is an exciting game inspired by Roblox and Obby. Compete with players online on a field of colored blocks. Enter the race and become the champion! Join the fun!

title: Number Bubble Shooter Wild West
description: Saddle up for a Wild West number bubble shooter! Shoot and match numbers to merge them into higher values, creating bigger combos and clearing the board. Plan your shots, stack smart, and ride through dusty levels full of challenge and fun!

title: Zombie Survival Shooter
description: Ready for an all-out apocalypse escape? Zombie Survival Shooter throws you straight into a world overrun by zombies. Zombies attack from every direction. Keep moving, dodge smartly, and never stop running. Shoot the digital doors to gain more helpers or boost your attack speed, etc. Use your strategy to choose which digital door to go through.

title: Mega Jump
description: Mega Jump is a fast-paced vertical arcade game where you leap from platform to platform, collect coins, and dodge hazards as you climb higher. Power-ups, shifting coins, and colorful boost stars keep every ascent exciting. With vibrant visuals and responsive movement, the challenge grows as you push for your highest score without missing a single platform.

title: RocketGoal.io
description: RocketGoal.io is an IO sports game where you drive around a soccer field to compete in intense matches against other players. Drive rocket-powered cars across the arena, show off wild aerial moves, and of course, score as many goals as possible.
genre: Basketball, Bike, Car, Casual, Controller, Browser Game

title: Detective - Logic Puzzles
description:
Become a Detective! Solve logic puzzles to find the criminal! 
Lots of levels and interesting stories!

You will have to solve a lot of different cases, in this you will be helped by the method of deduction known to all detectives.

title: Sniper Shooter 2
description: Aim and Shoot! Kill the bad guys and accomplish missions to become the master hitman. Just turn your device to aim and TAP TO SHOOT and kill.

title: Blocks Stack Rush
description: Enjoy an addictive stacking adventure. In Blocks Stack Rush, you’ll control a little block character running and begin a fun pixelated journey. Collect blocks, stack them high and race against time to build the perfect picture. You need to align each block and keep putting together the complete picture.

title: Golf Mini
description: Golf Mini is a fun and addictive game in which your goal is to get the ball to the hole in the minimum number of strokes. Complete levels, each of which is a unique golf course with various obstacles and traps.

title: Puzzle lub
description: In this puzzle game you need to connect the pieces in a line. To successfully complete the game, use its mechanics to your advantage.

title: Meme Mukbang ASMR Game
description: Welcome to Meme Mukbang ASMR Game, the ultimate livestream mukbang experience! Step into the world of a quirky mukbang streamer, where you’ll indulge in delicious dishes and share your mukbang ASMR moments with a growing audience. The more you eat and interact, the more you earn, all while building your fame in the livestream world!

title: Tank Battle.io
description:
Players can control the tank to perform various exciting missions and defeat the enemy. Players will have to synthesize a variety of weapons for tanks.
There are many tanks in the game that you can choose according to your preference. While completing the task, you must avoid obstacles at any time, and also constantly resist fire from enemy tanks
Each level mode has a different difficulty that you can choose from.

The higher the level, the higher the stable income received.

title: Hook Pin Jam
description: Hook Jam is an addictive puzzle game where you untangle and release hooks to clear the board and earn rewards. Each level challenges your logic and planning with increasingly complex layouts. Solve puzzles efficiently, unlock new stages, and test your problem-solving skills in this clever, satisfying brain game.

title: Sisyphus Simulator
description: An addictive and challenging hyper-casual 3D game. Push the rock up the hill cleverly so that it won't fall down. Reach the top of the hill and collect the honor star to complete the challenge and raise your name on the Honor Board.

title: Sokoban Push The Box
description: Challenge your brain in Sokoban - Push The Box. This is a timeless classic puzzle game. Enter a clever maze full of crates, tight corners, and tricky layouts. Your task is simple but challenging. Push every box to the correct spot. Each level will test your logic, patience, and planning skills. One wrong move could block your path, so think carefully before every push. But keep an eye on your move count.

title: Axe Throw
description:
Ready to test your precision? Welcome to Axe Throw, the ultimate test of aim and timing. The rules are simple, but the challenge is endless. You have one goal: Break the target.

But be careful—the path to victory is rigged with danger. Explosive bombs are moving, and blocking your way. One wrong move, and it's game over!

title: BasketBros
description: BasketBros is a fast-paced basketball game that offers both online and offline gameplay. Choose a player, customize your style, and compete in single-player and multiplayer games.
genre: Basketball, Bike, Car, Casual, Controller, Browser Game

title: PIZZA PUZZLE
description: Match the same pieces to complete the whole. If you are next to the same piece, the pieces will come together. Game over when there is no place to put pizza.

title: Minitoss
description: Score goals, protect your goal and beat all your opponents. Keep competing until you are the king and the best on the pitch.

title: Hero Tower War
description:
Many monsters and enemies in the tower. You need to defeat them, get treasures and save hostages.

You can play everywhere ,every time. It is a boring killer game.

title: Dots Master
description:
Dots Master is a fun and strategic puzzle game where you connect matching dots to solve colorful challenges. Connect dots vertically or horizontally, and form squares to clear all dots of the same color in a single move!

Each level has a special goal — clear a certain number of colored dots, pop stars, make loops, or conquer the tiles — all within a limited number of moves. With 5 exciting chapters packed with creative puzzles.

title: Fortress of the Sinister
description: Fortress of Sinister is a thrilling 3D strategy game that blends tactical depth with exciting challenges. Lead a team of distinctive characters through four treacherous fortresses teeming with enemies and traps. Take part in strategic turn-based battles on grid-based arenas, recruit unique units like the Mushroom Priest and Night Hunter, and unveil hidden secrets. Collect valuable loot, upgrade your skills, and unlock powerful allies to face escalating challenges and excel in survival mode.

title: Color Dash
description: Color Dash is a fast-paced endless runner that tests your reflexes and color matching skill! Pilot a speeding rocket and match its color to smash through colored gates. Dodge the wrong colors and react to frantic color changes to keep your run alive. Grab powerful shield and nitro power-ups to blast further and beat your personal best score in this addictive arcade adventure. How high can you score?

title: Merge Brainrot
description:
Drop and merge the most cursed Italian Brainrot memes!
From "Trallallero Trallala" to "Tum Tum Tum Saur! and "Boneca Ambalabu", they’re all here.
What final Brainrot will you unlock? Dare to find out!

title: Clicker Heroes
description: Clicker Heroes is an original idle clicker game. Go on an epic adventure and slay monsters, upgrade heroes with the gold you collect, find treasures, and kill bosses.
genre: Basketball, Bike, Car, Casual, Controller, Browser Game

title: Muki Wizard
description:
Muki Wizard is an arcade game where you face different enemies and bosses on different maps. collect money and improve your equipment or choose the best skills for your battles.

Features:

150+ Levels to play.
30 Suits that improve your stats.
15 Weapons with different shots (some shoot faster).
8 Minibosses and 8 bosses.
Increasing difficulty for each season.
Easy to play ideal for your free time. :D

title: 3D Kid Sliding Puzzle
description: We've taken the classic sliding puzzle into a whole new 3D world. Kids will need to slide the scrambled blocks to rearrange them and complete adorable cartoon pictures, such as little animals, vehicles, and fairy-tale characters. The game features vibrant colors and lively 3D models that will immediately capture a child's attention. Not only does it provide hours of fun, but it also helps develop a child's logical thinking, spatial awareness, and problem-solving skills.

title: Hippo Supermarket
description: Meet Jack Ma, a cute hippo who dreams of opening his own supermarket. But he doesn't know how to do it. He needs your help to make his dream come true.In this fun and addictive game, you need to merge the same items to get higher-level items, and then sell them to earn money. The more money you make, the more you can help Jack Ma build his store.

title: Dont Tap
description: Don't tap condenses the basic idea of ground breaking game hits like rock band or guitar hero into a simple yet genius free online game that you can enjoy, whether you play on your phone, a tablet or on your desktop.

title: My Cat Restaurant
description: Welcome to My Cat Restaurant, a casual kids cooking simulator game that you can play for free. Act as a chef and restaurant manager. Take orders, cook food, serve customers, and collect money. Plan your moves and workload in advance, and figure out an efficient routine.

title: Gladiator Fights
description: An action game based on battles with gladiators, where players can plunge into the world of ancient Rome and become real warriors. The game offers an exciting and dynamic gameplay where players have to go through many challenges and defeat a number of dangerous opponents.

title: Spellmind
description:
Welcome to Spellmind Magic School where wonderful adventures await! Solve match-3 puzzles to restore the old mansion to former glory. Beat colorful levels, explore magic mist-filled rooms, decorate them to your taste and solve the mysteries of the missing wizard’s mansion!
Show that you’ve got what it takes to restore the Spellmind Magic School to its former glory!  Build wonderful interiors for Sabrina’s story to take place in.

title: Zombies and Guns
description:
Urgently save: the evil spirits are coming!
You are a Fighter, who is attacked by hordes of zombies and all sorts of evil spirits! Don't let them eat you alive!

title: Blue Mushroom Cat Run
description: Catch the mischievous thief in Blue Mushroom Cat Run! A cunning thief has snatched your gold, and guess what? Unlock vibrant worlds and zoom through endless obstacles in this action-packed runner. From sun-kissed beaches to neon-lit night streets, every map offers fresh surprises and heart-pounding thrills.

title: Christmas Blocks Sort
description: Blocks Sort Christmas Edition brings a cozy holiday twist to the classic sorting puzzle. All the blocks have turned into festive Christmas colors like bright red, pine green, frosty blue, and warm gold. They start mixed together in different columns, and your job is to sort them so each column ends up with just one color. The rules are simple, but the challenge is still satisfying. Think ahead, plan your moves, and slowly bring order to the holiday chaos.

title: Barbee Summer Vacation
description: Summer’s here, and it’s time for Barbee and her besties to enjoy their dream vacation! In Barbee Summer Vacation, you’ll help each character get ready with stylish warm-weather outfits, fun accessories, and fresh summer vibes. Whether it’s flowy dresses, sunglasses, or floral tops, it’s all about picking looks that scream sunshine.

title: Word Rivers
description: Play Word Rivers - an exciting word game where you can enjoy a sea of words and fantastic crosswords. Find words from letters and discover the wonders of the world and words right now!

title: Doodle Road
description: Doodle Road is an imaginative and captivating 2D casual game that combines creativity with problem-solving. In this fun browser game, your primary objective is to draw a path that will successfully guide a car from the starting point to the finish line.
genre: Basketball, Bike, Car, Casual, Controller, Browser Game

title: Hexa Sort
description: Hexa Sort offers a delightful blend of puzzle challenges, strategic matching, and satisfying merging experience. Engage your mind with stimulating brain games that involve clever puzzle solving and logical maneuvers, making it an ideal choice for those seeking a mental workout.

title: Obby 3D Sprunki Parkour
description: Obby 3D Sprunki Parkour combines the best elements of obstacle challenges and parkour gameplay in an immersive 3D environment. The goal? Navigate through increasingly complex levels filled with moving platforms, tricky jumps, and narrow ledges while collecting coins and power-ups along the way. Each level offers unique challenges that test your timing, reflexes, and problem-solving skills.

title: Musketeers Gunpowder vs Steel
description: Take command in Musketeers: Gunpowder vs Steel, a strategic 17th-century battle experience. Lead musketeers, pikemen, and reiters as a mercenary commander, issuing orders, engaging in combat, and training troops. Master tactics, crush your enemies, and claim victory on the battlefield.

title: Hill Station Bus Simulator
description: "Hill Station Bus Simulator" invites players to step into the shoes of a skilled bus driver navigating the challenging terrains of picturesque hill stations. As the primary protagonist, your mission is to efficiently transport passengers through winding roads, steep ascents, and captivating landscapes, while managing a thriving bus service. The game offers an engaging blend of realistic driving simulation, strategic decision-making, and immersive experiences.

title: Black Pink Halloween Concert
description: Step into the spooky spotlight with Black Pink Halloween Concert, a thrilling dress-up game where you style the K-Pop superstars for their haunted Halloween performance. Choose from a wide variety of creepy-cute costumes, bold hairstyles, and festive accessories to make the members shine on stage.

title: DOP: Draw One Part
description:
► Can you see what’s missing? 

What a pretty picture, but don’t you get the nagging feeling that something’s not quite right? What’s the final touch that will make the image complete? 

Engage your brain, your imagination and your artistic talents to identify the missing element and add it to the drawing in this delightful puzzle game that will get you thinking and make you smile time and time again.

title: Fairyland Merge & Magic
description: Fairyland Merge & Magic is a puzzle casual merge game set on an enchanting island of imagination and wonder. Step into a vibrant mosaic of captivating stories, each intricately crafted with actual magical elements, where every move you make has the power to shape your own whimsical world.
genre: Basketball, Bike, Car, Casual, Controller, Browser Game

title: BURGER CATCH
description: Move the tray left and right to collect the ordered ingredients! If time runs out or you collect too many extra ingredients, you will lose hearts. If you run out of hearts, it's game over.

title: Ellie And Friends Get Ready For First Date
description: Join Ellie And Friends Get Ready For First Date! Explore chic ensembles, trendy accessories, and glamorous styles to make a lasting impression. Dive into the excitement of the first date as these fashion-forward friends set the trend for the perfect look. Elevate your style game, embrace the thrill of romance, and let Ellie and Friends guide you through a fashionable journey to a memorable first date. Make every moment stylish and unforgettable!

title: Arkadium's Bubble Shooter
description: Arkadium's Bubble Shooter is an exciting casual bubble shooter game. Match three or more bubbles of the same color to clear them and increase your score.
genre: Basketball, Bike, Car, Casual, Controller, Browser Game

title: Snow Race 3d Fun Racing
description: Snow Race 3D: Fun Racing is an addictive arcade game. Do you want to participate in a snow race? This is probably the most fascinating and addictive game you have ever played! Collect the snow around you to make huge snowballs, then let them build ladders and climb to higher levels. Your opponents will have the same talent and you will have to race against time to race against them! Be the first to reach the finish line to win! Come join us and become a snowball master!

title: Lucky Brainrot Blocks Online
description: Lucky Brainrot Blocks Online combines luck, movement, and progression in a fast and rewarding gameplay loop. Explore a large world, collect valuable Brainrots, and return safely to your base before danger slows you down.
genre: Basketball, Bike, Car, Casual, Controller, Browser Game

title: Academy Assault
description: Cael has decided to challenge Rin, the strongest in the academy that he goes to. She will only accept his challenge after he has defeated the other students in Imperium Academy.

title: Age of Zombies
description:
Age of Zombies, the nostalgic and thrilling twin-stick shooter, takes you through time to save the world from the undead menace with Barry Steakfries!  Age of Zombies is delivering pure, unadulterated fun with an unforgettable cast of characters.

Experience a lighthearted, action-packed story that spans 24 levels across 8 diverse worlds. Confront 7 unique bosses, encounter a variety of zombie types, and compete in 12 Horde levels for a spot on the leaderboards.

title: Slide Block Puzzle
description: Slide Block Puzzle is an addictive puzzle game. With no timer or pressure, every move is a calming and satisfying challenge for your brain. Solve color block puzzles, arrange blocks to escape from challenging boxes, a game that provides a fun and satisfying experience.

title: 8 Ball Pool
description: 8 Ball Pool is a fun, classic sports pool game where you can test just how good you are at billiards. This 3D multiplayer pool game lets you play against friends or online players from around the world.
genre: Basketball, Bike, Car, Casual, Controller, Browser Game

title: Cityquest
description: Guess the hidden city by using compass directions and unlocking helpful hints like continent, flag, time zone, and name clues.

title: Babel Tower
description: Babel Tower is a full-featured clicker-idle game with a mission to complete the Tower of Babel.How to Play Babel TowerPress and hold the left mouse button on certain camps to mine stones, transfer stones to processing, speed up brick production, chop trees, and perform other activities.
genre: Basketball, Bike, Car, Casual, Controller, Browser Game

title: 321 Choose the Different
description:
In this exciting casual puzzle game, you'll have less than 3 seconds to find the different figure among several options - the faster you find it, the more points you'll collect! 

Key features:

Fast Mode: Find the different figure in record time.
Relax Mode: Enjoy a calm and relaxing game, no pressure.
Extreme Mode: Test your skills with a real challenge.

321 Choose the Different is the perfect game to improve your observation skills and pass the time in a fun way.

title: Elemental Gloves Magic Power
description: Elemental Gloves - Magic Power is a superpower arcade game.  Experience the fun of superpowers in magic games? Fascinated by elemental games? In this game, you can use the superpowers in the magic gloves to fight with your enemies. Shooting with flames, attacking with lightning, and attacking with electromagnetic waves, are three ways for you to choose. Don't hesitate to take the opportunity to practice real elemental magic and wipe out the bad guys. Become the greatest elemental master!

title: Pixel Mini Golf
description:
Mini Golf is a complete game, with 400 different levels, and an addictive system. Have fun exploring the game’s green hills and plains while listening to the birds and enjoying its beautiful views, collect as many coins as possible and try to hit all the holes to achieve the highest score.

Among the game mechanics are levels with: Portals, Boxing Gloves, Cannons, Burners, Impulses, Mill, Sand, Mole Holes, Spikes and Movement Blocks that will help or hinder your game!

title: FlowBall
description: Feel the adrenaline in an exciting 3D arcade game where you control a glowing ball racing through an endless tunnel! Avoid traps, chasms and obstacles, defying the laws of gravity. Your goal is to collect glowing dots to unlock new levels and set records! But be careful: falling into the abyss takes away lives, and losing them leads to defeat!

title: Ants Empire Evolve Sim
description: Welcome to Ants Empire Evolve Sim! Begin the evolution. Become the king of the strongest ant empire. In this addictive strategy simulation, you start as a tiny spider in a humble colony. Keep collecting resources, like peaches to increase your health, and bottles to increase your ATK. Keep attacking opponents to gain upgrades.

title: Greedy Snake : Brain Hole Explosion
description: This is a level based puzzle game where players will transform into a greedy snake and challenge different levels.Players need to make flexible judgments and plan their movement paths reasonably in order to safely eat apples and reach the finish line smoothly, winning the level victory.

title: Style Icons: 2024 Rewind Edition
description: Relive 2024’s hottest fashion trends in Style Icons: 2024 Rewind Edition! From TikTok-inspired makeup to glamorous red carpet looks, this game brings together the best dress-up challenges of the year! Style iconic outfits, create bold beauty looks, and transform your favorite characters for every occasion—festivals, dates, holidays, and more! Are you ready to be the ultimate fashion trendsetter? Play now and own the style game!

title: Super Tank Wrestle
description: Welcome to the world of tank battles, where you can control tanks to fight with other enemies on different maps. There are also a wealth of tanks for you to choose from!

title: Princess Dress Up Run
description: Run, collect, and dress up like a true princess. Race around the fantasy track. Collect all kinds of gorgeous princess dresses, shoes and accessories along the way according to the goal. Create the perfect princess look. And watch out for obstacles and traps, such as suddenly broken platforms, flames, etc.

title: Find It - Find The Differences
description: Find It is an engaging puzzle game that tests your observation skills as you search for subtle differences between two nearly identical images. With colorful visuals and beautifully designed scenes, each level presents a fresh challenge. Whether you're spotting tiny details or uncovering hidden objects, Find It will keep you entertained and focused. Hone your attention to detail, enjoy the excitement of finding every difference, and experience hours of fun suitable for all ages!

title: TB Avataria Life Girl
description:
Hey, how about helping me decorate my house? You need to decorate my home beautifully, buy me nice clothes, and feed me. Let's get started — right now, I have an empty house, and we need to furnish it together. Let's make it look organized and cozy! Before I get too hungry, you must take me to the café to eat, or I might lose my life from hunger!
We also need to earn money. To make money, reach the computer and use the money-making app. You can either buy things or continue earning more money!

title: Shoot The Bottle
description:
You’re at an abandoned gas station with really nothing else to do. Why not grab a couple rounds to kill time.

In this immersive 3D game, your goal is simple: shoot as many bottles as you can. With limited time, precision, and speed are key to achieving the highest score. 

Tap or click to shoot the bottles. Shoot fast, shoot accurate to get the best score!

title: Gear Factory
description: Gear Factory is an idle and incremental game where you build a coin-generating machine out of interlocking gears. You start with a single spinning center gear on a small grid and grow your factory into a massive, multi-tiered engine of wealth.
genre: Basketball, Bike, Car, Casual, Controller, Browser Game

title: Pet Tile Master
description: Enjoy a fun pet-themed tile-matching challenge in Pet Tile Master! Draw up to 9 tiles featuring adorable pets and match three identical ones to clear them. Be careful—if the stack fills up with 9 tiles, the game is over! Use smart moves to uncover hidden tiles and complete each level. Have fun with cute animals, relaxing gameplay, and tricky puzzles!

title: Hidden Object: Clues and Mysteries
description: Hidden Object: Clues and Mysteries is a charming puzzle game that invites players to uncover secrets hidden within cozy, beautifully illustrated scenes. Follow a calm and clever detective as your guide while you explore each setting, searching for concealed items, solving gentle puzzles, and connecting mysterious clues.
genre: Basketball, Bike, Car, Casual, Controller, Browser Game

title: Knife Madness
description: Aim, throw and survive! Watch out — avoid hitting other blades. The spinning wheel gets faster, the stakes get higher and only your quick reflexes will keep you in the game. Can you defeat the boss levels and unlock epic knife skins? The challenge is on!

title: Chain Puzzle
description: Chain Puzzle is a relaxing logic game where you carefully untangle intricate chained constructions. Each construction is a single system of two same-colored balls connected by a chain. Every move changes the shape of the structure: the chain can automatically shorten, opening new ways to solve the puzzle. Observe, adjust positions, and find the right sequence of actions to completely unravel the knot.

title: Nubik: Create Your Place
description:
Nubik: Create Your Place – a game about Nubiks. In this game, you can create your own 'place' – meaning your own game. Choose the game type, build a level from blocks, set Nubik spawn points, and play.

You can play the game solo or with a friend. However, you can also create a 'place' (game) and simply watch how Nubiks (bots) play it.

The game features many skins for Nubiks, achievements, a leaderboard, and chat.

title: Marble Bubble Legend
description: Marble Puzzle Quest is a fun and addictive casual puzzle game where your task is to sort colorful marbles into the correct slots. With each new level, the challenge grows — chains become longer and more colorful, while the space for moves gets tighter. Use logic, plan ahead, and clear the board! Watch out: the marbles fill four slots at the top, and only three of the same color will disappear. Place them incorrectly, and you lose the round.

title: Mutant Assassin 3D
description: In the action-packed game “Mutant Assassin 3D,” you become a skilled special agent. Armed with web-launching abilities, you take on bad guys across diverse terrains. Your mission: eliminate all foes by ensnaring them with your webs and delivering powerful punches. As you progress through 4 levels, prepare for the ultimate challenge: the boss level. No hints here—navigate the best route to victory on your own. Good luck!

title: Noob Shooter: Gun Battle 3D
description: Noob Shooter: Gun Battle 3D is an exciting cooperative shooter created for true fans of action and intense battles. If you like games like CS, Warface and CoD, then this project will definitely not disappoint you. Join your team and engage in battle against opponents, striving for the main goal - to get as many kills as possible. The team that first reaches the required number of frags will be the winner.

title: Hard Rock Zombie Truck
description:
We ride on the roof of a truck, shoot, blow up and crush zombies!
This is a 2D shooter where you need to destroy crowds of zombies and monsters by shooting, crushing and exploding them. At the same time, it is necessary to save living people. We also upgrade our weapons and abilities! Lots of funny sounds, lots of blood (cartoonish!!!) and humor.

title: Battle Arena
description: Battle Arena is a thrilling RPG adventure battle game that seamlessly blends heart-pounding action with strategic gameplay. Create your team from over 50 unique heroes, each inspired by iconic characters you know and love.
genre: Basketball, Bike, Car, Casual, Controller, Browser Game

title: Pet Runner
description: Pet Runner is a fast-paced platformer where your pet runs forward automatically, and you must jump, dodge obstacles, defeat enemies, and collect coins. Play in Endless Mode for infinite fun or tackle unique challenges in Level Mode. Use up to three lives, hit checkpoints, and complete daily challenges to earn coins. Unlock and customize adorable pets in the shop to enhance your adventure. With its exciting gameplay and charming rewards, Pet Runner offers fun for all ages!

title: 100 Rooms Escape
description: This is a brain-burning and challenging escape room online game. Interesting gameplay so you won't get bored. You need to open 100 doors to escape the room. Interact with objects and solve puzzles to complete the tasks in the escape game. Solve the puzzles, and take inventory of the hidden items. You may use them to open the room, move on to the next level, use your skills, and do whatever it takes to escape.

title: Gloomy Princess Favorite Toy
description: Immerse yourself in the mysterious world of the Gloomy Princess and her strange but touching teddy friend. Create unique images for the heroine of the game: choose makeup, outfits and accessories - from witch hats to lace corsets in the Gothic spirit. Add personality to her favorite toy. Assemble the perfect duo - a princess hiding her feelings behind a flawless image, and her beloved companion reflecting the inner world of the hostess!

title: Swordsman Adventure
description: Swordsman Adventure is a thrilling adventure game where you wield your sword freely on the battlefield to complete a series of missions. In this role-playing game, you control your soldier to attack enemies of different hit points. You get rewards at the end of each mission completed, which you can use to upgrade your attack points or to equip with a new weapon.

title: Chibi Doll Coloring & Dress Up
description:
Chibi avatar character creator: anime coloring book and dress up games for girls
First chibi dolls coloring book: meet the most customizable Anime Avatar Maker! Color pictures, become a real doll designer, create and makeover adorable anime characters with baby doll dress up games for girls and glitter coloring pages! (✧∀✧)/

title: So Different Dragons
description: Discover the world of a new clicker game where you can trace the birth and maturation of your very unusual dragon pets. Each tap strengthens the strength of the dragons and speeds up time. Strategically build up your gold reserves to increase the number of your mythological pets and become the greatest guardian of dragons!

title: Pesky Moles
description:
An ordinary farmer lived a quiet life and grew vegetables, but at some point, moles began to attack his garden and eat the entire crop.
After the next harvest, he decides to take everything into his own hands and protect his garden.
In Pesky Moles, you have to protect your garden from moles for a certain amount of time. The more pests you manage to neutralize and the more crops you save, the more coins you get. With the coins you earn, you can buy traps that will help you protect your garden.

title: Blast Cubes
description: Blast Cubes is an addictive puzzle game where players strategically place cubes on a grid. When cubes align in horizontal or vertical rows, they explode, triggering an exciting chain reaction! After the explosion, characters of the same color as the exploded cube emerge and move towards vehicles of the same color waiting at the top. Once the vehicles are filled, new ones appear, continuing the cycle.

title: Stacking Match
description: Jenga match is a very fun puzzle game. Players need to pull out blocks of a certain color from a multi-layered tower of blocks. The pulled block will fly into the corresponding colored square. When there are three blocks of the same color in a square, it will eliminated, and a new square will appear. How many levels you can play?

title: Daily Jewels Blitz Mahjong
description: Enjoy Daily Mahjong with a sparkling jewels twist! Play a unique layout every day, match dazzling gem tiles, and keep your streak alive to earn boosters like Hint, Shuffle, Undo, and Torch. Track your longest streak and collect daily rewards as you match your way through beautiful designs. Miss a day? There’s a rare chance to recover it. Relax, match, and dive into the timeless charm of Daily Mahjong with a brilliant jewels theme!

title: Fruit Mahjong 3D
description: Fruit Mahjong 3D is a relaxing puzzle game where you match pairs of fruit-themed tiles in 3D space. Rotate the view, find free tiles, and clear the board by matching identical pieces. Each level is handcrafted and fully solvable, offering a mix of easy and challenging layouts. The game starts with a short tutorial and gradually increases in difficulty. Use shuffle and hint buttons if you get stuck. Enjoy colorful graphics, smooth animations, and intuitive controls on both mobile and desktop.

title: Cocktailz
description: Thirsty? Make all sorts of cocktails in this refreshing Match-3 game! Excessive alcohol consumption is harmful to health, but you can play this game without moderation.

title: Bubble Shooter Candy Wheel Level Pack
description: Bubble Shooter Candy Wheel Level Pack is a fun and challenging game where you shoot candy bubbles to match three or more on a rotating wheel. Use power-ups like the Bomb to blast nearby candies and the Stopwatch to freeze time for unlimited moves. Earn coins by clearing levels and use them to unlock more exciting levels. With increasing difficulty and sweet rewards, this game promises endless fun. Spin, aim, and conquer the candy wheel!

title: My Garden Journey
description:
Grow your dream garden, raise animals, and enjoy peaceful farm life!

Welcome to My Garden Journey! ?? Start your peaceful farming adventure in My Garden Journey, the ultimate relaxing farming simulator!

title: End Of World
description:
There are only 337 coins left in the world, collect them faster than the rest

You will appear in a post-apocalyptic world 

With coins, you can unlock unique items in the world, but you'll have to find them first

Summoning waves you can get even more coins
if you don't let the monsters get close to you

By completing the race, you will be able to convert your achievements into victory points and buy a unique incredibly powerful weapon!

And remember, you need to collect all the coins!

title: Guess Their Answer
description: Guess Their Answer is a casual quiz game where your goal is to outsmart opponents by predicting the most popular answers. Tackle three head-scratching questions per round across diverse topics, earn rewards, and unlock unique skins to personalize your experience.
genre: Basketball, Bike, Car, Casual, Controller, Browser Game

title: Screw Jam - Fun Puzzle Game
description:
Remove screws in correct order to get rid of the boards. 
Match the removed screws and complete the level. 
Test yourself with this amazing brain teaser!

title: The Flowers: Merge and Sell Bouquets
description: Combine flowers in the relaxing atmosphere of a summer garden and earn coins! Sell your bouquets to customers and clear your garden of unwanted flowers with your pruning shears! Earn more coins than other players to take a place on the leaderboard!

title: Steal Brainrot Eggs
description: Steal Brainrot Eggs is a competitive action game playable in both 1 Player and 2 Player modes. Players buy eggs from a central conveyor, carry them to their Base, and hatch random Brainrot characters based on egg rarity. Characters generate coins over time, allowing access to higher-tier eggs. Defend your Base from thieves or steal eggs and characters from rivals, customize your character, raise evolving pets, and take part in timed events across the map.

title: Doge Rush Draw Home Puzzle
description: Welcome to Doge Rush: Draw Home Puzzle! It's full of lovely adventures. There are two ways to play this game. In the Animal family party, you should help the dog and cat find their food and guide them home, drawing a line between the dog and cat's correct food. And avoid them bumping into each other. If they hit, they will get dizzy and the game will fail.

title: DIY Phone Case Shop
description: Welcome to Case Craft, a fun and creative game where you'll design and decorate phone cases to impress clients! Run your own phone case shop, attract customers, and fulfill their unique requests. Customize phone cases with various designs, patterns, and themes, and decorate your shop with attractive items to draw in customers. As you meet client demands, earn rewards and upgrade your shop to become the top phone case designer!

title: Sheep Sheep Duck
description: Sheep Sheep Duck is a very novel casual multiplayer party interactive game. You are free to choose and match the battle scenarios to your liking. The game has all kinds of cool scenes. You can control the game character flexibly by tapping directly on the screen, and take more challenges here. Show off your ability to defeat more enemies in this game, so you can get more weapons. You can challenge yourself better with great strength, so you can unlock new game maps.

title: Capybara Xmas Merge
description:
Capybara Xmas Merge is a cute and cozy holiday game where you combine adorable Christmas capybaras!
Drop festive capybaras into the box, watch them roll and bump into each other, and merge into bigger, funnier holiday characters.
Create giant capybaras, score points, and enjoy the warm winter atmosphere.

title: Huggy Mix Sprunki Music Box
description: Welcome to the wonderful world of Huggy Mix Sprunki Music Box. This music game is filled with energy and rhythm. Follow the beats, tap along to the music, and have fun with casual gameplay.You can choose three modes: health, ice, and bad man. You can make unique tunes that reflect your personality.

title: BFF Happy Spring
description: Welcome to the Bff Happy Spring games. Princesses Belle, Tiana, and Moana are best friends. They planned to organize a party to welcome the most adorable spring season. They already filled their wardrobe with a cherry blossom collection of outfits. Being a design expert join and help them to choose the best outfit for them. Have fun!

title: Find Objects - Hidden Item
description:
Find objects on colorful maps with links and Easter eggs!
An interesting puzzle casual indie game in the genres of "Hidden Objects" and "Find the Differences"!

Embark on an exciting journey through beautiful 2D locations, where hundreds of hidden objects and riddles await you! Explore picturesque landscapes, mysterious cities and magical worlds to find all the hidden objects. And in the "Spot the Difference" mode, test your attentiveness by comparing two almost identical pictures!

title: Tap Gallery
description: Tap Gallery is a relaxing and addictive puzzle game where you tap tiles to clear blocks and reveal beautiful images. Combining tile puzzles, block puzzles, Tetris-style logic, and brain-training challenges, Tap Gallery is perfect for casual play, stress relief, and moments of relaxation.
genre: Basketball, Bike, Car, Casual, Controller, Browser Game

title: Stabfish 2
description: Stabfish 2 is an IO shark game that takes the intense underwater combat of Stabfish.io to a whole new level! You are in an arena as a deadly shark, ready for thrilling battles against other players, aiming to impale as many rivals as possible.
genre: Basketball, Bike, Car, Casual, Controller, Browser Game

title: Good Yard
description:
Welcome to Good Yard!
Grow flowers, sell them and upgrade your tools! Unlock new flowers and sell them for more! Can you fully upgrade your yard?

title: Smashdoll
description:
Smashdoll – Ragdoll Smash Game is a fast and chaotic physics game where you smash through floors, obstacles, and enemies to reach the bottom! Collect coins, dodge bullets, and upgrade your smash power, jump force, and trails.

Break enough floors to charge your smash meter and transform into an unstoppable bullet of destruction. How far can you smash?

title: Anime Dress Up - Doll Dress Up
description: Anime Dress Up - Doll Dress Up is a fashionable and wonderful dress-up game with shocking graphic effects that will provide females with an unforgettable dress-up experience! This game is ideal for everyone who enjoys fashion and adventure, thanks to its amazing graphics and simple UI.

title: Escape Room Mystery Key
description: Escape Room Mystery Key is an intense escape room adventure filled with horror and puzzle elements. Choose a role to enter an abandoned school or a hospital. Uncover hidden clues and keys to find your way out. In this game, you must carefully examine every detail in the room, searching for hidden clues.

title: Beam Drive Car Crash Test Simulator
description: Experience thrilling car crashes with realistic physics and intense destruction! Smash, wreck, and demolish vehicles in crash tests, demolition derbies, and sandbox modes. Dive into authentic impact mechanics and explore the ultimate crash simulator for car destruction fans!

title: Queens Royal: Sudoku Puzzle
description: Queens Royal: Sudoku Puzzle reimagines the classic eight queens challenge into a sleek logic game with over 5,000 levels. Place queens strategically so none share a row, column, or color zone while avoiding attacks in all directions. With elegant visuals, daily challenges, endless mode, and smart hints, every puzzle offers a unique test of reasoning and precision for players who enjoy refined brain-teasers.

title: Relaxing cubes and campfire
description: A relaxing and peaceful game with delightful campfire sounds! You can easily learn how to play and win - just place blocks to create and remove vertical and horizontal lines. The game is suitable for all ages.

title: Traffic Racing
description: Traffic Racing is a fast-paced driving game that throws you into intense highway action where every second counts. Weave through heavy traffic at high speeds as you compete in Career Mode or test your skills against others in Racing League Online.

title: Celebrity Thanksgiving Prep
description: It’s Thanksgiving, and the celebrities are getting ready for the big day! In Celebrity Thanksgiving Prep, you’ll help your favorite stars get glammed up for the holiday dinner. Start by creating stunning makeup looks, styling hair, and choosing the perfect fall outfit. Then, join them in the kitchen for some festive cooking fun! From cozy sweaters to chic party dresses, show off your fashion taste and creativity in this delightful seasonal makeover game.

title: Ships 3D
description: Ships 3D is an online naval warfare game featuring frantic battles and chaotic smash-ups at sea. Join your friends in thrilling multiplayer ship wars featuring up to 20 players.
genre: Basketball, Bike, Car, Casual, Controller, Browser Game

title: Cosmic Tetriz Puzzles
description: Join a cosmic puzzle adventure where Tetriz meets pixel art. Place colorful Tetriz-style pieces on a grid to create shapes, ranging from easy to complex. Each piece has its own spot, adding to the challenge. Complete 45 levels, solving cosmic Tetriz puzzles in a space-themed setting. Can you beat this cosmic challenge before time's up?

title: Pottery Master
description: Pottery Master invites you into a peaceful world of creativity and clay. Shape, sculpt, and refine your pottery using intuitive tools, then add your personal touch with vibrant colors. Each creation is a moment to unwind, express your style, and transform simple clay into a stunning masterpiece in a relaxing, artistic flow

title: Sprunki Space Challenge
description: Get ready to soar through the stars in Sprunki Space Challenge an intergalactic online adventure where brave kids take flight to save the galaxy. This wild space ride throws you into the cockpit of a zippy space rover where danger lurks in every asteroid and rocket burst. But worry not: Sprunki is here to lead the charge. It is all about timing, reflexes, and sky-high jumps that send you sailing straight into the action.

title: Over the Rainbow
description: Help Alex the Elf return the colors to the rainbow by jumping. Avoid enemies and find power ups to aid you in your quest.

title: Paint Pop 3D
description:
Paint Pop 3D is an one-tap hyper casual shooting game that will keep you hooked for hours!

Tap to paint. Hold for more fun!
Stay away from obstacles and paint all slices on the ring.

Features:
- More than 1000+ levels to experience game play.
- A lot challenging missions.
- Various characters & themes.
- Beautiful graphic.

title: OMG Word Rainbow
description: Step into the vibrant world of OMG Word Rainbow, an engaging word finder game illuminated by the beauty of the rainbow. Explore a colorful mosaic of letter tiles, where drawing lines along neighboring letters unveils words inspired by the enchanting spectrum of colors; enhance your journey with rewarded ads, allowing players to effortlessly skip levels in this captivating linguistic adventure.

title: Penguin Farm - Ice Merge
description:
Explore a world of frozen islands where penguins run their own farm. Collect resources, merge wood, build and upgrade buildings to open up new territories. Develop your settlement step by step, expand your glaciers, and watch your income grow.
Train your penguins, improve production, and head to the ocean for rewards—there drift chests filled with valuable treasures. Upgrade each building, manage your resources, and turn your small island into a thriving icy farm.

title: 2-3-4 Player Games
description: These games can be played with 2, 3, or 4 players. You can play 21 unique games with your friends, each with different scenarios. The objective of each game is to either score or be the first to reach the finish line. Move swiftly and outpace your opponents! It's time to enjoy with friends!

title: Words from Words
description: "Words from Words" is an exciting game, the purpose of which is to create as many different words as possible from the letters given to you. You can create 29 words from the word «example», «maverick» includes 71 words, and "chalkboard" stores as many as 142 words. Can you solve everything?

title: Gold Miner Tower Defense
description: Gold Miner Tower Defense is a wonderful combination of tower defense, card strategy and upgrade combat. You will play as a brave miner protecting gold from enemies. Protect your precious treasures strategically with many unique defense towers!

title: Steal Brainrot Arena
description: Steal Brainrot Arena is a fast-paced collection and heist game where every match turns into a battle of wallets, wits, and sneaky steals. Play solo in 1 Player mode or team up and compete in 2 Player mode as you build the ultimate Brainrot lineup. With over 45+ brainrot characters to discover, your goal is simple: buy better Brainrots, earn more, and create the most stacked collection in the arena.

title: Home Design: Small House
description: A game of arranging and design rooms. In the game, the player will play the role of a small housekeeper, classifying items in the room and then placing them neatly in appropriate positions to make the room neat and tidy. The game is very easy and fun.

title: Find the Frog - Hidden Objects
description: Go on a relaxing and magical adventure in Find the Frog - Hidden Objects. In this charming hidden object game, you’ll explore beautifully hand-drawn black-and-white scenes and try to spot frogs hiding in plain sight. With each click or tap, the world around you lights up in color, revealing hidden surprises and playful details. Play for free on both mobile and desktop, unlock new levels, and collect unique frogs from all around the world.

title: Zombies: Battle for Survival
description: Survive an endless onslaught of zombies! Each wave gets harder, ammo is running low, and hope is fading. Unlock new areas, buy weapons, upgrade gear, and build barricades to slow the undead. Can you endure the nightmare and set a new record?

title: Word Clash
description: Words are the key to progress. With a massive number of levels to explore, you will improve your vocabulary. Use hints when needed and stay hooked for hours. Keep solving, keep learning and see how many challenges you can conquer along the way.

title: Sword Run 3D
description: Sword Run 3D is an easy to pick up action runner game. Collect sword pieces, cut off the obstacles that block your progress, and finally reach the finish line to win. More cool skins are waiting for you to unlock, what are you waiting for? Don't forget to share it with your friends if it's fun!

title: The Roman Empire Colosseum
description: The war in the colosseum has never been as epic as in this game! Arrange your units and send them into battle! This online game is a battle simulator similar to Totally Accurate Battle Simulator. Your units include warriors, riders, titans, dwarves, mages, and more.

title: Color Block Sort
description:
This is a casual puzzle game about sorting blocks by color!

Simply tap your finger to sort various blocks, achieve winning streaks, and win exciting rewards.

title: Fruit Block Tetra Puzzle
description: Fruit Block Tetra Puzzle is a fast and fun block puzzle game where you place fruit-shaped blocks to clear lines and collect target fruits before time runs out. Complete each fruit goal to level up and unlock new challenges. Easy to play, satisfying to master, and perfect for quick, brain-boosting fun!

title: Save the crop
description: Save the Crop is an exciting arcade game where you control a tractor to rescue crops from fire! ?? Quickly cut and collect crops before they burn, then stack and sell them to earn money. Use your earnings to upgrade your tractor, buy storage houses, and explore new fields. Navigate using joystick controls and master the art of saving and farming in this fast-paced, action-packed game!

title: Solitaire Story Tripeaks 6
description: The highly anticipated 6th installment of one of the most popular Solitaire Story card games of all time! Your good friend Foxy will take you on a journey to new destinations, visiting countries, landscapes, and landmarks like Japan, Egypt, Brazil, Korea, New Zealand, Madagascar, North Pole, and Fiji. With 6700+ levels, Daily Missions, Weekly Air Balloon and Pet Events, and dozens of new card designs, this is the biggest Solitaire Story game yet!

title: Stickman Leave Prison
description: You take control of two characters in Stickman Leave jail, a new entry in the stickman jail series. Your goal is to guide them to the level's finish as they search for the corresponding colored keys to unlock the door. The objective is to evade capture by the guards. Collect money spread over the level to unlock new, more skilled skins. As you go around the game, leap and avoid harmful things to arrive safely.

title: Celebrity Spring Manicure Design
description: Step into the glamour of ‘Celebrity Spring Manicure Design’! Explore a world of trendy nail art, vibrant colors, and chic designs. Join celebrities in setting the trend for spring nails. Elevate your style with creative manicures, from floral elegance to modern motifs. Immerse yourself in the art of nail fashion and transform your fingertips into a canvas of spring-inspired beauty.

title: Sticker Jam Peel Off & Match
description: Play Sticker Jam, the ultimate matching puzzle game! Peel vibrant stickers, match colors, and solve fun challenges. Relax and unwind with this unique blend of calming gameplay and brain-teasing puzzles. Perfect for hours of entertainment—start playing now!

title: Live 100 Days
description: Survive 100 days in a chaotic life simulation where every choice matters. Manage danger, resources, and unexpected events as you try to stay alive for as long as possible.

title: Soft Girls Winter Aesthetics
description: Hop on a plane and spend your winter vacation traveling around the world together with your favorite princesses. Discover fun winter activities and practice your fashion advisor skills while helping them choose their outfits of the day in the Soft Girls Winter Aesthetics for girls! Have a blast!

title: Color Nuts & Bolts Puzzle
description: Color Nuts & Bolts Puzzle is a fun and engaging puzzle game that challenges your spatial imagination and color-matching skills! Match colorful screws to their corresponding nuts and watch as your puzzle-solving skills bring vibrant images to life. Perfect for players of all ages, this game offers hours of brain-teasing fun with a visually satisfying reward at the end of each challenge. Test your logic, precision, and creativity in this unique puzzle-solving adventure!

title: Puppy Merge
description: Puppy Merge is a unique merge game where you must grab and combine identical puppies to create a new and bigger one. Puppies will fall automatically into the arena; what you must do is drag the puppies around and merge them into identical ones. Don't let the puppies fall outside the box, or the game will end. You can try to catch the puppy and bring it back to the arena if the puppy falls.

title: Bolts and Nuts - Puzzle
description:
An educational and exciting game in which you can test your logical and strategic thinking.
Solve unique puzzles to while away the time and relax with excellent soundtrack. A bright and exciting game is perfect not only for children, but will also give you the opportunity to test your skills in solving difficult problems for adults.

title: Pocket Parking
description: Get all the cars out of the parking lot wthin the time limit! The car goes straight forward and backward. Move it in a direction where there are no walls or cars.

title: Connect Balls New Year Puzzles!
description: ● This New Year's game is more difficult than it might seem ?! You have a playing field? on which you need to throw balls and connect the same ones??! Until you get the biggest and most beautiful one?! Save up points?! Compete with friends and colleagues to become the best?! Enjoy your game?!

title: Thief Puzzle
description: Thief Puzzle is a clever 2D puzzle logic game that puts your problem-solving and strategy to the test. You control a sneaky thief’s hand as it reaches for valuable treasures, but the path is filled with complex traps, laser security systems, and tricky obstacles.
genre: Basketball, Bike, Car, Casual, Controller, Browser Game

title: Triple Sort 3D Home Design
description: Welcome to the world of Triple Sort 3D: Home Design, where matching meets decorating! Dive in the puzzle-solving with and begin crafting a virtual space of your dreams. Get ready to transform ugly and cluttered rooms  into clean and cozy spaces! Discover the perfect blend of challenges, creativity, and an epic makeover journey that awaits you!

title: 2048Skill Edition
description: Ini adalah permainan kesenangan untuk 2.048, dan terutama kami telah menambahkan permainan dan keterampilan baru yang memungkinkan pengguna untuk mengalami 2048 berbeda.

title: Push The Colors
description: Push the Color game features colorful squares, obstacles, and color gates. It is a 2-player casual game where you can find various costumes during the adventure. The goal is to get the cubes to the finish line and challenge the giant at the end. The more cubes you have, the more power you will possess. You can defeat the color monster by having many cubes. Make wise choices along the way and increase the number of cubes in your possession.

title: Eye Art Perfect Makeup Artist
description: Eye Art Perfect Makeup Artist is a very sophisticated makeup game. This game has an eye makeup  theme that is very targeted. This game has 26 levels, which means there are 26 types of eye makeup  for you to choose from. No matter what style of makeup you prefer, you can find one that satisfies  you in this game. Want to know more about this game?

title: Bunny Boy Online
description: Play the exciting online game. Variety of weapons, grenades, maps to choose from, various game modes, dynamic gameplay. Play with friends to the game!

title: Head Basketball
description: With exceptional shots, Head Basketball is a simple yet entertaining basketball game. The ball must be shot into the hoop of your opponent. Two points for each shot. It is imperative that you surpass your rivals in points before the time runs out.

title: Scroll and Spot
description: Experience the joy of the holidays with Scroll and Spot, a unique Christmas-themed puzzle game! Explore two beautifully crafted images as you scroll to uncover five subtle differences hidden within.The scrolling feature keeps both images perfectly aligned, making it a dynamic and immersive puzzle experience. Challenge your observation skills and celebrate the holiday spirit with every discovery!

title: Girl Rescue Dragon Out
description: In Girl Rescue: Dragon Out!, evil dragons and sneaky snakes are threatening a helpless girl. Only you can save her! This exciting rescue puzzle game blends shooting, colorful match mechanics, and epic boss battles into one exciting adventure! Click on the correct color cannon to destroy the corresponding color part of this flying dragon.

title: Chicken shooter io
description: SUPER COOL SHOOTER game, in which you will plunge into exciting fights with chickens, roosters and chickens. Your task is to choose the best equipment and make full use of your shooting skills to defeat other characters in this feathered battle!

title: Authentic Football
description:
3D modeling technology is employed to construct a lifelike football field, encompassing elements such as the green pitch, goalposts, and stands, thereby creating an immersive match atmosphere.
The player and football models also boast a high level of intricacy. The players' movements are smooth and natural, and the flight path of the football adheres to the laws of physics, enabling players to feel as if they are in a real - life football match.

title: Choo Choo Spider Monster Train
description:
Welcome to the most terrifying train ride of your life!
Cho-Cho Scary Charles: Spider Train is a chilling open-world survival horror shooter where your only lifeline is a small yellow train armed with a machine gun and a whole lot of courage.
Face off against Charles — the monstrous spider-train hybrid that haunts a remote island, preying on unsuspecting humans. No one knows where he came from, but one thing is clear — he won't stop until he's fed.

title: Ultra Pixel Survive 2
description:
Command heroes with unique abilities, gather natural resources to produce materials, then build and develop your military defenses.
Enemy hordes will attack the village, challenging your strategic and tactical abilities to survive. Explore dark underground dungeons and battle against gigantic bosses!
Features
Build and upgrade your resources and heroes
Set up defenses, hunt, cook, and much more
Unlock new characters
Action RPG and survival gameplay
Beautiful epic fantasy pixel art

title: Shanghai Town
description:
Mahjong matching game!
If you select the same mahjong block, it will be removed.
Please remove the last block!
Match the tiles to create a cool building!
Collect the buildings and create a cool city!

title: Sword Play! Ninja Slice Runner
description:
Become a legendary kunai master in this thrilling combination of dynamic gameplay and classic ninja action. Play offline and enjoy the freedom to dive into the adventure whenever you want. Slice through foes, overcome obstacles, and set out on an epic ninja quest without boundaries.

Will you seize the blade and claim your place as the ultimate ninja warrior?

title: Butterfly Kyodai Rainbow
description: Play Butterfly Kyodai Rainbow – a relaxing and colorful butterfly-matching puzzle game with fresh mechanics and vibrant rainbow visuals! Enjoy hundreds of exciting levels, earn daily rewards, take part in special events, and unlock beautiful new wings. A fun Mahjong-style connect game for all ages – no download required!

title: Stick Hero Fight
description: Enter the most nervous stickman battles. In Stick Hero Fight, you as a mighty stickman hero. Fight through waves of enemies using incredible battle skills. This action game lets you upgrade your hero and unleash devastating attacks to dominate every fight! Use punches, weapons, and powerful skills to deliver deadly attacks.

title: Kings and Queens Match 2
description: Kings and Queens Match 2 is one of the most anticipated Match 3 sequels! This long-awaited second chapter features 2,500+ incredible levels full of magic and adventure. Join Princess Bella on a magical adventure, matching jewels and crowns to uncover hidden treasures. Create powerful boosters like Royal Bombs, hammers, and arrows to clear obstacles and win big.
