Stunning graphics and an enchanting soundtrack bring the kingdom to life. Get ready for a royal journey full of fun and surprises!

title: Connect Image
description: Play an exciting puzzle game about rainbow friends and other characters! You just need to assemble a picture of the parts.The game is similar to both puzzles and games in the style of "dop". Use logic, turn on your brains, pump attention and ingenuity!

title: Geometry Wave Hero
description: Geometry Wave Hero is an exciting rhythm-based game that takes players on a thrilling journey through a vibrant color world. This game offers a unique twist on the classic Geometry Dash formula, focusing exclusively on the wave game mode. Players must navigate their wave through a series of challenging obstacles, using simple one-touch mechanics to control its movement.

title: SCP 173 Escape
description: Step into the role of SCP-173 and break free from the Foundation’s control in a tense stealth experience built around a deadly rule: you can MOVE only when no one is LOOKING at you. Hide in the shadows, avoid patrols, and choose the perfect moment to dash through dark corridors where every mistake leads to capture.

title: Blockapolypse Zombie Shooter
description: Blockapolypse: Zombie Shooter is a defense shooting simulation game with 3D pixel undead creatures. To defend this position, you need to use weapons to defend incoming zombies from 3 directions. After you kill all zombies, you still need to defeat a giant undead creature. As long as you lose all of your HP, you will lose the game. When you earn enough gold coins, you can buy better weapons in the gun shop. Good luck and survive!

title: Offline FPS Royale
description:
Embark on a perilous journey in Offline FPS Royale, a brand new 3D shooter where you must fight for your life by eliminating every person you come across. You will get closer to finishing the map with every person you remove.

Kill foes from every angle in battle royale games as a stealthy assassin with the most captivating sniper experience.

title: Is it right
description:
This puzzle game will challenge your wits and attentiveness - do it right!
Look for pumping logic, look for the right colors, go through levels, open skins!

title: Stickman Troll Thief Puzzle
description: Thief Puzzle is a funny and addictive casual puzzle game. Here you should help a clever stickman with many funny ways to solve puzzles and steal target items. The rich and varied game scene contains many unexpected obstacles and traps, testing your intelligence and logical thinking. Each level of the game is a unique challenge. To make flexible movements of the character to overcome obstacles, avoid enemies, and successfully steal the target item.

title: Hidden Objects: Island Secrets
description: Hidden Objects: Island Secrets is an exciting hidden object game where magic and time intertwine in a thrilling adventure. Everything changes when a mysterious magical crystal activates, scattering objects across time.
genre: Basketball, Bike, Car, Casual, Controller, Browser Game

title: Backrooms Skibidi terrors
description:
Backrooms Skibidi Toilet Terrors is an action terror game, run and grab the coin.
Avoid skibidi toilet and try to escape! only few people can survive

title: Among Squid Challenge Online
description: All players, get ready. They are hiding in a maze. To win the game, you must defeat all the other players. You have a knife and must defeat everyone. Catch the players one by one and make sure they are eliminated. Don’t worry, they won’t find you. If they try to find you, hide in the ventilation holes. Defeat all the players. Be careful, and whatever you do, don't reveal yourself. If they catch you, you will lose and they will defeat you.

title: RobyBox - Space Station Warehouse
description:
Your main task is to place boxes in their designated places to open doors and advance through the levels. Be on the alert! Aggressive bots will chase you. You can destroy them with a powerful arsenal including drill, disks, mines and rockets. Traps are scattered throughout the levels - use them to your advantage by luring the bots into dangerous areas. 
When you need a break from the intense gameplay, head to the warehouse where you can earn gold and solve Sokoban-style puzzles in peace.

title: Sausage Man Shooting Adventure
description: Dive into a hilarious and action-packed adventure. Sausage Man Shooting Adventure is a fast-paced side-scrolling shooting game where you control a crazy, energetic sausage hero and blast through waves of enemies. Run forward, dodge traps, jump platforms, and shoot enemies with nonstop excitement! Collect airdrops to increase your damage.

title: Ultimate Plants TD
description: Ultimate Plants TD is an army of plants to protect your garden from countless zombies. Your goal is to protect your garden from challenging waves of zombies. Experimenting with different plant combinations and positioning is the key to maximizing your defense capabilities and overcoming tough challenges!

title: Drunk But Not Wasted Knight
description: Stumble into a moonlit alley and befriend a tipsy yet oddly wise knight in this comedic medieval visual novel. Banter, make choices, and nudge affection as you chase stories, dodge trouble, and unlock quirky endings.

title: Backgammon Online
description: Backgammon Online is a casual game adapted from the original board game for online players. This is a game of logic that allows you to play the classic and ancient board game of backgammon against other players worldwide.
genre: Basketball, Bike, Car, Casual, Controller, Browser Game

title: Madness: Sheriff’s Compound OFFICIAL
description:
Madness: Sheriff's Compound is a thrilling, action-packed survival game where players must navigate a chaotic compound overrun by anarchy and danger. Set in a gritty, lawless frontier, the game pits players against waves of unpredictable enemies, demanding quick reflexes, sharp strategy, and resourceful thinking to survive.

Madness: Sheriff’s Compound OFFICIAL is the one and only authentic game of the Madness series, available on gamedistribution.com and itch

title: Nail Queen
description: Play Nail Salon Queen, the ultimate makeover and manicure game loved by US teens! Design beautiful nail art, run your own salon, and complete fashion challenges with glitter, polish, and gems. Perfect for players searching “nail salon game,” “manicure game,” or “fashion makeover,” this fun beauty challenge lets you style nails like a pro. With colorful levels, creative designs, and endless glam, it’s the best free nail game for fashion fans and students everywhere!

title: Balls Vs Lasers
description: Begin a wonderful arcade challenge. In Balls Vs Lasers, your skill and reaction speed will be limited. Control two balls and avoid incoming lasers. Flexible avoiding and challenging your extreme operation. Control the movement of the two balls and avoid the oncoming laser attacks! Place balls of the same color against the corresponding laser.

title: Toilet Pin
description: Join the daily story of the toilet boy in the monster letter world. This new pin pulling game is for you. Let's explore Alphabet Lore with extraordinary characters! In the land of evil letters, you will have a chance to meet various amazing characters and powers of them: evil B ready to punch in your face, Angry C biting with sharp teeth, boring F with a gun, Crazy Z with fire, monster D who loves lava ....

title: Fashion Princess Dress Up
description: Fashion Princess: Dress Up is a casual game. With beautiful animations and sound effects, this game is sure to keep you hooked. Swipe left and right to control the character and choose the corresponding dress up according to the task to show off your matching trendy outfits, hairstyles, and make-up, you need to consider the theme of the fashion show, and the judge's preference. If your score is higher, you will win the battle and become the ultimate fashionista.

title: My Farm Empire
description: My Farm Empire is a fun and relaxing game that lets you create your own farm paradise on a beautiful island. You will become a farmer and grow various crops, from fruits and vegetables to flowers and herbs. You will also enjoy the stunning graphics, the smooth gameplay, and the rewarding progression system that will make you feel like a real farmer. My Farm Empire is more than just a game, it’s a lifestyle. Join the My Farm Empire today and start your farming adventure.

title: Burger Day
description: Burger Day is a fun and fast-paced arcade game that puts you in charge of a busy burger kitchen. Stack ingredients to serve up tasty orders as quickly as possible. Your speed and decision-making skills are tested as customer demands increase. Satisfy hungry customers to unlock fresh challenges and advance through exciting levels.

title: Tropical Merge
description: Dive into Tropical Merge, the ultimate merge game where you can create your tropical paradise! Immerse yourself in a vibrant world as you match and combine resources in three groups to craft exciting new items.
genre: Basketball, Bike, Car, Casual, Controller, Browser Game

title: Coin Stack Up
description:
Coin Stack Up is a colorful and satisfying puzzle game where strategy meets stacking fun!
Connect and stack coins of the same color to create powerful combinations and clear the board.
To make a valid move, you must connect at least 3 coins of the same color. The bigger the stack, the better the results! Each level comes with specific goals shown at the top of the screen - plan your moves carefully to complete them before you run out of moves.

title: Car Jam Escape
description: Car Jam Escape is a puzzle game where players clear a crowded parking lot by moving cars in the correct order. Each vehicle can only move forward in the direction it faces, so players must study the layout and plan carefully. The goal is to guide every car out without collisions or blockages. As levels progress, the puzzles become more complex, requiring logical thinking and strategy.

title: Merge Heroes Titans
description:
In this game, you will command squads of melee fighters and ranged archers fighting against waves of enemies. Your agility and strategic thinking will give you an edge to victory.

Unlock new powerful fighters and accurate archers by combining those available for purchase. Place them on the map according to abilities and win.

You will have to discover not only new characters, but also beautiful different worlds, enjoy our new game.

title: Grukkle Onslaught
description: Grukkle Onslaught: Defend the blue portal in this thrilling tower defense game! Strategically place towers to fend off waves of enemies and protect your gateway. Master strategy and quick thinking to emerge victorious. Play now and prove your skills!

title: Golden Frontier
description: This simulation game takes you on a Wild West adventure. Mine and manage resources, grow crops and craft goods as you aim to build a thriving city in the frontier lands. Invite friends to become your neighbors to trade and co-op, and progress quicker. Hunt for gold, unlock new locations, and discover secrets as the story unfolds. Meet a colorful cast of characters, including trappers, Indians and criminals.

title: Fireboy & Watergirl 7: and Friends
description:
Fireboy and Watergirl need help to explore this new temple. This time with 3 new friends that will help them solve the puzzles, beat the times and collect all the diamonds! 

Play alone or with a friend to join Fireboy and Watergirl in this new adventure!

Turn levers and push buttons to complete these 36 new levels of the official Fireboy and Watergirl series.

title: My Cottagecore Aesthetic Look
description: Welcome to the My Cottagecore Aesthetic Look game. Cottagecore fashion is inspired by farm life, it is very impractical for doing chores around the farm! Princess Elsa, Anna, and Ariel are best friends planning to try something special. Get ready to explore the Cottagecore fashion style along with them to create the cutest looks!

title: Brain Draw Line
description:
Brain Draw Line is a minimalist puzzle game where you must complete shapes using a single, continuous line. There are no timers or unnecessary distractions — the focus is purely on precision and planning. Each level presents a unique figure that you must finish without lifting your finger or mouse and without crossing the line twice.
The experience is calm, strategic, and rewarding — ideal for players who enjoy logic-based challenges.

title: Brainrot Merge
description:
Merge adorably weird Italian brainrot characters! 
Combine them to unlock rare (and even weirder) species. 
Build the ultimate brainrot paradise!

title: Garden Guardians
description:
A fun and strategic tower defense game that’s easy to pick up!
Tap directional arrows to launch seeds into flowerpots—each seed blossoms into a powerful flower ready to blast incoming zombies. Plan your moves, hold the line, and protect your garden from the undead horde!

title: Cooking Stories: Fun cafe game
description:
Become the host of the popular transformation cooking show — Cooking Stories! You are not just a chef, you are a culinary genius, a style master, and an interior designer. Participants come to you at their most desperate moment: they urgently need help — and only you can change and save their lives!

But that’s not all...  
Take a peek behind the scenes of the TV show: intrigue, emotions, unexpected twists — all this in the game Cooking Stories!

title: Hidden Objects Bakery
description: Explore 6 charming bakery shops in this fun hidden object game! With 24 exciting levels, find 6 hidden bakery items in each shop before time runs out. Perfect for all ages, enjoy the challenge and discover delicious treats in every corner. Can you find them all before time runs out?

title: Stellar Swarm
description: Pilot a neon starship through endless waves of geometric enemies. Choose your starting weapon, unlock new ones, upgrade your arsenal through branching skill trees, and push toward powerful evolutions.
genre: Basketball, Bike, Car, Casual, Controller, Browser Game

title: 4 Colors Card Mania
description:
4 Colors Card Mania is a thrilling and fast-paced card game inspired by the uno gameplay. Challenge against AI opponents in this colorful and strategic showdown.
Can you outwit your opponents and become the 4 Colors Card Mania champion? 
Shuffle the deck, deal the cards, and get ready for a colorful adventure!

title: Peg Solitaire
description: Engage your mind with the classic puzzle game, Peg Solitaire. The objective is simple yet challenging: clear the board by jumping pegs over each other until only one peg remains. This timeless game tests your strategic thinking and planning skills, offering various levels of difficulty to keep you entertained.

title: Color Strings
description: Looking for a simple way to exercise your brain every day? Try Color Strings! This game features straightforward rules and fun, challenging gameplay. In this puzzle game, you need to rearrange the strings on the dots to match the given pattern. With various puzzle levels, you'll keep your brain sharp in just a few minutes each day.

title: Cowboys Duel
description: In this fast-paced cowboy showdown, players can either compete solo or engage in a thrilling duel against a friend, testing their reflexes and quick draw skills. Will you answer the call to become the fastest and most skilled cowboy around?

title: Block Sniper
description:
Pixelated sniper action game where you have to complete various missions in a blocky world. 
Game where you are a sniper who performs various missions in a block-based world.

title: Baby Penguin Fishing
description: Tiny Fishing is a fun and addictive 2D puzzle fishing simulation game that challenges your skills. Enjoy this charming game as you explore a fishing adventure. The game has two modes: Fishing and Trawling. In Fishing mode, you cast your line by clicking on each fish’s body and catch them quickly to advance to the next level. In Trawling mode, you release the net by clicking on the desired area and capture everything within it. You also have to complete the objective fast.

title: Conquer.io
description: Expand your zone and assert your dominance over every territory on the map. Plan your moves to outmaneuver opponents and gain as much space as possible. But beware, your rivals will stop at nothing to thwart your plans. Are you ready to claim your space?

title: Interior Designer - Decor Life
description: Interior Designer: Unpacking House is a delightful and relaxing casual game that allows you to explore your creativity through interior design. Whether you’re tackling specific challenges or letting your imagination run wild, this game offers an immersive experience where you can design beautiful spaces and create captivating aesthetics.

title: Brick Game Classic
description: Brick Game Classic is a classic Tetris online game. If you are a fan of classic games, then this game that has been popular for many years is just right for you. When any row or column is filled, it is eliminated. You can change the shape of the cubes before they fall to eliminate them quickly. You can also make them fall faster if you are satisfied with their shape.  Now join the world of fun games.

title: Mine FPS shooter: Noob Arena
description: Enter dynamic arenas packed with relentless enemies, each wave more challenging than the last! Equip yourself with 7 different weapons and 5 types of armor to face off against diverse foes. With unique square graphics and three arenas to conquer, gear up for the ultimate boss battle at the end!

title: World Flags Trivia
description: Challenge your geography skills in World Flags Trivia! Identify the nation for each flag from three choices across 194 questions. Perfect your skills as you progress through increasingly tricky questions. Can you score a perfect game and become a true flag expert? Play now and find out!

title: Offroad Climb 4x4
description:
Welcome to "Offroad Climb 4x4", where the hills are alive with the roar of engines! This isn't just a game; it's an off-road odyssey. Imagine climbing up hills, navigating through a scrapyard of cars, scaling rocky terrains, and conquering snow-laden paths.

Whether you're a hardcore off-road enthusiast or just looking for some casual hill-climbing fun, "Offroad Climb 4x4" has something for everyone. So, buckle up, start your engines, and let the off-road adventure begin!

title: Liquid Sort Deluxe
description: Liquid Sort Deluxe is a relaxing and addictive color sorting puzzle game where you sort colorful liquids into tubes until each tube contains only one color. Plan your moves carefully and challenge your brain with unlimited levels. Unlock an extra tube by watching a short reward ad to make the puzzle easier, or get unlimited time to complete tricky levels.

title: Italian Brainrot Baby Clicker
description: Get ready for the cutest twist on the viral Brainrot universe! Italian Brainrot Baby Clicker is the baby-themed sequel to the hit Brainrot Clicker! Tap your way through the baby versions of your favorite characters, collect upgrades, and enjoy a whole new atmosphere with colorful visuals, cheerful music, and fresh sound effects designed to fit the playful baby theme!

title: Beach Soccer
description: Immerse yourself in a fun-filled beach adventure where your goal is to aim and shoot the ball into the goal while collecting starfish for maximum points. With over 20 challenging levels, you'll need to think strategically to navigate obstacles like crabs and sandcastles. Enjoy a vibrant beach setting complete with golden sand, coconut trees, and a soothing soundtrack.

title: Color Block Jam 2
description: Play Color Block Jam 2 free online in your browser with no download and no install required. This free online puzzle game lets you slide colorful blocks into matching gates through smart logic levels designed to test your brain and timing. Perfect for fans of cool math games, unblocked games, and quick school breaks, it loads fast and works smoothly on desktop and mobile. Enjoy relaxing color block puzzles anytime, anywhere, completely free.

title: Push The Frog
description: Control your little frog to eat all the mosquitoes. Master the length of the frog's tongue and make the frog reach the appropriate position to eat the mosquitoes. Think carefully about planning the route. The game has a simple and interesting style, and the gameplay is educational and novel. It is very suitable for playing when killing time.

title: Mahjongg Solitaire
description: Mahjongg Solitaire is an online mahjong puzzle board game that features traditional rules and modern visuals. There are no shuffles, and the game is timed, but the game's pace is relaxed.
genre: Basketball, Bike, Car, Casual, Controller, Browser Game

title: Vortex io
description:
Play Vortex.io for free! Swallow everything in your path and become the biggest vortex in this fast-paced io game.

Vortex.io is a competitive .io game where you control a growing vortex that can swallow objects, vehicles, and even other players. As you absorb more items, your size increases, making you more powerful in the arena. The game features smooth controls and intense gameplay, requiring quick reflexes and smart movement to survive and dominate your rivals in real time.

title: Bimka Drive - Smash cars into splinters!
description: Game created in the style of racing, where you will have no restrictions. But it's not that simple. The fact is that the basis here is based on the physics of actions, because every collision of your car with any obstacle will significantly affect its both external and internal condition. The damage model is made very realistically. Your choice will be a variety of different types of car models that you can test on all kinds of racing tracks. The game is very similar to "BeamNG Drive".

title: Mojicon Winter Connect
description:
The Mojicon series returns for the holidays! Match festive tiles, break the new Ice Sheet blockers, and enjoy a relaxing winter puzzle adventure. ❄️
Mojicon Winter Connect takes the classic Onet matching fun you love and covers it in a layer of fresh snow. Immerse yourself in a cozy holiday atmosphere, connecting festive icons like reindeer, gingerbread men, and happy snowmen.
Fast, satisfying, and full of seasonal charm – it’s the perfect winter puzzle for all ages. ✨✨✨

title: My Happy farm
description: Welcome to farm land game – the ultimate farming adventure that brings the beauty of rural life, the challenge of resource management, and the excitement of running your very own farm straight to your browser. The game is not just about clicking and waiting; it’s about strategy, timing, and smart decisions. Do you invest in farms first or focus on crops? Should you expand your land or upgrade your equipment? Every choice matters.

title: Bubble it jam
description: Bubble it jam is a vibrant, fast-paced puzzle-shooter game where players aim and shoot colored balls to match and pop clusters of the same color.the goal is to collect color bubble, free the ropes, and complete each level. Every stage presents a new and exciting challenge, keeping gameplay fresh and engaging, combining strategy, quick reflexes, and a bit of luck for high scores.

title: Island Expander
description:
Island Expander — relaxing crafting game. Collect resources, discover 30+ recipes, and grow your island step by step!
It is a cozy crafting game where you transform a tiny island into a paradise.
Collect resources, unlock recipes, craft items — from simple tools to complex machines — and watch your island grow with every step.

Start building your dream island today! ?

title: Slime Attack: Puzzle!
description: In this complete action, the play-heading playing you have to choose the right arrows and hit the corresponding slugs until it became too late. Calculate the time of shots, select colors and bring down arrows on top to protect your kingdom!

title: Monster School 3
description: Continuation of the Monster School series from the creators of Noob vs Pro games. Teacher gave the school students a new challenge, this time the monsters will have to draw to survive!

title: Wood Nuts Master: Screw Puzzle
description:
In this physics-based innovative puzzle game, your objective is to strategically place screws and nuts to fall all the wooden blocks.
Unleash your cognitive ability as you tackle each brain-teasing level, each one designed to test your problem-solving skills. From simple puzzles to complex constructions, this 2D puzzle game offers an array of challenges suitable for puzzle enthusiasts of all ages.

title: Pim Path
description:
Reach the trophy at the end of the level to win, but it's not as easy as it might seem. You can't fall off the platforms; spikes and blades will be everywhere, making the levels more challenging. One wrong step and it's game over.
You'll need to stay calm, pay attention, be agile, have good reflexes, and most importantly, don't get angry.

title: LABUBU MERGE CLICKER
description:
Enter the wacky world of Labubu and the Monster Crew — merge mischievous Labubus, unlock rare forms, and climb your way to the top!
Boom! Crash! Roar! The gang’s all here — how far can you go before the box overflows?

title: NSR Street Car Racing
description:
Hit the Streets & Dominate the Race! 
Jump into heart-pounding street racing action! Customize powerful cars, master drifts, unleash nitro boosts, and challenge real players in multiplayer races and intense 1v1 duels. Become a street-racing legend!

Ready, Set, Drift!

title: Click Click Clicker
description: Click Click Clicker is a single-player, idle clicker game where you earn money by clicking the button on the screen. Unlock various buttons, cursor styles, themes, and music.

title: Athena Match 2
description: Athena Match 2 - the epic sequel returns! Join the goddess Athena on a new mythical journey through ancient Greece. Match 3 or more legendary artifacts to restore temples and unlock the secrets of the gods. Enjoy stunning visuals, immersive sound, and hundreds of new levels packed with daily missions and challenges. Step into the world of Greek mythology and prove your match-3 skills in this divine adventure!

title: Zip Zap
description: Step into the fascinating world of Zip Zap, a unique online physics puzzle game that blends mechanics, movement, and precision. Tap, twist, and control your way through clever levels filled with moving parts and intricate structures. Every stage tests your timing and creativity — can you reach every target? Play for free on desktop or mobile and enjoy a perfectly balanced mix of challenge and relaxation.

title: Fish rain 2
description:
"Cast and pull!" is the motto of this fishing game. Everything is real here: the sounds in the locations, and the online chat. Share your legendary trophies with other players, show off your catch, and name the weight and type of fish.

 Try to catch a pike or a catfish, a perch or a minnow, or maybe a carp or a sturgeon?

 Fish in different locations: on a rocky shore or on the Pripyat River. Use a variety of baits, from worms to live bait and leeches.

title: Nuts & Bolts Puzzle
description:
Play Nuts and Bolts Game, the new brain-challenging puzzle to challenge and test your IQ. Train your mind while relaxing with multiple levels of our game.
Become the master of logic puzzles and enjoy the creative gameplay we have prepared especially for you.

title: Color Sand Puzzle
description: Welcome to Color Sand Puzzle! Relax and unwind with Color Sand Puzzle, a refreshing take on the classic block puzzle game! Your mission is simple yet fun—fill the grid with matching colors of sand to clear and control the lines. As colorful sand blocks fall from the top, you’ll need to strategically arrange them to form complete horizontal rows. When the sand lines up from left to right, they disappear, and you earn points!

title: Farm Blast
description: Farm Blast is a colorful level-based blast puzzle game set on a vibrant farm. Complete exciting objectives, overcome tricky obstacles, and unlock powerful boosters as you progress through hundreds of engaging levels. With bright visuals, satisfying chain reactions, and strategic gameplay, this addictive casual puzzle game is perfect for fans of match-3 games, farm games, and relaxing yet challenging brain teasers.

title: Travel With Me: ASMR Edition
description: Prepare to jet-set across the world with Travel With Me: ASMR Edition! Join Lisa, the stylish vlogger, as she explores stunning destinations, allowing you to dress her up in fabulous outfits that match each location perfectly. From the serene temples of Thailand to the desert adventures in Dubai, and the tropical paradise of Maldives, challenge your fashion skills and create unforgettable looks for every occasion.

title: Bubble Shooter Witch Tower 2
description: Bubble Shooter: Witch Tower 2 brings back the magic in a fun, family-friendly way! Pop colorful bubbles, unlock cozy enchanted rooms, and help the Witch Tower shine again. Meet adorable familiars, enjoy charming details, and celebrate the magic of every season — even a touch of Halloween spookiness! Easy to play for all ages, with plenty of bubble-shooting fun to enjoy anytime.

title: Charger City Driver
description: Get ready to skid the wheels of a stunning muscle car through an expansive night city map! Customize and upgrade your muscle car with cool upgradables and become the best driver in the city. Take your dog with you in 4 driving challenges and conquer the missions together. Use nitro to beat slow traffic and beat all speed, stunt and drift triggers spread across the map. Are you ready to show your driving skills? Prove yourself!

title: Battler
description: Immerse yourself in the world of tactical card battles, where your victory depends on the right choice and combinations of skills! You are fighting against decks of treacherous enemies. Choose one of three unique characters and immerse yourself in exciting battles. Use the character editor to fine-tune your character, adding unique abilities.

title: Tri Peaks Emerland Solitaire
description:
Welcome to Tri Peaks Emerland Solitaire, the land of card magic! An incredible journey awaits you, in a beautiful world filled with dwarfs, elves, mermaids and many other amazing creatures.
Be the hero the world needs!
Welcome to Tri Peaks Emerland Solitaire, the land of card magic! An incredible journey awaits you, in a beautiful world filled with dwarfs, elves, mermaids and many other amazing creatures.

title: Openfront
description: Openfront.io is an IO battle game where you expand your territory, build up your economy, forge alliances, and drop bombs to dominate the map.How to Play OpenfrontBefore jumping in, you'll choose how you want to play.
genre: Basketball, Bike, Car, Casual, Controller, Browser Game

title: Doggo Jump
description: "Doggo Jump" is a charming hyper-casual platform game where players controls a playful puppy as it hops between platforms, collecting bones and racking up points. With simple tap-to-jump mechanics, colorful graphics, and an adorable dog character, the game is easy to pick up and addictive, making it perfect for quick gaming sessions.

title: Formula Racers
description: Formula Racers is the ultimate HTML5 browser top-down arcade racing game - no download required! Race on any device across 10 thrilling tracks, tackle dynamic lap tracking and real-time placement, and earn coins to unlock and upgrade cars (engine, gearbox, steering, brakes). This online racing game features HD graphics, responsive design, immersive SFX & music - perfect for mobile & desktop gamers seeking fast-paced, addictive arcade action!

title: Wool Sorting
description:
Wool Sorting is a super relaxing and addictive yarn-connecting puzzle game!
In LEVEL 2, slide and merge colorful wool segments to create perfect complete threads. Match colors and sequences with precision — simple to play, yet deeply satisfying!
Challenge yourself across LV.10, 15 & 20. Soothing, brain-teasing fun for any moment!

title: Flames & Fortune
description: Dive into "Flames & Fortune," a game inspired by Card Crawl, set in treacherous dungeons. Play as the Pyro-Paladin, mastering a deck of 54 cards to battle foes like goblins and dragons. Strategy determines survival and success brings gold to unlock new skills. Will you conquer the darkness for untold riches?

title: Hero Ragdoll Fighting
description:
Sahur Ragdoll Fighting Game is a dynamic action game in which you have to prove to everyone that Tung Tung Tung Sahur has no equal! ?

? Play as Sahur with a huge arsenal of weapons! Fight in different modes:
— Survival: defeat wave after wave of enemies
— Campaign: complete levels with different opponents and mechanics Maya

title: Solitaire Farm Seasons 3
description: Solitaire Farm: Seasons 3, the highly anticipated sequel, continues the charming farm theme of Seasons 1 and 2 with incredible 3,400+ levels! Train your brain with diverse solitaire puzzles while enjoying country life. Explore new scenes and travel to new countries. Grow new crops such as Gooseberry, Foxgloves, Celery, Papyrus, Loquat, Prickly Pears, Berseem, and Blackberries. Enjoy stunning visuals and engaging gameplay in this delightful solitaire adventure!

title: Labubu Doll Mukbang Asmr Unblocked
description: Welcome to Labubu Doll Mukbang Asmr Unblocked, a charming, casual ASMR game that combines the joy of food, cooking, and ASMR sounds! Experience as a talented baker and join the lovely Labubu on a mouthwatering adventure. In the game, you will take orders from your diners, each with unique requests for bread. From croissants to loaves of baguettes, you need to pack each bread for your customers on time.

title: Escape & Steal Brainrot: Sahur Hills
description:
Escape & Steal Brainrot: Sahur Hills is a tense survival horror where you roam a fog-covered forest to steal brainrot pages while being hunted by the relentless Sahur entity.
No weapons, no escape-only rising whispers, shifting woods, and the race to survive before the echoes of “TUNG TUNG TUNG SAHUR” close in.

title: Panda Shop Simulator
description: Do you love shopping at supermarkets? Now you can build your own! Play as a cute panda owner and grow your store from a small corner shop to a bustling retail empire. Earn money to hire assistants and upgrade facilities to the max level. Enjoy playful twist with adorable panda characters that make running your shop even more fun and exciting!

title: K-Wedding Dream
description: Immerse yourself in the atmosphere of Korean love with the heroes of this dressup-game. Become a part of a magical story where bright K-Pop stars are preparing for the most important day of their lives - Wedding day! Combine tradition and modern fashion by creating wedding looks for lovers. Choose the perfect makeup, hairstyle and jewelry to highlight their unique style and charm. Let each of your choices reflect the emotions and dreams of the characters, turning this day into a real fairy tale!

title: Live Star Doll Dress Up
description: Discover the makeover world of fashion and fun in Live Star Doll Dress Up Games! Immerse yourself in an interactive magic princess universe! In this dress-up anime simulator, you're in charge. Dress up your doll in trendy outfits. Get creative with makeup and personalize your cute doll!

title: UFO Attack
description: UFO Attack is a type of classic style arcade game, developed with Construct 3, abduct as many humans and pets as possible before they take you down, ideal for all ages.

title: Snow Rider 3D nostalgia
description: Snow Rider 3D: Nostalgia brings back the beloved old version of the iconic sleigh-riding game — the same thrilling ride, relaxing snow tracks, and joyful music that started it all.

title: Steal Items io
description:
Grab everything in your hands and steal items!
You play for a flexible and funny stickman who can't stand on his feet straight. You need to run faster to the largest and most expensive items in the houses, grab them and deliver them to the truck.
You have to steal a lot of items, because besides you, there are other stickmen running around the house who also want to rob this house. Beat them on points and collect more furniture.

title: Italian Brainrot Challenge
description: Welcome to the Italian Brainrot Challenge quiz game with the characters from Strange Animals! Choose your difficulty and test your knowledge of the Brainrot characters. Tap the correct answer from multiple choices and collect points as you go through the world of Italian Brainrot.

title: Secret Rooms
description: After entering one of the rooms you have to find all the hidden objects. The names of the items you need to find will appear on the left side. You need to concentrate well and find all the objects in the room. You have to watch the time, because if it runs out it will be game over. Try to get the maximum points and three stars in every room.

title: Snake Puzzle 3D
description:
Get ready to unravel a tangled knot of snakes to solve this puzzle! ?? Dive into the world of puzzle-solving games to become the legendary tangle master 3D! ??

Knock-knot! Who’s there? Riddle. Riddle who? Riddle me this: how do you unravel a twisted tangle of serpents? With your sharp puzzle-solving skills! ? Welcome to Snake Knot: Sort Puzzle Game where your logic and gaming skills will be tested! Sort serpents to unknot every twisted tangle and free every color snake!

title: VSCO Girl Aesthetic
description: Welcome to the VSCO Girl Aesthetic. Rainbow High school girls Sunny, Skyler, Ruby, and Violet are the trendy fashion girls. They planned to try VSCO fashion which is trending all over social media. Join and browse their wardrobe to pick some suitable outfits for the girls. Play and Have fun!

title: Moto Cabbie Simulator
description: Welcome to Moto Cabbie Simulator, where the thrill of the open road meets the fast-paced world of urban transportation! In this exhilarating and immersive gaming experience, players take on the role of a daring motorcycle taxi rider navigating the bustling streets of a vibrant city.

title: Idle Dice 3D: Incremental Game
description:
In this game, you roll dice and accumulate coins. Upgrade dice to generate more coins, even when you are not actively playing (Offline earnings).

Idle Dice 3D stands out with its variety of dice: from classic six-sided to dice with 2, 4, 8, 10, 12, and 20 sides. Aim for combinations like pairs, triples, straights, and more to increase profit.

The Prestige system allows you to reset your progress to boost future earnings, adding a strategic element to the game. The game also has achievements.

title: Klondike Solitaire
description:
Test your skill and logic with Klondike, the classic solitaire game loved by generations!

Stack the cards in ascending order, alternating colors, and complete all four suits to win the game.

With clean graphics, intuitive controls, and the option to play with one or three cards, Klondike offers hours of fun and relaxation.

Perfect for a quick break or a long strategic challenge!

title: AOD - Art Of Defense
description: AOD - Art of Defence is a casual tower defense game set in a post-apocalyptic world. As Commander of the A.O.D squad, you lead the charge against Mr.
genre: Basketball, Bike, Car, Casual, Controller, Browser Game

title: Bunnys Farm
description: Embark on a delightful fruit match-3 adventure with Bunny's Farm: Zen Match Master. Join your cheerful companion, Bunny, as you traverse diverse landscapes—from lush meadows and snowy peaks to desert dunes and tropical beaches. Match juicy fruits like oranges and peaches to solve engaging puzzles, uncover enchanting stories, and unlock new chapters in this relaxing yet challenging journey.

title: Pipe Puzzle: Connect & Flow
description:
Pipe Puzzle: Connect & Flow – Relaxing Brain Teaser
Connect the pipes, let the water flow, and solve hundreds of satisfying puzzles!
Pipe Puzzle: Connect & Flow is a relaxing and addictive puzzle game where your mission is simple: fix the pipes and restore the flow of water. Perfect for all ages, it's the ultimate brain exercise you can play anytime, anywhere.

title: Unstack Tower
description: Unstack Tower is a puzzle game that challenges players to dismantle a tower of colorful cubes in the correct order. Every move matters—remove or drop blocks carefully to keep the structure stable while freeing space for the next step. Different block materials such as glass or wood add variety and difficulty, making each level unique. With its blend of strategy and reflex-based gameplay, Unstack Tower offers a mix of tension and fun that keeps players engaged.

title: War Mahjong
description: War Mahjong (Tiles of the Unexpected) is a mahjong-style tile-matching game with a war theme. Although it's not like typical mahjong games, your objective is to clear the tiles by clicking on groups with the same image.
genre: Basketball, Bike, Car, Casual, Controller, Browser Game

title: Mahjong Lines
description: Mahjong Lines is a relaxing logic puzzle in the mahjong connect style. Find matching tile pairs and clear the board by linking them with a valid path. With classic mahjong tiles, simple rules, hints, and lots of levels, it’s perfect for both quick sessions and thoughtful puzzle-solving.

title: Sky Maze Challenge
description: Perfect your jumps, defy gravity, and showcase your unmatched eye-hand coordination. Sky Maze Challenge demands precision and timing to overcome all of the traps and obstacles to conquer

title: Galaxy Carnage
description: Battle in space with countless enemies and their bosses coming in waves. Lots of weapons, lots of lasers, lots of explosions and effects. Upgrade the starship to the most powerful machine for exterminating alien invaders.

title: Knit Rescue
description:
Knit Rescue is an engaging and original puzzle game where you untangle a knitted dragon to save a frightened kitten.

But it’s not enough to simply tap the right spools. You must unlock the correct spools and move them in the right direction to stop the dragon in time.

Plan your moves, follow the arrows, and solve each level using logic and strategy. Knit Rescue is the perfect casual puzzle game for fans of brain games, logic puzzles, and strategy games.

title: Office Spider Solitaire
description: Your objective in Office Spider Solitaire is to clear the table by creating suited sets from king to ace. The game has either one, two or four suits depending on the difficulty setting.

title: Army Base Of America
description: This military tycoon game combines base management, soldier training, and territorial conquest into one action-packed experience.Train your soldiers and improve their combat abilitiesUpgrade your troops with better equipment and stronger statsBuild and expand your military camp to grow your armyFight against enemy forces in strategic battlesCapture enemy territories and expand your control across the mapManage your resources and strengthen your war operationsLead your army to victory and protect America from hostile forces
genre: Basketball, Bike, Car, Casual, Controller, Browser Game

title: Car Mechanic Simulator 2025
description:
In "Car Mechanic Simulator 2025", you are a master restorer who breathes new life into forgotten cars! 

Your task is to find old, broken, and abandoned cars, disassemble them down to the last screw, repair them, replace parts, and reassemble them, turning rusty piles of metal into shiny legends of the automotive industry. Search for rare spare parts, restore engines, choose the perfect paint, and bring every detail to perfection.

title: Slope Snowball
description: Slope SnowBall is an intriguing endless-running game with a winter theme. Your aim is to roll a snowball as far as possible down slopes full of hazards!

title: Kingdom Cats
description: Become friends with the King of Cats and build a whole kingdom together! Dive into a colorful, exciting world where you can fully demonstrate your creativity!

title: Smoke Trail
description:
Drift and earn in this fast-paced 2D endless drifting game!
Master the art of controlled slides across an ever-changing track. Rack up cash by chaining stylish drifts and maintaining momentum—then use your earnings to unlock a growing collection of iconic drift cars, each with its own unique stats and feel. But it’s not just about the money—complete challenges to test your skill, and unlock a special car.

Easy to pick up, hard to master—how far can you go before you crash?

title: Hidden Objects: Island Secrets
description: Hidden Objects: Island Secrets is an exciting hidden object game where magic and time intertwine in a thrilling adventure. Everything changed when a mysterious magical crystal activated, scattering objects across time! You'll enter a world of riddles, hidden objects, and temporal paradoxes.

title: Italian Animal Alchemy - Brainrot
description:
Dive into a world of crazy Italian creatures, where logic meets memes! Combine animals and objects to create the strangest and funniest Italian mutants!
A true meme zoo awaits you here, where creativity knows no bounds! Experiment, discover rare mutants, and share your results with friends to prove you have the most epic brainrot.

title: Happy Town
description:
In Happy Town you have to lead your own city and make its inhabitants happy!

Becoming the mayor of your happy city is very simple! Combine items, upgrade buildings, complete tasks for residents, communicate with them, expand and enjoy a vibrant style and soundtrack. Residents are waiting for you!

title: Merge Balls New Years Toys in 3D!
description: ● A game with a New Year's atmosphere! Compete with friends and colleagues?! In the game you have a play area? where balls fall and connect if they have the same color! Connect as many balls as possible to make the biggest one, save up points?! Be the first on the leaderboard?! Play and relax ?!

title: Hexa Sort Master
description:
Let's sort some hexa blocks on the hexa tiles. Hexa blocks consist of colorful pieces. Place the same colored pieces side by side and match them to stack all hexas over one tile.
A great puzzle game begins with colorful hexa blocks! Sort the stacks side by side and try to destroy them making hexa towers. Match the same colors with each other. Exercise and improve your brain skills. More than 200 levels are waiting for you!

title: Mind Games: Math Crosswords
description:
Mind Games: Math Crosswords is a game to improve your math skills. It is a great way to spend your time. 
The player's mission is to save the planet from extinction. The aliens have destroyed all the plants on the planet. However, humans have found a solution. Engineers have built ships that convert brain activity into life-giving energy to grow plants. By solving mathematical problems, you are contributing to the restoration of plants and the regeneration of our planet.

title: Tiny Baker Rainbow Buttercream Cake
description: Whip up layers of color and sweetness in Tiny Baker Rainbow Buttercream Cake! Mix, bake, and frost your way to the perfect rainbow treat, then finish with cute decorations that make your cake sparkle with charm.

title: Fight for the Tree
description:
The gaming world is facing a serious tree crisis. Evil forces are running wild, and the trees are in great danger.
As a player, your mission is to protect these precious trees. Even when you're offline, your character will keep fighting to safeguard the trees, constantly accumulating experience and resources.
In the game, there's also a group of cute little sapling creatures imprisoned by the evil forces. You need to rescue them one by one through battles, explorations, and so on.

title: Merge Beasts
description: A fun and addictive merge game where you combine cute and quirky beasts to create stronger and rarer creatures. Each merge brings you closer to discovering powerful evolutions and unlocking new surprises. Collect coins, upgrade your beasts, and watch your monster city grow!

title: Farm Ring Idle
description: Farm Ring Idle is a circular farming simulation that challenges you to expand outward from a tiny central plot into a thriving, automated ring of crops. Grow vegetables, unlock smart upgrades, and deploy robotic helpers to streamline your harvest.
genre: Basketball, Bike, Car, Casual, Controller, Browser Game

title: Block Builder Jam
description: Block Builder Jam is a physics-based puzzle game that blends logic with creativity. Your goal is to drop blocks and fit them into the outlined shape on the screen. Each block falls according to real physics, so precision and timing matter. As levels progress, shapes become more complex and demand sharper planning. With its simple mechanics and engaging challenges, Block Builder Jam offers a satisfying mix of strategy and experimentation.

title: Animerge
description:
Animerge is a cute, fun and cozy casual game where players merge cute adorable animals, starting from the tiniest mouse, all the way to the majestic elephant! 

Combining these animals playing solo or battling with friends, the cozy Lo-Fi music and hand drawn art create the perfect atmosphere for unwinding. 

Merge, strategize, and relax in this fun and laid-back adventure!

title: Drawer Sort
description: Do you like a cluttered space exactly where everything has its place? It is time to organize your life and become a tidying hero, conquering chaos one drawer at a time.  Be sure to plan ahead for this epic puzzle or you may find yourself with a messier hand than when you started! Each brain training task will challenge you to place various items in the right places. You'll have to aim for perfect precision if you want to make sure the objects fit snugly and achieve the ultimate tidy victory.

title: Feet Doctor Urgency Care
description:
As a podiatrist in this medical simulation game, treat various urgent foot conditions and save patients. As a doctor, you will take care of the patient's feet.
Use all tools to cure them.

title: Bow And Arrow
description:
? Bow and Arrow – Master Your Archery Skills! ?

Step into the world of precision shooting in Bow and Arrow! Test your skills, aim with accuracy, and hit your targets in a variety of exciting levels. Whether you're shooting at moving targets, battling enemies, or competing in archery challenges, this game will put your skills to the test!

title: Ultimate Yatzy
description: Ultimate Yatzy is the classic dice game that delivers endless fun and excitement. Roll five dice to score the best combinations and outsmart your opponents. Whether you're a casual player or a Yatzy pro, this game blends strategy and luck to keep you challenged and entertained. Aim for a Full House, a Straight, or the elusive Yatzy—every roll is a new chance to win.

title: Granny Pills - Defend Cactuses
description:
2075 year. After the invasion of aliens, there was almost no life and oxygen left on Earth. The only plant that survived are cacti. The aliens want to destroy or steal all the cactuses to stop the live on Earth.

The brave Granny who grows her cactuses on the road (so that they can receive rays of light) should protect them from aliens. She discovered that the aliens are afraid of human pills, and she has a huge amount of them, as well as a shotgun loaded in case of emergency.

title: Snake Out
description: Dive into Snake Out – a vibrant puzzle adventure packed with fun and challenges! ?✨ Sharpen your skills, conquer tricky stages, and enjoy endlessly rewarding gameplay. Ideal for casual gamers and puzzle lovers alike! ?

title: Unlock the Bolts
description: Unlock the Bolts is a challenging puzzle game where you carefully remove screws to solve mechanical puzzles. Each level tests your logic and precision as you figure out the correct order to unlock the bolts. In special levels, the stakes are even higher—you must free trapped animals by unlocking the right bolts! With satisfying mechanics and engaging challenges, this game will keep you thinking and entertained. Can you master every puzzle and rescue the animals in need?

title: Stunt Multiplayer Arena
description:
Go solo in a free roam challenge where you can pull off incredible stunts like front and backflips. Navigate icy and dirt tracks as you push various vehicles to their limits.

In the multiplayer derby mode, choose your vehicle—whether it's a car, truck, or van—and engage in a fierce survival derby. Compete against all other vehicles in an intense, smashing battle. 

Jump into the action today and see if you have what it takes to rule the arena!

title: My Cake Shop: Bake & Serve
description: Run your own sweet bakery in My Cake Shop! Bake and stack colorful donuts, clean messy floors, and serve hungry customers. Expand across the world by unlocking new bakery locations and upgrading machines. Manage crowds, grow your patisserie empire, and become the ultimate idle arcade tycoon!

title: Fury Tanks
description: Beyond the hills and forests, war waits in silence. When it starts, it’s you, your tank and the enemy in your sights. Build your armor, power up your cannon and let instinct guide your aim. When the ground shakes, make sure it’s because you fired first.

title: Room Sort Floor Plan
description: Room Sort Floor Plan is a fun creative puzzle game with elements of sorting and design. In this casual game, you’ll go through proper sorting and organization. Designing the perfect layout for every room. Rearrange the floor plan to create your unique home. Each level is a jigsaw puzzle challenge.

title: Yummy Trails
description: Can you help the hungry snake navigate the tastiest trail of all? The path may be tricky, but the reward is delicious. Test your brain and relax.

title: 1945 Air Force Space Shooter
description: Prepare for nonstop action in 1945 Air Force: Space Shooter! Inspired by the classic shooter era, this game combines vintage visuals with thrilling bulletstorm gameplay that will test your reflexes and precision.Fly through endless waves of enemy aircraft. Avoid storms of bullets and unleash devastating firepower from your Force fighter.

title: Cricket Clash Pong
description:
Get ready to swing, hit, and defend in Cricket Clash Pong, an exhilarating blend of classic Pong gameplay and the beloved sport of cricket. This game promises endless hours of fun, challenging players to master the art of the digital pitch with a dynamic twist on traditional gameplay.

Exciting Features:
Multiple Game Modes: Whether you’re in the mood for a quick match or a full-blown tournament, Cricket Clash Pong has a mode to suit every player

title: Sprunki
description: Sprunki is a casual music game that lets you craft unique soundscapes. This modded version of Incredibox by NyankoBfLolCombine gives you DJ control to mix loops, vocals, beats, and melodies, pretty much creating your own musical style.
genre: Basketball, Bike, Car, Casual, Controller, Browser Game

title: Build A Queen 2025
description: In Build a Queen 2025, you will embark on a fun journey to become a real queen. You will need to make your way through different platform levels with your opponents. Choose outfits, skin colors, and more according to your goals. Dress up in the most glamorous queen look, meet the prince, and win. You can collect money to unlock more dance steps.

title: School Teacher Game School Day
description: Enter the world of teaching in School Teacher Simulator! Manage classrooms, inspire students, and experience the daily challenges of education. Plan lessons, grade assignments, and engage with students to create a dynamic learning environment. Customize your teaching style and watch as your students grow and learn. Are you ready to become the ultimate educator?

title: L.O.L. Surprise Game Zone
description: Hi, B.B.s, welcome to the big city of L.O.L. Surprise! where you will visit the coolest shops, full of games and surprises.

title: Smash Defense
description: Smash Defense is a chaotic baseball-inspired action game where your swings decide the fate of entire worlds. Crush waves of flying monsters using your bat and evolve your ball with fiery, electric, and explosive powers. Travel through dynamic environments like deep oceans and erupting volcanoes, upgrade your skills, and prove you’re the ultimate monster-slaying champion.

title: Merge Combo
description: Immerse yourself in this captivating merge puzzle game! Combine matching blocks to score points and trigger epic combos. The more blocks you merge, the bigger the numbers and combos grow! Test your strategy and aim for the highest score—how large a number can you create?

title: Block Blast 2048
description: Block Blast 2048 is a fun and addictive puzzle game where you merge blocks with the same number to create higher values. Keep merging to boost your score and face increasing challenges. How far can you go? Can you reach the ultimate block? Play now and test your puzzle skills!

title: Face Changes
description: Face Changer is a fun puzzle game in which you have to correctly put together different faces in order to move to the next level or achieve new and better results in the training mode.

title: SPRUNKI GETS SURGERY
description:
SPRUNKI GETS SURGERY ??

OREN, a genius (but reckless) surgeon, must save PINKI after a brutal facial injury—without anesthesia! As more SPRUNKIS like TUNNER, shot in the head, flood the ER, OREN races against time. But lurking in the shadows is BLACK, ready to turn OREN’s mission into a nightmare. Will OREN save them all, or will BLACK end it in tragedy?

title: Port Shipping Tycoon
description: Embark on a thrilling adventure as you build your own shipping empire in this addictive tile-flipping game! With just one click, start constructing your port business by flipping tiles to supply resources to bustling ports around the world.

title: Maze Escape Toilet Rush
description: What's the most urgent situation you can imagine? Of course, it is the last second of finding a toilet. In Maze Escape: Toilet Rush, you'll have a nervous and hilarious maze escape. Each level is a brand-new maze. You need to find the best route to the toilet quickly. Use your logic and intelligence to reach your destination successfully.

title: Pull the Pin: Fish Rescue!
description: Pull the Pin: Fish Rescue! is a relaxing and addictive puzzle game with lots of interesting puzzles. You will see several niches in it. They will be separated by partitions. In one niche you will see a fish, and in another water. You will need to carefully study everything and pull the pin. Thus, you will open it and water will get to the fish.

title: The Basement isn't THAT haunted
description:
A puzzle game about finding things in a messy basement and avoiding paranormal danger.

As a cute little bunny you look through the boxes stored in the basement and try not to open the ones with ghosts inside.

title: Bubble Race Party
description:
Cute characters race on the platform to collect water drops and fill the pools. To use the aquapark slides you need to fill the mini pools. Collect water drops and try to knock down the opponents. To get better, you can use bombs, booster boxes and doors that give positive bonuses. Try to finish first in this fun race!

Game Features:
- Colorful and fun map designs
- 1 and 2 Player game modes
- Different hats available for characters
- Surprise bonuses and game mechanics

title: Timewalker: Survive!
description: Time Walker: Survive – Embark on a thrilling journey through apocalyptic landscapes in this fast-paced 2D top-down survival game! As a Timewalker, battle relentless hordes of zombies across different eras, fighting for survival against increasingly intense waves of the undead.

title: Grass Land
description: Grass Land is a vibrant exploration game that drops you into a sprawling world of thick greenery and hidden surprises. Take control of your grass cutter, uncover valuable resources beneath the overgrowth, and build up your base as you roam the fields. Stay sharp, move fast, and make the most of every patch of grass you find.

title: GunFu Stickman 2
description:
Armed with a pistol in each hand, take control of the famous Stickman from the "Gun Fu" series and blast through hordes of enemies!

Reflexes and reaction times will be challenged and put to the test as the never-ending onslaught gets faster and faster!

Unlock more deadly guns and outfits, and customize your Stickman to suit your style!

title: Neko's Adventure
description: Neko’s Adventure is a vibrant platformer starring Neko, a playful cat trying to rescue his girlfriend. Explore 20 challenging levels, unlock the Power Beam to shoot fire, and face quirky enemies in a whimsical, fast-paced adventure full of charm, excitement, and cartoon fun!

title: Jungle Match Adventures
description: Jungle Match Adventures is a brand-new Match-3 game set deep in the lush Amazon Rainforest. Join the fearless explorer Aria as she uncovers hidden treasures, ancient relics, and precious gems buried in the jungle. Match colorful stones and nature-themed items, solve fun and challenging puzzles, and unlock secrets along the way. Take part in Daily and Weekly Challenges, enjoy Daily Surprises, and progress through hundreds of exciting levels in this unforgettable jungle adventure.

title: Street Racing: Moto Drift
description:
Become the king of drifting! Win extreme street motorcycle races, escape from the police and make your way to victory!

**Feel the extreme and drive:** Incredible motorcycle races, chases, drifting and crazy stunts are waiting for you. Feel the drive, enjoy the speed, make exciting drifts and win the race!

**Avoid the chase:** Beware of the police who are trying to catch you!

title: Jello Bubbles
description: Classic Match 3 Bubble Shooter Game with jello balls, challenges, a nice bird and a fantastic heroine. Enjoy with lots of fun levels travelling around the world.

title: Mergest Kingdom
description: Mergest Kingdom is a merge puzzle and match-3 game where you create your kingdom by combining items in threes. Match resources to unlock new items, complete quests, and grow your land.
genre: Basketball, Bike, Car, Casual, Controller, Browser Game

title: Spider Solitaire
description: Get ready to dive into the timeless classic Spider Solitaire, reimagined for mobile with sleek design and intuitive gameplay! Perfect for players of all skill levels, this game offers a relaxing yet challenging card puzzle experience anytime, anywhere.

title: Ninja Spell Match
description: Ninja Spell Match is a fast-paced blend of match-3 puzzling and ninja action. Connect tiles to charge up your attacks and unleash devastating moves against waves of enemies. With each level, the challenge grows tougher as you fight your way through 30 unique stages packed with traps, puzzles, and rival ninjas. Think fast, match smart, and strike hard—your reflexes and strategy are the only way to survive.

title: Coin Empire
description: Embark on a journey of idle empire building in Coin Empire, where you'll construct your empire with gold, utilizing a slot machine mechanic to earn resources, engage in strategic actions like attacking settlements or looting for crystals, unlock powerful heroes such as Iron Musk or Thor, and progress through ages as you expand your dominion. Build your base, and be the slots coin master!

title: Winter Tetrix Trails
description:
Winter Tetrix Trails is a relaxing shape-filling puzzle game set in a snowy world.
Drag and place colorful Tetris-style blocks to complete each unique silhouette — think carefully, fit perfectly, and enjoy the magic of winter puzzles!

title: Math Master
description: Unleash your inner math whiz! Math Master turns numbers into art—solve fun math problems to unlock drawing tools, sketch colorful shapes, and bring numerical puzzles to life. Perfect for learners and creativity lovers alike!

title: Moto Stunts Driving & Racing
description: Moto Stunts Driving & Racing is a typical motorcycle-racing balanced game with 2D cartoon riders. On side-scrolling platform tracks, you need to arrive at the finish as fast as you can in both Racing Mode and Level Mode while keeping your rider alive. Try to earn coins and buy a new motorcycle first, the initial bike can only help you complete the game instead of making a new record for better rewards.

title: Build and Crush
description: Build and Crush is a multiplayer game in which you can, you guessed it, build and crush stuff. Choose your own fun!
genre: Basketball, Bike, Car, Casual, Controller, Browser Game

title: Math Box Balance
description: Math Box Balance is a puzzle game with numbers. Early levels have 2 boxes, and as you progress you can reach up to 8 boxes. Each box contains 4 number blocks, and the sum of these numbers is shown inside the box. Your goal is to make the sum of all boxes equal. You can swap number blocks between boxes to achieve the equal sum. It is an endless game where the difficulty increases over time, your score goes up, and the fun grows with it.

title: Block LEGENDS!
description:
Drag and match blocks!
Block LEGENDS! is a casual puzzle game, where you drag and arrange blocks on a board. Once you form a line, either horizontally or vertically, you clear that line, and along with that, you may find - diamonds, bombs and score multipliers! 
Finish missions - earn rewards! Missions reset every few minutes, so keep the grind on!?
Once you have enough diamonds, you can buy Bombs and NUKES☢️!  You can use these powerups to breeze through levels!

Made with ❤️ by Realinspirer

title: Money Chaser- City Parkour Game
description:
Chasing/Running eldnlessly for collecting coins(Money).
Try to avoid traps & *kick out all the enemy/competitors on your way.
*You can kick out enemy infront of you with slide skill*

After you have enough money, you can challenge the Boss fight.
The amount of coins(Money Bullets) is the only weapon to defeat Boss, the more the better.

Remember, no money no life...just keep running :)

title: Bomby
description: Launch into fun with Bomby Birds, a slingshot arcade game inspired by the style of Angry Birds! Pull, aim, and fling your bird through tricky levels filled with blocks and obstacles. Perfect for students searching cool math games, bird games, or quick school break fun. With addictive gameplay, silly physics, and nonstop action, Bomby is the ultimate free kids game for anyone who loves arcade challenges and slingshot adventures!

title: Safe Merge
description: A simple idle merge game, you need to merge safes with same design to make a safe more powerfull, you need to unlock all design to win the game, the design are in the right, if the game was hard you can do prestige to win more money per cicle.

title: Land Cruiser Offroad Driver
description: Take your cute dog along for a thrilling offroading adventure, and complete 4 awesome game modes across the city map with your awesome SUV. Customize and Upgrade it to your liking and ride in style across the giant offroading map. If you create nuisance in the city, the cops will be on your tail to chase you down. Drift the tires off the SUV and make as much money as you can. Are you ready for this thrilling adventure?

title: Break a Lucky Egg Brainrots
description: Break a Lucky Egg Brainrots is a fast-paced collection and action game where risk and strategy meet. Break eggs, collect valuable characters, and return safely to your base before time runs out.
genre: Basketball, Bike, Car, Casual, Controller, Browser Game

title: Taylor Dress Studio Preppy & Wild West & Glam
description: Welcome to the dress-up game, in which the pop diva tries on three completely different fashionable looks: a youthful preppy bow, a cowboy outfit and a glamorous stage look. In addition, you can experiment with hairstyles and change the makeup of the heroine. Complete the images with accessories: glasses, hats and jewelry. Choose clothes and combine elements from different sets to create delicate, daring or superstar bows. Turn Taylor into an icon of any style!

title: Delivery Chaos
description: Delivery Chaos is a fast-paced driving game where explosions turn every delivery into a challenge! Navigate through explosive mayhem, collecting waypoints to rack up coins and boost your score. Outmaneuver destruction, and unlock powerful new vehicles and exciting map areas. Can you survive the chaos and become the ultimate delivery driver?

title: Domino Online Multiplayer
description:
Do you like strategy, excitement and duel battles? You will find different modes, flexible settings and strong opponents.

Variety of modes:
With a computer – hone your skills against AI of varying difficulty
Online Duels - fight with live players in real time
Play with a friend – send a link and play together, even from a distance
On one screen – convenient for pair battles at home

Every game is a challenge, and every move is a step towards victory!

title: Mental Hospital Escape
description: Mental Hospital Escape is an exciting hide-and-seek game. In total, it contains two modes, doctor and patient. If you choose a doctor, you need to capture all the patients within the time limit. If you are patient, you need to run as hard as you can in the time limit, climb rocks, dodge chases, and survive!

title: Solitaire Farm Seasons 4
description: Solitaire Farm: Seasons 4 is here with over 3,800+ levels and fresh adventures! Explore beautiful new maps like Greenland, South Korea, Sumatra, and Nepal while growing unique crops such as Mountain Avens, Ginkgo, Durian, Flax, and Orchids. With new level packs, seasonal events, and charming visuals, this relaxing solitaire journey is more exciting than ever. Ready to train your brain and enjoy country life? Dive into the adventure now!

title: Obby Tower
description:
Climb. Think. Survive.

Ascend a towering obstacle course filled with tricky jumps, moving platforms — and surprise math challenges! Combine your parkour skills with quick thinking to make it to the top.

Perfect for players who love obbies and want to test both reflexes and brainpower.

title: Cubica
description:
Get lost in a tranquil atmosphere with Cubica, a fun puzzle game designed to relax with a simple brain teaser. It's very simple! Blast blocks of identical colored cubes to make them disappear, making room for new ones. No rush, no complicated rules, just enjoy the game.
Immerse yourself in soft colors, pleasant sounds, and smooth gameplay that will allow you to forget about the hustle and bustle.

title: Slenderman Back to School
description: On a very mysterious night you wake up and find yourself trapped in your high school, a town in Massachusetts, and you will have to survive until dawn and escape from the urban legend Slenderman. In Slenderman Back to School, a 3D online game, you will be able to feel the adrenaline that a horror game feels like.

title: Furry Wedding Proposal
description: Hi, young stylist! You will find a very unusual couple in love - a brutal fox and a feminine bunny - who are preparing for their future wedding. They dream of looking stunning on this holiday and you will become their main assistant in this exciting adventure! You have to dress the characters in beautiful wedding dresses, choose stylish hairstyles for them and apply light makeup. Create, fantasize and create a fairy tale!

title: Boat Mania
description: Play Boat Racing Mania free online and hit the waves in a high-speed browser game you can play instantly with no download and no install. Race rival captains, collect upgrades, and master tight turns in a skill-based challenge that feels like a fast reflex brain game. This unblocked game loads fast and runs smoothly at school or home, perfect for quick breaks. Fully mobile-friendly and optimized for desktop and mobile, it’s a free online game built for nonstop water racing action anytime.

title: Shotting Balls
description: In this fun game, you'll have to use your skills to destroy all the black blocks you find in each level in order to advance to the next one. But that's not all: you'll also have to avoid losing the ball, because if it leaves the screen, you'll lose a life and, ultimately, the game. On the other hand, you can also collect gems, which will allow you to obtain new skins to give your ball a new look.

title: Words with Prof. Wisely
description:
ind words by connecting letters. Improve your attentiveness, train your brain!

Keep in mind - some crosswords will be difficult to solve.

title: Granny 2 asylum horror house
description:
Play this chilling 3D game Granny 2 asylum horror house this game is the continuation of the famous Granny game, a horror game, escape, shoot, collect items. This time you will appear inside an abandoned asylum, you will have some clues to complete and survive.

Move around the asylum, don't stop moving because they will find you at any moment. If you don't have time, you can hide in the closets and not make noises.

title: Unicorn Find The Differences
description: Unicorn Find The Differences is a magical spot-the-difference game designed to test your observation skills and bring a bit of fantasy into your day! Each level offers beautifully crafted images with subtle differences that make every game exciting and engaging. Perfect for both kids and adults, this game is a delightful way to relax, challenge your attention to detail, and enjoy charming unicorn illustrations. See if you can spot all the differences and reach the next level of mythical fun!

title: Fish Story 4
description: Fish Story 4 returns with its biggest underwater Match-3 adventure yet! Dive into over 4,500+ colorful levels packed with fun challenges, clever puzzles, and sparkling ocean treasures. Join your friend Mermaid on Daily Missions to earn coins, boosters, and special rewards every time you play. Take part in exciting Treasure Hunt events and uncover hidden pirate loot beneath the waves. Relax, match, and explore the deep blue sea!

title: Horror Playtime Room Escape
description: Challenge your brain to break through the fog of horror. In Horror Playtime - Room Escape you will enter a mysterious story. You spend your birthday with Ye Chen on the roof of a building. The strange woman suddenly appeared and trapped you in a horrible room. Enter many rooms full of puzzles and horror! Use your brain to solve hidden things and uncover the truth of horror stories. Every detail in the room is full of mystery.

title: Obby Prison Run
description: Obby Prison Run is an intense obstacle course game where escape is the only option—and survival is everything. Sprint, leap, and dodge through deadly traps and twisted takes on classic childhood games. Outsmart your rivals and stay ahead in the race for freedom, where every second counts and only the sharpest make it out alive.

title: Words Match
description: This catchy combo of word search and spelling bee lets you create thousands of words with different lengths. Try to improve your score while hitting the targets presented in every unique level, and upgrade your word tiles to keep progressing! Relax and train your brain at the same time - can you pass all the levels in Words Match?

title: HexaFill
description: This is a relaxing hex-grid puzzle game where you connect paths, fill cells, and solve unique levels without overlaps or dead ends

title: The Zombie House
description:
Protect your home from endless waves of zombies!
Defeat zombies to collect coins and ability drops.
Use coins to upgrade both your player and your house.
Each level makes the zombies stronger.
How long can you survive?

title: Toilet Rush
description: You have to help the boy and girl who want to go to the toilet to find their way. They should not encounter obstacles and their paths should not overlap while going to the toilet. You can achieve this by making drawings. You can get help from the "Hint" button when you have difficulty. Don't forget to try other "Skins" in the game.

title: Man Runner 2048
description: Man Runner 2048 is a casual arcade game where your objective is to run and merge men till you reach 2048. Your goal is to get the highest score on each round, because at the end of the level, you will get a chance to shoot a giant monster.
genre: Basketball, Bike, Car, Casual, Controller, Browser Game

title: Shoot And Drive
description:
Radiation is spreading all over the world. People are going crazy, a tough battle for life continues.
After falling into the trap of bandits along with your crewmates, you’ll have to fight to the end. And your best ‘friends’ — a rusty gun and a car that’s about to stall — will come to your aid.

title: Sudoku Brain Blocks
description: Sudoku Brain Blocks is a relaxing yet addictive online puzzle game that blends classic Sudoku logic with block-fitting challenges (Tetris style). Drag and drop various shaped blocks onto a 9×9 grid to complete full rows, columns, or 3×3 squares to clear the board and earn high scores. Use strategy and planning to avoid running out of space and test your brain with every move!

title: Draw The Weapon
description: Draw The Weapon is a free online action and drawing game for boys played on PuzzleGame. The game is divided into two parts. First, you need to draw your weapons with limited ink. Next, enter the battlefield, and then shoot the enemy down the cliff with weapons to win the battle. In addition to a variety of weapons, we also provide wonderful skins for you, Mobile, Tablet, and Desktop are playable!

title: Football Duel
description: Step into the arena in Football Duel! Take turns shooting and goalkeeping in this thrilling 3D penalty showdown. Swipe to score or defend — the first to 5 goals claims victory!

title: Sort Master
description: Get ready to bring order to the chaos in Sort Master, a relaxing yet addictive online puzzle game. Test your logic and observation skills as you sort, match, and organize a variety of fun challenges — from colors to everyday objects. Whether you’re playing on your phone or computer, enjoy the satisfying feeling of tidying up and completing each level with perfection. Play for free and become the ultimate Sort Master!

title: Car OUT! Jam Parking Puzzle
description: Car OUT! Jam Parking Puzzle is a puzzle game that challenges you to maneuver cars and passengers through clever, obstacle-filled levels.
genre: Basketball, Bike, Car, Casual, Controller, Browser Game

title: Disk Rush
description: Disk Rush is a reaction-based arcade game where players must quickly sort colored disks into their matching zones. The game challenges your speed and accuracy as disks appear faster over time. With simple tap mechanics and increasing difficulty, Disk Rush tests your ability to think and act quickly under pressure.

title: Cunning Ginger
description: Cunning Ginger is a super fun game that'll give you lots of excitement and intense emotions! The game follows the adventures of a cute red cat, Ginger, as he goes on a great journey around the world. He's catching falling food items and dodging all sorts of dangerous things along the way. Your goal in the game is to help Ginger explore the world and pick up as many goodies as possible. But beware - there are tons of dangerous obstacles that could harm your furry friend.

title: BFFs Luxury Loungewear
description: Get ready to style your way to comfort in the BFFs Luxury Loungewear game! Join the fun with Riri, Elsa, Polka, and Bonnie, each with a unique wardrobe.
